Your creation is just as important as the works of Graphia. Not a single innocent soul was lost on this day because of your protection.
遥想烬土纪元时的那位画师之祖，她在创造画中世界时，难道会在意手中挥出每一笔的艺术价值吗？
Looking back to the ancestral painter of the Cindearth Age, do you truly think she cared about the artistic value of each stroke when she created World in Canvas?
啧，我在胡说什么呢…一点艺术门外汉的锐评，别放心上。我走了！
Tsk, but what do I know... These are just crude observations from an amateur, so pay them no mind. I'll be on my way!
<color=#dbc291ff>——那道在数百年前，吞下了丰饶令使「倏忽」的影子。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That very shadow that devoured Shuhu, the Emanator of Abundance, hundreds of years ago.</color>
感觉，经历了好不真实的一天。
This entire day has felt... unreal.
事情一件一件地发生，需要解决的危机也越来越大。
We had situations lined up one after another, and a growing crisis on our hands.
幸研会竟然真的疯狂到了染指丰饶的力量。也不知到底有多少人接受了「幸福手术」……
The Research Society is insane to meddle with the power of Abundance. There's no telling how many have already undergone the Happiness Surgery...
满愿，明明她也亲眼目睹了告死魔带来的惨剧，但十五年后，她却成为了新告死魔的制造者。
Fulwish witnessed the tragedy caused by the Herald of Death fifteen years ago, and now she herself has assumed that dreadful mantle.
我们得尽快将情报告诉丹恒、星期日和爻光将军。
We have to relay this information to Dan Heng, Sunday, and General Yao Guang as soon as possible.
满愿真的以为自己能赢？
Does Fulwish really think she could win?
她是在向这个世界宣战。
Fulwish is declaring war against this world.
自己究竟在面对什么样的敌人，满愿不可能不清楚这一点。
Fulwish is definitely aware of the enemies she's facing.
事到如今，我们更要赢得谒见阿哈的机会，至少要阻止她赢得游戏的胜利。
That is why we must win an audience with Aha. At the very least, we need to stop Fulwish from winning the game.
是啊，要是幸福微笑研究会成功了…光是想想就觉得那画面很可怕。
Yeah. The thought of the Research Society of Happy Smiles going through with their plan gives me the chills...
忙碌了一天，大家应该都累了，抓紧这短暂的和平时间，好好休息一下吧。我要先回列车和瓦尔特汇合了，小三月、{NICKNAME}，你们呢？
It's been a long day, and all of you must be very tired. Take this chance to get some proper rest. I'll go meet Welt back on the Express. March, {NICKNAME}, what about you?
疲惫的时刻，最好的充电方式就是虚度时间，我先留在外面呼吸点新鲜空气吧。
The best way to recharge is to waste time, so I'm staying outside for some fresh air.
正好，我也想在街头转转。
Sounds good. I was thinking of heading to the streets for a walk.
——真的，刚才月亮发笑了——我只是来凑凑热闹的——你听错了吧？
I wasn't kidding. The moon was laughing... I'm just here to join the fun... I bet you misheard it...
快看，天上的月亮…好像确实有点不对劲！
Look at the moon in the sky... Something is definitely wrong with it!
喂喂，地上的聪明人和笨蛋们，小朋友和大朋友们，愚者和伶人们，大家能听见吗？
Hey there! All the smarties and dummies, children and adults, Fools and entertainers, can you all hear me?
…我就说嘛，占卜所得这个世界异于常情的「凶命」，一定是有解释的。
...I knew it. There must be an explanation for the unusual fate of this world.
循踪失雀影，得窥灵木春。多亏了这只小鸟，这不就找到了幻月游戏的根柢所在了吗？
Though I lost sight of the sparrow, I discovered a mysterious tree. I've finally found the heart of the Phantasmoon Games, thanks to this little birdie.
（星期日先生，你能感应到我吗？）
这鸟儿到底是怎么了，毫无反应？
There's no reaction from the bird. What's wrong with it?
Hello? Is anyone there? Can I get somebody here?
骗人，我明明透过鸟儿的眼睛瞧见这儿躲着个漂亮姑娘啊。你是谁？
That's a lie. I saw a pretty girl hiding right here through the bird's eyes. Who are you?
That's none of your business... None of your business...
既然这样，那就别怪本座说话不客气了。
If that's how it's going to be, then I'm done playing nice here.
<color=#dbc291ff>如果我所见无误，扎根在此的这株古木，应该就是丰饶「建木」吧？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If my eyes weren't playing tricks on me, the ancient tree here must be the Ambrosial Arbor of Abundance, yes?</color>
小姑娘，要继续躲起来装神弄鬼，还是好好出来和我谈谈？
Little girl, are you going to keep playing hide-and-seek, or will you come out and have a proper conversation with me?
「异常防御部」的人三天两头地往这儿跑，记录游戏进展也就罢了。现在连我的行藏都被无关的外人发现了…我想，我真的应该搬家了。
The Department of Aberration Defense often comes here to record game progress, and now my movements have been exposed to complete outsiders... I suppose it's time to leave.
你这人说话口气凶巴巴的，但念在你眼光不坏，能一眼瞧出我来历的份上，我就好好同你聊上几句。
You sound unpleasant to talk to, but since you have eyes keen enough to tell what I am at a glance, I'll have a short chat with you.
我可以回答你三个问题，开口问吧，三个问题一过，我就要动手逐客咯。
I will answer three questions, so ask away. Once you have your answers, I'm going to show you the door.
我本想问…为何{RUBY_B#阿哈}常乐天君{RUBY_E#}会默许一株丰饶建木在祂所赐福的世界里生根发芽，但料想以祂百无禁忌的性格，也没什么允不允许的。

I wanted to question why the {RUBY_B#Aha}Joyseeker{RUBY_E#} would permit the Ambrosial Arbor of Abundance to take root in a world they had blessed, but given their carefree nature, there was probably never any restriction to begin with.
那么第二个问题，你究竟是这哈托彼亚土生土长的灵物，还是…由建木赋形点化的长生种？
On my second question, are you a Faekind native to Ahatopia, or are you... one of the long-life species shaped by the Ambrosial Arbor?
你不是很擅长卜卦望气嘛，能替我看看吗？我头上悬着的签是吉是凶？
Aren't you good at divination? Can you help me take a look whether the slip on my head says weal or woe?
你的头顶除了那对耳朵，空无一物。
There's nothing on your head except your ears.
And that itself is the answer.
我是主持「幻月游戏」胜负的仲裁者。我是这世界上汹涌的欢欣之力，亦是它的生命脉动本身。
I am the arbitrator who determines the outcome of the Phantasmoon Games. I am the raging waves of joy and the living pulse of this world.
仙舟的卜者，你所见吉凶，不过是我掌中飘落的一瓣落花——朝生暮死，转瞬成尘。而真正的我，乃是容纳这「一瞬」与「永恒」的…镇世神木。

Diviner of the Xianzhou, the weal and woe you behold are but a single petal fallen from my hand. It blooms with the morning and withers by evening, reducing to dust in a fleeting moment. My true form is the Panarch Elwood, the embodiment of "instant" and "eternity."
有趣，想出这些词儿花了不少时间吧。
Interesting. Took you quite some time to come up with those words, huh?
创造我的那家伙说了，这些话说出来多半没人会信。啧，还真被祂说中了……
The one who created me did say most people wouldn't believe me. Tch, turns out THEY were right...
我信。我和你同病相怜。因为卜者的话，从来也是信者寥寥。何况你的额顶并未悬着吉凶签，这意味着——你的命数超越凡人的吉凶之变。自打来到这儿，我已见着一例。

I believe you. I feel the same way, for many do not trust the words of a diviner. Besides, no weal or woe has befallen you, which means your fate cannot be determined like that of ordinary mortals. You're not the first one I've met with this condition since my arrival here.
你还剩下最后一个问题。
既然你自认是丰饶孽物…那是否该好好解释一下，这个世界居民头上所悬的凶命……
Since you admit to being an abomination of Abundance... Shouldn't you explain the fate of this world's residents...?
…莫非是你的手笔？若你口吐的答案不能教我信服——
...Unless they are your doing? If your answer fails to convince me...
等我一支帝弓箭符召来天上的光矢，一切可就来不及咯？
It may be too late by the time I summon the Lux Arrow from the sky with the Reignbow.
冷静，冷静！这样的玩笑可开不得。
Chill out! You shouldn't make jokes like this.
我没你这般能掐会算的本事，你突然说起什么大吉大凶的事，又问这问那的，我也很茫然啊……
I'm not as skilled at divination as you are. When you suddenly speak of the great weal or woe and interrogate me, I get confused too...
毕竟，这「幻月游戏」背后的种种规则、变数，不都是某位神明一时兴起的结果嘛……
After all, isn't every rule and every variable of the Phantasmoon Games dictated by the impulse of some god?
要说眼下这风雨欲来的局势…我们不妨好好聊聊——
As for the brewing storm... let's settle down and discuss...
——会不会是某个混蛋乐子神又唯恐天下不乱了？
Whether the turmoil once again is the result of the Laughter's mischief?
片刻后，城市的某个角落……
Moments later, in some corner of the city...
我也实在很难相信自己居然会回头找你，尤其是在知道你想把我卖给真珠后……
It's hard to believe that I came back for you, especially after learning that you wanted to sell me out to Pearl...
感谢大自然的馈赠，行走的六十一亿赏金又出现了。
Gotta thanks nature's gift. The <unbreak>6.1</unbreak> billion credits reward has appeared again.
幸好，我跳过了你这中间商，和那个智械达成交易了。很遗憾，我现在的悬赏是，零。
Fortunately, I bypassed you and struck a deal with that Intellitron instead. Regrettably, my current bounty stands at zero.
你每次都会把上门的主顾卖给警方吗？真是把路走窄了，难怪客人那么少。
Do you always turn your customers over to the police? How impressively short-sighted. No wonder your clientele is so small.
论把路走窄，谁也比不上为「命运的奴隶」奔走的星核猎手，不是吗？你们可是一条道奔着「终末」的方向，谁都拉不回来啊。
Speaking of short-sightedness, no one rivals the Stellaron Hunters, a.k.a. Destiny's Slaves, isn't it? You are all fated to march toward the Finality, and nothing can stop you.
恰恰相反，我们的路有许多条——只要{RUBY_B#艾利欧}那家伙{RUBY_E#}看得见。
On the contrary, there are many paths for us, as long as {RUBY_B#Elio}that person{RUBY_E#} can see.
也就是说，这趟行动，他看不见你们在这个世界的命运轨迹？
In other words, he can't see the trajectory of your destiny in this world during this mission?
翁法罗斯的消息我听说了。「列神之战」已成不可避免的定局…公司也好，列车也罢，都在为这无法预测的未来奔走。
I've heard what befell Amphoreus. The war among the Aeons is now inevitable... Whether it's the IPC or the Express, they are fighting for an uncertain future.
而在这个被欢愉瞩目的世界里，也将面临不止一位星神的干涉。所以，就连命运的奴隶也无法看清前路。
And in the world where the Elation is the Center of Attention, there will eventually be more than one Aeon interfering. Even a Destiny's Slave would not be able to see the path ahead.
Keep guessing. We're getting pretty close.
猜个屁，要我说这颗星球立刻改名亚德丽芬还来得及。
Enough of your games. I'd say it's not too late to rename the planet Adlivun.
别这么绝望嘛，大叔。我可是有备而来的…但我也需要人搭把手。
It's still too early to despair, old man. I came prepared... but I could use a helping hand.
三千万信用点，先款后活。
不是吧，看在老朋友的面子上，打个折呗。0信用点，如何？
Come on, give your friend a discount, will you? Say... zero credits?
It's been too long, Mr. La Mancha.
——我真的听见了——是你听错了吧？
No, I heard it... You must have misheard...
哎，我已经累得连凑热闹的劲儿都没了，你要是想玩就去吧，我在这儿等你。
Hey, I'm too tired to join in the fun. Go ahead if you want to play. I'll wait here for you.
满愿背后的支持者…这场幻月游戏，或许早就被更危险的人物盯上了。
Fulwish's partner.... Perhaps someone far more dangerous has already set their sights on this round of the Phantasmoon Games.
Oh no, they are definitely up to no good.
系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>47</unbreak>分<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，你很准时，卡芙卡。
{RUBY_B#星核猎手}艾利欧{RUBY_E#}看见的未来是不会出错的。刚刚的爆炸是怎么回事，这也在他的「剧本」里吗？
{RUBY_B#Stellaron Hunter}Elio{RUBY_E#} always tells the exact future. So what's with the explosion just now? Was that also part of his script?
在，「系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>44</unbreak>分<unbreak>59</unbreak>秒，爆炸产生的脉冲造成了主控系统的大面积瘫痪。」
Uh-huh — "<unbreak>23</unbreak>:<unbreak>44</unbreak>:<unbreak>59</unbreak> system time: The pulses from the explosion cause a massive breakdown from the master control system."
「反物质军团」干的，它们在两个系统时前全面入侵了空间站。
No, the Antimatter Legion did it. They completely invaded the space station two system hours ago.
我们需要和军团交手么？
*whistle* Alright, so do we need to fight the Legion?
不知道，艾利欧没有说，那这件事就不重要。
I dunno. Elio didn't say anything about it, so it doesn't matter.
明白了～那么从现在开始，行动由我接手。
Got it. So from now on, I'll be in charge of this operation.
收到。这次能让我玩得开心点吗？之前的几次行动都很无聊呢。
Copy. Can you let me have some fun this time? Our last few operations turned out to be pretty dull.
抱歉，今天的任务非常枯燥：仅仅是把目标「放进去」而已。
...Sorry, I'm afraid there's not much I can do for you — our task this time is just to "place" the target properly.
——但想要找什么乐子，我都不会拦着你。毕竟……
But if you wanna go look for some fun yourself, I won't stop you. I mean, after all...
这空间站的主人是黑塔吧？那个「天才俱乐部」第<unbreak>83</unbreak>席。她的防御系统好对付么？
So the owner of this space station is Herta, No. <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society, right? Is her security system easy to crack?
有一点点棘手。但「军团」的入侵让这儿的主控系统瘫痪了几分钟，省了我不少工夫。
Not really. But the Legion's invasion paralyzed the master control system for a few minutes, which was a big help.
既然被星神「{RUBY_B#纳努克}毁灭{RUBY_E#}」盯上了，这座空间站的寿命也快到头了。
I guess this space station is about to meet its doom now that it's become a target of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Nanook}Destruction{RUBY_E#}.
到头不了，这任务还有后续…你都不看「剧本」么？
...No, it isn't. There's a sequel to this mission... You didn't read the script?
你知道我的，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。艾利欧也知道，所以他只会告诉我哪些是不能做的。
...You know me, I hate being told what to do. Elio knows this too, so he normally just tells me what's off-limits.
比如干掉这儿的所有人。
好啦好啦，你把它丢哪去了，银狼？
*sigh* Yeah, yeah. Where did you send it, Silver Wolf?
随手打的坐标，没什么讲究。你很关心那只虚卒的去向吗？
Some random coordinates, not important. You care about where that Voidranger ended up?
不关心啊～只是不管看几次我都会想，你的手段还真是不可思议~
Of course not~ I'm just amazed at this fancy technique of yours, as usual.
修改现实数据而已，不值一提的小把戏。
Just a little trick of tampering with the data of reality, I wouldn't call it fancy.
你刚刚看什么东西那么津津有味？也给我瞧瞧？
What were you looking at so intently just now? Let me see.
黑塔的玩具，空间站收藏的「奇物」目录。里边有很多有趣的东西。
Herta's toys, a catalog featuring the space station's collection of rare items. They've got a lot of interesting gadgets.
有一把枪，能给它准星里出现的生物打分，从0到<unbreak>100</unbreak>不等。
There's this gun, it can rate any creature within its crosshair as a score from 0 to <unbreak>100</unbreak>.
你不好奇自己会得多少分吗？…我还挺想知道的。
Aren't you curious about how much you would score? I kinda wanna know mine.
好啊，要是顺路的话就去玩一下吧～目标地点在哪儿？
Fine, I guess we can swing by and play with it if it's not too far. What's our destination?
沿着左边门后的回廊继续深入，有个放置了某种「奇物」的房间。
Go down the corridor behind the door on the left. There's a room where some kind of rare item is stored.
So that's where the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} is?
它能告诉我们「星核」在哪里。
That's where we can find out where the Stellaron is.
载体锁定好了吗，随时可以带来？
Is the receptacle ready for use?
Of course. You just need to make the decision.
艾利欧说过，这个选择会改变很多东西……
Elio said this decision will bring about lots of changes...
艾利欧也说过，做出这个选择的人必须是你。
He also said it must be you who makes it.
反物质军团什么时候变得这么弱了？
When did the Antimatter Legion become so weak?
我能诱来的兵力就这么多了，你也不想这里被军团的主力盯上吧？
I could only attract this much. Did you really want the entire Legion to come here?
只有这种货色，拖不住星穹列车那伙人啊。
This lot won't be able to slow down the Astral Express crew.
放心，一只末日兽也来了。
Relax. A Doomsday Beast is also here.
要给{M#他}{F#她}一个新的名字么？
找到「星核」前，你还有反悔的时间。
You can still change your mind before we find the Stellaron.
后面已经十分接近空间站的关键区域，「军团」的主力应该也都集中在那里。
We're getting close to the central area of the space station, the main force of the Legion must be there.
可这对我们来说并不是问题。
我姑且提醒一下。卡芙卡，这是个潜入任务。
Just a reminder — this is a stealth mission, Kafka.
把它们通通做掉，就不会有人知道我们来过咯。
No one will know we were here if they are all dead.
前面是空间站的核心区域，反物质军团的虚卒会很多喔。
The central area of the space station is up ahead. There will be lots of Legion Voidrangers there.
Someone, or something, is up ahead.
Looks like we're the ones getting ambushed.
But they're the ones getting besieged.
一个人都没有，疏散做得相当彻底呢。是黑塔亲自下的指示么？
Not a single soul here. Impressive evacuation work. Did Herta organize it herself?
看访问记录，那女人都大半年没登录过这里了，避难工作是由代理站长——一个叫艾丝妲的人指挥的。
According to the access history, she hasn't logged in here for over six months. The evacuation was directed by the acting lead researcher — a girl named Asta.
没听过的名字…啊，艾利欧好像说过我们不会碰上黑塔，看来她是真的不在。
Doesn't ring a bell. Oh, right, Elio said we wouldn't run into Herta. It seems she really isn't here.
艾利欧的剧本没有提到「星核」的具体位置，也就是说在他看到的未来里……
Elio's script doesn't include any info about the location of the Stellaron, which means in the future he foresees...

Do you need help with anything?
你说呢？你已经分走了我的一点快乐！刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
What do you say? You've already shared some of my joy, so you may as well share some of my chores!
别走啊！你已经分走了我的一点快乐！不得补偿一下吗？
Wait a second! You've already shared some of my joy, shouldn't you return the favor?
手上刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
I happen to have a job on my hands that you could help out with.
我们应物科受上边之托，正在盘点空间站的各项亏损。其中，月台区域由我负责。
We in the Department of Implement Arts have received orders to take stock of the various losses of the space station. That includes evaluating areas like the railway platform.
这附近因「军团」入侵而受损的资产，无论动产不动产，统统要<color=#dbc291ff>拍照定损</color>，报给「星际和平公司」。
All assets damaged by the Legion in the area, whether mobile or immobile, must be <color=#dbc291ff>photographed</color> and reported to IPC.
我一个人忙不过来，你给我搭把手吧。放心，帮我办事，好处少不了你的。
My hands are full already, so why don't you lend me one? Don't worry, there'll be something in it for you too.
I'll be on my way then.
嗯。那我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
Hmm. And I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~
Maybe you can do some stargazing in the meantime.
随你怎么耍嘴皮子，把事儿给我办了就行。我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
Smart mouth you've got there! You just worry about getting those photos. I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~
星星直堪摘，银河直堪赏~
The cosmos is indeed a sight to behold.
回来啦，动作还挺快。来来来，我这账本上有的是空余地方，看看你都拍了些啥？
Back already? You're fast! Here, I have plenty of blank space in this ledger. Let's see what you managed to capture.
The railway platform corroded by the Fragmentum.
我听着风言风语，说入侵时期有个极为骇人的怪物躲在这里，专挑平日研究成绩垫底的科员下手。
I've heard rumors of a horrific monster that sneaked in during the invasion. It is said to prey on the lowest-performing researchers.
嘟噜噜，想想就恐怖，我可别遇上它。
Just thinking about it gives me jitters. I hope I never cross paths with it.
列车嘛，按规矩它不归空间站管。
Well, strictly speaking, the Express isn't part of the space station.
你是列车的人吧？那卖你个人情，一并写上！
Hey, you're one of the Express folk, right? I'll do you a favor and add its damages to the books!
流线型的机身，银白的金属光泽……
A streamlined body. A silver-white metallic luster...
这不是艾丝妲站长订购的机器人吗？不得不说…她的眼光真不错！
Is this the robot that Asta ordered? I have to admit... She has great taste!
说多不多，说少不少。我统统记在账册上了，你确认一下。
More or less. I've put it all in the ledger, you can take a look now.
看完了吗？眼睛别乱瞟，跟你有关的就这几行。没什么问题的话，照片我就拿走了。
Are you done yet? Don't just nose around. There are only a few lines that concern you. And if there's nothing wrong, I'll take the photos.
There are thousands of items on that list!
都确有其事嘛，而且「公司」报销，咱也不跟他们客气。
You don't say! And IPC will reimburse every one of them. There's no need to be coy about it.
It seems like there's something odd about that list.
有什么怪的？都是「公司」报销，坏了就是坏了，咱也不跟他们客气。
Odd? IPC will reimburse us for everything, there's no need to be coy about it with them.
对呀，虽然只磕了个角，那也是磕了。反正都是「公司」报销，咱也不跟他们客气。
Yes, even though it only got bumped slightly in the corner, it still counts as damage. In any case, IPC will reimburse us for everything, so there's no need to be coy about it.
这几千项货损，不仔细看，谁会发现啊。
With the thousands of things listed here, who's going to know the difference unless they check every one?
好啦那我先整理账册啰，晚点交回科里。你也早点休息，不送~♪
Okay, I'll sort out the ledger for submission later. You should go get some rest.
{F#丫头}{M#小子}你动作还挺快，这边几个大箱子里好东西不少，你自己找找啊。
You move pretty quick, {F#lass}{M#lad}. There are lots of nice things in these boxes here. Help yourself.
那个我有点急事，要先走啰！
I am in a hurry. Bye!
这开关你为什么不自己打开？
Why didn't you just turn on the switch yourself?
为什么不自己打开…嚯嚯，兴许是我这把老骨头没注意到吧。
Why didn't I turn it on myself... Hoho, I suppose I didn't notice.
你刚刚答应我的天价报酬呢？
What about the big reward you promised me?
什么天价报酬…我怎么不记得我答应过？
What a big reward... I don't remember making such a promise.
啥？我听不清，{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你大点声！
What? I can't hear you clearly, {F#lass}{M#lad}. Speak up!
... Forget it, as long as you're fine.
我当然没事！浑身上下，每一块骨头，都好着哪。
Of course I'm fine! Every muscle and bone, everything is fine.
你就是想吸引我的注意。
So you just wanted to get my attention.
我不是，我没有。{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你可别乱说啊。
No. I did not. Don't be ridiculous, {F#lass}{M#lad}.
You're not trying to blackmail me... are you?
我又没有讹你，怎么能说是碰瓷呢？顶多占用了一点你的注意力。
I didn't ask for anything! How can you call this blackmail? At most I just took up a little of your time.
快快快，让开让开，我憋不住了。有事到机修间找我！
Come on, get out of the way, I can't hold it anymore. Come get me in the maintenance room if you need anything!
你看，这汽水起子也不知道扔在零件箱里多久了，总算给我找出来啰！
Look, I don't know for how long this bottle-opener has been in the toolbox. I finally found it!
我手上这瓶，可是四个琥珀纪前的汽水<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>，历久弥香，嗬…爽快！
This bottle of soda is from four Amber Eras ago, <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>, so fragrant. Ho... so refreshing!
妙啊，年轻人！你是不知道刚刚我有多烦躁，手上拿着好东西，却只能望梅止渴，差点我就上牙咬了。
Good one, kid! You have no idea how frustrated I was just now. I had this tasty treat in my hand, but I couldn't drink it! I almost tried to pry it open with my teeth!
也怪我自己，清理轴承阻塞，还非把瓶子揣上；瓶子揣上就算了，把起子忘了。
It's my own fault for bringing it with me when I went down to unblock those bearings. Why did I forget the bottle opener?
Must've gone flat ages ago, right?
气足着呢，要说我在你这年纪，就凭这一口气，点了古恩的胡子，撮合伯纳德和密卷科那娘们儿……
I haven't gone flat! When I was your age, I could light Gunn's beard on fire and set up Bernard with that chick in the Department of Insight, all in one go!
只可惜飞跃「黑塔」这事，我还真差一口气。
Sadly, I really was a bit flat in the "Station Breakout" incident.
时间也过得真快，我现在连汽水起子都忘了带，不得不服老了。
Time flies, though. Now, I even forget to bring a bottle opener. I can't deny I am old.
So this is why you were in a hurry...
嗬，那还能是啥？我辛辛苦苦处理阻塞，奖励自己一瓶汽水不很正常么？
Ha, what did you expect? Can't I reward myself with a bottle of soda after working so hard dealing with that blockage?
就是忘了带汽水起子，哎，这种事上还是不得不服老啊。
I just forgot to bring the opener. Sigh... I must admit I am old.
我告诉你啊，这<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>曾经可是空间站的专利，风靡星系的反重力饮品，我手上的存货就剩这最后几瓶了。

Let me tell you, the patent for this <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> used to belong to the space station. This anti-gravity drink was once all the rage across the cosmos. I only have a few bottles left.
喝一口少一口，可惜啊，可惜！
I'd better enjoy every last sip while I still can.
啊对了？！还没自我介绍吧？
Oh, right! I haven't introduced myself yet, have I?
老爹我啊，是这儿的维修师温天翁。活得最久，资历最老，手也最稳——
I am Wen Tianweng, the mechanic. I am number one around here in terms of age, experience, and skills.
可惜屁用没有，整个机修间就我一个人。
Unfortunately, it doesn't mean jack, because I'm the only one in the maintenance room.
曾经倒有过一个同伙，可惜是个恶棍，不仅曾把空间站炸出大洞，还经常遣回古怪的信件，三天两头阻塞轴承，惹我前去修理。

I had a partner once, but he was a scoundrel. Not only did he blow a big hole in the space station, but he also kept sending back these strange letters. He always blocked the bearings and made me go repair them.
我和那只会给人添麻烦的恶棍，注定八字不合。背了阿基维利的大运，才会卡在那儿。
I never got along with that troublemaker. It's as if we were fated to be at odds with each other... Ah, Akivili must've turned their back on me, that's why I got stuck in there.
卡了老半天，可把我憋坏啰，哎哟哟。
I was stuck for so long it was starting to ache. Ouch!
你在下面答应给我报酬…
报酬？你看我像是有钱的样子吗？
Pay? Do I look rich to you?
我只是个穷困潦倒的维修工，一直为恶棍搞出的大洞背负着「渎职」的罪名……
I'm just a poor mechanic. I've been charged with dereliction of duty ever since that scoundrel made that giant hole in the station.
你要一般的报酬，我没有，呵呵……
If you want a reward, I don't have any, hehe...
不过！既然和你说了半天，也算投缘，值得破例一回。
However! Since we've been talking this whole time and you seem agreeable enough, it's worth making an exception.
下面的话你可听好啦。我要给你的是……
Listen carefully now. What I am going to give you is...
去去，你这什么跟什么啊。老爹是要给你来一招仙人指路，保你飞来横财。
Huh... what are you on about? I am only going to show you the way to make money. You are guaranteed to make a fortune.
而这横财的来路嘛，首先要从一个人开始说起。
As for the origin of this fortune... well, it all started with this person.
还记得刚刚我提到的恶棍吗？他的真名叫做<color=#dbc291ff>何塞•拉萨罗</color>。
Remember the scoundrel I was just talking about? His real name is <color=#dbc291ff>Hosea Lazaro</color>.
这老斑鸠有过不少唬人的头衔。比如<color=#dbc291ff>「前地概科员」、「前无名客」、「武装考古学派成员」</color>。

That old fart has a bunch of grand titles, like <color=#dbc291ff>former researcher in the Department of Cosmic Geography, former member of the Nameless, and member of the Armed Archaeologists</color>.
他还在空间站的时候，就整天夸耀自己发明的<color=#dbc291ff>勘星钎、星域导影图、特殊显影法、各种软饮专利</color>有的没的，恃才傲物，谁也不服。

When he was still in the space station, he would boast about his inventions all day. <color=#dbc291ff>Astro Rod, Cosmos Guide chart, the Special Autoradiograph, various soft drink patents.</color> He was so arrogant and refused to obey anyone.
而且，他尤其看不惯地概科员受人欺负，经常为本科室出头，和别人大打出手。
What's more, he would get very upset whenever he saw his colleagues from the Department of Cosmic Geography being bullied by others. He would often stand up for his colleagues and start fights.
哼，没错，难为你也发现了这底下的真相。
Humph, that's right. I am glad you can see the truth.
拉倒吧，也只有你们这种小年轻，会被那些虚张声势的头衔和发明给唬住。
Yeah, right. Only impressionable young kids like you would get intimidated by those pretentious titles and inventions.
Could you get to the point?
年轻人，就是性子急。唠嗑就讲究一个慢字，再说了，我哪句话不是重点？
Kids these days are always so impatient. The key to having good conversations is to let things sink in. Besides, which one of my words is not on point?
想要宝贝啊，你就得听我跟你慢慢唠。
If you want the treasure, you have to listen to me talk first.
总而言之，何塞那家伙是出了名的「动手能力」强。
Long story short, Hosea is famous for his craftsmanship.
这一方面，是因为他自己喜欢私下鼓捣；另一方面，是他几乎天天到机修间来，跟我学上两手。
On one hand, it's because he likes to tinker with things in his spare time. On the other hand, it's because he would come to the maintenance room to learn from me almost every day.
他负责疏通阻塞、发明超镍零件，还有冲调<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>。我嘛，则负责监督他干活…对了，我俩还合写过一本《汽水与空间站维修艺术》。

He was responsible for clearing blockages. He invented Ultra Nickel Parts, and he brewed Kapo-Kali. As for me... I was responsible for supervising his work... By the way, we also wrote a book together, The Art of Soda and Space Station Maintenance.
是有过一段快乐的时光…啊，是有过一段快乐的时光。
We did have a good time... yes... it really was quite good.
直到有一天，我正睡着呢，突然被一声巨响吵醒——
Until one day, I was suddenly woken up from my sleep by a terribly loud noise —
那恶棍竟然把机修间炸出一个大洞，乘着飞行器扬长而去！给我留下一地的烂摊子。
That scoundrel blew a giant hole in the maintenance room and flew away in an aircraft! Leaving me with all the mess.
后来我还是从别人口中得知，他那进行星际旅行的飞行器机油，还是从我这机修间一点一点偷去的！
Afterward, I learned from the others that the fuel in the spacecraft that he used for his adventure was stolen bit by bit from my maintenance room!
这就是他四处宣扬的「飞跃黑塔」事件。多少年了，这事我一想起来，就气得牙痒痒。
And this is the "Station Breakout" incident that he boasts about all over the place. It's been so many years, but whenever I think about it, I'm still so mad at him.
He endured hardship to accomplish his ambition. That's so cool.
少来，你以为「飞跃黑塔」很风光？
Oh come on. You think the "Station Breakout" is something to be proud of?
这也就是第一次被何塞•拉萨罗钻了空子，打那以后，有点火星儿，就会拉响全站警报。
And that was the first time Hosea Lazaro exploited us. After that, whenever there is a tiny spark, the whole station would go up in alarm.
你要是学他，我保证你一只脚还没离地，就会被防卫科的小崽子们按在地上一顿摩擦。
If you try to copy him, I guarantee that those kids from the Security Department will mop the floor with you before you even lift a foot off the ground.
That's destruction of public property. It's unforgivable.
是啊，放着好好的月台不走，非要在我的地盘闹事。
That's right. He just wanted to cause trouble on my turf.
他倒是一走了之，这大洞欠下的巨额债务，我一股脑背到了今天。
He just walked away, but to this very day, I am still paying the huge debt from all the damage he's done.
He betrayed his teacher and friend.
算你有良心！千万别有样学样，着了何塞•拉萨罗的道。
I am glad to hear you have a conscience after all! Never be like that Hosea Lazaro.
我可听说，地概科现在有不少年轻人，把那老斑鸠当作精神偶像，真是不学好。
I've been told there are many young people in the Department of Cosmic Geography who worship that old scoundrel like a spiritual idol. What a bunch of buffoons.
Such a long speech. I am falling asleep...
…扯远了，扯远了。唉，上了年纪，就是有这追忆从前的毛病。
...I went off-topic. Eh... that's what happens when you get old.
平时没人说话，现在一股脑全倒出来，浑身上下舒坦多了——我真正想给你的东西，正是何塞•拉萨罗留下的一张<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>。

Usually, I have no one to talk to, but now that I got to let it all out, I feel much better. So, what I really want to give you is the <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Map</color> that Hosea Lazaro left behind.
这么好的东西不早拿出来。
Awesome. You should have shown me earlier.
找人唠嗑才是你的目的吧…
You just wanted someone to chat with, didn't you...
才不是，瞎说八道什么哪。
Of course not. Stop talking nonsense.
这东西藏在空间站的犄角旮旯，被不相干的人翻了出来，以为是废纸。
This thing was hidden in a corner somewhere in the space station. Someone found it and thought it was trash.
但辗转到老爹我手上，用那老斑鸠发明的特殊显影法一试，嚯！发现上面揭示了某个房间的坐标。
But it ended up here with me, I tried using that old scoundrel's special technique to reveal the text, and lo and behold! It revealed the coordinates of a room.
听说那恶棍曾在空间站留下不少私房宝贝，想必都藏在这里。
I've been told that the old scoundrel left many personal treasures in the space station. They must be hidden there.
你尽管按照图上的位置去找，只要你能找得到，东西可都归你！
You can look for them according to the location on the map. If you can find them, then everything belongs to you!
我得再去整两口<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>了，配上咔滋闪光的焊枪，就是阿基维利来了我也不换！
I have to go take a couple of sips of <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> and tinker around with my blazing welding gun. I wouldn't give up on that even if Akivili were to come pay me a visit!
Did you find them? What are these?
别误会，我就问问，我反正是不信老斑鸠能留下什么好东西。
Don't get me wrong. I'm just curious. I don't believe that old scoundrel would leave us anything good.
你手上是什么纸…啊！是黑塔大人…大不敬，大不敬啊！快给我，别让其他人看见了。
What's the paper you are holding...? Oh! That's Madam Herta... Disrespectful, really disrespectful! Give it to me and don't let others see it.
你别是被耍了？我就知道，狗改不了吃屎，何塞•拉萨罗也转不了性。
Don't be fooled! A tiger never changes its stripes. You can't trust that scoundrel Hosea.
快给我，要是被别人发现，我们一老一少都跑不了。
Quick! Give it to me. If someone finds out, we are done for.
怎么，这「宝藏」上面也标注着「宝藏」的位置？在这儿跟老爹我玩套娃哪？
What? This treasure is also marked with the location of another treasure? What game is he playing?
什么，这是封加密信…<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>…的珍贵秘方？！
What? This is an encrypted letter... the secret recipe of... <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>!?
好家伙！等着啊，显影试剂管够——
Why you little! Just you wait. There's enough Autoradiograph reagent—
搞什么名堂啊，这老斑鸠。
What's he playing at, that old scoundrel.
As long as we can find the treasure.
焦糖，二氧化碳，听起来挺耳熟。香涎…是口水的意思吗？！
Caramel, carbon dioxide, sounds familiar. Ambergris... Does it mean saliva!?
还算他讲点义气。活到这份上，我就念着这口<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>了。
At least he has a shred of loyalty left. At my age, a sip of <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> is the only thing I want...
行了，都是糟老头子之间的事，年轻人瞎掺和什么。
Enough. This is between us two old farts. Young people shouldn't get involved.
而且，说到底，我记恨他，那都是气话。
And besides, when I said I hated him, I said it in the heat of the moment.
能送到这封信也不容易。
It wasn't easy to deliver this letter.
对不住啊，{F#丫头}{M#小子}。我没想到他会唱上这么一出。
Sorry, {F#lass}{M#lad}. I didn't expect that from him.
When I said I hated him, I said it in the heat of the moment! Argh!
其实，老爹我从来都不在乎他给我造成的损失。
Of course, I never cared about all the mess he left me with.
打从小时候，我就不喜欢学术研究和应物科那档子破事儿。
Ever since I was young, I have never liked academic research and dealing with the Department of Implement Arts.
我最大的愿望，就是闷头躲在这机修间，拧拧螺丝，动动扳手。醒了就干，累了就睡。在我眼里，和机器打交道，可比跟人打交道快乐多了……

My biggest wish was to hide in this maintenance room and play with the tools. Work when I wake up and sleep when I get tired. In my opinion, dealing with machines is much more fun than dealing with people...
但这么多年空间站人来人往，唯独何塞•拉萨罗是个例外。
But so many people have come and gone through this space station over the years, with the exception of Hosea.
所以我生气的是，这老斑鸠没把自己的逃亡计划漏给我，哪怕一丁点儿。
So, I was angry that the old scoundrel didn't share his breakout plan with me. Not even a little bit.
我们不是兄弟吗？兄弟不该无话不谈吗？
Aren't we brothers? Shouldn't brothers be able to talk about anything?
…不过，那么多年过去，我早就释怀了。
...Nevertheless, it's been so many years. I have long since learned to let it go.
相反，每次听到他在外面「为非作歹」的消息，我都真心替他感到高兴。
On the contrary, whenever I hear about what kind of trouble he's making outside, I really do feel happy for him.
他天生就适合那片广阔银河。适合不要命地使劲折腾。
He was born to run amok all over the cosmos.
One has got to learn to let it go eventually.
He also thinks of you as a brother.
或许吧。但「飞跃黑塔」这事他要真叫上我，我还不一定够胆呢。
Maybe. But if he had really invited me to make a breakout from the space station, I may not have had the guts for it.
I like to run amok too.
你还年轻着呢，以后有的是机会。不是折腾这个世界，就是被这个世界折腾。
You are still young. There will be plenty of opportunities in the future. Either you run amok all over the world or it runs all over you.
所以，兜了这么一大圈，<color=#dbc291ff>「宝藏」</color>就是这张配方，{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你怎么说？
So, after all that... The <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure</color> is just this recipe, {F#lass}{M#lad}. What do you think?
I want to exchange it for money.
虽说想法不错，但这张手稿已经被显影试剂浸透，脆弱不堪，一碰即损，怕是撑不到你与买家接头的那一天。

As good as the idea may sound, this manuscript is soaked in Autoradiopraph reagent, which makes it very fragile. You'll break it with the slightest touch. I'm afraid it won't last until you find a buyer.
让我想想，不如给你些别处寻不到的珍贵货。看手稿上所写这些香料，在仓库里耐心找找不成问题……
Let me see. I guess I can give you a few treasures you won't find anywhere else. And I may have some of these ingredients in the warehouse.
You keep it, as a memento.
老爹我才不稀罕呢！除非你坚持，我才考虑勉为其难把它收下。
I do NOT want it! Unless you insist, then maybe I'll consider taking it home.
It is very important to you.
既然这样，那我就给你露一手。
Well, in that case, let me show you something.
让我看看，这些香料，在仓库里耐心找找不成问题……
Let me see, these ingredients... I suppose I can find some in the warehouse if I look hard enough...
等等！我就是客气一下，你怎么还当真了呢……
Hold on! I was just being polite. What were you thinking...?
这样吧，手稿我留着，给你露一手别的功夫。
How about this. I'll keep the manuscript, and I'll show you something else.
没办法了，老斑鸠遛了你这么久，结果这债还是要我来还。
Well... then I suppose there's no other choice. That old scoundrel... after all these years, I am still paying off his debt.
既然这样，那我就给你露一手。
Well, in that case, let me show you something.
让我看看，这些香料，在仓库里耐心找找不成问题……
Let me see, these ingredients... I suppose I can find some in the warehouse if I look hard enough...
来啰来啰，一大桶新鲜灌装的<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>…就是这个味道！
Come on, a big bucket of fresh <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>... That's the taste!
这些汽水你就收下吧，提神醒脑，健体强身。
Just take these sodas with you. They can refresh your mind and strengthen your body.
何塞•拉萨罗离开之后，也就你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}，愿意跟我这么折腾。
{F#Lass}{M#Lad}, you're the only one who would talk to me ever since Hosea left.
你要是对那老斑鸠感兴趣，可以再在空间站里找找，还有没有他寄回来的天外信件。上面写满了自吹自擂。
If you are interested in that old scoundrel, you can look around the space station again and see if you can find some of those letters he sent back. Those letters are filled with his bragging.
他啊…可是巴不得自己的废话能被更多人听见。
That guy... just wants more people to hear his nonsense.
Nonsense can be very interesting to listen to.
我也和你唠得差不多了。以后要是没什么事……
Alright, enough chitchat. From now on, whenever you are free...
哈，记得多来陪我这老头子解解闷哦。
Ha! Just remember to come more often to chat with me.
我这儿虽然什么都缺，但可和你说好了，只要你来，<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>就一定管够。
Although I don't have much of anything here, you and I have an agreement. Whenever you pop in, there will always be enough <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> for you.
其实，根本就没有什么「宝藏」。
Actually, there is no treasure at all.
唯一的大礼，就是藏在这房间里我的四张涂鸦手稿。我想你也认出来了，其中还有黑塔大人的风姿，没想到吧？
The only big gifts are my four graffiti drafts hidden in this room. And yes, there is also a nice picture of our respected Madam Herta. You didn't expect this, did you?
如果你是一名兢兢业业的小科员，深呼吸吧！千万别吓得倒在地板上死了。
If you are a devout little researcher, take a deep breath! Don't get a heart attack!
如果你是一个具有娱乐精神的年轻人，我建议你把它们都收集起来，生活不顺时就拿出来看看，在黯淡无光的塔内研究之余，给自己找点乐子。
If you are a fun-loving young person, I suggest you collect them all. Take them out when life is bad, and have some fun while studying in the dark tower.
好吧，你能看到这段话，说明你听从了我的建议，具有百折不挠的宝贵品质。
Alright, if you can see this, it means you have followed my advice and that you possess the precious virtue of perseverance.
我承认，你绕了这么一大圈，我要是一根毛也没留下，是有点不地道。
I must admit, you've gone such a long way. If I don't give you something, it'll be a little mean.
毕竟我不知道过去这么多个琥珀纪后，来到这里的你到底是谁。
After all, I don't know who'd be looking for my treasure after so many Amber Eras.
有那么千分之一的可能，你是我何塞•拉萨罗在未来的卫道者、冉冉升起的精神接班人
There is a slim chance that maybe you are my future champion, my spiritual successor.
如果贸然误伤友军，岂不是很过意不去？
Wouldn't it be a pity if I accidentally hurt my friends?
没办法了，现在，我打算把真正的「宝藏」秀出来。
Seems like there's no other way. I have to show you the real treasure now.
你喝过一种名叫「卡利白」的汽水吗？
Have you ever had a soda called Kapo-Kali?
它一度是空间站的招牌，风靡南垣星系的反重力饮品。
It was once the signature of the space station, an anti-gravity drink extremely popular in the Southern Orion system.
不好意思，除了大名鼎鼎的勘星钎与星域导影之外，毋庸置疑，那也是我何塞•拉萨罗的手笔。
Oh, sorry! Besides my other famous inventions, like the Astro Rod and Cosmos Guide, this is another one of my masterpieces.
「星际和平公司」曾经想花五百万信用点买下它的配方，被我拒绝了。
The Interastral Peace Corporation once wanted to spend five million credits to buy its recipe, and I refused.
「黑塔•万有应物科」的温槐仁曾经三十三次试图来偷师，被我打得鼻青脸肿。
Wen Huairen of the Herta Department of Implement Arts has tried to steal the secret from me <unbreak>33</unbreak> times — for which he was beaten to a pulp like he deserved.
现在，我将它的配方公之于下——
Now, I'll make it public once and for all.
它可值五百万啊。且听下回分解。
It's worth five million! Please stay tuned.
金牌调饮师何塞•拉萨罗
不要怀疑自己的眼睛，以上就是「卡利白」的珍贵秘方。
Do not doubt your eyes. Above is the precious secret recipe of Kapo-Kali.
I swear on my mother's grave.
如果你是自己人，你会知道上哪儿破译上方这一串密码。
If you are one of us, you will know where to decode the password above.
提示：它需要用到一种特殊显影法。
Tip: A special method is required to reveal the text.
绝对够意思的何塞•拉萨罗
这里应该就是藏宝图标示的房间所在了。
This should be the room shown on the treasure map.
经由特殊显影法处理的藏宝图呈现出黑白的暗色调，唯独用红圈标示出了目标房间位置。
The treasure map revealed by a special autoradiograph is in black and white. Only the location of the target room is marked with a red circle.
（…莫名其妙。不过，艾丝妲和阿兰似乎摊上麻烦了……）
(...So strange. Seems like Asta and Arlan are in trouble...)
（这种捕风捉影的事情，还是不要让当事人知道比较好。）
(Still, it all sounds like hearsay to me. Better keep them in the dark for now.)
（姬子跟空间站的人好像很熟，还是先找她商量商量吧。）
(Himeko seems to be on good terms with the folks on the space station. Maybe I should tell her first.)
(Recount the situation in the group chat to Himeko.)
艾丝妲这个站长当得也真不容易。
It must be difficult for Asta. Being the lead researcher isn't easy.
前脚「军团」刚走，后脚就有人造谣生事…那句话怎么说来着？「对外敌我唯唯诺诺，搞内耗我重拳出击」……
As soon as the Legion exits stage right, in comes the gossip... How does that saying go again? "Greet enemies outside with a smile, greet enemies inside with a sword..."
Such is the Herta company culture...
You seem pretty cheerful about it.
{NICKNAME}, are you thinking of getting involved?
其实我也只想看看乐子…
No, just eating popcorn on the sidelines...
我还挺想帮帮艾丝妲的。
I really want to help Asta.
那怎么能呢？毕竟是这么有…麻烦的状况。
What do you mean? This is such an inter— Uh... inconvenient situation.
有其企业家必有其文化。
Company culture stems from the company owner...
哈哈，黑塔才不管这个地方呢。不如说有人的地方，就会产生江湖吧。
Haha, Herta doesn't really have anything to do with it. I'm afraid wherever you find people, you find gossip of some variety.
嗯，其实这类谣言本与我们无关，但事关艾丝妲那姑娘的声誉，佯装不知也不是无名客的作风。
Well, while these rumors have nothing to do with us, they do concern the reputation of young Asta. And turning a blind eye is not the way of the Nameless.
处理这种事情并不困难。群众关心的是戏剧性而并非事实，不用揭开真相，只要阻止谣言发酵就好了。比起辛辛苦苦地辟谣，不如直接找出谣言的制造者。

Solving a matter like this won't be difficult. Predictably, the crowd cares more about the drama than the facts. Stopping the rumors from brewing is more important right now than laying out the truth... and it's better to unearth the source of the rumors directly than to painstakingly try to refute them one by one.
As always, your guidance is wise.
So we get rid of the troublemaker, right?
No, no... that's not what I meant...
我有个朋友，据说这空间站里就没有她不知道的八卦消息。
I have a friend — they say there isn't a single piece of station gossip she doesn't know about.
这个朋友是不是你自己？
看不出来姬子你也爱好八卦…
I didn't realize you liked gossip too, Himeko...
首先，我的朋友不是我；其次，我交朋友也不是为了听八卦呀。
First of all, it's not me. Secondly, I don't make friends JUST for the sake of gossip.
只是我这个朋友神通广大，我想你也许能从她那边套出什么情报。这个时间…我看看，她一定是在科室外面翘班摸鱼。
It's just that my friend is pretty amazing, and I think you might be able to extract some information from her. Let's see... Right now she's probably slacking off somewhere outside the department.
我不知道她的本名，只知道她自称——<color=#dbc291ff>「瓜农」</color>。
I don't know her real name, but she calls herself <color=#dbc291ff>Gossipmonger</color>....
（好像没有人在偷懒…难道「瓜农」不在这里？）
(I can't see anyone slacking off... Maybe Gossipmonger isn't around?)
是阿兰大哥托你来调查的吗？太好了，正巧我有些新发现。
Did Arlan ask you to investigate? Great! I've made some new discoveries.
（流言已经开始发酵了，先在周围收集一下情报吧。）
(The rumors are already circulating. Let's gather some intel first.)
怎么说，「瓜农」有什么劲爆内幕吗？站长真的有贪污？那个举报人是谁啊这么狂？
Have you heard anything from Gossipmonger? Is the lead researcher really that corrupt? Who exactly is this whistleblower?
Hey, aren't you off work today?
刷了下手机这不就赶过来了嘛，轮休哪有吃瓜重要！
I couldn't not come in after checking my phone! Days off aren't as juicy as gossip.
可惜我一早上也没碰上「瓜农」，不如你回去躺着等消息？
Well, too bad, I haven't seen Gossipmonger this morning. You should rest up and wait for more news.
你怎么还在这儿？你们科室没喊你去准备急救手术吗？
Why are you still here? Didn't your department call you to prepare for the emergency operation?
好像…没有？我才偷偷溜出来转了会儿，没这么巧吧……
Uh... no? I just sneaked out for a little while. What are the odds...
2分钟前我收到群发消息，说<color=#dbc291ff>特殊解析室那边出事了，有人被困住了</color>，现在防卫科把入口的区域都封起来了。

I got a group message two minutes ago saying that <color=#dbc291ff>something's happened in the Special Purpose Lab — somebody's trapped</color>. The Security Department's blocked off the area around the entrance.
特殊解析室？那<color=#dbc291ff>「瓜农」帕梅拉岂不是也……</color>
The Special Purpose Lab? Then wouldn't <color=#dbc291ff>Pamela — I mean, Gossipmonger be...</color>
多半是了，难怪这个时候没见着她来摸鱼……
Most likely. No wonder she's not here right now...
「瓜农」只关心八卦，却不关心八卦背后的秘密。
Gossipmonger only concerns herself with gossip, not the secrets within.
黑粉群人这么少，但消息却传得这么快，这背后必有推手……
There aren't many members in the Heritor group, but news is still traveling so fast. This must be the work of something bigger...
…嗯…群聊的人数和内容…小号的自导自演？可这么做的目的到底是什么呢……
...Hmm... Given the number of people in the group and its content... could this all stem from a few alt accounts? But why kick up a storm like this...
特殊解析室附近通路已经封锁，请无关人员不要靠近。
The walkways around the Special Purpose Lab have been temporarily closed off. Please keep your distance.
能不能通融下让我过去。
Can you let me through just this once?
那里有一些突发情况，现在很危险。
I'm afraid this is a live situation. It's too dangerous.
但…我听阿兰大哥说过你的事。你执意要去的话…我只能说，注意安全。
Wait... Brother Arlan told me about you. If you insist on going... then I wish you the best of luck. Be safe.
是这样，防卫科收到了「军团」残党在这附近的目击情报。
The Security Department received information about sightings of Legion remnants in the vicinity.
但就在刚刚，我们确认到这里还存在着前所未见的怪物。
However, we just confirmed that there are monsters here that have never been seen before.
虽然防卫科紧急封锁了这片区域，但已经有人失去了联系。
The Security Department sectioned off the area immediately, but we lost contact with some people.
帕梅…拉？我看看，救援人员名单上确实有她的名字。
Pamela...? Let me check, I remember her name was on the rescuer list.
看到没有，这痕迹…空间站有「裂界」化迹象的传闻看来也不是毫无根据。
Did you see it? Look... It seems like the rumors about the station are true — there are Stellaron traces here.
是什么原因我不管。我只知道，怪物破坏了这里的电源设备。
Good luck figuring that out. All I know is that monsters have destroyed the power supply installations here.
现在电梯开不了，困在下面的人也上不来。
The elevator is out of commission, so the people stuck on the floor below can't make it up.
Why don't you go down there?
事发突然，防卫科的支援还在路上。
It happened so suddenly. The support from the Security Department is still on the way.
目前人手不太够，只能先守住入口不让怪物上来。
We're low on staff right now — all we can do is make sure the monsters don't make it up here.
Is there anything I can do?
或许，你可以协助我们重启中央电梯。
Maybe you can help us restart the central elevator?
收容舱段的备用电源有很多，没记错的话对面就有。
There are plenty of backup power sources in the storage zone — right opposite, if I remember right.
只要能恢复供电，就能重启电梯下去救人。
As soon as we can restart the power supply, we can get this elevator working and rescue everyone.
怎么样，备用电源还在吗？
Well, did you find the backup power source?
嘶，还好有你在，这下够用了。稍等我去调试一下电梯。
Phew, thank goodness you're here. Give me a moment — I'll give the elevator a little shake-up.
好了，现在你可以下去了，注意安全。
Alright, you can use it now. Be safe.
救命啊，救命——等等，电梯来了！
Help! Somebody help! ...Wait, the elevator is here!
那个，帕梅拉她跟我们走丢了。那边有个很吓人的怪物，我们不敢过去。
W—We lost sight of Pamela... There's a terrifying monster over there — we didn't dare to go over on our own.
请你赶紧去救救她，我、我们自己坐电梯回去就好了。
Please save her! W—We'll take the elevator up.
妈耶，吓死姑奶奶我了…你、你怎么才来啊！
Holy mackerel, you scared the stars out of me... Y—You took your time!
没错，我就是你要找的人。
That's right, I'm the one you're looking for.
You knew I was looking for you?
当然。我不仅知道你会来，我还知道你为什么而来。
Of course. Not only did I know you were coming, but I also know why.
I came to ask you something...
呵，你不就是想知道黑粉群里的「瓜田里猹」到底是谁么？
Heh, you want to know who Richard_Knowitall from that Heritor group is, don't you?
黑塔女士的粉丝，简称黑粉。
Fans of Madam Herta. They call themselves the Heritors.
我是个生意人，生意人有生意人的规矩。你想知道消息，就得付出代价。
I'm a businesswoman, and we play by our own rules. If you want the scoop, you have to pay the price.
I saved you, isn't that enough?
那必须不能够啊。我这才值多少点，人总得有个自知之明不是？
Certainly not. I have a very clear notion of how much different favors cost.
放心，生意人讲的就是个公道，我又怎么会为难你？
Don't worry, the price is a fair one. Why would I make it difficult for you?
我这人吧，平时也没啥爱好，就爱听听八卦，然后…崇拜崇拜…这个，科学家。
I don't have any particular hobbies. I do indulge in a little tittle-tattling here and there, not to mention, admiring... of a certain scientist...
那什么，我听说你跟星穹列车那伙人是一起打过小怪兽的关系？
A—And now here you are, vanquishing monsters left, right, and center! I heard you're with the Astral Express...?
巧了不是，在下就喜欢姬子姐姐这种美貌与智慧并兼，优雅又不失温和的…科学家。
How fortunate! As it happens, I'm a huge fan of Himeko... An amalgamation of beauty and brains — the epitome of a graceful and gentle... scientist.
所以你能不能帮人家弄到姬子姐姐的高清无死角正脸笑容照嘛～
Can you help me take a hi-def portrait photo of Himeko smiling? Pleeeaase~
要眼里能放出十万伏特的微笑电力，能把人家都电晕的那种笑容哦～
Make sure you capture her electrifying smile — the one that stuns people into a trance — that million-volt smile~
没听过这么奇怪的要求。
干嘛啦～你和姬子姐姐很熟的吧？你去求她，她肯定会愿意的啦～
What's the matter? You know Himeko well, right? If you ask her, I'm sure she'll say yes~
Alright, though it'll probably be my funeral...
我就欣赏你这种年少有为的勇士！
I appreciate young, brave, talented people like yourself!
一张超绝美丽电光四射的姬子姐姐大头照换「瓜田里猹」的小秘密。
A superbly beautiful, dazzling, electrifying portrait shot of Himeko in exchange for the secret behind Richard_Knowitall.
照片到手，你直接发消息给我就好。一物换一物，我做生意一向公平。
Send the picture over when you have it. I'm always fair when it comes to haggling.
我要是连这都不知道，岂不枉称个「瓜农」虚名？
If I didn't even know that, could I really call myself Gossipmonger?
Do you have a request that's more... normal?
找到「瓜农」了吗？她怎么说。
Did you find Gossipmonger? What did she say?
She wants your picture in exchange for information.
Ha, I knew she was weird...
唉，朋友也分很多种…这种呢，就是不照面的时候才能当朋友……
*sigh* There are many types of friend... She's the type you can only stay friends with if you never meet her.
算啦，一张照片而已，我是不介意啦。{NICKNAME}，有需要的话你就拍呗。
It's okay. It's just a picture. I don't mind. Go ahead, {NICKNAME}.
给我看看…咦，拍照有一手嘛，{NICKNAME}。
Let me see... Hey, you're pretty good, {NICKNAME}.
Huh? What are you taking pictures of?
March 7th may have rubbed off on me.
看到我这么慌张干嘛？…好可疑。
Why do you sound so nervous all of a sudden? Suspicious...
没想到你会来吧，不是说你最近很忙吗？
I didn't expect to see you here. Didn't you say you were really busy?
唉，是啊。「军团」刚刚退走，空间站又是这个百废待兴的状态。
*sigh* I am. The Legion has only just retreated — the station is in absolute shambles.
重建工作才小有进展，最近局部又出现了裂界化的迹象……
And now any progress in rebuilding things has been ruined by the reappearance of the Fragmentum...
星核被激活了，该来的总是会来…裂界化的事，黑塔怎么说？
Oh, an active Stellaron is rarely a cause for celebration... What did Herta say about the Fragmentum's appearance?
老师的性子您知道的，就跟无事发生一样，又当甩手掌柜了。
You know what she's like. It's like nothing's happened — she's just sitting back and giving orders.
后面有空，我还得再找您商量商量。毕竟事关裂界，你们才是专家。

哼，暮气沉沉，千篇一律…所有人都穿着相同制式的衣服。
Hum! Nothing special, it's so boring here... Everyone wears the same clothes.
究竟要怎么样，才能从混乱的人群中一眼认出一名科员呢？
How on earth are we supposed to recognize a researcher in a crowd?
嗯，小囡之前也常常这么说，「爸爸，你烫个爆炸头吧，这样我就能从一堆同科室的科员伯伯中把你一眼认出来了」。
Well, my daughter used to say to me, "Daddy, you should get a more luscious hairstyle, then I can tell you apart from all the other old guys in your department."
不，这个方式不科学，小囡很早以前就发现了，「爸爸，你烫个爆炸头吧，这样我就能从一堆同科室的科员伯伯中把你一眼认出来了」。
No, this method is not scientific. My daughter worked it out a long time ago, "Daddy, you should get a more luscious hairstyle, then I can tell you apart from the other old guys in your department."
我之前还不相信，直到「军团」入侵的时候，她叫着我的名字，却朝着反方向跑走了——一定是见到了背影和我相似的科员。
I didn't listen to her until the Legion invaded. She called out my name, but ran off in the opposite direction — she must have seen a staff member who looked similar to me.
后来嘛，我终于找到了那个跟我背影相似的科员，他趴在月台上，不远处躺着小囡。
Later, I found that researcher who looked similar to me. He was lying face down on the platform. My girl was not far away.
我告诉她，这次爸爸一定会烫个爆炸头喔，可她的小手冰冰凉。
I told her... that Daddy will definitely get a more luscious hairstyle this time. However, her little hands had already gone cold.
麻烦的是，现在「无敌宇宙核弹头协会」的成员越来越多了。以后究竟还要怎么样，才能从混乱的人群中一眼认出一名科员呢？
The trouble is that there are now more and more members in the Invincible Space Warhead Association. In the future, how can we recognize a researcher in a crowd?
随身物都没有逃过「巴卜昂乓嘭」的命运，只剩下一些毫无印象的垃圾。
None of my belongings escaped that "Babracadabra" mishap. All that was left was a bunch of unrecognizable garbage.
罢了，都是身外之物，至少还有头发陪着我。
Whatever, they are merely worldly possessions anyway. At least I have my hair with me.
欸，又是你！没记错的话，这已经是你我的<color=#dbc291ff>第五次</color>对话。
Jeez... you again! If I am not mistaken, this is our <color=#dbc291ff>fifth</color> encounter.
…你缠着我这么久，也算陪我解了闷，这些东西就送给你吧——我真的不是懒得靠近垃圾桶喔。
...You've been pestering me for so long, I guess it was kind of entertaining. Here, take these — It's not because I'm too lazy to toss them out.
狂野爆炸头将一堆「垃圾」塞进了你的怀里，其中夹杂着一张奇怪的卡片。
The person with the luscious hairstyle shoves a pile of garbage into your arms, among them is a strange-looking card.
隐约可以辨认出是一张特殊权限卡——残角破碎，字面磨损，不知是否还可投入使用。
This special access card is vaguely distinguishable from the others — the corners are chipped and the writings are worn out. It's unclear if it works.
随着偶然的光线折射，可以发现上面印着模糊的「集团」字样。
When the light is at a certain angle, the words "Corporation" can vaguely be seen printed on the card.
风趣？不，还是深情一点好。文雅？嗯，俚语是不该写进诗里。
Should I make it witty? Nah, maybe sentimental is better. Elegance? Well, I probably shouldn't use idioms in a poem.
这里该用「黑发绸」还是「白裙裾」？嘶，头皮发麻……
Should I use "dark silk" or "white gown" here? Tsk... It's hurting my brain...
啊？我在写诗。你没看见嘛，那边的桌面上已经摆了好几版了。
Oh, I am just writing a poem. Can't you see the drafts on the desk?
唉，你这一打断倒是提醒我，都写了这么多版了，莱斯莉怎么还不给我回信呢？
Oh, your interruption reminds me. How come Lesley still hasn't replied to my letters after all those poems I sent her?
你看过我写给莱斯莉的那些诗了吧，怎么样？
You've read the poems I sent Lesley. What do you think?
别理我师父，这些诗完全抒发了我的内心所想。你一看就跟空间站里死气沉沉的普通科员不同，肯定能够理解我的风情。
Don't mind my master. These poems speak my mind. You don't look like those dull researchers around the space station. I'm sure you'd understand how I feel.
啊，真是不凑巧。有空翻翻看吧，你要是懂这玩意儿，还能帮我推敲推敲。
Oh, that's unfortunate. Take a look when you have time. Give me some suggestions if you know a thing or two.
你和我师父一样的看法？看来写诗对我这种大老粗还是太难了……
What? You share the same view as my master? Looks like writing poems is too hard for a rough fellow like me...
是吧！他们都嫌我不务正业，只有你懂得里面的情趣。说说看！你喜欢哪一版？
I know! They all say I am wasting my time. You are the only one who understands the fun of it. So tell me, which is your favorite?
嘿嘿，看来你也喜欢打直球。
Heheh, you also prefer to be direct.
不过我担心这一版写得太直接了，贸然发出去，会暴露我炙热的感情，给她带来很大压力。
But I am worried this may be too direct. If I send this to her, it will reveal my burning desire and put her under tremendous pressure.
You were as light as a swallow when leaving the station...
哈，你也喜欢这一版！他们都说这一版用词太过粗鄙，没想到你才是我的知音。
Ha, you like this one too! They all say my choice of words is too rough. It turns out you know me best!
他们哪懂得语词不必多精致，唯有真情才是诗的灵魂。写这一版我只花了十分钟！
They don't understand that the soul of poetry lies in real emotions, rather than beautiful words. It only took me <unbreak>10</unbreak> minutes to write this!
Other than the halo and starlight...
原来你喜欢这种风格啊。不过，我担心被她拒绝才写的这一版……
Oh, so you're into that style. But I only wrote this in case she rejects me...
I hope I don't have to use it in the end.
但是就像我刚才说的，这诗写得怎么样不重要，重要的是要有机会把诗送出去……
But just like what I said, it doesn't matter how these poems are. First I need to be able to send them out...
所以，修复中继器的事情就拜托你啦。
So, please help me fix the repeater.
呵，人家莱斯莉，那可是「黑塔•光渊密卷科」的明星科员，本琥珀纪里唯一出使丰饶星域的访问学者。
Oh, Lesley is a prominent researcher in the Department of Insight, the only scholar who has visited the Abundance segmentum this Amber Era.
You sure she has time for you?
当然有空搭理我！自从莱斯莉走后，我们一直断断续续地通过银河电波中继器联系。
Of course she does! Ever since Lesley left, we've been communicating on and off through the Cosmic Airwave Repeater.
Do people here write letters too?
哦，你别误会，我说的不是纸质信件。自从莱斯莉走后，我们一直断断续续地通过银河电波中继器联系。
Oh, don't get me wrong. I was not talking about paper letters. Ever since Lesley left, we've been communicating on and off through the Cosmic Airwave Repeater.
即使隔着数万光年的距离，她也会回复我的消息，只是这次……
Even if we are tens of thousands of light-years apart, she still replies to my messages. Only this time...
人家可是「黑塔•光渊密卷科」的明星科员，本琥珀纪里唯一出使丰饶星域的访问学者。
She is a prominent researcher at the Department of Insight, the only scholar who has visited the Abundance segmentum in this Amber Era.
科考工作忙得很，还指望次次都给你回复哪？
She must be very busy with her research. Don't expect her to keep answering you all the time!
她没有按时回信，应该只是这次情况特殊罢了！
This is the only time she hasn't replied to me.
我、我写了信和莱斯莉表白，不像平时，只是告诉她地概科有多少种石头、泥巴……
I... I confessed my love for her in my last letter. I usually just talk to her about the types of rock and mud we see in Department of Cosmic Geography...
对自己的学科放尊重一点！
Show some respect to your own discipline, will you?
我真的很不理解，为什么偏偏在我表白之后，莱斯莉就不理我了……
I really don't understand why Lesley stopped answering me after I confessed my love for her...
我们曾经聊了那么多。从密卷科<unbreak>101</unbreak>个星神密仪中有哪些是需要用到古恩的胡子，聊到……
We used to chat about a lot of things, from which of the <unbreak>101</unbreak> Aeon instruments in the Department of Insight require Gunn's beard, to...
我们从密卷科<unbreak>101</unbreak>个星神密仪中有哪些是需要用到古恩的胡子，聊到……
We talk about everything. We talk about which of the <unbreak>101</unbreak> Aeon instruments in the Department of Insight would require Gunn's beard, and...
勘星钎该如何「相土石」，才能通过考察土质好坏来判断某个星球神眷的旺衰。
And about how to use Astro Rods to examine the quality of soil, thus determining the rise and fall of the inhabitants of the planet.
这就叫浪漫？那我们聊的「浪漫」可多了。
So this is romantic? Then we had even more "romantic" discussions.
Ghosting you might just be her way of rejection.
不可能，要是她想拒绝我，还能和我聊这么多？更何况……
That's impossible. If she were to reject me, why would she talk to me so much? Besides...
哪有人和女孩聊泥巴啊。
Who the hell talks about mud with a girl...
泥巴…泥巴怎么啦？！即便是和莱斯莉聊泥巴，那也是相当有意思。更何况……
Mud... what's wrong with mud!? With Lesley, it's fun even when I talk about mud. Besides...
在我表白前的那次通讯中，她还向我描述了一场壮丽非常的<color=#dbc291ff>星震</color>。
During the communication where I confessed my love, she told me about a spectacular <color=#dbc291ff>starquake</color>.
你想想，那是恒、星、衰、亡！别人躲都躲不及，可我的莉莉，不仅获得了第一手的观测资料，甚至顺手救了一名死里逃生的银河搭车客。
Think about it! A star DIED! Most people would try to hide, but not my Lesley. Not only did she get first-hand observational data, she even saved a cosmic hitchhiker who almost died!
你是不知道，这封复信里她的语气有多快乐，连中继器的信号都那么快乐！
You have no idea how happy she sounded in her reply. Even the Airwave Repeater signal was cheerful!
每次收到她的回信，我都会情不自禁地想象着，拿一颗石头雕出她的笑脸。
Whenever I receive a reply from her, I can't help but picture the smile on her face and I'd carve it on a rock.
「军团」入侵前，我的桌子上已经放了整整一排这样的小石头。可惜，它们在混乱中全丢了。
Before the Legion invasion, I had a bunch of rocks all lined up in a row on my desk. Unfortunately, they went missing in the chaos.
总之，没有任何预兆表明她会拒绝我的表白。所以，如果我没有在约定时间收到她的消息…一定是银河电波中继器出了问题！
Anyway, there is no sign that she's going to reject me. If I don't receive her reply within the usual time frame... it means there must be something wrong with the Cosmic Airwave Repeater!
我去调查过，有一帮「军团」怪物占领了收发讯号的区域，你能帮我去看看到底出了事吗？
In my investigation, I found out that a group of Legion monsters occupied the area where the signals are transmitted. Can you help me find out what happened?
你能帮我去看看中继器到底出了啥毛病吗？师父他不让我去……
Can you help me find out what happened to the Airwave Repeater? My master wouldn't let me go...
满脑子就是中继器中继器，十几天没干正经事。不争气！
All he thinks about is the Airwave Repeater. He hasn't done any proper work for more than <unbreak>10</unbreak> days. Shame on you!
We may as well get this off his chest.
别听我师父乱说！你要是有空听他唠叨，早找着银河电波中继器啦。
Don't listen to my master! If you have the time to listen to him, you would've found the Cosmic Airwave Repeater already.
听我讲，<color=#dbc291ff>中继器</color>就在<color=#dbc291ff>「嘘实埋间」</color>的旁边！那是一座大型的废弃奇物仓库。
Listen, the <color=#dbc291ff>Airwave Repeater</color> is next to the <color=#dbc291ff>Disposal Site</color>! It is a massive warehouse for storing discarded Curios.
要是成功修复我们的通讯，我一定报答你——早晚请你当{F#伴娘}{M#伴郎}！
If you can resume our communication, I promise I'll reward you by inviting you to be our {F#bridesmaid}{M#best man}!
即使隔着数万光年的距离，她也不会不理我的。
She will never ignore me even though we are tens of thousands of light-years away.
异常！线路异常！已启动解离保护程序。
Error! Abnormal route! Detachment protection activated.
超镍零件…看来中继器也有点年头了……
Ultra Nickel Parts... this Airwave Repeater is quite old...
刚好旁边就是存放废弃奇物的「嘘实埋间」，说不定有能用的替换件。
Luckily it is right next to the Disposal Site where discarded Curios are stored. Maybe I can find some spare parts.
哔嘟！检测到超镍零件，启动归位复机程序。
*BEEP* Ultra Nickel Parts detected. Initiating recovery procedure.
尚未侦测到正在传输的电波讯号。如有需要，请选择您要察看的过往讯号转译纪录。
Transmitting airwave has not been detected. If needed, please select the historical signal decoding record that you wish to review.
请选择您要察看的过往讯号转译纪录。
You can view the historical signal decoding record here.
本时间段无电波讯号转译纪录。
No signal decoding record was found during this period.
Is there a delay in signal transmission?
傻洛奇，我当然明白你的意思。至于我的回答……
Rocky, how silly of you, of course I understand what you mean. As for my answer...
历史纪录查阅结束。尚未侦测到正在传输的电波讯…号……
End of historical record lookup. Airwave Transmission has not been detected.
Why was the record damaged here?
无法识别，无法识别，检测到生物情绪波动。
Cannot identify. Cannot identify. Lifeform emotional fluctuation detected.
警告！您已进入「黑塔」全景监控区，请勿对中继器做出不当举动。
Warning! You've entered the full surveillance area of the space station. Please do not conduct any inappropriate behavior toward the repeater.
关键纪录损坏…全景监控区……
Key record is damaged... full surveillance area...
去监控室调查看看有没有线索…看起来像是有人对中继器动了手脚……
I better check the surveillance in the monitoring room... it looks like someone has done something to the repeater...
请选择要察看的监控区域。
Please choose the surveillance area you want to review.
请选择要察看的监控区域。
Please choose the surveillance area you want to review.
虽然监控只拍到了一个模糊的背影，但他好像是…伯纳德？！
The camera only captured the image of a blurry figure from behind, it looks like... Bernard!?
没想到监控还拍到了艾丝妲，以及两个少见的少年科员……
I can't believe the surveillance camera captured Asta and two rarely-seen young researchers...
但需要调查的区域不是这里。
But this is not the area I should be investigating.
监控拍到的这段时间，接待大厅似乎尚未设立安全区。
During the time captured by the camera, the safe zone in the Reception Hall hasn't been set up.
不见奇物再收容小队，只有「军团」游荡的余孽。
The Curio Collection Squad is nowhere to be seen, only the wandering monsters of the Legion.
这不是三月七和丹恒吗？两人步履匆匆，当时急着去干嘛呢……
Isn't that March 7th, and Dan Heng? They looked like they were in a hurry to do something...
算了，别多想，现在最要紧是找到中继器的监控记录。
Forget it. The most important thing is to find the surveillance record of the repeater.
这显然是有人被困在斥力桥时所摄影像。
This surveillance footage clearly shows that someone is trapped in the repulsion bridge.
受伤的科员正在医疗舱内接受治疗……
The injured researcher is under medical treatment in the medical cabin.
既然知道是谁了，现在，就去找他对质吧。
Now that I know who that is, let me confront him and find out the truth.
...I don't know what you're talking about.
年轻人不学习，净知道瞎转悠。
Young people should spend more time studying instead of wandering around.
It's been captured by the security footage.
...It looks like you've fixed the machine.
Why did you damage the record?
…说得这么精确，看来你有证据。
Don't jump to conclusions. Show me your evidence.
唉！你们这些小崽子，真是让人操碎了心！
Hmph! Thanks to you kids, I am worried to death!
——我破坏纪录，那都是为了洛奇好！他为了莱斯莉，整天不学无术…这就算了。
I damaged the record for Rocky's own good! He's forgone his research because of that Lesley... Not to mention...
更别提你们对事情根本缺乏了解，莱斯莉她……
Not to mention you have no idea what's happening right now. Lesley...
对。她答应了洛奇的表白。
不。她答应了洛奇的表白。
没有，她毫发无伤。而且，她答应了洛奇的表白。
No, she is safe and sound. And she said yes to Rocky's confession.
如果你以为是我从中作梗，那你就错了！小崽子，自作聪明。
If you think I am the one being difficult here, you are wrong! Don't get ahead of yourself!
他们不能在一起…永远不可能在一起。
They can't be together... they will never be together.
你知道为什么吗？不，你不知道。很少有人明白星震到底是怎么一回事……
Do you know why? No, you don't. People rarely understand what a starquake means...
如果防护得当，星震不会对人产生物理性伤害。
With proper protection, a starquake will not cause physical damage to humans.
但是，星震造成的重力坍塌，会使所在星域的时空曲率发生巨大变化。
However, the gravitational collapse caused by a starquake will severely change the space-time curvature of the segmentum.
打个比方，莱斯莉所在星域的时间，曾经和我们一样，是一条直线，那么如今，它已经被重力压成了一道巨大的峡谷。
For example, the time in Lesley's segmentum was once a straight line like ours. But now, it has been pressed into a huge canyon by gravity.
显而易见，曲线总是长于直线。所以她所在星域的时光曲线，当折算至我们的时间直线时，会覆盖若干倍的长度。
Clearly, a curve is always longer than a straight line. Therefore, the time curve of her segmentum is going to cover several times the length when converted to our timeline.
你知不知道，这意味着什么？
Do you even know what that means?
The flow of time will be different.
这意味着我们和她的时间流速不一致。
It means the velocity of our time is different from hers.
打从星震发生后，莱斯莉与我们的时间差将逐步增大。她发送复信的时间，会从一个月，变成一年，再延长到十年，都有可能。

Since the starquake, the temporal difference between Lesley's and ours will gradually increase. It is possible that the time it takes for her reply to arrive will change from one month to a year, and maybe even ten years.
不光是消息，她的任何活动都是如此。在她离开异常的重力环境之前，她在银河中每跋涉一个月，都将耗费我们数十年的等待。
This isn't just about her message, but everything she does. Until she leaves that abnormal gravity environment, every month she spends among the cosmos will equal decades for us.
如果说洛奇，包括我们在内，正生活在「现在」这样的此在之点。
Let's say, if Rocky, including us, is living at a point called "the present."
那么相对来说，莱斯莉她……
...I used to be a young man once.
我想，比起被拒绝，「本该」却「无法」和心意相通的人在一起，那才是更为残酷的事情。
In my opinion, not being able to be with someone you love is even more cruel than being rejected.
It's not up to you to decide!
所以你想告诉他真相。但请你告诉我，他又能做什么？
If you want to tell him the truth, then tell me — what can he do?
知道真相后，洛奇无非要用数十倍的时间，等一条本该很快返回的讯息。
After knowing the truth, Rocky will have to wait ten times longer for a message that should have arrived right away.
无非孤独地生活在此刻，等着那个有莱斯莉的未来，一步一步朝他走来。
He would have to live in this lonely present and wait for the future containing Lesley to finally come to him.
But how much time can he spend waiting?
也许当他垂垂老矣，成了我这样的老头子，莱斯莉终于回到了「黑塔」。
Maybe Lesley will finally return to the space station when he is old and decrepit like me.
但从她身上流过的时间是那么少，或许她还和现在一般无二年纪。
But the flow of time for her is so slow. Maybe, at that time, she will still be as young as she is today.
那时候，他们该怎么在一起？
When that time comes, how are they going to be together?
空间，可以逾越；但时间，触不可及！
We may transcend space, but time is beyond our reach!
你们都还太年轻…还不知道，这世间但凡需要等待的事，一般没有结果。
You are way too young... you don't understand. Things that require a lot of waiting don't usually end up well.
He will never give up if he doesn't know the truth.
本来，破坏纪录，取走零件，推在怪物身上，可以让洛奇永远寄希望于中继器被修好的那一天。
At first I thought if I damage the record, take away the parts, and blame everything on the monsters, I could keep Rocky in the hope that, one day the repeater will be repaired.
现在，既然是你揭开了这层纱，就由你来做决定吧。
Now, since you have found out, the decision is up to you.
我手上有两个从中继器拷贝下来的讯号转译录，分别是红色和蓝色。
I have two signal logs I copied from the repeater, red and blue.
红色转译录存着莱斯莉的真实回复，但里面包含关于星震的真相——老实说，以洛奇那小崽子的性格，就连我也无法预测他知道真相后会做出什么冲动事。
The red log contains Lesley's real reply, including the truth about the starquake. To be honest, even I can't imagine what Rocky will do after finding out the truth, given how impulsive he is.
蓝色转译录是我的伪造记录——莱斯莉会拒绝洛奇。别以为这样残忍，以后洛奇就不必再等她的回信，他的人生还有机会。
The blue log is forged — in which Lesley refuses Rocky. Don't think about this as cruel. This way, Rocky won't have to wait for her reply in the future. He can just move on with his life.
姑且就称它们为红色真相与蓝色谎言吧，由你选择该把哪个转译备份交给他。
Let's call these "the red truth" and "the blue lie." It's up to you to decide which one you want to give to him.
拿好，仔细地想一想。洛奇还在等你的消息。
Take them and give it some thought. Rocky is waiting for your news.
哥们儿！你回来啦！你去的这段时间，我又写了一首《咏莱斯莉》。
Bro, you're back! While you were away, I wrote another poem called "Praise Lesley."
你修好了中继器对吧？我看到你还拿着转译备份…嘿嘿，哪个是我的？
Did you fix the repeater? I see you are holding decoded backups... Hehe, which one is for me?
怎么很犹豫的样子，确定红色是我的吗？
You seem hesitant. Are you sure the red one is for me?
怎么很犹豫的样子，确定蓝色是我的吗？
You seem hesitant. Are you sure the blue one is for me?
哦。那我拿去读取了，谢啦哥们儿！
Okay. I'll read it now. Thank you, bro!
怎么会这样…莱斯莉答应了我的表白，但星震那部分……
I can't believe it... Lesley said yes, but the starquake...
我、我脑子一下子转不过来了……
I... I can't get my head around this...
似乎是…因为星震的引力效应，她的时间每过去一个月，我的时间就会过去数十年。那岂不是等她回来，我已经像师父一样老了？
So... Because of the gravitational effect of the starquake, every month she spends in her time will be decades for me. Am I going to be as old as my master when she's back?
是不是这个意思？{NICKNAME}，你再帮我看看，我脑子不灵光，她是这个意思么？
Is my interpretation correct? {NICKNAME}, help me take a look. I'm a bit slow. Is that what she means?
This is not up to you.
她，去了未来。而我，留在现在…是这样吗？
She has gone to the future, and I am left in the present... Is this what happened?
那我想念她的漫长时间，对她来说，岂不只是一个毫不起眼的瞬息吗？
The decades I spend thinking about her will only be a fleeting moment for her, right?
真没想到，连时间也会对人不公平。
Who would've thought that even time can be so unfair.
所以，指望她回来是不现实了。就算她行进数月，跨越光年，在我的时间坐标里，我已经成了老头一个。
I guess it's unrealistic to hope that she will come back. Even if she travels for months and crosses light-years, I will have become an old man in my time.
用一辈子的时间去等一个人，忍受无尽的思念与孤独……
Spending my whole life waiting for someone and enduring endless longing and loneliness...
老实说，哥们儿，你不会真以为我那么天真吧？
Come on, bro, do you really think I'm that naive?
哈哈！我当然是不会等她的！我不会等！
Haha! Of course I'm not going to wait for her! I won't!
I am not going to wait for her...
但我要去追她。我要去，追赶时间！
But I can go after her. I am going to chase after time!
既然她的时空曲线已经成了一座大峡谷，那与其盼着她出来，由我去翻越这座大峡谷不就行了吗？
Since her time-space curve has become a canyon, wouldn't it be better for me to travel past this canyon instead of waiting for her to come back?
也许我会花十年的时间找到刚度过一个月的她，但我们的时间流速就能从此同频，总比在这里坐以待毙来得好。
Maybe it will take me ten years to find her, who has only spent a month. But once I do that, our time will be synchronized. It's better than sitting here and doing nothing.
不，无论{NICKNAME}你怎么看，我都已经决定了！我会尽快跟师父打好招呼，收拾行李，出发去找莱斯莉。
No, no matter what you think, {NICKNAME}, I've decided! I should inform my master as soon as possible, pack my things, and set off on my journey to find Lesley.
我在这里也早就呆腻了…身为「黑塔•寰宇地概科」的科员，连真正的银河也没见过，说出去早晚笑掉别人的大牙。
I'm already tired of this place... As a member of the Herta Department of Cosmic Geography, I haven't even seen the real cosmos. Isn't it embarrassing?
我想你肯定和我一样，也很好奇那深空中到底还有何种景象。
I'm sure you are just as curious as I am about the scenery in deep space.
What resides in the deep space?
It may be full of dangers.
壮绝寂寞的奇观，未知美丽的危险，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
Spectacular wonders, enigmatic dangers, and the woman I am chasing after...
也许吧…有未知美丽的危险，也有壮绝寂寞的奇观，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
Maybe... It may be full of spectacular wonders, enigmatic dangers, but it will also have the woman I am chasing after...
至少对我来说，那里有壮绝寂寞的奇观，未知美丽的危险，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
At least for me, there are lonely wonders, the mysterious charm of danger, and the person I am chasing after...
等我找到莱斯莉，总有一天，我会回来告诉你我在这趟旅程所看见的一切……
When I find Lesley one day, I will come back and tell you everything I witnessed on my journey...
那时，我还要请你当我们的{F#伴娘}{M#伴郎}，你可别忘了这个约定啊。
By then, I will invite you to be our {F#bridesmaid}{M#best man}. Don't you forget it.
那么，这首诗送给你，再见了，我的朋友。
Well, this poem is for you. Goodbye, my friend.
黑暗在远方列队。用近乎残忍的方式
Darkness is gathering in the distance, using cruel methods...
解剖着时间。询问爱情的花瓣已经下坠
To dissect time. Petals inquiring for love are falling,
如同无限时空中、滴答的钟声。我们别无选择
Like the ticking chimes in an infinite time and space. We have no choice,
只能滑入宇宙那不详的颤抖，如同滑下一道黄昏的斜坡
But to slide into the shivering calamities of the universe as if sliding down a slope into dusk.
就这样，群星依旧在头顶赏乐，沿途将是它们优雅的倦容。
And with that, the stars continue their enjoyment above as their elegant smiles fill the way forward.
哦。那我拿去读取了，谢啦哥们儿！
Okay. I'll read it now. Thank you, bro!
怎么会这样…莱斯莉，拒绝了我？
I can't believe it... Lesley rejected me?
可我明明已经很努力了啊…她问的每个问题，我都有问必答。她讲的每个笑话，我都有捧场……
I tried so hard... I answered all the questions she asked. I laughed at every joke she made...
而且，你也看过那些消息吧？她会关心我，安慰我…难道那些也只是普通的同事情谊吗？
You've seen our messages, right? She cares about me and she comforts me... is that how colleagues behave?
Maybe she has her own reason...
苦衷？她能有什么苦衷…沐浴在神眷里，接触第一手的资料，和杰出的科考队员密切合作……
Reason? What kind of reason... She's bathing in divine blessings, she receives first-hand information and gets to work with top researchers...
真要有苦衷，那也只能是我…我不知好歹，一直纠缠她。
If she really has a reason, I am the only one to blame... I've been hassling her without knowing the boundaries...
那还会是谁的呢？难道是莱斯莉的错？
Whose fault is it then? Lesley's?
There's plenty of fish in the sea.
我谁都不在乎，我只在乎莱斯莉。
I don't care about other women. I only want Lesley.
…没想到等了这么久等来这样一条消息。
...I can't believe this is what I've been waiting for.
嘿，还不如不让你去修呢，让你看笑话了不是。
I shouldn't have asked you to fix this. It's so embarrassing.
都怪我太自信。也对，地概科的小科员，黑塔鄙视链的底层，怎么配得上密卷科的明星学者？

I shouldn't have been so confident. I am only a small potato in the Department of Cosmic Geography, the bottom of the space station's food chain. I must be stupid to think that I'm good enough for a prominent researcher from the Department of Insight.
她身边又是何等角色，汇集了全银河、全宇宙的智囊，我？连吊车尾都排不上。
Come to think about it, who is she surrounded with? The aggregated wisdom of the entire cosmos, or even the universe. And who am I? I'm not even in the same league.
呵呵…我这副自怨自艾的样子，又要讨师父的骂了。
Heheh... Master's going to lecture me when he sees me being pathetic again.
只是被拒绝了，对我洛奇来说，也算不上什么大事。实在不行，遇到再来挑衅地概科的人，我就狠狠地揍他们一顿。
It's just a rejection. It's no big deal to me. If anyone dares to challenge the Department of Cosmic Geography right now, I'm gonna teach them a lesson.
这些诗也得藏起来，可不能让他们看见。
I better hide these poems. I can't let anyone see them.
这些诗写得怪好笑的，是吧？
哥们儿你要是也这么觉得，也别憋着，就笑出来吧。
Bro, if you want to laugh, laugh. There's no need to hold back.
我眼睛怎么，好像进了点滑石粉…这东西也能弄进眼睛，真滑稽，简直就和我的诗一样滑稽。
What the heck? Why is there talcum powder in my eyes... Ridiculous, just like my poems.
我先去处理一下，再见了，哥们儿。
I should go fix it. See you, bro.
只是被拒绝了，对我洛奇来说，也算不上什么大事。只是可惜了我一大堆的石头，都雕了些什么玩意儿……
It's just a rejection. It's no big deal to me. But what am I going to do with these rocks? Ridiculous carvings...
勘星钎也送出去了…回头和师父认个错就是了，空间站不也还有一把么，不是什么珍贵的东西……
I even gave away my Astro Rod... I better go and apologize to my master. There should be another one in the space station. It's not anything expensive anyway...
要把精力放在研究上，毕竟个别人…的认同不重要，重要的是同事们的认可。
I should shift my focus back to my research. After all, some people's recognition... doesn't matter. Recognition from my colleagues is what matters.
总有一天，总会有人，能看见我洛奇的闪光点。
One day, one day someone will see my advantages.
…那个，我眼睛可能进了点滑石粉，没想到，这东西也能弄进眼睛……
... Well, some talcum powder got into my eyes. Who would've thought it could get into my eyes...
我先去处理一下，再见了，哥们儿。
I should go fix it. See you, bro.
没想到你这年轻人，还会回来找我这个老头子。
I never thought you would visit me again, kid.
来把多余的备份还给你。
I'm here to return the other backup to you.
有始有终，是个可塑之才。多余的这一份，是蓝色转译录…看来，你还是把真相告诉了他。
You are someone who finishes what you started. This is the blue log... so you told him the truth.
你也担心洛奇的情况吧…
You must be worried about Rocky...
…我有什么好担心的！路是你们年轻人自己选的，遇到风险就得自己承担，我这种老头子，也只能在旁边干着急。
Not at all! You choose your own path and suffer your own consequences. An old man like me can do nothing but worry.
你手上剩下的是蓝色转译录…所以洛奇得知了真相，那小崽子现在如何？
This is the blue log... So Rocky found out the truth. How did he cope with it?
他愿意为了莱斯莉付出一切。
He's willing to do anything for Lesley.
…哼，也就是他那样一个地概科的愣头青、穷光蛋，才会血气上头，认为自己付得起所谓一切。
Hmph, only a Department of Cosmic Geography imbecile who lives in poverty would think he has nothing to lose.
也罢…要是我伯纳德的徒弟一点血性也没有，那才是丢尽了我的脸。
Fine... I would be ashamed if my student is a cold-blooded lizard.
我只是怕他所谓的付出一切，是要离开空间站，那我还是会有点…舍不得啊。
I'm just worried that when you said he's willing to do anything, it includes leaving the space station. I will... miss him.
He's even more impulsive than I thought.
…哼，你不用说完我也知道，那小子八成早晚会离开空间站，寻找莱斯莉。
Hmph, I knew it. I knew that he'd leave the space station to look for Lesley.
只是事情真的发展到了这一步，对我这个老头来说，还是有点…舍不得。
But just when it actually happens, I think... I will miss him a lot.
毕竟，我这大半辈子的心血，除去倾注给地概科研究的那部分，就是给了洛奇这小子。
After all, other than Department of Cosmic Geography, I devoted the majority of my life to Rocky.
He may leave the space station...
Hmph, I knew it from the very beginning.
只是…他好歹是我的徒弟，要我亲手促成他的离开，心中还是有许多不舍。
Just that... he's my student. I can't stand being the cause of his departure.
哈哈。有时候真是不知道，这股子不知天高地厚的冲劲，到底是他的优点，还是他的致命缺陷。
Haha, sometimes I really wonder if his naïve ambition is his virtue or weakness.
不过我想，既然这道关于爱情和莱斯莉的难题是由时间出予他作答的……
But I think it is "time" who threw this question at him, about love and Lesley...
那么，就由时间来揭晓终点的答案吧。
So, let's see what answer time will give him.
没想到你这年轻人，还会回来找我这个老头子。
I never thought you would visit me again, kid.
来把多余的备份还给你。
I'm here to return the other backup to you.
有始有终，是个可塑之才。多余的这一份，是红色转译录…看来，你选择向他隐瞒真相。
You are someone who finishes what you started. This is the red log... so you chose not to tell him the truth.
你也担心洛奇的情况吧…
You must be worried about Rocky...
…我有什么好担心的！路是你们年轻人自己选的，遇到风险就得自己承担，我这种老头子，也只能在旁边干着急。
Not at all! You choose your own path and suffer your own consequences. An old man like me can do nothing but worry.
你手上剩下的是红色转译录…所以最后，你也骗了他。那小崽子，现在如何？
This is the red log... so in the end, you chose to lie to him. How is he doing?
He's more fragile than I thought.
…没错。你别看洛奇那小崽子平时大大咧咧，横冲直撞。他爱写诗，就说明心思比普通科员更为细腻。
Right. He may seem rough and direct, but the fact that he loves writing poetry shows his emotions are more delicate than the average researcher.
捧出一颗敏感的心，却被最为在意的心上人拒之门外——无疑是一种毁灭性的打击。听说，他把写的那些诗全撕了，这就是证明。
He gave her his sensitive heart but got rejected by someone he cares a lot about. It's undoubtedly devastating to him. I heard he tore up all the poems. That's the proof.
不过，从好的方面来看，你的选择也给了他一次磨练内心的机会。
However, on the bright side, your decision also gave him a chance to toughen up.
He tore up the poems he wrote.
…是吗？这说明他受到的打击实在是不小，可惜了那些诗歌……
Did he? He must be devastated. I feel sorry for those poems...
小崽子，别用那种「你不嫌是酸诗吗」的怀疑目光看我。我虽然主张把研究精力用在正途上，但也不会漠视洛奇的心血。
Hey, what's that look on your face? I admit I did say they are "cringy," but I'd never ignore Rocky's efforts despite thinking think he should focus on his research.
那些诗歌，记录着他的心事。某种程度上，也是他人生的一部分。全撕了确实可惜，可叹。但是……
Those poems are records of his feelings. To some extent, they are part of his life. It's a shame that he tore them up. However...
Do you think he'll be able to pull himself together?
你的担心不无道理。我听说他把写的那些诗也全撕了…也好，就像有些科员失恋后也会选择剪去头发，象征新的开始。
Your concern is not groundless. I heard he's torn up all of his poems... Well, some researchers cut their hair after a breakup, symbolizing a new start.
多吃几顿好的，多睡几天大觉，把自己抛入研究工作的海洋，甚至找点不着调的缺德乐子…相信他早晚也能振作起来。
With a couple of good meals and a good rest, he'll throw himself back into his research, or even indulge himself in a random hobby... I'm sure he'll get over it sooner or later.
对年轻人来说，不论什么糟心事，那都是穿肠过的事。人生还长，这日子也总得过下去。
No matter how bad the situation is, young people can put it behind them in a blink of an eye. Life is long, we all have to live our lives.
有些实在无法遗忘的心结会伴随一生，直到我这把年纪，还无法释怀。那时候，这心结，也就成了一辈子的伙伴。
Some regrets will always stay in your life. Even at my age, there are regrets I can't let go of. By then, your regrets will become your life-long partner.
希望你也能找到忠于自己的伙伴，也希望这个伙伴，不是一件无法遗忘的憾事。
I hope you can find a partner who's loyal to you. And I hope this partner will never become a regret in your life.
I don't want such a partner.
这样的想法很有魄力，可惜…大部分时候总是事与愿违。
That is a bold idea. Unfortunately... Things don't always go the way we want.
Seems there's a story behind it.
哈哈，没有什么故事，年轻人别想太多。
Haha, there isn't. Don't overthink it, young one.
对了，其实不是所有的诗歌都被洛奇给撕掉了……我这里还剩下一份。
By the way, Rocky didn't destroy all the poems... I kept one.
这是当他听我讲述完一对被时空阻隔的恋人的故事后，所创作的东西。
He wrote this after I told him a story about a couple who was separated by time and space.
Keep it. This is a souvenir for you.
…必须时刻保持十二分的警惕，才能将星火燎原之前将其熄灭…
...We must stay vigilant at all times if we are to prevent any potential disasters from getting out of hand...
防卫科负责人阿兰，向你报…啊，原来是{NICKNAME}。不好意思，没有第一时间认出你来。
Arlan, head of security, reporting to... Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I didn't recognize you at first.
我刚刚在思考怎么加强防卫科的灾患特训，毕竟这也是复兴计划的重要一环。「军团」胆敢再次来犯，别想再从我这讨到任何便宜！

I was just thinking about ways to improve the Security Department's emergency response training. After all, this is also an important part of Project Revival. If the Legion dares to attack us again, I don't want to make things easier for them!
嗯，复兴计划是艾丝妲小姐多方搜集空间站受损信息后，与五大科室负责人共同制定的一套灾后运转机制。

Well, Project Revival is a set of post-disaster operational protocols that Lady Asta and the heads of the five departments collaboratively developed, using data gathered about the damage sustained by the space station.
那是因为我非常相信艾丝妲小姐！
That's because I have a lot of faith in Lady Asta!
复兴计划可是她多方搜集空间站受损信息后，与五大科室负责人共同制定的一套灾后运转机制。

Project Revival is a set of post-disaster operational protocols that Miss Asta and the heads of the five departments collaboratively developed, using data gathered about the damage sustained by the space station.
其中还涉及许多其他机密概念，比如什么奇物再收容小队，安全区划立，「星际和平公司」定损之类的……
It also involves many other confidential initiatives, such as the Curio Collection Squad, security zoning, and the Interastral Peace Corporation's damage assessment.
奇物再收容小队，安全区划立，「星际和平公司」定损，这些都包含在复兴计划内。
Curio Collection Squad, security zoning, and the damage assessment of Interastral Peace Corporation are all part of Project Revival.
嗯，这都要归功于艾丝妲小姐和各科室负责人思路清晰，规划得当。
Well, it's all due to the clear thinking and proper planning by Lady Asta and the heads of the various departments.
但复兴计划实施起来并不容易，艾丝妲小姐也认为目前需要的人手超出了我们的预期……
But the implementation of Project Revival is not easy, and Lady Asta believes that the number of personnel needed exceeds our previous estimates.
虽然有些唐突，不过{NICKNAME}，你愿意帮忙吗？
Sorry if it seems to come out of nowhere, but {NICKNAME}, would you like to help?
之前与那帮「军团」怪物对阵的时候，{NICKNAME}你保护了我，是值得信赖的同伴。
You protected me in the past when we battled those Legion monsters, {NICKNAME}. You are truly a trustworthy comrade.
所以我第一时间想到了你。
That's why I immediately thought of seeking your help.
Please just order me around as you please!
怎么能说是差使…你愿意来帮忙，我们真的感激不尽。
This is not an "order" at all... If you are willing to help, we'd really appreciate it.
其实也不是什么棘手的事，科员们目前都在为复兴计划忙乎，我想拜托你到<color=#dbc291ff>空间站的各个舱段</color>看看他们是否需要<color=#dbc291ff>协助</color>。

It's nothing too difficult, really. The department staff are busy with Project Revival. Can you please go to <color=#dbc291ff>every zone in the space station</color> to see if they need <color=#dbc291ff>assistance</color>?
对了，这里是委托费，一共<unbreak>648</unbreak>…
By the way, here is your commission fee. A total of <unbreak>648</unbreak>...
我、我也不知道该给多少…我在这一直是包吃住的，对钱也没什么概念……
I—I'm not sure how much I should offer you... Since my living expenses are all already covered by the space station, I have no idea how much money is worth.
Please don't turn down the offer...
We can't put a price on our friendship.
<unbreak>648</unbreak> is a huge sum of money!
那么，就拜托你了！我向艾丝妲站长申请了「{NICKNAME}」专属的权限卡。
Well, we shall count on you, then. I will also ask the lead researcher, Asta, to issue an access card exclusively for you.
有{NICKNAME}协助复兴计划的稳步推进，希望艾丝妲小姐今后能多睡几个好觉……
Hopefully, with your help in Project Revival, Lady Asta will finally get a good night's sleep.
请、请放心，基座舱段的险况已经完全处于奇物再收容小队的控、控制中！
P—Please rest assured that this zone is now completely under the con—control of the Curio Collection Squad!
发、发抖？我没、没有，你一定是搞错了。
Shaking? It i—is not. You must've misheard.
呼，呼…镇定，亚伯拉罕。作为奇物再收容小队队员，必须时刻保持冷静。
