Just let everything go back to the way it was.
不知道古恩是否会按照约定，销毁原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>呢？
I wonder if Gunn will really destroy Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> as agreed?
那么精细的实验品，就算是医学诊断也无法察觉她与真人的不同。除了…在她的脖颈侧面，隐藏着一个<unbreak>157</unbreak>的编号。

Such a fine piece of technological experimentation. Even the most advanced diagnostic equipment couldn't detect the difference between her and a real person. Except... on the side of her neck, there is a vague mark with the number <unbreak>157</unbreak>.
如果真的被销毁，不得不说是一种巨大的遗憾。
I have to say, it would be a shame if it really were destroyed.
可惜她始终不是真正的「人」
It's a shame. No matter what, she's not a real "person."
…你那里还存着希拉的录像带吧？是时候把它们归还到应去的地方。
...You still have Sheila's videos there? It's time to return them to their rightful place.
Just let everything go back to the way it was.
用自己的眼睛，去经历他人的人生，这就是录像的魅力。
Experience other people's lives with your very own eyes. That is the charm of those videos.
录像带我全都带回来了。
三个。一个不多，一个不少。这一路辛苦你了，年轻人。坐下来歇一会儿吧。
Three. Not one too many. You've worked hard, young one. Sit down and have a rest.
作为回报，我想给你讲一个不知从什么时候听来的故事，你有兴趣听吗？
In return, I want to tell you a story I heard god knows when. You want to hear it?
曾经，在「黑塔•银河法政科」，有两位美名远扬的年轻人，他们既是一对志趣相投的战友，也是一对互相砥砺的伉俪。

Once, in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, there were two well-known young people. They were not only comrades in arms with similar interests but also a couple who pushed each other to become better.
他们致力于为弱者争取权益，为被星神派系践踏之人伸张正义。
They were committed to fighting for the weak and upholding justice for those who were trampled by Aeons and their factions.
直到有一天，「正义」不再成了一个纸上谈兵的词——「绝灭大君」降临在了女科员的故乡，她的母星即将毁于一旦——两人第一次对如何执行「正义」产生了分歧。

Until one day, justice was no longer just an ideal. A Lord Ravager came to the female researcher's hometown, and her home planet was about to be destroyed. For the first time ever, the two disagreed on how justice should be implemented in this scenario.
于是，那位女科员选择孤身返程去报信，却不料在路程中发生了意外。
The female researcher chose to return to her home planet alone to alert them of the disaster, but unexpectedly, an accident occurred during her journey.
由于星轨被「星核」所阻塞，她的航器也搁浅在「反物质军团」的必经之路上。在绝对的恐惧中，她选择向「黑塔」求援。
At the time, the star rail was blocked by a Stellaron and her spacecraft was also stranded in the path of the Antimatter Legion. In absolute fear, she chose to call the Herta Space Station for help.
然而「黑塔」在一切有涉星神的行动中都选择了中立，而负责通报这条冷酷无情的讯息的接线员，正是那名男科员。

However, the space station had chosen to remain neutral in all actions involving the Aeons, and the operator responsible for relaying this ruthless message was none other than the male researcher himself.
隔着无线电，他亲自见证了无人救援的爱人，是如何在破损的航器中耗尽了氧气，又是如何在无尽的黑暗漂流中缓慢走向死亡。
Through the radio, he personally witnessed how his stranded lover ran out of oxygen in the damaged aircraft and how she slowly died drifting into the endless darkness.
…不知怎的，今天我突然想起了这则令人唏嘘的故事，说来与你一听。
... For some reason, this tragic story just came to mind today. Thought I'd share it with you.
The researcher in the story is...
哈，故事的主人公并不重要。我就是和你讲个故事，如有雷同，想必纯属巧合。
Ha, that's not important. I'm just telling a story. Any resemblance to real-life events is purely coincidental.
没错，她是一位真正的英雄。
Yes, she was a real hero.
她罹难之后，科员们进行了反思——如果我们终其一生只是在讨论纸面上的正义、局部的正义，却对银河中频繁上演的不幸袖手旁观，那真是忝为正义的一方。

After her death, the researchers reexamined the question of justice. If we spend our whole life debating justice but choose to stand idly by when there are actual injustices happening all over the cosmos, then what we're really doing is just making a mockery of justice.
故事里的他一定无法释怀。
This must have been tormenting for him.
也许吧。不过我相信，人生漫长，他一定已经找到了弥补过往、获取平静的方法。
Maybe. However, I believe that in his long life, he must have found a way to make up for the past and obtain peace.
好啦，故事今天就讲到这里。那么这些报酬请拿着，希望以后还有机会见到你。
Well, that's all for today. Please take these rewards. I hope to see you again in the future.
毕竟这世上，还有许多秘密等待着有缘人的见证。
After all, there are still many secrets in this world waiting to be unearthed.
I have other matters to attend to...
我明白了，那么这些报酬请拿着，希望以后还有机会见到你。
I see. Please take these rewards. I hope to see you again in the future.
毕竟这世上，还有许多秘密等待着有缘人的见证。
After all, there are still many secrets in this world waiting to be unearthed.
您好，我的名字是希拉•诺娃，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导。
Hello, I am Sheila Nova, the guide from the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics.
I didn't expect to see you again.
我们之前…见过吗？不好意思，作为向导，一天之内要和太多人打交道，请{M#先生}{F#小姐}原谅我的健忘。
Have we... met before? Sorry, as a guide, I have to deal with many people every day. Please excuse me, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}, for my forgetfulness.
现在我有事在身——我到这里来，替法政科的古恩•科诺列夫先生取几卷录像带。
I am busy right now — I'm here to pick up some videos for Mr. Gunn Konolev of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.
我到这里来，替法政科的古恩•科诺列夫先生取几卷录像带。
I'm here to pick up some videos for Mr. Gunn Konolev of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.
恕不闲聊了，我还在等待以斯帖科员的录像带借用权限批准。如果您愿意，以后请随时到这里来，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导欢迎您的垂询。

Sorry, but I don't have time for chitchat. I'm still waiting for researcher Esther to approve the request for videotape access. You are free to come here whenever you like. The Department of Galactic Geopolitics guide welcomes your inquiries.
这位冰冷而妥帖的法政科向导一如既往的微笑着。
The cold, proper guide from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics is always smiling.
在她的脖颈处，有着一行精致的数字：<unbreak>158</unbreak>。
On her neck, there is a faint line of numbers: <unbreak>158</unbreak>.
唔，这事的确有些不好办，不过…咦，是{NICKNAME}，你总算来了。
Hmm, this is tricky, but... Oh, {NICKNAME}, you are here.
I heard you are looking for me?
嗯，我想请你帮忙调查「螺中笑声」感染的模因病毒的源头。
Yeah. I want you to investigate the source of the memetic virus that infected the Crackup Conch.
是我们这儿的一件奇物。看上去只是个普通的海螺，但凑近了可以听见从里边远远传来的没品笑话。
It's one of our Curios. It looks like an ordinary conch, but when you get close, you can hear the dirty jokes coming from the inside.
只要使用者忍住不笑，就能缓慢获得其中蕴藏的神秘力量。当然啦，至今也没人成功过，所以我们只在审讯的时候才会用到它。
As long as you hold your laughter, you can slowly obtain the secret power it contains. Of course, no one has succeeded so far, so we only use it on people in interrogations.
是一种像病毒一样能不断传播的信息粒子，会给寄主带来思维性质上的改变与污染。
It is a kind of information particle that spreads around exponentially like a virus, which will bring changes and contamination to the host's nature of thinking.
很不幸的是，它能在非生命物质上传播，并改变了「螺中笑声」的对外表现——它不再讲笑话了，而是不断讲些臭烘烘的怪话。
Unfortunately, it can infect inanimate objects, and thus it changed the Crackup Conch's external expression — it no longer tells jokes, but instead, it keeps talking weird nonsense.
什么「跳出舒适圈，不然你就废掉了」「你吃过的苦会照亮你的路」的…这种毒鸡汤实在令人轻松不起来。
Like "Get out of your comfort zone, or you'll be wasted," or "The pain you suffer will light up your way"... cliché quotes that just make people cringe.
谢谢讲解，我大概了解了。
Thank you for the explanation. I got the gist.
我派人去检查了一下，发现这是感染了模因病毒引发的畸变。但「螺中笑声」的收容工作并无任何异常，也就是说，这绝不可能是它自行感染上的。

I had someone examine it and found that it was caused by the memetic virus. But the Crackup Conch has been properly stored all this time, which means it's impossible for it to get infected on its own.
唯一的可能性是——有早已感染了病毒的工作人员，在与它接触时的附带传染。所以我去排查了一遍近期接触了它的人员名单，锁定了三位可疑人员。

The only possibility is that workers who were already infected passed on the virus when they came into contact with the item. After I looked into the list of people who had recent contact with it, I identified three suspects.
哎呀，接下来的你也该懂了吧，我就是想请你帮忙调查一下这三位可疑人员嘛。
Well, I'm sure you already know what I'm about to say next. I want you to investigate these three suspects for me.
嘿嘿，能者多劳嘛。再说啦，并不是我故意欺负你，我先前安排过防卫科员去调查，但他们统统失败啦。
Hehe, with great power comes great responsibility. Besides, I'm not just trying to take advantage of you. I sent people from the Security Department earlier, but they all failed.
Is the Security Department here just for show?
名单一出来，我就安排他们去核查了，但是调查结果都是「正常」。
I arranged for them to investigate as soon as I identified the list of suspects. But they all found nothing unusual.
由于这几位可疑人员在空间站也待了一段时间，和防卫科员也算是熟稔了，可能存在被故意蒙混过去的情况。
Since these suspects have spent a fair bit of time in the space station, they are pretty familiar with the Security Department. They might have gotten away with their possible misconduct.
因此之前压根就无法得到有效的调查结果，所以我想请你帮个忙——因为你和他们并不算特别熟，以陌生人的视角去观察，反而容易发现破绽。

I, therefore, could not get any useful investigation results. That's why I need to ask you for a favor — you don't know them very well. It may be easier for you to spot their flaws from a stranger's perspective.
放心吧，各种意义上你都称得上是拯救了空间站的英雄，没人会对你起疑心的。
Don't worry, you are a hero who has saved the space station. No one will suspect you.
而且这事做起来也很简单的，无非是到他们旁边，听听看他们的表现是否有异常之处。
And it is not rocket science. You just need to walk up to them and listen, then see if there are any unusual behaviors.
但凡是你觉得不太正常的地方，通通记下来跟我汇报一下就好。怎么样，帮个忙呗？
If you find anything weird, just write it down and report it to me. So, what do you think?
No problem. I'll take care of it.
太好啦，你愿意帮忙我就放心啦。不过也不能亏待你，等我想想……
That's great. I'm so relieved that you're willing to help. I will reward you fairly. Let me think...
I can help, but are there any rewards...
放心好啦，你想要什么呢？听说最近很流行歼星舰，不过那玩意吨位挺大，感觉你未必会喜欢……
Don't worry. Do you have anything in mind already? I heard the starnought fleet has been very popular recently. But that thing is huge. I don't think you'll like it...
唔…既然搞不懂你的喜好，那我就清空你的购物车好了。不走预算，我自费，你随意。
Well... I don't know your taste. Why don't I pay for everything in your shopping cart out of my own pocket? You are free to choose whatever you like.
好了，我先跟你说下三位可疑人员吧——分别是密卷科的梅厄、法政科的克里斯，还有医疗科员乔安。
Well, let me tell you about the three suspects — Mare from the Department of Insight, Chris from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and Joanne from the Medical Department.
他们一般都待在各自科室的舱段里，现在空间站这个情况，一般不会跑到别的什么地方去…那么，接下来就拜托你啦~
They usually stay in their own cabins. Given the station's current situation, I don't think they'll be anywhere else... So, please help me take care of this.
（梅厄就在前面，还是不要惊动她，就藏在这附近听听她在说什么好了。）
(Mare is right ahead. I better not alert her. I'll hide around here and listen to what she says.)
哈——呼——哈——呼，是这样吗，好像发音有点不够标准…唔……我再练练好了。
HAA — HU — HAA — HU, am I doing this right? I feel like my pronunciation is not very good... hmm... I better keep practicing.
那么蓬松的毛发、健硕的四肢…要是能摸摸该有多好啊，呸呸，我怎么能有这种亵渎的想法。
Fluffy hair and strong limbs... If only I could touch it. Bah! What kind of dirty ideas is this?
啊，要能成为它们的奴仆该有多好…嘶——我再练练吧，这样下去迟早能……
Awww, how nice would it be if I can be their slave... Hiss. I just need to keep practicing, and one day I can...
咦，梅厄前辈，你最近的脸色比之前好多了，难道是我之前跟前辈说的那个…看来是起作用了？
Mare, you look much better lately. So the thing I told you about. It actually worked?
呃、那个，不是…是…啊抱歉，我、我，我是有顺着你说的那个方向去找，不过方向可能有点偏了…
Uhhh, well, no, that's not the case... Um, sorry, I—I did try to look up what you mentioned, but I might've gone off track halfway...
但、但是，也挺有用的，就是、就是…呃，你还有别的什么事吗？
But, yes, it's quite useful. It's just that... Well, is there anything else?
我想请教前辈一件事，是这样的…我总结了下一些星球中神话故事里的星神形象。
Well, there is something I wanna ask you about... So, I've been researching how Aeons are depicted in the mythological tales from different planets.
为什么他们为星神们描绘的形象都不同，甚至有所谓的「古兽崇拜」呢？
Why are they depicted so differently? Some even have this so-called "Leviathan Worship?"
古兽的话也可能是宠物哦，宠物的话…咳咳…我、我、哎呀，我刚刚那份研究报告还没写完，过几天我再答复你吧。
Leviathans can be pets too. Well, pets... ehem... I... Well, there is a research report that I haven't finished working on yet. So I'll get back to you later.
好呀好呀，不过最近都没看到前辈的身影，难道前辈是去异星进行田野调查了？咦，是有什么新发现吗，可以跟我透露下吗？
Sure. By the way, I haven't seen you around lately. Did you go on an exotic field trip? Did you discover anything new? Can you tell me anything?
那个、那个…以后再说吧，我、我没有……
Well... let's talk about this... later. I didn't...
哦哦我知道啦，前辈你刚回来肯定很忙，不过看你现在精神状态比以前好多了，我也就放心了，那我不打扰你啦。
Okay, I understand. You must be very busy since you just came back. Anyway, it's nice to see that you've recovered mentally. I'll leave you to it.
（这个梅厄的表现似乎也不太对劲啊。）
（一开始还在学什么古怪叫声，而且谈到什么「古兽崇拜」就心虚，难道…）
(At first she was imitating some strange sounds. Then when they talked about "Leviathan Worship," she looked very nervous...)
（难道是在研究中接触了什么不可名状的古神古兽的，被精神污染了？真是奇怪。）
(Did she come into contact with some kind of Leviathan during her research? And got her mind contaminated? That's very strange.)
（这位好像就是克里斯，先观察下他的行为举动好了。）
(I think this is Chris. Let me observe his behavior.)
喂喂喂！我说你，对对对，就是你，你想干嘛啊？你这什么眼神啊还瞪我…你、你别过来啊！
Hey, hey, hey! I'm talking to you, you! What are you doing? Why are you staring at me like that... Stay away from me!
我刚刚明明看到你在偷窥我，绝对错不了！
I saw you peeping at me. I am sure of it!
…你怎么知道我名字？天啊！难道你之前就在跟踪我，调查我的信息？你该不会……
...How did you know my name? Oh, my goodness! Have you been following me and investigating me? Did you...
等等，你这头发为什么要染成这样，就为了来我面前炫耀，标新立异博出位好玩吗？
Hold on, why did you dye your hair like that? Did you do that to show off in front of me, trying to stand out from everyone else?
还有你这衣服…故意不穿制服，就是为了炫你的名牌定制？
And your clothes... Why don't you wear the uniform? Are you trying to show off your luxurious tailor-made outfit?
大家都没你这样的，搞什么特殊，不就是为了炫耀自己的特权，生怕自己不够吸睛吗？
No one else has hair like that. You think you are very special, huh? You just want to show off your privileges! Such an attention seeker!
This is not a luxurious outfit.
哎，「不是什么名牌」，虽然你心里认为不是，但你看看我们穿的都是制服，只有你在出风头……
"This is not a luxurious outfit." That's just your opinion. Take a look at us. We are all wearing uniforms. And you, you are just trying to show off...
你尽管炫耀吧，不要摆出这种装作无辜的样子，我知道你这种人心理怎么想的，无非是觉得自己高人一等。
Show off as much as you want. Don't try to act all innocent. I know exactly what people like you think. You think you are better than us.
像你在虚拟世界里炫耀来炫耀去的还不够，还非要顺着平台找到我，当着我的面炫耀。
It's not enough for you to show off in the virtual world. You have to track me down and show off in front of my face.
只要有那么点点钱，就以为自己有了整个宇宙，等等，你这什么眼神，你眼睛里有东西？
You think you are so rich that you can own the universe. Wait a second. What's that look on your face? Is there something in your eyes?
…你装了角膜接触相机？你拍视频干嘛？难道是在直播？噢，我明白了，就是那种把欺负普通人当乐子的直播，你快走开，离我远点！

...You have a corneal contact camera? Why are you taking videos? Is this live? Oh, I get it. You are one of those people who likes to live-broadcast your bullying behavior. Now, go away and leave me alone!
（…这个克里斯好奇怪，这完全没办法正常交流啊。）
(...Chris is very strange. I can't have a normal conversation with this person...)
（感觉他好像有臆想症…难道，是被模因病毒感染了？）
(He's such a paranoid... Is he infected with the memetic virus?)
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
…咦，乔安，你今天怎么没继续睡觉了？稀奇啊，难道是湛蓝星开始绕着空间站自转了？
... Hey, Joanne, so surprised to see you are not still sleeping today. How rare! Maybe the Blue has also started to orbit around the space station?
检验报告结果已经出了，交由终端机发送到你的桌面上了，请启动审核流程。
The test results are out. I've sent them to you through the terminal. You may start the review process.
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
我的天，这…乔安都开始干活了，难道是我今天没睡醒？
My goodness... Joanne is actually working. Am I dreaming?
你才发现这事吗？算上她每天早来的三个小时，这都第七天了，你的消息也不怎么灵通嘛。
You are only noticing this now? She's been three hours early for work for the past seven days. Looks like you haven't been paying attention.
审核流程倒计时开始，还有三十分钟。
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
我才请了几天假，回来科室就变天了，我不能接受。乔安啊乔安，到底是谁把你变成这样的？这得受了多大的刺激啊！
I only took a few days off, and now our department has changed so much. I cannot believe it. Who turned you into this, Joanne? What happened to you!?
My guess is that it has something to do with the department's reform.
本季度星际和平公司那边砍了点医药研究的预算，所以连带着我们这里也遭殃了，我听人说要改制——
The Interastral Peace Corporation has cut the medical research budget this quarter. And we are also impacted. I heard there would be a reform...
这种动荡时期，想刷个高绩效不是很正常吗？怎么，难道你想看到自己的研究预算被砍？
It's not that unusual for people to try to get a high performance indicator during such turbulent times. You wouldn't want your research budget to be cut, would you?
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
你说得有道理，不过短时间内我还得平复下心情，这事儿实在是…实在是令人难以置信，哈哈——
You're right, but I still need some time to digest all this. It's all... it's really unbelievable, haha...
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
咱们医疗科室的「睡美人」居然不再打瞌睡，修身养性开始努力尽到自己的医师本分了，哈哈，这说出去压根不会有人信好吗！
The Sleeping Beauty of our medical department finally stopped sleeping and began to act on her duty as a doctor. Haha, no one's gonna believe this!
还有二十分钟，二十分钟内我要见到药物实验审批的结果。
<unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes left. I need to see the result of the drug test in <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes.
Surprised Researcher From Department of Implement Arts
好了好了，知道了，这就去。
All right, all right, got it. I'll get on it.
（听起来这个乔安好像蛮正常的，但她说话好怪哦。）
(Although Joanne looks normal, the way she speaks is very strange.)
（说话没有自己的情绪，表情看上去也很僵硬，像机器人一样，是不是有哪里不对……）
(She is emotionless when she talks and her face looks stiff, like a robot. Is there something wrong...)
（前面那位就是乔安，她好像在和什么人聊天，这附近…好像也没有能躲起来的地方……）
(Joanne is right in front of me. Looks like she's talking to someone. There's nowhere to hide...)
（有了！我假装自己在查询医疗服务不就行了！）
(I know! I'll just pretend I'm checking out the medical services!)
你回来啦，怎么样，调查出什么了吗？
You're back. How did it go? Did you find anything?
(Tell her your observation and your thoughts.)
听你这么说，三个人好像都有点问题，可是理论上来说，应该只有一名真正的感染者。
So, all three of them sound unusual. But in theory, there should only be one person who is infected.
不，这不符合「螺中笑声」上检测到的数据。
It can't be. It doesn't match the data detected in the Crackup Conch.
为什么你笃定只有一名？
Why are you so sure that only one person is infected?
因为我有科学验证过的检验数据。
Because I have test results that have been scientifically verified.
原理其实很简单，「螺中笑声」上遗留的模因病毒信息粒子的颗粒数量不高。
The principle behind it is actually quite simple. The viral load of informational particles left behind by the memetic virus in the Crackup Conch is simply not high enough.
满打满算勉强能达到一个成年人在感染后传播出来的极限值，所以绝不可能出现多人感染的情况。
The viral load detected barely reaches the amount that can be carried by an infected adult. So it's absolutely impossible for the Crackup Conch to have contracted the virus from multiple individuals.
But my investigation couldn't corroborate this...
没关系的，我早就设计好保底的方案了。
It's okay. I've got a backup plan.
嘿嘿，我可是留了后手的。
Hehe, I've got a backup plan.
模因病毒是通过虚拟数据传播的，而空间站里所有虚拟数据都会在终端机上留下完整的监控记录。
The memetic virus is transmitted through virtual data. And all the virtual data in the space station leave traces in the terminal.
既然之前调查不出什么来，那直接去查询这三位可疑人员的浏览记录，就能知道他们到底是哪位感染的了。
Since we couldn't get much from our previous investigation, let's check the browsing records of the three suspects. Then we should be able to identify the source of the infection.
嘿嘿，我之前为现在这种情况安排了紧急方案了。到这种时候，就要麻烦你跑一趟数据交换中心——也就是，终端机所在的机房。
Hehe, I've got an emergency plan for situations like this. Please visit the Data Exchange Center — where the terminal is located.
But I've never used a terminal...
安啦安啦，这个很简单的，进了机房通过身份验证，直接查询就好啦。
Don't worry. It's simple. Enter the terminal room, verify your identity, and you can start your query.
哎，我也是有苦衷的，这事说来话长。
*sigh* I have my own reasons. It's a long story.
因为终端机记录了每个数据设备使用者——也就是空间站上上下下所有人的使用记录，因此我也好，其他工作人员也好，都不方便去查。

Simply put, anyone using any data gadget, which basically includes everyone on the space station, would have their user behaviors recorded by the terminal. It is thus inappropriate for me or any other staff member to check such information.
Um, I still don't get it.
别急，等我慢慢跟你解释。
Don't worry. I'll explain to you when I have time.
I know. You are just looking for excuses to slack off.
才不是呢，要是我能去我早就去了。
It's not like that. I would have gone if I could.
你想想啊，空间站里往来人员的背景与身份各不相同，但在个人隐私方面大家都达成了一致。
Think about it. Despite different backgrounds and identities, people on the space station have reached an agreement on personal privacy.
终端机上能查到所有人使用虚拟数据留下的痕迹，比方说，你上班时间在访问一些奇怪的虚拟平台，在这儿都能看得到。
The traces left from using virtual data can be found on the terminal. For example, from here people can see all the unusual virtual platforms you visited during your working hours.
因此，基于尊重大家隐私的考量，我也好，其他工作人员也好，最好还是别碰终端机。
Therefore, to respect everyone's privacy, no one, including myself and the other staff, should access the terminal.
设身处地地想一下，假如你是空间站的工作人员，你能接受我去翻阅你在虚拟网络上的浏览记录这种事吗？
Think about it in their shoes, if you are space station staff, would you be happy with me going through your browsing records on the virtual network?
对啊，现在你该明白了吧？正因如此，你特殊的身份才是干这件事的最好人选！
Now you understand, right? That's why your special identity makes you the perfect candidate for this!
这就要从你的英雄事迹与特殊身份说起了。
Let me start with your heroic deeds and your special identity.
So, you just want me to get beaten up?
诶，你成天都胡思乱想些什么呢？我和你无冤无仇的，怎么会害你。
Jeez, is this the kind of nonsense you think about all day? I have nothing against you. Why would I set you up?
从客观角度来看，你算是空间站的「外人」，跟大部分人都不熟，因此也不存在私交与针对某个人的可能。
From an objective point of view, you are an outsider on the space station. You are not familiar with most people here, so it's unlikely that you hold any personal grudge against anyone.
并非每个外来人都有资格去查阅大家的数据记录，但你不一样，你是拯救了空间站的英雄，大家都信得过你的人品。
Not every outsider has the right to access the data records. But you are different. You are the hero who saved the space station. People trust your moral character.
当然啦，如果你愿意帮忙，我希望你能对自己见到的所有数据记录都保密。
But of course, if you do decide to help, I hope you will keep everything you see strictly confidential.
No problem. My lips are sealed.
哎，总之在空间站的时候全程保密就好，之后你要去哪儿做些什么我也管不着。
Anyway, keep it all a secret while you're still in the space station. As for where you go or what you do in the future, it's none of my business.
Piece of cake. Just leave it to me.
在走之前，我先跟你讲讲终端机的使用规则吧。
Before you leave, let me tell you how to use the terminal.
因为之前空间站被入侵过，整个数据中心都遭受重创，终端机所在的机房也不例外。
As you know, the invasion of the station severely damaged the whole data center. And the server room where the terminal is housed is no exception.
尽管我们很努力地在维修了，但至今还没有完全恢复过来。之前发现了模因病毒感染者的事情后，我就只能派了个维修工程师每天去盯着。

Despite our best efforts, the damage is yet to be fully remediated. And reported cases of memetic virus infection only made things worse. I had to send a maintenance engineer to monitor the situation on a daily basis.
<color=#dbc291ff>工程师每天都会手动开启光学身份校验程序</color>，用来检验进入房间的每位访问者的生物电是否正常，以此确保终端机房间不被入侵。

<color=#dbc291ff>The engineer would turn on the optical identity verification program manually every day</color> to check whether the bioelectricity of each visitor entering the room is normal, thus ensuring that the terminal room is not invaded.
由于光学身份校验程序是<color=#dbc291ff>在每天开启后动态刷新的，因此你每次进去都需要重新校验身份。</color>
Since the optical identity verification program is <color=#dbc291ff>refreshed dynamically after it is turned on every day, you need to re-verify your identity every time you enter.</color>
至于更多的细节，就<color=#dbc291ff>请你找维修工程师咨询</color>吧，进入房间的权限与相关事项我已经和工程师交代过了。
For more details, please <color=#dbc291ff>consult the maintenance engineer</color>. I've told the engineer that you have permission to enter the room.
那么，接下来就拜托你了！
So... I will leave the rest to you!
终端机屏幕上跳出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「错误代码<unbreak>505</unbreak>：服务不可用」</color>
A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Code error <unbreak>505</unbreak>: Service unavailable."</color>
除此以外便没有任何回应。
有人喘着气急急忙忙跑着回到了房间，看起来，他就是艾丝妲所说的<color=#dbc291ff>「维修工程师」</color>。
Someone runs back into the room, panting. Looks like he's the <color=#dbc291ff>"maintenance engineer"</color> Asta mentioned.
既然终端机没有反应，不如去问问他好了。
The terminal doesn't respond. Let me ask him.
你就是{NICKNAME}吧？艾丝妲站长说要来用终端机的那位——她之前已经跟我交代好了。
Are you {NICKNAME}? Asta already gave me a heads up that you are going to come use the terminal.
非常抱歉，刚刚隔壁机组的系统突然自动更新了，有几个科室的研究员还没来得及保存成果，我得过去帮忙。
I'm terribly sorry. The computer system in the next room suddenly initiated an auto-update. The researchers didn't have time to save their results. So I went to help them just now.
啊，是因为我刚刚不在，就没把终端机的数据联通。等我先开一下，很快就好——
Ahh, I didn't connect the data to the terminal while I was away. Let me turn it on. It'll just take a second...
现在好了！麻烦您再过一次身份校验程序，然后直接查询终端机就会有结果了。
It's all set now! Please verify your identity again. And the results will come up when you input your query.
（原来梅厄之前一直失眠，但在看了猫科萌宠打呼噜的短视频后就能睡得着了。）
(It turns out Mare had been suffering from insomnia. Now she can fall asleep after watching short videos of cats snoring.)
（之前她嘴里神神叨叨的念词，也只是在模仿猫科动物的叫声。）
(So she was just imitating the sound of cats last time.)
（原来她只是个普通的云养猫爱好者啊，那没事了，感染者不是她。）
(Turns out she's just a run-of-the-mill cat lover. That's all good. She can't be the one who got infected.)
(Let me check the other people's records...)
终端机屏幕上跳动出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「当前算力不足，请稍后再试。」</color>
A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Insufficient computing power. Please try again later."</color>
但连试了很多次依然还是这行提示，或许终端机的时间概念并非人类世界里的「稍后」。
After several attempts, the same message still keeps popping up. Perhaps the terminal meant "a lot later."
还是找<color=#dbc291ff>维修工程师</color>来修一下吧。
I'd better ask the <color=#dbc291ff>maintenance engineer</color> to fix it.
能查到就行…噢，你是在问其他的啊。
Good... Oh, you mean you couldn't find the others?
提示「算力不足，稍后再试」？
噢噢，这个正常，终端机没坏，吓我一跳。
Oh, that's normal. The terminal is not broken. It's nothing to worry about.
是这样的，那个提示说「稍后再试」，实际上「稍后」没用的，要等到第二天才能用。
Although, it won't be operational until tomorrow.
因为之前空间站被入侵过，本来终端机不止一台，联通的也远非现有规模的机组。
Because the station was invaded. Originally, we had more than one terminal, connecting units on a much larger scale.
但在之前的动荡中，有些机组被毁坏了，终端机的算力就大为下降，更别说现在还是单核运转……
During that debacle, some units were damaged. The computing power of the terminal was thus greatly decreased, not to mention it's only running on a single-core processor right now...
站长说已经在准备采购新的设备了，不过眼下还没到货。所以，以目前的算力来说，您每天只能查询到一次结果。
The lead researcher said she was going to purchase new equipment. But it hasn't arrived yet. Therefore, with the current computing power, you can only query once a day.
而且现在的身份校验程序，也只能由我每天手动开启，所以…还是麻烦您<color=#dbc291ff>明天再来</color>一趟吧，记得来找我开校验。

And the current identity verification program has to be activated manually by me every day, so... please <color=#dbc291ff>come back tomorrow</color>. Don't forget to ask me to turn on the verification.
Please turn on the terminal for me.
好嘞，走你！光学身份校验程序已经架设完毕，终端机目前算力充足，您直接用就完事了。
Yup, here you go! The optical identity verification program has been set up. The terminal has sufficient computing power. Please feel free to use it.
（虚拟网络放大了人心中的恶意，看他被骂成这样，难道是在最脆弱的时候被模因病毒趁虚而入？）
(People act much more maliciously on the virtual network. He was brutally harassed online. Did he get infected by the memetic virus during his most vulnerable moments?)
（可他说话的内容与发帖的文风，都与艾丝妲说的「毒鸡汤」有着显著不同，恐怕感染者并不是他。）
(But his speech and the style of his posts are significantly different from the "cliché quotes" Asta had mentioned. I'm afraid he's not the infected one.)
（那就是乔安了？不过要下定论的话，还是得查一下乔安的记录才行。）
(Then is it Joanne? But I better not jump to a conclusion just yet. I should check Joanne's records.)
终端机屏幕上跳动出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「查询失败，点击重新加载。」</color>
A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Query failed. Click to refresh."</color>
然而点击了也依然是这行冰冷的提示，还是去问问维修工程师吧。
However, no matter how many times you click, the same message still pops up. I better ask the maintenance engineer.
It kept asking me to refresh...
看来还是兼容性出了问题……
It seems to be some compatibility issues...
呃，维修期间，偶尔坏一下也挺常见的。
Well, it sometimes breaks down during maintenance.
哎，可惜了，我今天才找到了之前的几台表面看上去完好的旧机组，组装了进去想提升下终端机算力的。
Oh no! This is caused by the old units I installed into the terminal today. They looked good to me at the time and I thought they could boost the terminal's computing power.
看来还是得等新机组到货才能彻底解决这个问题。
Looks like we'll have to wait until the replacement units are delivered.
抱歉啊，您别着急，我等会儿就去把这几台机组拆下来。保证不会影响到现有算力。
Sorry, please give me some time. Let me remove these units. I assure you the existing computing power won't be affected.
不过呢，还是得麻烦您<color=#dbc291ff>明天再来</color>找我一趟了，到明天肯定是有算力的，这一点您放心！
However, I'm afraid you'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>come back tomorrow</color>. I'm sure by tomorrow there will have been sufficient computing power!
今天的算力是够的，我和站长汇报过您的事，她说预估您今天就能彻底完成此事了。
We've got enough computing power today. I've reported it to the lead researcher. She said she expects you to get this done today.
劳驾您确认完成了之后，过来知会我一声，我得把终端机的安保系统重新加固一下。
Please let me know when you are done. I'll need to reinforce the terminal's security system.
Sure. Please turn on the terminal for me.
光学身份校验程序已经架设完毕，终端机目前算力充足，请便！
The optical identity verification program is all set. The terminal has sufficient computing power. Please help yourself!
（明明字单独看我还认识，摆一起就看不懂了，而且看完感觉发晕，好想吐……）
(I understand every single word but I don't understand when they are put together. I feel dizzy reading them. I want to throw up...)
（…究竟，我存在于这个世界上的意义是什么呢？人如果没有自己的事业，和太空垃圾有什么区别呢……）
(...What on earth justifies my continued existence in this world? If a person is without any career, would they be any different from a piece of space garbage...)
（等等，我在胡思乱想些什么——好险，差点就被模因病毒感染了！）
(Hold on. What was I thinking? That was close! I almost got infected by the memetic virus!)
（从乔安的记录来看，这个模因病毒会干扰人的心智，蛊惑人进行无意义地内卷，这种病毒真是害人不浅！）
(From Joanne's record, it is clear that this memetic virus interferes with one's mind and manipulates people into a pointless rat race. This virus is truly vicious!)
（接下来该回去了，回去之前，还是跟工程师说一下吧，毕竟答应过他……）
(I should head back. But before I go, I better tell the engineer. After all, I promised him...)
Yes, I think I got the result.
好的，按照空间站数据中心的流程，您的查询权限会在您离开机房后关闭，感谢您的配合。
Okay. According to the space station data center's regulations, your query access will be terminated as soon as you leave the terminal room. Thank you for your cooperation.
我看完所有数据记录了。
I've gone through all the data records.
太好了，我听维修工程师之前向我汇报，因为先前入侵遗留的复兴工作还未全部完成，终端机的算力一直拖累你的进度。
Great. I heard from the maintenance engineer that, due to incomplete recovery from the previous invasion, the terminal's computing power had been hindering your progress.
没想到你这么快就查出来了，真是辛苦了，所以结论是？
So I didn't expect you to finish the investigation so soon. Thank you for your hard work. So what's the conclusion?
(Tell her your observation and your analysis.)
哈哈，原来如此，我之前就怀疑乔安是感染者，只不过先前一直没有找到实质性的证据。
Haha, I see. I did have a suspicion that Joanne was the one who got infected. But I didn't have any substantial evidence.
How did you know it was her?
很简单，三个人中只有她的表现出来的风格，是和「螺中笑声」后来讲的那些话是风格一致的。
Simple. Out of the three of them, she is the only one who exhibited speech patterns similar to those of the Crackup Conch after its infection.
我就说她成天打瞌睡的人怎么会突然「洗心革面」，这样突然抹掉自己的习惯与喜好，实在是太可疑了。
I've always found it rather suspicious that she, a person who dozes off all the time, would have such a drastic change of personality and would quit all her habits and hobbies out of nowhere.
Have you ever suspected the other two?
他们俩的表现在你看来或许有些奇怪，但在我眼里却是再稀疏平常不过了。
Their behaviors may seem strange to you, but to me, they are extremely normal.
先说梅厄，上班走神是每个人类在工作中的必经之路，就算是我在从事自己挚爱领域的研究时，这种事也偶尔会发生。
Let's start with Mare. Getting distracted at work is such a common occurrence for all humans. It sometimes happens to me, even when I'm working in my favorite field of research.
再说克里斯，相比起其他科员，他才来空间站没多久，此前听说是个学业优异的贫苦学子。在来到遥远太空后肯定会有不适应的情况出现。

Then there's Chris. He is said to be a good student from a poor family. And compared with the other researchers, he's still fairly new here on the space station. So it's normal that he would experience discomfort after a lengthy space flight.
唯一令我意外的是，他的不适应程度有点严重。但我已经安排了医师去给他诊断一下了。
What surprised me was the severity of his discomfort. So I've already sent for a doctor to check on him.
结果还是不出我所料，接下来得清除一下乔安感染的病毒，让她「重回正轨」了。
Anyway, the overall result is as expected. Next, we should weed out Joanne's virus and get her "back on track" to her old self.
辛苦你忙前忙后的这么久，查到了实质性证据，那么——
Thank you for your hard work on finding such substantial evidence, so—
别急，我有几个问题想问。
Hold on, I have a few questions.
嗯？你尽管问，我知无不答。
Oh? Go ahead. I'll answer all your questions if I know the answers.
所以你是还有哪里需要我再讲解一下吗？
Is there anything else I need to clarify?
让乔安继续这样不好吗？
Isn't it a good thing to keep Joanne this way?
…你这样的想法很危险啊，这可不行，乔安是个大活人，你怎么能这么想。
...That was a dangerous thought. Of course not. Joanne is a living human being. You shouldn't think like that.
虽说大家有着不同的文化背景，但有些最基础的权益却是大家公认的底线，万万不可剥夺。
Although we come from different cultural backgrounds, some of the most basic rights and interests are recognized by all of us as the common bottom line and must not be deprived.
再说了，根据我的经验——主要从我自己的人生来看，不是发自内心喜爱自己研究的领域，再怎么苦干也不会有什么出彩结果的。
Besides, based on my personal experience, you'll never get great results in any field of research unless you are passionate about it.
你是怎么猜到乔安有问题的？
How did you guess correctly that Joanne was the one?
猜？这并不算「猜」，从某些意义来说，算得上是一种简单易懂的心理科学吧。
Guess? I didn't "guess." To some extent, it was just simple psychology.
因为乔安之前完全抹掉了自己的个人生活，这非常不合理。用个简单的比喻来说，人的承受力是有限的，就像气球那样——

Joanne completely wiped out her personal life, which is very unusual. Think about this simple analogy. People's capacity for work is limited, just like how a balloon can only hold a finite amount of air...
在缺乏兴趣爱好的满足与休息的情况下，人就像一只被源源不断注入气体的气球，不放气的话，只有崩溃这个必然的结局。
When they don't get enough rest or fulfillment, people will just be like a balloon being unceasingly inflated, which will inevitably blow up if there's no chance for an air release.
你不担心另外两位的行为吗？
Aren't you worried about the other two?
担心什么？你是指会影响到他们在空间站的研究工作吗？除了克里斯需要医师进行心理疏导之外，我不觉得有什么问题。
Worried about what? Do you mean how their research at the space station will be affected? I don't think there's any problem except that Chris might need some psychological counseling from a doctor.
每个人都有自己的人生，在不影响到空间站安危与违背其他规定的情况下，做什么都是大家的自由。
People have the freedom to do whatever they want in their own lives, as long as they don't undermine the security of the space station or violate the regulations.
I don't have any more questions.
唔，我大概明白你心中的疑惑了。从短视点的目光看来，无视大家的安危，让他们无止尽地工作，看起来是好事，实则祸害无穷。

Well, I do get your point to some extent. It might seem productive, at least in the short term, to just disregard people's safety concerns and force them into nonstop work. But in the real world, such practices will only spell disaster.
空间站建设在宇宙之中，离地面很远，并非每个人都能适应这里的生活。这一点在待久了以后会尤为明显。
The station is built in space, far away from any land surface. Not everyone can adapt to life here. This will become clear after a while.
虽说这里的设备与资源都是顶级的，但待久了依然有人会觉得憋屈难受。
Despite our top-notch equipment and resources, some people still find it unbearable to live on the station after staying here for a long time.
在这种情况下，适当地让大家发展自己的兴趣爱好，反而能保障大家离地太久后的心理健康，这才是提高大家效率的最佳方法。

In that case, letting people develop their own hobbies improves everyone's mental health, especially when they have been away from land for an extended period of time. This is the best way to improve overall productivity.
毕竟我们生来是人，并非什么没有情感的草木山石，如果连自己的喜好与情感都要抛之脑后，那我们又怎能称之为人？
After all, we are born to be humans, not plants or rocks that do not have emotions. How could we still call ourselves humans if we were to throw away our hobbies and emotions?
But I don't seem to have any hobbies...
你的事情我也知道一些，没关系的，你还有无限的未来，在漫长的人生里总能找到自己的喜好与要走的路。
Well, I do know a little about your situation. It's alright. You still have a long way to go. You'll eventually find your hobbies and your own way of life.
那可不嘛，这也是我自己的人生经验，研究自己喜欢的东西，这样的人生才有滋有味。
Of course it does. This is also my life experience. Having fun in life is all about investing in things that you find interesting.
好啦，以后的路长着呢，你在外探索的时候，记好啦——无论发生什么事，都不要丢掉自己的喜好与情感。
Well, you still have a long way ahead of you. When you are out there exploring, remember — no matter what, don't just throw away your hobbies and your emotions.
啊对了，跟你说了这么多，差点忘记一件正事。
Oh right, by the way, I almost forgot one thing.
我知道终端机那边会打印出纸质记录，那几张纸页你自己收好，不要在空间站中外泄出去，这事你要答应我，否则报酬我可要收回去啦。
I know paper records will be printed out at the terminal. Keep those records to yourself. Don't let the information leak out in the space station. Promise me, or I'll take back the reward.
Don't worry, they will never leak out.
嗯嗯，那么——总之这次就辛苦你啦，给你准备了点报酬，不是什么特别贵重的东西，不过都是我亲手准备的。
Well, anyway, thank you so much. This is the reward for you. I made this myself.
咳咳，你要是都不喜欢，回头我看看有新一代旗舰产品了，再带你去选购下歼星舰吧，现在年轻人之间都流行这个。
Ehem, if you don't like it, I can take you to buy the starnought fleet when the latest version comes out. It's very popular among young people these days.
军团虽已退走，异变仍在发生。空间站多处区域出现了裂界化的征兆，为此在艾丝妲的远程支援下，你深入现场展开了对未知危机的调查。

The Legion has retreated, but the mutation hasn't stopped. There are signs of Fragmentum in multiple areas. With remote support from Asta, you go deep into the field to investigate the unknown crisis.
看来你已经顺利抵达了现场，那我们长话短说。
Looks like you've already reached the site. So let me cut to the chase.
根据监控到的影像，军团残党和裂界造物同时存在于你现在所处的这片区域。
According to the surveillance video, creations of the Fragmentum and remnants of the Legion are present in this area where you are now.
我们的目的是调查这里裂界化加速的原因，为此需要你尽可能地对全域进行探索。
Our aim is to investigate the cause of the accelerated appearance of Fragmentum in this area, so you need to explore the entire area as much as possible.
你的相机上搭载了一道临时识别程序，通过它我能远程为你分析镜头内敌方的情报。
Your camera is equipped with a scanning program through which I can remotely analyze any visible enemy's intelligence for you.
前面好像有怪物出没，正好可以用来测试一下。
There appear to be some monsters right ahead, so let's give it a test run.
是反物质军团的残党，似乎只是落单的普通虚卒，没有什么特别之处。
It was a remnant of the Antimatter Legion. Seems like it was just an ordinary voidranger that had fallen off the grid, nothing special.
是裂界造物，它们诞生于裂界，身上还有诸多谜团未曾解开。
Those are Fragmentum creations, creatures born of the Fragmentum.
看来疏散人员的时候，两边的闸门都被锁死了。
It seems that the gates on both sides were locked during the evacuation.
受裂界影响，我没有办法远程解除封锁。想要通过，得先找到通行密钥。
Due to interference from the Fragmentum, I can't unlock them. You'll have to find the encryption key in order to get through.
等等，通行密钥上的涂层是特殊的光敏材料，相机上的识别程序或许能够派上用场。
Wait, the coating on the encryption key is made of a special photosensitive material. The camera's scanning function might be of some use here.
前面有多个敌方反应。假设密钥落在它们手上的话，或许可以找出并针对性地打倒密钥持有者以回避多余的战斗风险。
There are multiple enemies ahead. Assuming the key is in their hands, it may be possible to identify and target the key holder in order to avoid fighting more enemies than necessary.
这里似乎没什么东西了。
There doesn't seem to be much here.
去前面看看吧，那里的敌方反应十分密集，说不定能找到剩余的密钥。
Let's go check up ahead. Enemies reaction is very dense, and you may be able to find the remaining keys.
这是岔路口右侧房间的通行密钥，看来得麻烦你原路返回一趟了。
This is the encryption key for the room on the right side of the path, so it looks like you'll have to make a trip back the way you came.
只剩中央房间的大门没打开了，这应该就是那里的密钥。
The only door still locked is the one in the central room. This should be the key.
小心点，在这个家伙身上侦测到了不同寻常的能量波动。
Be careful, unusual energy fluctuations were detected in this guy.
看来这片区域裂界化加速的现象很难说跟它没有关系，去看一看吧。
It seems that the accelerated Fragmentum corrosion in this area can hardly be unrelated to it. Let's take a look.
干掉了么？能量波动趋于平稳…这片区域「裂界化」加速的趋势也得到了有效遏止。
Did you take care of it? The energy fluctuations have leveled off... and the accelerated Fragmentum corrosion has effectively halted in this area.
看来的确如我所料，辛苦你了{NICKNAME}。
It's as I expected. Good work, {NICKNAME}.
任务完成！后续的调查就交给我们吧。
Mission complete! We'll take care of the follow-up investigation.
黑塔•全景系统提示您：已锁定监控目标，无特殊光学反应。
Prompt from the Herta Panopticon System: Locked on to target, no special optical response.
黑塔•全景系统提示您：已锁定监控目标，通行密钥已识别。
Prompt from the Herta Panopticon System: Locked onto target, identifying key.
使用相机识别程序，找出身上藏有房间钥匙的敌人。
Using the camera's scanning function, find the enemy with the key hidden on their body.
看来你已经顺利抵达了现场，那我们长话短说，你现在所处的这片区域已被裂界造物侵占。
Now you've reached the site, let me cut to the chase. Fragmentum creatures are present in this area.
我们先前架设的设备也已损坏，此行的目的是收集信标数据，以便恢复远程连接。
The equipment we set up previously has been damaged. Therefore, this trip is to collect beacon data to restore the remote connection.
我在你的相机上搭载了一道临时识别程序，空间站的终端能远程为你解析镜头内的信标数据。
Your camera is equipped with a temporary scanning program, through which the space station's terminals can remotely analyze the data in any visible beacons.
你成功地从呜呜伯处提取到了信标数据，呜呜伯向你发出呜声致谢，便转身离去。
You succeed in extracting the beacon data from the Wubbaboo. It thanks you with a "woo" then leaves.
当前敌人已击败，信标数据已提取。
The current enemy has been defeated. Beacon data extracted.
{NICKNAME}，你来了？艾丝妲站长吩咐我们在此处等你。这片区域的设备损毁状况十分严重，我们得留在原地架设终端。收集信标数据的事就拜托你了。

{NICKNAME}, is that you? Lead Researcher Asta ordered us to wait for you here. The damage to the equipment in this place is so severe that we have to stay put and rig a new terminal. I'll leave it to you to gather the beacon data.
这些信标数据应该够了，带回去交给调查人员吧。
That should be enough data from the beacons. Take it back to the investigators.
{NICKNAME}，多亏有你在，远程连接已经连通。接下来的事情就交给我们了，请回去好好休息吧。
We're so lucky to have you, {NICKNAME}. The remote connection is up. Leave the rest to us. Go back and have a good rest.
信标数据收集完毕，正在建立连接…远程连接已成功！谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。接下来的事就交给我们了。请好好休息吧。
The beacon data's collected. Establishing connection... Remote connection successful! Thanks, {NICKNAME}, leave the rest to us. You go rest up.
一楼区域的设备也遭了殃，看来还得麻烦你再跑一趟了。
The equipment on the first floor has been hit, too. Looks like I'll have to ask you to take another trip.
临时识别程序运转正常，请多留意相机提示，接下来它或许会派上用场。
The temporary scanning program is working normally. Please pay attention to the camera hints, as they may come in handy later.
前方有个神秘的「大家伙」，收集信标数据的时候请多加小心。
There's a mysterious "big guy" up ahead. Please be careful while gathering data.
检测到有效信标，正在连接
前方侦测到多个敌方反应，有不少信标数据落在了它们手里，识别程序或许能够派上用场。
Multiple enemies detected ahead. They possess a large amount of beacon data. The scanner program might come in handy here.
这个舱段有不少呜呜伯出没，它们在混乱中将部分信标数据转移到了身上。
There're quite a lot of Wubbaboos in this zone, and they've managed to transfer some of the beacon data onto themselves amidst the chaos.
将镜头对准呜呜伯，按钮发光的时候就提取信标数据。
Point the camera at the Wubbaboo and extract data once the button lights up.
这个舱段的裂界化程度非常严重，最近就连终端设备也坏掉了，只能重建远程连接，但这需要信标数据……
The extent of Fragmentum corrosion in this zone is very severe, and even the terminal devices recently broke. Establishing a remote connection is the only way to go, but that requires beacon data...
你是{NICKNAME}？是艾丝妲站长派你来的吧，太好了，请你帮个忙，帮我们收集里面的信标数据吧，拜托了！
Are you {NICKNAME}? I guess you're sent here by Lead Researcher Asta. Awesome! Please do us a favor and collect data from the beacons inside. Please!
里面还是挺危险的…不过你要是准备好了，就和我说吧。
It's quite dangerous in there... But if you're ready, just let me know.
你可算来了。事态紧急，我就直奔主题啦——阿兰他失踪了。
Finally, you're here. This is urgent, so I'll cut to the chase — Arlan's disappeared.
没错，人找不到，消息不回，通讯也不接。
Yes, I can't find him. He's not answering his messages or calls.
我把他捡回来到现在，从来没发生过这种事。
In all the time since I took him in, this has never happened.
Have you checked the surveillance cameras?
当然，但监控录像中也找不到阿兰的行踪。
Of course! I didn't see him...
「军团」入侵时破坏的监控系统还没完全恢复，可能是监控的盲区被利用了。
Parts of the surveillance system were destroyed when the Legion invaded — it still hasn't been fully repaired. Maybe he took advantage of a blind spot.
距他上次和我联系已经超过了<unbreak>13</unbreak>个小时，平时回复消息都不会超过<unbreak>13</unbreak>秒的！
It's been thirteen hours since he last contacted me. He usually takes less than <unbreak>13</unbreak> seconds to reply to my messages!
我怎么都找不到他，只好调取了防卫科的个人工作规划记录，然后发现了这个！
I looked everywhere and couldn't find him, so I checked the Security Department's work plan records. This is what I found!
哎，你看最后的工作目标：从心、从镜、从我。这怎么看都很怪吧？
Look, at his last work objectives entry: "Of the heart. Of the mirror. Of the self." It's so strange...
The entries for last week are pretty odd too.
I knew it. {NICKNAME}, you think so too, right?
I think guys his age do tend to write like this.
我问了防卫科，可他们都觉得这不是什么要紧事。还说什么：
*sigh* I asked people in the Security Department, but none of them thought it was concerning. They said stuff like:
「阿兰大哥已经是个成熟的男人了，有自己的安排也很正常！」
"Brother Arlan is a grown man with his own plans!"
我跟他们完全说不通，所以这件事只能拜托你了。
I couldn't get them to listen at all, so I'm asking you for help.
你都没有线索，我能怎办…
You don't have any clues, how can I—
还有一个秘密武器！那就是……
I have a secret weapon! Say hello to...
成熟的男人失踪了也正常！
Guys his age just need "alone time" sometimes!
你怎么也来防卫科那一套！不要开玩笑了，快帮帮我呀。
Why are you acting like those Security Department idiots!? Stop fooling around and help me!
我还有一个秘密武器！那就是……
I have a secret weapon! Say hello to...
嗯，它是我的爱犬，从小就由阿兰照看，他俩感情非常好。
Mm-hmm, Peppy's my dog — Arlan's looked after him since he was a puppy. They're great friends.
阿兰的气味，佩佩再熟悉不过了，或许它能找到阿兰。
Peppy knows Arlan's scent — maybe he can track him down.
不不，你想啊，我作为代理站长，要是当着这么多科员的面调查阿兰的行踪。
Y—Yes! Think about it — if people see me, the acting lead researcher, searching for Arlan...
Then get Peppy to find Arlan.
让它自己去，要是也失踪了怎么办？可是我跟着它，当着这么多科员的面调查阿兰的行踪。
Peppy can't go alone. What if he gets lost too? And I can't go with him — if people see me, the acting lead researcher, searching for Arlan...
这岂不是…岂不是让他这个防卫科负责人显得很不靠谱！
Wouldn't that... Wouldn't that make Arlan look incompetent as head of the Security Department?
咱们这就带上佩佩出发吧！放心啦，它不会咬人的。
...Let's go together! Relax — Peppy doesn't bite.
那是…卡波特教授？你确定阿兰来过这里？
That's... Professor Capote? Are you sure Arlan was here, Peppy?
怪起来了，他找这中央空调能有什么事？
Weird. Why would he visit this Casanova?
看到那些个围在他身边的粉丝，你还不明白么？
Look at all his fans! Need I say more?
这就是空间站「这位科员真绝了」大赛第一名的含金量啊。
Behold, the winner of the "Most Awesome Researcher" contest.
I thought you said his name was Capote...
啊哈哈，空间站公认的…不小心说顺口了。
Haha, he probably should've been named Casanova... I've gotten used to saying it, anyway.
这就是空间站「这位科员真绝了」大赛第一名的含金量啊。
Behold, the winner of the "Most Awesome Researcher" contest.
唔，我不方便亲自出面…{NICKNAME}，向卡波特问出情报的事儿就拜托你了。
Hmm, it's better if I don't show my face... {NICKNAME}, see if you can get some intel out of him.
其实我当时也很恐惧，也很害怕！但是我的心中仍有一束微光，引导着我向前迈步！
I must confess that I, too, was terrified. Petrified, even! But there remained a light in my heart. A light that led me onward!
那束光，正是大家幸福的笑容。
That light... was the happy smiles on all your faces!
Ah! Master Capote thinks about me!
哦，是你啊。好久不见。最近过得还好吗？
Oh, it's you! Long time no see. How are you?
我现在有点忙，如果不是什么要紧事的话待会儿再说。
I'm a bit busy here. If it's not urgent, come back later.
哦，是你啊。好久不见！最近过得不太好吗？怎么看你表情很复杂，眉毛都拧到一起去了？
Oh, it's you! Long time no see. Are you okay? You look troubled — that's quite a wrinkled brow.
来来来，和大家一起，听我讲讲之前空间站入侵的事情。回顾那段往事，可以有助于你走出迷茫。
Come! Join the others and listen to me recount the tale of the Legion's invasion. I'm sure your memory of the events will dispel your worries.
你听卡波特说了很久，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
You've listened to Capote for a long time, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...
当「反物质军团」与我擦肩而过的刹那，心里浮现的正是你们的容颜。坦白说没有你们，就没有现如今活生生的我。
The Antimatter Legion barely missed me, and that's when I saw your faces... It was all I could see. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be standing here today.
啊——我会支持波少一辈子！
嗯嗯，看来你已经扫除了心中的迷茫。从你的眉眼之间，我就读出了四个大字：「豁然开朗」！
Aha, I see you no longer look troubled. There is only one word to describe your expression: Enlightenment!
怎么样？听我聊天，果然能感受到能量围绕在身旁吧？
Such is the power of my rhetoric! It creates an energy that uplifts the soul.
诶，你怎么回事，是哪里不舒服吗？怎么脸色越来越差，瞳孔都要涣散了…没有关系！我卡波特的爱好就是帮助迷茫之人，接下来我会提升强度，为你提供心灵上的支持。
Oh, still troubled? You must be ill! You look pale and your pupils are gray... That's fine! I, Capote, never waver in my support! I shall double my efforts to heal your heart.
你向卡波特问询了关于阿兰的事情……
阿兰队长？这个人嘛…我当然是认识的，毕竟我的职责就是照亮空间站每一个人的心灵。但是至于他现在人在哪儿……
Arlan? Uh, yes... I know him. After all, my calling is to light up the heart of every person on the space station. As to his current location...
Forgive me, but I cannot tell!
（总感觉他那戏剧化的停顿和大喊都是精心设计的……）
(Insert dramatic pause and sudden drama here...)
大家都知道，我卡波特人生中最关键的词语，就是「原则」。如若没有了原则，人和机械臂又有什么区别？
Everyone knows the most important word in my life is "principle." Without principle, what difference would there be between a person and a mechanical arm?
可是上次波少说自己人生中最关键的词语是「光明」……
Wait a minute... last time he said the most important word in his life was "illumination..."
回去更新一下「波少个人百科」！这次是人生关键词<unbreak>12.0</unbreak>版本。
We need to update Master Capote's Life Wiki! This will be version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak> of his life keywords!
咳…嗯。总之，我是个不会说出谎言的人。我可以坦然告诉你，我与阿兰队长确实在最近有见过面，也知晓他的行踪。
Ahem, uh... Anyway, I do not lie. I can tell you that I did indeed meet Arlan recently, and I know where he went.
但是很抱歉。我已经用我的生命发起誓言：卡波特，绝不会将阿兰队长的秘密，告诉任何人！
Regrettably, I already swore on my life that I, Capote, would never tell anyone Captain Arlan's secret!
（夸大其词强调情况的急迫性）
(Exaggerate the urgency and importance of the situation)
你还不懂，不懂我想要表达的含义！
You don't understand what I'm trying to say at all!
所谓危机，所谓灾难，不过都是现实物欲世界的虚影！然而人类的品格，人类的誓言与约定，才是最最珍贵，最最值得保留的东西！
Crises, disasters... these are just mirages of the material plane! A person's character and the vows of humankind are most precious — they must be protected at all costs!
你只看得见眼前那小小的风险，却不知道：我卡波特如果成了那样卑劣的小人，有多少少女将会从此感受不到快乐的滋味？

All you see are the minuscule risks of the immediate situation... but did you ever consider that if I, Capote, abandoned my principles, then the hopes and dreams of hundreds of fair ladies would be dashed?
我是她们的灯塔，所以我——「绝•不•蒙•尘」！
I am their lighthouse, and I will NEVER allow myself to be tainted!
呜呜呜，波少，波少真的太温柔了。
*sniff* Oh, Master Capote is so considerate...
你听卡波特说了很久，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
You've listened to Capote for a long time, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...
（清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
(Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)
（妙语连珠夸赞卡波特的品格）
(Spares no effort in praising Capote's character)
看来你已经非常了解我的为人了。
Seems like you already know what kind of person I am.
之前阿兰队长过来拜托我的时候，神色与你颇为相仿。他那个时候也非常焦虑，迫切地希望我给他一个答案。
Captain Arlan had a similar expression to yours when he found me. He was anxious and desired an answer.
然而答案又怎是那样简单的东西？更何况他想要达成那样从心而外的「修行」，更是难上加难……
But answers are not easy to give. Besides, he wanted to master a trial of the heart that would thoroughly change him, and that would be even more difficult...
你想都想不到那是多么困难的「修行」，我光是配合他模仿那种说话的方式，就累得够呛！还好他…啊！咳咳，不说了，不说了！
You can't even imagine the difficulty of the trial. I was tired merely from the act of imitating that way of talking with him! Thankfully he... Ah! Ahem, no more. No more!
（他的说辞和阿兰的工作规划对得上，看来他果然知道关键信息。）
(His words match Arlan's work plan records. Seems like he does have key information.)
怎么样，想必你已经彻底理解了我的为人吧？我劝你，知难而退，别在我这里费心思费口舌了。如你所见，我也是很「忙」的。
Seems like you already know what kind of person I am. I'm telling you, quit while you can and don't waste your time and effort here. You can see that I, too, am quite busy.
（夸大其词强调情况的急迫性）
(Exaggerate the urgency and importance of the situation)
哎，想不到你竟然是这么顽固的家伙。看来你心灵之灯已经蒙尘许久了啊！
*sigh* I didn't take you to be so stubborn. The light in your heart has been clouded for too long!
不过我卡波特不会放弃每一个人，哪怕我多费点口舌，也会把道理给你讲明白的！
But I, Capote, will never give up on anyone. Even if I have to talk through the day and into the night, I will make you understand!
你听卡波特说了很久，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
You've listened to Capote for a long time, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...
（清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
(Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)
（妙语连珠夸赞卡波特的品格）
(Spares no effort in praising Capote's character)
看来你已经非常了解我的为人了。
Seems like you already know what kind of person I am.
之前阿兰队长过来拜托我的时候，神色与你颇为相仿。他那个时候也非常焦虑，迫切地希望我给他一个答案。
Captain Arlan had a similar expression to yours when he found me. He was anxious and desired an answer.
然而答案又怎是那样简单的东西？更何况他想要达成那样从心而外的「修行」，更是难上加难……
But answers are not easy to give. Besides, he wanted to master a trial of the heart that would thoroughly change him, and that would be even more difficult...
你想都想不到那是多么困难的「修行」，我光是配合他模仿那种说话的方式，就累得够呛！还好他…啊！咳咳，不说了，不说了！
You can't even imagine the difficulty of the trial. I was tired merely from the act of imitating that way of talking with him! Thankfully he... Ah! Ahem, no more. No more!
（他的说辞和阿兰的工作规划对得上，看来他确实知道关键信息。）
(His words match Arlan's work plans. Seems like he does have key information.)
你询问卡波特关于修行和从心的事情……
You've asked Capote about the trial of the heart...
我，我刚才可没说这个吧？你是不是听错了？
I—I didn't say that! Did you mishear it?
咳咳…我刚才说的应该是：「人生就是一场修行，做人也要从心如一。」
Ahem... What I said was "Life is a trial, and you need to be true to yourself."
所以你说的那些和阿兰队长有关的东西，我是完全不知道的。哎，我这边应该得去开会了，要不我们下次再聊？
So, I know nothing about anything you said about Captain Arlan. Ahem, I need to head to a meeting now. Can we talk later?
（可不能让他就这么溜了，如果他实在不肯说的话，那就——）
(I can't let him get away like this. If he doesn't want to tell me, then...)
以开除为由，恐吓卡波特。
Threaten Capote with dismissal from the space station.
你，你竟然说得出这种话！
Y—You dare to utter such a threat!
我告诉你，且不论你有没有权利把我开除。今天就算是艾丝妲站长…哦不，哪怕是黑塔女士亲自来命令我，我卡波特也不会屈服！
Listen here, leaving aside the fact that you don't have the right to dismiss me, I wouldn't yield even if Lead Researcher Asta — no, if Madam Herta herself commanded me!
别说是开除我。哪怕你今天用我的命来威胁我，我也会对你大声说「不」！
Why not threaten to KILL me while you're at it? I've said it once and I'll say it again — I will not yield!
波少，波少他真的是太好了。此生无悔粉波少——
*sigh* Master Capote is so courageous... We're so lucky to be his fans...
波少之前承诺阿兰队长的时候，说的话和刚才一模一样、分毫不差。
He said the exact same thing when he promised Captain Arlan.
对，尤其是那段「用命威胁，大声说不」，真的是太催泪了呜呜呜呜。
Yes, the part about not yielding... It's making me tear up! *sob*
今天回去我就把当时的<color=#dbc291ff>「录音稿」</color>打印下来，我们粉丝会必须全文朗读并背诵！
I'm gonna print out the <color=#dbc291ff>transcript of the conversation</color> as soon as I get back today! The fan club needs to recite and memorize it!
（录音？阿兰委托卡波特的过程被录下来了…？）
(Transcript? They've recorded Arlan's conversation with Capote...?)
（没想到关键线索会以这种方式出现……）
(I didn't think a clue like that would suddenly pop up...)
以晋升为由，引诱卡波特。
你，你别乱说啊！那可是有严格考核制度的。
D—Don't joke about that! Promotions have a strict assessment process!
虽然我的确是听说，空间站会特别褒奖品德优秀的科员…但那都是无稽之谈，即便是岁数最大的前辈，都没有亲眼见证过呢！
I did hear that the space station gives special benefits to morally upstanding researchers... but those are just rumors — even the oldest staff have never witnessed it!
你少瞧不起我们波少了！他不是你想的那种人！
Stop looking down on Master Capote! He's not the kind of person you think he is!
我们波少视职级为粪土，在「波少个人百科」<unbreak>4.0</unbreak>版本中就曾记录过这件事！
Master Capote's Life Wiki, version <unbreak>4.0</unbreak>: Master Capote doesn't care about rank. Everyone knows that!
今天你就算是要让波少当空间站的代理站长，他也不会告诉你「修行」的秘密！
Even if you promoted Master Capote to acting lead researcher, he wouldn't tell you about the trial!
没…没错！我是不会为了那种东西就失去宝贵的品格的！
...I—Indeed! I won't forsake my precious morality for something so base!
你啊你，怎么会想出这样的坏主意，歪点子呢？你不是迷失，你这是彻底走上了歧途！
How could you think up something so terrible? You're not just lost, my friend — you've completely strayed from the narrow path!
我得对你进行深度的思想教育才行，最好是咱们之后有空坐下来慢慢细说……
I need to give you a thorough education on human ethics — we'll need to sit down and go over it slowly...
不用麻烦波少！这种不正之风，我们就能帮你肃清！
No need to bother Master Capote! We'll fix this injustice for you ourselves!
你被波少粉丝后援会团团包围，被迫接受了漫长的思想教育，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
You've been surrounded by the Master Capote Fan Club and listened to a frustratingly long lecture, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...
（清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
(Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)
看样子，她们已经和你说了很多了。你应该也做出了深刻的内心反思吧。
They went through everything with you? I'm sure you reflected deeply on your actions.
你之前和我聊的那些事情，我就当没有听到过，你也最好多多反思。
I'll pretend I never heard the things you said. Think before you act in future, please.
