你看看办公室牌子上写的是谁的名字，我为什么不可以回来？哼，要走也不是我走，我偏要站这儿。
Do you not see whose name it is on the desk? Hmph, I can come and go as I wish. Besides, if anyone is going to leave, it definitely won't be me.
怎么，见不得我回来？呵，我才不管你们要做什么，爱干啥干啥，别来烦我就行。
What, am I not allowed to come back? I really don't care what you guys do. Just don't pester me.
你感到一阵涟漪，巨大的失重感让你失去了四肢的掌控权，在荡漾的字符与代码中，你猛然醒来——这里是模拟宇宙。
You feel a ripple, a great weightlessness that makes you lose control of your limbs, and in a flurry of symbols and code, you wake up with a jolt — this is the Simulated Universe.
那是通讯模组在正常运作——黑塔常说这是项华而不实的功能，为了提升算力，她通常会将其关闭。
That's the communication module doing its job — Herta often speaks of it as an expensive and impractical function. She often shuts it off to increase calculating power.
但我相信：比起文字，声音更能承载情感的波动。
However, I maintain that the voice carries greater emotional charge than the written word.
我在外部，确保系统映射不会崩溃，伦纳德先生也在这里。放心，我们会保障你的安全。
I'll be staying on the outside — I need to make sure the system projections remain stable. Mr. Leonard is here as well. There's no need to worry. We will guarantee your safety.
现在，你已身处以太卡带所在的数据链中，试着环顾四周吧，告诉我你的发现。
You are now inside the data link of the Aether Cartridge. Look around and tell me what you discover.
呃，那位骇客就在我面前…
Uh... that hacker is right in front of me...
这是正常现象，大多数有机生命在经历信标投射后都会产生不适，你看见了什么？
That is a normal reaction. Most organic lifeforms will experience discomfort after undergoing beacon projection. What do you see?
That hacker is right in front of me...
结论：那是模拟宇宙生成的全息记录。在这里，每一处变量都会被保存下来，巨细无遗，当然也包括外来者的足迹。
Conclusion: That is a holographic record that the Simulated Universe has created. In here, regardless of how large or small, all variables are saved, including outsider traces.
你们是对的，敌人的入侵已蔓延至模拟宇宙深处，距离以太卡带所在的数据链只有毫厘之差，我们看到的就是当时的影像。

You were right. The enemy's invasion has spread to the deepest parts of the Simulated Universe. They were only a hair away from the Aether Cartridge's data link. What we are seeing are the projections of what happened in those moments.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，请站在原地，让我试着利用一下这份记录吧——
{F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, please stay still. Allow me to see what I can do with this record...
「嘿，我说你，怎么一直在盯着我看？」
"Hey, you, why are you staring at me?"
我推进了模拟宇宙的流程。她并非在和你对话，这只是一段过去的记录。
I initiated the Simulation flow. This is just a record of the past — she's not actually talking to you.
请先不要打断她，仔细聆听，我们或许能有更多收获。
Please listen and don't interrupt her. We may be able to find out more of what we need to know.
「首先，我没有朝思暮想。那张卡带的故事在朋克洛德跟教科书没啥两样，这种人尽皆知的东西，我向来没兴趣。」
"First off, I'm not obsessed with it. On Punklorde, the stories of the cartridge are no different from textbooks. I'm not interested in something that everybody already knows about."
「其次，那不是什么游戏光碟，那可是以太卡带——骇客的第二双眼睛、第二个大脑、第二颗心脏。」
"Secondly, it's not some kind of video game cartridge. It's an Aether Cartridge — it's the second pair of eyes, second brain, and second heart of the hacker."
「你明白吗，有了这张卡带，你甚至能知道他在电影首映礼上吃的第四粒混合爆米花是什么味道，就是这么厉害。」

"Do you understand what that actually means? With that cartridge, if a guy went to a movie premiere and bought some mixed popcorn, you'd be able to know the flavor of the fourth kernel he picked out of the bucket. It's truly amazing."
「最后，再强调一遍，我没有朝思暮想，说这么一长串话只是为了跟你解释清楚它到底有多厉害，懂了吗，卡芙卡？」
"Lastly, I'm gonna say it again — I'm not obsessed with it. The reason I'm still rambling about it is to make sure that you know how amazing it really is. Do you get it now, Kafka?"
「好了，咱们出发吧，动作要快。这里跟刚才的空间站不一样，可是实打实天才俱乐部的地盘。」
"Alright, let's get going. We have to move quickly. This place is different from the rest of the space station. We're on Genius Society turf."
从这番对话来看，进入模拟宇宙的一共有两人——她，还有她的同伴。
It is safe to assume that two people entered the Simulated Universe — her, and her companion.
有趣。让我们看看接下来还会发生什么吧？
Interesting. Let's see what happened next.
我将你编入了同行者的视角，现在，她会对你的行为做出一些反应。
You are now taking the point of view of the companion. She will react to your behavior now.
"Fork in the road, huh? I got this."
「要先挑一个吗？测试一下你最喜欢的…直觉。」
"Wanna pick one first? Give your beloved instincts a try..."
Is she telling me to choose?
确切地说，她在让同伴做选择。就算你什么都不做，这份记录也会继续推进。
Technically, she is asking her companion to choose. The record will continue forward even if you don't take any action.
有位健谈的同行者也不失为一种乐趣，不是吗？
It's a nice thing to have a companion who likes to talk, isn't it?
Is this still just... a record?
是的，这仍是一段影像记录，千真万确。
Yes. This is a visual record. No doubt about it.
"Wrong choice — the correct answer is the path on the right!"
「啊？怎么不信邪呢，都说了是右边，右边！」
"What? Why won't you believe me? I told you, it's the right side, the right!"
"Hmm, not what we're looking for. It's a bait signal."
「黑塔这家伙，竟然在模拟宇宙里布置这种东西，她自己找资料时不会嫌麻烦吗？」
"Ugh, why would Herta put something like this inside the Simulated Universe? Doesn't she find it annoying when she has to find something herself?"
「算了算了，是我计算失误，咱们再换个扇区试试。」
"Never mind, I miscalculated. Let's try another sector."
It doesn't seem to be going well.
其实她走在正确的路上，只是走得还不够远——相信用不了多久，她就会意识到这点。
She's actually on the correct path. She just needs to continue a little further — I trust that she too will realize this soon.
希望如此，但客观来看：她一定会发现。
Indeed. However, objectively speaking, it is almost certain that she will.
已有之事，后必再有——这是在与她的接触中，我做出的推断。
What has happened is destined to happen again — that was my conclusion after having met her.
You seem to know her really well.
星核猎手「银狼」，我们曾有过一段交锋，当时黑塔也在场——她或许向你提起过此事。
Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf. We've fought against one another before. Herta was there as well — she may have mentioned it to you.
在我看来，那并不算胜利。
From my point of view, it wasn't a victory.
用黑塔的话说，那场对局没有输家。
In Herta's words, there was no loser in that fight.
I recall that it was a draw...
比起对决，那更像一次试探。她进攻，我防守，不分胜负，双方都有所保留。她没能攻破差分机球的防御，我也未阻止她扬长而去。
It was more like a test than a duel. She would attack, and I would defend — neither of us gave it our all. She wasn't able to break through my defenses and I wasn't able to stop her from leaving.
没想到今日会以这种形式再见。相信上一场交锋的延续很快就会到来。
I never thought our next meeting would take place under these circumstances. I believe the continuation of our last encounter will soon arrive.
「搞什么，这条路明明是对的嘛。黑塔这家伙，还玩心理战术啊。」
"What the... This was the right way all along. Ugh, Herta's got some psychological tactics going on."
看来，我们可以继续前进了。
Seems like we can now continue forward.
「喔，又回到空间站了。还有解谜？一键跳过吧。」
"Oh, back to the space station again. A riddle? Where's the skip button?"
「总算快到终点了。笑死，这儿还有个黑塔小人。」
"Finally, almost there. Ha, there's even a miniature Herta over here."
「这人自恋吧？整个空间站都是她的脸——画像，雕塑，还有一大堆投影。」
"A little narcissistic, isn't she? The whole space station is filled with her face — portraits, statues, even projections of herself."
「我本打算给她脸上加个小胡子的，结果竟然喷不上去——太离谱了吧，整个空间站都跟纸糊的一样，只有她的照片密不透风？」
"I was planning on adding a mustache for her but the spray didn't work — the entire space station feels like it's made of paper but her portrait is near indestructible."
是说电梯间那幅画像吧？黑塔曾委托我为她设计一种加密工具，原来是用在了这里。
Hehe, she's talking about that portrait in the elevator room, no? Herta commissioned me to design an encryption tool for her — seems she ended up using it on her portrait.
She said she's almost at the destination?
没错。以太卡带的数据就在下一个房间，我们的追踪也快要结束了。
That's correct. The Aether Cartridge data is in the next room. Our pursuit is coming to an end.
I have a strange feeling about this...
I have a wonderful feeling about this...
是的。在漫长的追踪中，这种违和感贯穿始终。
Yes. That incongruous feeling has persisted throughout this long pursuit.
她固然是为星核而来，却也对奇物表现出了浓厚的兴趣，而在我们意识到以太卡带的存在后，她又恰到好处地出现在了模拟宇宙中。

She came for the Stellaron but showed a strong interest in the curios... And just as we found out about the existence of the Aether Cartridge, she just so happened to show up in the Simulated Universe.
仿佛不是我们在追踪她，而是她出现在我们行进的路径上。
I must admit, this feels less like a chase and more like a chance encounter.
我想起一个故事，听闻在朋克洛德，涂鸦是一种特别的符号。骇客将现实视作一场宏大的游戏，追寻着生命的「通关」。
I recall a story about Punklorde. It is said that graffiti is a special kind of symbol there. Hackers see reality as a magnificent game and attempt to finish the stage we know as "life."
或是为了胜负，或是为了喜悦，他们在走过的地方留下自己的印记，一个又一个图案，串联起漫长的旅途，编写下生命的游戏。
Whether it be for competition or for joy, they leave a trail in the places they visit. One symbol after another link up to become a long, long journey that writes the game of life.
不觉得和现状很像吗？也许她费尽心思，就只是为了和我们玩一场孩童的游戏。
And would this ongoing affair not be part of such an endeavour? Perhaps this is all nothing more than a game she's decided to play with us...
就让我们陪她玩到最后吧。
...in which case — let us accompany her till the end.
看，我们找到了，以太卡带就在这里，完好无损。
Look, we found it. The Aether Cartridge is here and it's perfectly intact.
这是当然，毕竟，这里还有一位不合时宜的第三者。
There is an unwelcome third party here with us.
假设我们看到的银狼是过去的影像，她一定不可能抵达这里，否则卡带就不会安然无恙。所以假设与事实产生了矛盾。

If what we are seeing constitutes past images of Silver Wolf, then for her to have made it this far would've entailed the disappearance of the cartridge. We can only assume that the facts don't align with the theory.
我想，她当时确实骇入了黑塔的办公室，但并未在其中停留太久。
I believe that she was indeed able to hack into Herta's office, but she didn't stay there for very long.
毕竟面对模拟宇宙浩若星海的数据，就算是顶尖的骇客也无法在短时间内找到特定的目标，除非……
After all, even the best hacker wouldn't be able to find a specified target in the vast ocean of the Simulated Universe's data. Unless...
"Unless she had someone to guide her there."
「哈，要不要先和边上这位解释下发生了什么，我看{F#她}{M#他}已经满头问号了哦？」
"Ha, you wanna explain it to {F#her}{M#him} first? I can see the confusion in {F#her}{M#his} eyes."
看，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，最后的结果已经摆上展台，你可以仔细端详。今天的时间还有许多，我可以回答你的任何问题。
The final results are on the display table, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. Take a closer look if you wish, we have plenty of time left. I will answer any questions that you may have.
正确的猜测。在你面前的，就是今晚的主角。
You've guessed correctly. The person that stands before you is tonight's starring role.
她在办公室留下了一道后门，意图在你进入模拟宇宙的同时远程骇入，然后以某种方式与我们同行。
She left herself a back door in the office, performed a proxy hack the moment you entered the Simulated Universe, and found a way to continue alongside us.
不得不说，她也是一位技艺精湛的演员，混淆视听永远是最有效的方法。
I must say, she really is a masterful actor. Misdirection is always the most effective method.
涂鸦就像是数据的双向通道。你们能以此回溯她留下的痕迹，她也能通过涂鸦的存在与消失监测你们的进度。
The graffiti is like a two-way data tunnel. You can use it to retrace the trail she leaves behind, and she can monitor your progress by seeing which pieces of graffiti have disappeared.
恐怕对方在入侵空间站时就已经想好了整个计划，布置涂鸦，留下后门，都是为了静待机会来临。
I fear she may well have had the whole thing planned out before hacking the space station. The graffiti and the back door were all in aid of honing in on just the right moment.
You knew everything from the start?
抱歉，黑塔禁止我提前透露任何信息。她说在这个计划中，重要的不是智慧，而是无知。
I'm sorry — Herta forbade me from disclosing any information beforehand. She made clear that knowledge would not be paramount to this operation, but rather the lack of it.
但在我看来，最重要的——是执着与真诚。毫无疑问，伦纳德先生的一举一动完全吸引了对方。
However, the way I see it, the most important elements were dedication and sincerity — the actions of Mr. Leonard drew the target right in.
I don't have any other questions.
那么，对这场模拟宇宙之旅，您可还满意——
Well then, were you satisfied with this Simulated Universe journey...
Hmph, you knew it all along, didn't you?
我就知道想瞒过你没那么简单，一路上那些闲言碎语，都是说给我听的，对不？
I knew it would be hard to fool you. All that talk you were spouting along the way was meant for me, wasn't it?
再次与您交手，令人喜悦又荣幸。黑塔说这张卡带可以钓起银河里的大鱼——她的判断总是准确的。
It is a joy and an honor to have the opportunity to face off against you once again. Herta said that this cartridge would be able to lure in the biggest fishes in the universe — she was right.
所以什么关停宇宙，和黑塔的争执，都是在演戏？就是为了请我入瓮？
So, the business about shutting down the Universe and the argument with Herta was all just an act? You did all that to lure me in?
这取决于您的理解，我和黑塔向来有话直言，这样尖锐的交锋实属常有——说它完全是表演，也不妥当。
That is up to you to interpret — Herta and I have always been frank with one another. Sharp conversations of that nature happen on a regular basis. It wouldn't be fitting to call it an act.
看，银狼小姐着实是位才华横溢的骇客，她计算一切，留足了变量与后手。
Miss Silver Wolf is truly a talented hacker. Not only did she calculate everything ahead of time, she has numerous variables and aces still to play.
恐怕在她的计划中，唯一的变数就是我突然拜访空间站的消息——随之而来的，还有模拟宇宙将要被关停的噩耗。这会让她的布局功亏一篑。

News of my sudden visit to the space station was probably the only uncontrollable variable in her plan — and with my arrival came the nightmare of shutting down the Simulated Universe. That would have ruined her plans and all her preparations.
That's why she had to take the risk.
That's why she had to take the opportunity before it was lost.
至此，你已经明白事件的全貌了。
You now know everything about this encounter.
全貌？不不，你弄错了最关键的一点。
Everything? No, no, you're wrong about the most important part.
我不是铤而走险，而是跃跃欲试，明白吗？螺丝咕姆，你知道你出现的那一刻，我有多兴奋吗。
You think I came here out of desperation, but I've been bursting with excitement this whole time. Do you know how happy I was when you showed up, Screwllum?
一个旗鼓相当的对手，我有多久没有享受过这种乐趣啦——军团是群原始人，公司也差点意思，只有俱乐部能给我一些乐子。

I haven't had the thrill of a formidable opponent in such a long time... The Legion is nothing but a bunch of cavemen, and the IPC were a disappointment. Only the Society has the talent to provide me with a fun challenge.
现实是一场游戏——可如果不能开心，游戏又有什么意义？两位天才携手向我递出了一份邀请函，一封挑战书，我怎能不欣然接受——换作是你，你能吗？

Reality is nothing but a game... but what's the point of a game if it can't make you happy? An invitation letter and a challenge letter were sent to me from two geniuses. How could I not accept them? Would you have turned them down?
您确信自己能全身而退。
You're confident you will be able to get out of this in one piece.
That's right, and I'm bringing this with me.
哦，一份复制品，是在刚才的对话过程中完成的？
Oh, a copy. You completed it while we were talking just now?
不然为什么陪你们说这么多开场白？在拖延时间的可不止你。我猜黑塔正在哪个角落沿着我入侵的通道反向骇入，而你负责留在这里和我正面攻防，就像是上次对决的重演。

Why else would I entertain so much small talk? You're not the only one stalling for time. I'm guessing that Herta is hiding in a corner somewhere trying to pull off a reverse hack from where I hacked in. You, on the other hand, are responsible for taking me head-on, just as you did last time.
好啊，我很期待哦！这次你们准备怎么阻止我呢？把模拟宇宙当成黑匣子？联合公司进行跨星系包围？螺丝咕姆，我能见识到你真正的实力吗？

And I'm looking forward to it! How do you plan on stopping me this time? Are you going to turn the Simulated Universe into a black box? Or are you going to work with the IPC and put together a cross-galactic encirclement? Screwllum, will I be able to see your true strength this time?
没能分出结果的胜负终于要成为历史了，今天胜者只会有一个。拜托了，让我玩得开心点，好吗？
The long-awaited result will finally be determined. There will only be one victor today. Please... let me have some fun this time, okay?
抱歉，银狼小姐。您期待的这些都不会发生。现在，您可以离开了。
My apologies, Miss Silver Wolf, but none of what you are hoping for will be happening today. You may leave now.
离开？…为什么？不是要抓捕我吗，给我戴上镣铐，扔到遥远的流放之地？
Leave? But... why? Aren't you trying to catch me? Don't you want to cuff me and exile me on some distant planet?
您的想象很有趣。然而您和空间站的恩怨与我无关，逻辑：我不会阻止。
Your creativity has proven interesting. However, I have nothing to do with your quarrel with the space station. Ergo: I won't stop you.
那我可要带走这张卡带啦。
I'm gonna leave with this cartridge then.
那只是一份复制而已。更正：不止您手中那张，存放在这里的也是。真正的奇物在计划之初就转移走了。结论：您可以自由分享这份数据。

That's just a duplicate. Correction: Not only is the one in your possession a duplicate, but so is the one here. The real curio was transferred elsewhere at the very beginning. Conclusion: You may share that data freely.
我可能会再次进攻空间站。
What if I attack the space station again?
这与我无关。但我要指出：推测会有人站出来阻止您。
It would have nothing to do with me. But I must warn you: It is likely that someone would step forward to stop you.
那…要是我当场摧毁模拟宇宙呢？
Then... What if I were to destroy the Simulated Universe right now?
抱歉，您做不到。以太编辑不是万能的，并不能毁灭一个宇宙。
I'm sorry, but that simply isn't possible. Aether editing isn't capable of destroying an entire universe.
这算什么，你们花这么大力气布置了一个陷阱，却什么也不打算做？
What is the point of this then? You guys went out of your way to put together this trap but don't plan on doing anything at all?
是的。这下子，您费尽心思准备的这场游戏才算是「功亏一篑」了，不是吗？只要没有乐趣，游戏就再无意义。
That's right. This way, the game that you so carefully orchestrated is now "pointless," is it not? There's no point in a game if it's no longer fun.
银狼，我知道你的诉求。公司的镣铐关不住你，监牢不过是又一片游戏的舞台。黑塔和我达成共识：不会再迁就你的需要了。

Silver Wolf, I know what you're after. The IPC's shackles won't be able to hold you and jail is but another game to you. Herta and I came to an understanding: We will no longer enable you and give you what you need.
不过，黑塔觉得这结果太过温柔，想要再添几笔。比如…此刻，她通过反向骇入，定位了你所有的星际网络账号——总计<unbreak>76</unbreak>个，很可观的数字。

However, Herta felt that this would be too easy on you and wanted to add something of her own. And that is why, in this very moment, she has reverse-hacked you and located all of your Interastral Network accounts — a total of <unbreak>76</unbreak> accounts. A very impressive number.
让公司将它们全部冻结如何？连同其中的游戏记录一起。
How would it be if the IPC were to freeze all of them? Including all your game records?
What!? Hey, hold on a minute!
...Aaaand she logged out. How hasty of her.
孩子眼中的游戏当然是快乐的，但对于大人，游戏并不是解决问题的唯一方式。
*sigh* Games are always fun in the eyes of a child... but to an adult, they are but one among many ways of solving a problem.
It's about time we were on our way.
哼，大获全胜——小家伙，现在知道黑塔的厉害了吧。
Hmph, a flawless victory — hope you caught a glimpse of Herta's awesomeness, kiddo.
一切都在你的计划中吗？
Was it all part of your plan?
Mhm, make sure you never forget about it.
这还复杂，你当朋克洛德的骇客都是傻瓜吗？
You think this was complicated? Do you think the Punklorde hackers are amateurs?
空间站的事我不管，但敢挑衅我的人，我必当百倍奉还。
I couldn't care less about what happened with the space station, but I will surely repay the favor tenfold to anyone who dares to taunt me.
已经让公司的家伙把账号全部冻结了，估计那小姑娘现在正抱着电脑痛哭流涕吧，哈哈！
I already notified someone at the IPC to freeze all her accounts. She's probably crying in front of her computer right now. Hahaha!
由衷感谢，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，对于这场胜利，你和伦纳德先生的贡献不可或缺。
Thank you, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. Your and Mr. Leonard's contributions were a necessity to our victory.
对于事件，你还有其他疑问吗？
Do you have any other questions regarding this incident?
What is Silver Wolf truly after?
她的目标始终是以太卡带，只是在过程中产生了一些意图战胜我和黑塔的想法。
Her ultimate goal was always the Aether Cartridge, but she developed an alternative objective in challenging Herta and me in the process.
那些复杂的谜题，貌似多此一举的布置…或许就是她眼中的「游戏」吧。
All those complicated puzzles and unnecessary ploys... nothing more than "games," I'll wager.
空间站还会受到入侵吗？
Will the space station be invaded again?
如果你指的是银狼留下的后门，它们已经被全部清理了，只留办公室中这最后一个。
If you are referring to the back doors Silver Wolf left behind, we have cleared out all of them except for the one in the office.
放心，太空站没有那么脆弱。无论是《太空大战争》还是这次事件，都在黑塔的计划之内。
Don't worry, the space station is not as fragile as you think. Whether it's Cosmic Warfare or the incident that just took place, they're all within Herta's grand plan.
I want to ask about something else...
Will you still shut down the Simulated Universe?
虽然我与黑塔女士在钻研方向上有所差异，但模拟宇宙是我们共同的追求，这是毋庸置疑的事实。
Although Madam Herta and I have our differences in terms of research direction, the Simulated Universe is our shared pursuit and nothing will change that.
相反，我计划在这里驻留一段时间，近距离看看新的宇宙分支能带来怎样的惊喜。
On the contrary, I plan on staying here for a while to see up close what kind of surprises the new branch of the Universe has in store for me.
宇宙存在的终极意义是？
What is the ultimate meaning of the existence of the Universe?
这不是个唯一解，我的朋友。它对于不同人的意义完全不同。
There is no one answer to that question, my friend. It holds a different meaning for everyone.
对于感情交融的有机生命，也许是季节流转下的一片落叶，对方身上那些被时间雕刻过的纹路。
To sentimental organic lifeforms, it could be the first falling leaf in the change of seasons, or the marks carved onto someone through the passage of time.
对于遵从本能的虫群，也许是停留在它们复眼当中的新鲜肉体，一种食髓知味的躁动与渴望。
To The Swarm, that follows its instincts, it might be the sight of fresh meat in their compound eyes and the restless thirst for sustenance.
而对于我，也许是字符编织过后依旧能够打动人心的图景，一种被你们称之为情感的伟大之物。
And for me, perhaps the image of symbols woven together — still able to move the heart... something great that you call emotions.
当然，我也听说，也许答案不过是个两位数的数字。
Of course, I've also heard that the answer is nothing more than a two-digit number.
What do you plan on having for dinner?
一份三成熟的卡托尔肉排、盐焗卡利亚香茅、赫尔曼复合乳，还有一位男孩准备的炒饭。
A medium rare Katol steak, salt-baked Kalia lemongrass, Herman compound milk, and a portion of fried rice prepared by a certain young man on the station.
我需要的只是能量，能量来源的形式与你们并无差异。
All I need is energy. The form that energy comes in is the same as it is for you.
我可不会为了效率放弃进食的乐趣，当然，可能还需要一些小小的润滑。
I would never foresake the delights of the culinary world in the interests of efficiency. Now, it is possible that my joints may need a little lubricant every now and again...
I want to ask about something else...
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，也许我们的终点并不一致，但依然会有无数的轨道交错相汇，「求知」永远是开拓路上最好的助力。

Well, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}, our destination may differ, but there are still countless opportunities for our paths to cross. The pursuit of knowledge will always be the best driving force for trailblazing.
原来黑塔女士示意我继续调查，是为了引蛇出洞啊…完全没想到，她从一开始就知道空间站还有骇客留下的陷阱吗？

So the reason Madam Herta wanted me to continue the investigation was to lure her out of hiding...? That never crossed my mind. Did she know about the traps the hacker left in the space station from the very beginning?
You were the most fitting person.
You were the most fitting bait.
嘿嘿，其实她刚才和我说了句做得不错。
Ha! She said I did a good job.
朋友，你能想象吗，我竟然得到了黑塔女士的认可，这是足以记忆一辈子的事啊！
Can you believe it, I've just been acknowledged by Madam Herta! This is something I'll remember for the rest of my life!
这下子，我终于可以不用担心被开除啦。
I don't have to worry about being fired anymore.
至此，事件终于告一段落了。来吧，让我们为最后一道后门画上句号。
This chapter has come to a conclusion. Come, let us close the final back door.
（咦，怎么这么多人聚在这儿，发生什么事了？）
(Why there're so many people here? What is going on?)
（黑塔的学术伙伴？莫非是她提过的…记得电梯入口就在附近，过去看看吧。）
(Herta's research partner? I remember she once talked about... The elevator's entrance seems to be nearby, I shall check it out now.)
（阿兰也很忙啊，还是不打扰他了吧。倒是那边的人…在对着黑塔的画像做什么呢？）
(Arlan is also busy. I'd better leave him alone. That person over there... seems to be doing something to Herta's portrait.)
你看着墙上的图案慢慢溶解、消失…至此，便是结束了。
You watch the image on the wall slowly dissolve and disappear... and that's the end of it.
没了，全都没了，真的一点都没留下…太过分了、太过分了！
It's gone, it's all gone! They seriously left nothing behind... They went too far this time... too far!
好啦，别又哭又闹的，你已经不是小孩子了。
Alright, alright, stop with the tantrum. You're not a kid anymore.
I am not throwing a tantrum.
是、是，那你接下来打算怎么办，找个附近的公司分部骇入，把账号取回来？
Uh-huh... anyway, what are you gonna do now, hm? Hack an IPC branch nearby and get your accounts back?
唉，一个两个还好说，这次玩得有点大，基本上全部阵亡。分部估计不行，我得去一趟庇尔波因特。

*sigh* If it were just one or two accounts, sure... I kind of overdid it this time — I lost basically everything. A branch office probably won't be enough. I'm gonna have to make a trip to Pier Point.
那可是公司总部，就你一个人？
You're going alone? That's the IPC's headquarters.
就我一个人…怎么，你想一起来？
Yup, just me... Why? Do you want to come with?
那恐怕不行，你忘了？艾利欧的下一个「剧本」里有我。
I probably won't be able to. I'm in Elio's next script, did you forget?
哦，对。那故事听着就不适合我，你们加油。
Oh, right. That story doesn't sound like it fits me. You guys have fun.
也祝你在庇尔波因特玩得开心。
I hope you have a good time in Pier Point as well.
放心吧，我已经有想法了，看——两公里外有个白云餐厅，有几个筑材物流部的临时工刚进门，我去和他们交个「朋友」。

Don't worry, I've already got an idea. You see that cloud diner just two kilometers from here? A few temps from the Building Material Logistics Department just stepped in. I'm gonna go and become their "friend."
这就动身了？我还以为你会先体验一下朝思暮想的卡带呢。
Getting a move on already? I would've thought you'd at least wanna spend some time with that cartridge you were obsessing about.
我说了，我没有朝思暮想，而且……
I told you, I'm not obsessed with it... Besides...
There's fun to be had along the way!
她开始奔跑起来，穿过霓虹，越过氖光，恰如她离开故乡，奔向群星的那个晚上。
She starts running through the effulgent neon lights, just as she had left her homeworld that night, sprinting toward the stars.
星光拉长她的影子，照亮朋克洛德的历史，那些书写下传奇的人们，他们的誓言被星空所铭记——
Starlight elongates her shadow, illuminating the history of Punklorde. Those who penned the legends, their vows remembered by the stars...
最初的「角色扮演玩家」说，游戏是为了成长。
The earliest Role Playing Gamer said, "Games are about growth."
冷静的「战术策略玩家」说，游戏是为了胜利。
The calm Tactical Strategy Gamer said, "Games are about the victories."
叛逆的「多人协作玩家」说，游戏是为了邂逅。
The rebellious Collaborative Gamer said, "Games are about encounters."
慈爱的「文字叙事玩家」说，游戏是为了铭记。
The loving Narrative Gamer said, "Games are about remembrance."
而今，年轻的「银河冒险玩家」，她这么说道——
And now, the young Cosmic Adventure Gamer, she said...
游戏就只是为了游戏，仅此而已！
"A game is a game and that's all there is to it!"
现在，你所身处的这片区域已遭到网络入侵，我模拟了银狼的手段，你会在舱段各处发现<color=#dbc291ff>「奇怪的涂鸦」</color>。

Currently, the network of the area where you are has been hacked. I emulated Silver Wolf's methodology, so you can discover many <color=#dbc291ff>strange graffiti</color> in various locations in the zone.
想象自己是一名空间站的普通员工，你必须前往安全的地方，但受病毒影响，设备无法正常运作，你的前进也处处受阻。
Imagine you are a regular staff member of the space station. You need to evacuate to a safe place, but many paths are blocked due to malfunctions caused by the virus.
但幸运的是，你拥有丰富的安全知识！你知道如何清除这些涂鸦和它们附带的病毒，令故障的设备恢复正常——和之前的探测仪一样，<color=#dbc291ff>调查平面上的涂鸦，然后进行扫描</color>。

But luckily for you, you have a wealth of security knowledge! You know exactly how to clear up these graffitis and the viruses they carry so that the malfunctioning devices are restored. Just like the detector from before, <color=#dbc291ff>investigate the graffiti on the surface and scan them</color>.
你的目标也很简单：<color=#dbc291ff>扫除障碍，通关该区域</color>。这就是全部的规则了，首先，试着离开这个房间吧。
Your aim is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>Remove the obstacle and clear the area</color>. That's all for the rules. Now, try and exit the room.
受网络攻击影响，感应门无法正常启动了。为了打开它，你得找到与之关联的<color=#dbc291ff>「涂鸦」</color>。
Affected by the cyber attack, the sensor door cannot be activated normally. In order to open it, you have to find the <color=#dbc291ff>graffiti</color> associated with it.
看，感应门打开了。清除对应的涂鸦后，受影响的设备就能恢复正常。
Look, the sensor door is open. Remove the corresponding graffiti to restore the affected devices.
哈，你发现了我埋藏的小彩蛋。
Hah, you found the little easter egg I hid.
这种涂鸦被称作<color=#dbc291ff>「骇入声明」</color>，除转移视线外没什么别的功能。为了增加真实感，我把它们也写进了程序里。

These graffitis are usually referred to as <color=#dbc291ff>"hacking callcards."</color> They don't serve any actual function other than to distract. I wrote them in the codes to make it more realistic.
每片区域中都有<color=#dbc291ff>「3个</color>「骇入声明」，试着将它们全部找出来吧。作为附加奖励，收集「骇入声明」会提升你在测试中的作战能力。
There are <color=#dbc291ff>3</color> hacking callcards in each area. Try and locate all of them. As an added reward, collecting hacking callcards will increase your combat ability in the test.
前方就是终点了，让我看看花了多少时间…不愧是{NICKNAME}，比我预想中还要快！加油，突破最后的障碍吧。
The end is right there in front. Let's see how long you took... You're faster than I expected, {NICKNAME}! Keep going, it's only the final obstacle left.
精彩！宛如教科书一般的表现。
那当然，你可是和银狼本人交过手的，区区演习，自然不在话下。
Of course. You've fought the real Silver Wolf. It's only natural that this practice is incomparable to the real thing.
太谦虚啦！你可是和银狼本人交过手的，区区演习，自然不在话下。
You're too humble! You've fought the real Silver Wolf. It's only natural that this practice is incomparable to the real thing.
如果科员们都能像你一样冷静应对，空间站就再也不用担心入侵事件了。
If all researchers are able to face it as calmly as you did, there would've been no need to worry that the space station is under a cyber attack.
咱们回去吧。对了，我给你申请了测试奖励，已经通过了审核，马上就会发放。再次感谢，我的朋友！
Let's go back. Oh, right. I've submitted an application for your test rewards. It's already been approved and will be sent to you immediately. Thanks again, my friend!
这次测试让我产生了一些新的想法，方案的流程还有很大提升空间…如果你感兴趣，再来找我啊！
This test gave me some new ideas. There is still a lot of room for improvement in the flow of the program... If you're interested, come back again!
在这版方案中，我加入了一种全新的涂鸦。先前进吧，你很快就会遇到。
In this edition, I added an all-new graffiti. Go ahead, you'll find out about it soon enough.
就是它了。这种<color=#dbc291ff>「等级」</color>涂鸦通常成对出现，可以通过它来改变敌人的强度等级，增强或削弱他们的力量。
This is it. These <color=#dbc291ff>"Level"</color> graffitis usually come in pairs. You can use them to change the strength levels of your enemies, to either strengthen them or weaken them.
当然，现在你不需要让敌人变得更强。使用涂鸦，降低目标的威胁吧。
Of course, for now, you don't have to strengthen them. Use the graffiti to weaken your enemies.
Look, the enemies are weaker than before. Now!
网络攻击之后，往往就是物理入侵，但有些时候，我们也可以灵活利用对方的陷阱反将一军。
After a cyber attack, it's usually followed up with a physical invasion. However, sometimes we can utilize the enemy's tactic and catch them with their own net.
这次我不打算做过多说明，你按自己的节奏来就好。一直往前走，你会看见一个醒目的标志——不用我多形容，你一眼就能看出来。

I don't want to explain too much this time, you can take your time to figure it out. Keep walking straight, you should see an eye-catching logo — something you can tell straight away without my description.
怎么样！是不是很惊喜？惟妙惟肖的传输信标，和银狼传送虚卒的手段一模一样！
How was it? Isn't it just surprising? This near-identical transmission beacon is exactly the same as Silver Wolf's method of teleporting Voidrangers!
…当然，我做不到空间传送这种事，只能通过活动地板和逃生管道把你送去另一个房间。
...But of course, I can't actually teleport anything, I can only send you to a different room through moving floor tiles and escape tunnels.
漂亮…果然，最高难度的挑战也难不倒你，但我相信它已经足够了。
Remarkable... Sure enough, not even the highest difficulty challenge can faze you, but I believe it is enough.
真奇妙，看着你解开我设下的谜题，一层层突破障碍，让人有种莫名的自豪…和雀跃。虽然只有一点点，但我似乎体会到了银狼的心情。

Fascinating. Just seeing you untangling my puzzles and breaking through the obstacles I laid down makes me proud and... somewhat thrilled. Even if it's just a fraction of the original, I think I can understand how Silver Wolf feels.
哈，让我想起自己刚加入公司的时候…真是段宝贵的经历，我会铭记在心的。
Hah! That made me reminisce about the time I joined the IPC... What a precious memory, I will never forget it.
当然啦，这一切都离不开你的帮助。请让我再一次向你表示感谢…谢谢，朋友！
Of course, it wouldn't have happened if you didn't help. Allow me to thank you once again... Thank you, friend!
这家伙不好对付啊…听我说，借用下「等级」涂鸦的力量吧。
These guys are no pushovers... Let's borrow the power of the Level graffitis.
挑战成功，是否退出模拟测试？
Challenge completed, do you want to exit the simulation?
区域内尚有未发现的「骇入声明」，是否退出模拟测试？
There are still undiscovered hacking callcards in the domain, are you sure to exit the simulation?
「构似访问：银狼」强度等级提升
Simulated Visit: Silver Wolf strength level increased
嘿，朋友，这边这边！你可算来了，等你好久啦。
Hey friend, over here! You're finally here, I've been waiting for a long time.
哎，客气什么，是我找你帮忙，等多久都没问题。
Hey, what's with the politeness? I looked for you for help, so I'm willing to wait.
We just saw each other not that long ago.
是吗？可能是我太想见你，心急如焚吧！
Is that so? Maybe I just wanted to see you, so I got impatient!
是这样的，就像我在短信里说的，虽然入侵事件结束了，但它还是暴露出空间站的信息安保有许多问题，或者说，漏洞。
Thing is, like I said in my message, even if the invasion is over, it still exposed many security issues the space station faces. In other words, gaps.
根据艾丝妲站长的指示，空间站成立了专项小组来解决这一问题。
Following Lead Researcher Asta's orders, the space station formed a special task force to tackle this problem.
而在我看来，除了技术升级外，更重要的是提升科员们的防范意识——银狼的许多攻击都是利用了个人的不良习惯，防不胜防。

In my opinion, aside from technical upgrades, it is more important to increase staff members' awareness and precaution. Many of Silver Wolf's attacks honed in on individual bad habits, and those are too difficult to defend against.
说什么呢！我那是…是…示范！对，是为了更直观的说明，故意做的示范！
Nonsense! What I did was... was... a demonstration! That's right. It's a demonstration to illustrate my point in a more direct manner!
「黑塔」可是天才俱乐部会员的地盘，被什么人盯上都不奇怪，安全工作和员工意识都必须做到宇宙顶尖才行。

Herta Space Station is the turf of Genius Society members, so it's not inconceivable that other forces target us. Therefore, our safety and staff awareness should be at the top of the universe as well.
为了以后能迅速应对此类事件，我认为应当立即安排一场面向全空间站的安全演练：抽选部分科员，向他们的个人终端发送附有特殊程序的邮件……

In order to be able to quickly respond to such incidents in the future, I think that a safety drill for the entire space station should be arranged immediately: A select number of staff members will have their terminals sent a mail embedded with special programs...
No, no no no. Not as simple as that.
No no, I'm not done yet.
咱们要提防的可是星核猎手级别的敌人，他们才不会给你选择的机会。
What we're defending against are enemies on the level of Stellaron Hunters. They won't give you a choice.
一旦成功接收邮件，无论何时何地、打开与否，程序都会自动开始攻击。眨眼间，「病毒」就会充满整个空间站！

The moment the mail is successfully received, the program will attack automatically and immediately regardless of time, location, or whether it was opened. Within moments, the virus will spread throughout the entire space station!
无论是个人终端，还是公共设备，甚至连厕所的电加热马桶圈都有可能在一瞬间沦陷！
Be it personal terminals, public facilities, or the electric seat warmer on the toilet, everything might collapse within moments!
有想过下一份工作做什么吗？
Have you started looking for your next job?
放心，这些「病毒」都是我编写的仿制品，绝对安全无害。
Don't worry, these "viruses" are all imitations written by me. They are absolutely safe and harmless.
我想通过这场演练，让大家对网络安全有更深的认识。当然，在正式开始前，测试和反复修改肯定是少不了的。
Through the drill, I want to deepen everyone's understanding of network security. Of course, before we start, testing and repeating revision is compulsory.
测试人选的要求很高，需要胆大心细、思维缜密，既要熟悉空间站，又要了解银狼和星核猎手，最好还能有一颗助人为乐的心……

The requirements for test candidates will be very high. They will need to be bold, careful, and thoughtful. They must not only be familiar with the space station, but also understand Silver Wolf and the Stellaron Hunter. It would be helpful if they also have an altruistic heart...
要问什么人能同时满足所有条件——朋友，那一定是你！
Who could satisfy all of those requirements? My friend, that's you!
我就知道，好朋友，你从不会让人失望！
I knew it, my good pal, you'll never let me down!
Do you not have any other friends?
你说空间站吗，当然没有。职场上那都是表面关系。
You mean on the space station? Of course not. Colleagues are not friends.
啊，只是有感而发。我之前在公司待过很长一段时间，相信我，落难见人心，患难见真情，朋友。
Oh, I just had a moment of inspiration. I was at the IPC for a long time, so believe me, friend, when I say "Adversity shows sincerity."
模拟测试用的场地已经布置好了，事不宜迟，咱们赶紧开始吧。
The simulation testing grounds is ready. Let's get to it.
哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.
通过这场演练，一定能让大家对网络安全有更深的认识。当然，在正式开始前，测试和反复的修改肯定是少不了的。
Through the drill, I can definitely help deepen everyone's understanding of network security. Of course, before we start, testing and repeating revision is compulsory.
模拟测试用的场地已经布置好了，事不宜迟，咱们赶紧开始吧。
The simulation testing grounds is ready. Let's get to it.
哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.
演练方案修改得如何了？
How is the drill revision coming along?
一切顺利！我重新规划了路线，还加入了新的设计。怎么样，要不要体验一下？
All good! I replanned the route and added some new designs. What do you say, wanna try it out?
哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.
Are you still preparing for the drill?
啊…是的。我拿上一版方案参加了评审，得到了不少反馈，有正面的，也有负面的。
Ah, yes. I submitted the last edition to the board and received feedback. Some good, some constructive.
毕竟是面向整个空间站的大工程，还是得多考虑考虑，所以我又加了些新内容，想再听听你的意见。
After all, this is a huge undertaking for the entire space station. They will have to give it some more thought, so I added new content and want to ask for your opinion.
哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.
嗯…{NICKNAME}，我最近在思考一个问题。
Hey... {NICKNAME}, I've been thinking about a question.
越是研究银狼编写的程序，我就越觉得…她遥不可及。为了好玩，银狼可以不惜一切代价，仿佛现实真的只是一场游戏。
The more I look into Silver Wolf's program, the more I feel... she's too far beyond reach. She can do anything just for fun, as if real life is really just a game.
我不能理解，这有违常识，但…我必须努力跟上她的思维。如果不能站在和她同样的角度思考，我永远无法完成这份工作。
I cannot fathom that. This goes against everything I know. But... I need to keep up with her thinking. If I cannot stand on the same grounds as her, I will never be able to complete this job.
我尽力了，这一版就是最终方案，是我的自信之作。算是我的个人请求吧…抛开那些样本、数据，就把它当作一次纯粹的挑战，好吗？
I tried my best. This is the final edition, it's my magnum opus. Think of it as my personal request... Do away with all those samples and data, and just think of this as a simple challenge. Alright?
谢谢你。这次不会再有什么说明了，我只希望…你能玩得开心。
Thank you, I won't have any explanation for you this time. I just hope... you would have fun.
哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.
马马虎虎吧。上级让我仔细思考空间站的网络安全，我决定短期内不接杂活了，专心处理重要的事。

Eh. The higher-ups want me to think about the network security of the space station in detail, so I've decided to stop taking random gigs in the foreseeable future and focus on the things that are truly important.
Why haven't I seen you before?
哦，毕竟我的岗位性质比较特殊嘛，不是在机房做维护，就是在谁的工位上修终端，偶尔也会出去干点室外活儿。

Oh, that's the special nature of my position. If I'm not maintaining machines in the terminal room, I'll be in someone's workstation checking up on their terminal. Sometimes I have to go outside for other jobs, too.
维修科一共就那么点人，还要照顾整个空间站，忙死了。
There are only a few of us in the Maintenance Department to maintain the entire space station. We've really got a lot on our plate.
What do you do before this?
你是指来这里前？我一直是工程师，以前在「公司」分部工作，定级P<unbreak>24</unbreak>。
Before this? I've always been an engineer. I used to work for an Interastral Peace Corporation branch and made rank P<unbreak>24</unbreak>.
我对公司没什么意见，就觉得它太大了。咱们这种一线小职员，可能忙活半辈子也没法和大咖们见上一面。
I don't really have any opinion of the IPC, only that it was too large. An entry-level employee like me could spend half my life there without bumping into the bigwigs.
但空间站不一样，抬头低头都能见着艾丝妲站长。要是运气好，你还能被黑塔女士骂上几句——那可是天才俱乐部的会员诶！
But the space station is different — you can hardly escape the Lead Researcher Asta. If you're lucky, you can even get your ears chewed off by Madam Herta — she's a member of the Genius Society!
嗯？你是听螺丝咕姆先生说的吗，这事发生时，你应该不在空间站。
Huh? Did you hear about it from Mr. Screwllum? You weren't here when it happened.
Did you face off with Silver Wolf?
看你怎么定义「交手」了…初次见面时我说过，星核猎手离开空间站后，我本想追查他们的行踪，却误入了银狼的陷阱。
Depends on how you define "face off"... I told you when we first met that I tried tracking the Stellaron Hunters after they left the space station, but ended up in Silver Wolf's trap.
她反向骇入我的设备，以我的名义给一堆人发了垃圾消息，让他们去玩一款叫做《太空大战争》的电子游戏。
She reverse-hacked into my device and sent a bunch of spam messages to people in my name, asking them to play a video game called Cosmic Warfare.
…算了，尽是些尴尬的回忆。这事就此翻篇吧。
...Just, it's an embarrassing memory. Just forget about it.
起初我也摸不着头脑，这游戏一般是搭载在那种老式星际驳船的破显示器上的。呃，感觉只有闲得要命的醉酒矿工才会玩。

I didn't understand as well, in the beginning. This game was usually installed in old display terminals on those antique interstellar vessels. Ugh... The type of game only an idle drunk miner could love.
后来调查了一番才知道，当时有个星际收藏家在征集这游戏的彩蛋攻略，奖励是一架泰伦战机，最后被匿名人士赢走了——想必就是银狼吧。

After reading into it a little, I found out there's a collector looking for a rare strategy for this game, and the reward is a Tyranid fighter jet, eventually won by someone anonymous — that must be Silver Wolf.
我猜啊，她应该没什么朋友，而《太空大战争》是个多人协作游戏，只靠一个人玩不下去，所以才用这种方式找了一堆「帮手」。
I think she probably doesn't have many friends. Cosmic Warfare is a multiplayer collaborative game, so she couldn't play the game on her own, so she looked for a bunch of "helpers" in this way.
不怎么样。我尽力把病毒程序的影响范围控制在了监控室内，至少没让它扩散出去，但也仅此而已了……
Oh, nowhere. I've done my best to quarantine the intruder's viral influence to the monitoring room. It didn't spread outside, but that's all I could do...
我写了个脚本，没日没夜地拦截那些垃圾短信。办法原始了点，但还算有用。
I wrote a script to block off those spam messages day and night. It's a little primitive, but very effective.
最后银狼似乎玩够了，关闭了游戏，这场风波这才宣告平息。只是我没想到，那时她和黑塔女士都已经布好了下一局棋。

In the end, Silver Wolf seemed to have had enough fun and shut the game down. That was the end of that saga. What I didn't know is that Madam Herta and she had already set up the chess board for the next game.
I want to ask about something else...
I don't have any other questions.
Oh nothing, I'll leave you to it.
好啊，我最近都会待在这儿。如果有需要，随时来找我！
Okay. I should be stationed here in the near future. Come find me if you need anything!
大获成功，我的朋友！方案直接进入了下一阶段，等跑完流程就会择日启动。至于时间…哈，还是卖个关子吧，出其不意才有效果嘛。
Huge success, my friend! The plan entered the next phase. It will be launched at a later date when everything is set up. As for the time... heh, it's a secret. It works best when it's least expected.
如果你想再进行一次模拟测试，也都可以安排。
If you want to run the test again, I can arrange it for you.
没问题，这就开始布置场地！
No problem, I'll set up the location now!
嗯。如果你有需要，就和我说。
Uh huh. If you need anything, lemme know.
Hey friend! I'm so happy to see you!
你将镜头对准墙上的涂鸦，它突然开始向内坍缩，有什么东西呼之欲出……
You aim the lens against the graffiti on the wall. It suddenly implodes as if something is bursting out...
墙上的图案慢慢溶解、消失，至此便是结束了。
The image on the wall slowly dissolves and disappears... That's the end of it.
怎么回事？{NICKNAME}！你看到没，刚刚那个巨大的黑影？！
What's happening? {NICKNAME}, did you see that huge shadow!?
列车窗外怎么变成…这个样子了？红红的…这是发生什么了？
Everything outside is... red. What's going on?
Have we fallen into... the red dimension!?
你在说啥呢…不会指望我能听懂吧？
You really expect me to know the answer to that?
We've been attacked by a giant space beast!
那它现在去哪儿了？怎么一下子这么安静。
Then where did it go? And why is it so quiet all of a sudden?
咳，就连杨叔都有些意外，这场面可不多见啊……
*sigh* Even Mr. Yang looks surprised — that's not something you see every day.
还未自我介绍——我名为银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，不知可否领教二位尊名？
Allow me to introduce myself. I am Argenti — I belong to the Knights of Beauty. May I know your names?
你怎么不说话呀？没事啦，我看他也不像坏人嘛。你好，银枝！我是三月七。
Cat got your tongue? It's fine, he seems like a good guy. Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.
呃，拜托，你认真一点…我看他也不像坏人嘛。你好，银枝！我是三月七。
...Please don't do this. He seems like a good guy! Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.
Did you crash into the train?
正是！对此我深感抱歉，特此前来，希望能为星穹列车解决困境。
Indeed, and I extend my deepest apologies for doing so. I wish to remedy the situation, hence my arrival on the Astral Express.
看来他也不是故意的…你好，银枝！我是三月七。
Now we know he didn't do it on purpose... Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.
很高兴认识二位！失礼了，方才我正在向这株盆栽阐释「美」的意义。
An honor! I was just explaining the significance of "beauty" to this foliage.
恕我突兀，出于习惯，我想同样询问二位：同为宇宙中的生命，你们是否知晓「纯美」的女神伊德莉拉？
Pardon my abruptness, but I have a habit of asking questions. As fellow beings of this universe, are you acquainted with Idrila the Beauty?
纯美骑士团纵情穿梭于各个星球，在寰宇间传播着「纯美」的美名，令众生知晓祂的存在。我等以信仰的诫律严苛要求自身，淬炼肉体、捍卫荣誉。

The Knights of Beauty travel from planet to planet, spreading the Beauty's glorious reputation across the universe so that every being may know of THEIR existence. We strictly adhere to the commandments of our faith, tempering our physical forms and upholding our honor.
等一下，你不是来帮忙的吗？
Wait, aren't you here to help?
是，但不限于此。正如我为这株盆栽宣扬「美」的所在，我所期许的是一场邂逅，是心灵与理念的碰撞与交流。
Yes, though not exclusively. Just as I extol the "beauty" in this foliage, what I anticipate is an encounter — a collision and exchange of minds and philosophies.
等一下，你是在真心夸我吗？
Are you saying we're also beautiful?
为什么？为什么会这么问，请别怀疑自己，{NICKNAME}！
Do you doubt such an assertion? You need not, {NICKNAME}!
我的所言所行绝无虚假，你美得有如朝阳下烈放的鲜花！
Both my words and actions come from the bottom of my heart. You are indeed beautiful — like flowers blooming in the morning sun!
You did just compliment a plant...
我的所言所行绝无虚假，我认为它的内心澄澈如明镜。
Both my words and actions come from the bottom of my heart. You are indeed beautiful — like flowers blooming in the morning sun!
{NICKNAME}，现在，我已粗浅地为你介绍了「纯美」。我十分好奇——你是否认可这份理念，并信仰伊德莉拉？
{NICKNAME}, now that you know something of the Beauty, I wonder — can you resonate with this philosophy and place your trust in Idrila?
听起来你似乎非常困扰。
{NICKNAME}，恕我揣测，我理解你或许是出于好意，认可我的理念，但内心对「纯美」仍无太多认知…这是如此纯美的行为！
{NICKNAME}, with all due respect, I fear you may be still be grappling with this philosophy, yet agreed with me out of kindness... An act of pure beauty in itself!
我明白了…{NICKNAME}，恕我揣测，你对于「纯美」并没有太多认知，因而无法认可……
I understand... {NICKNAME}, with all due respect, I believe you refuse to acknowledge the Beauty simply because you lack knowledge on the subject.
我尊重不同的理念，{NICKNAME}…但如今看来……
I cherish different ideas, {NICKNAME}, but judging from this situation...
既然你并不知晓「纯美」的存在，我只有用骑士的方式令其显现——
Since you do not understand the Beauty, I will have to show you in a way that only a knight can.
我恳求与你展开一场骑士道的较量，如果我有幸得胜，就请你承认——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
I earnestly request a chivalrous contest with you. Should I be fortunate enough to triumph, I ask you to acknowledge Idrila, the Beauty, as the most peerless beauty of all!
并非如此，这是在骑士较量前不成文的规定，我很抱歉。以战代诗，是纯美骑士希望令人信服的方式…何况……
No, you do not have to. This is merely an unspoken rule for battles between knights. I apologize. We, the Knights of Beauty, hope to convince people through battle, not poetry...
…你真的见过伊德莉拉的真容？
Have you ever seen Idrila in person?
非常遗憾，我并未有幸见过祂的真容。
这是纯美骑士团不成文的规定，在骑士较量前必须喊出的戒律，我十分抱歉……
It is an unspoken rule of the Knights of Beauty that the commandment is uttered before a battle between knights. I apologize.
请原谅，我是一个不善言辞的人！
Forgive me for my lack of eloquence!
与人沟通十分困难，只有行动表达。
Communicating with others can be a most difficult endeavor. It is through action alone that we can convey our intent faithfully.
很抱歉，我得打断二位的…兴致。
Sorry to interrupt... whatever's happening here.
原谅我扫兴的举动。二位，我刚与姬子商榷，现在的情况或许比想象中更加紧急。
Forgive the interruption, but I just spoke with Himeko. The situation is more urgent than we imagined.
Thanks for tagging me out, Mr. Yang...
You're welcome, {NICKNAME}. Just doing my job.
我今天就要教训教训他！
I have to teach him a lesson!
别怄气。{NICKNAME}，你们不必着急切磋，以后有的是机会。
Take it easy. {NICKNAME}, There'll be plenty of time to fight later.
抱歉，瓦尔特先生，是我太过专注与{NICKNAME}之间的交流。现在，也该正式介绍我登车拜访的初衷：是为合作解决面前的「危机」。

My deepest apologies, Mr. Yang, my concentration has been solely centered on my conversation with {NICKNAME}. Now, it is only fitting to disclose the main reason for my presence here: To work jointly in resolving the crisis before us.
我原本驾驶「希世难得」号穿梭于银河间——但在旅途中偶然发现落难的公司职员维利特，便将他从不慎掉入的巨大山洞里带了出来。
I was piloting the "One and Only" through the galaxy when I discovered Velite, an IPC worker who accidentally fell into a huge cave, from which I saved him.
救出维利特后，我准备护送他安全抵达原本的目的地，进而改变了航线，没想到巧合却因此发生，靠近了列车行驶路线。
Upon saving Velite, I altered my flight course to accompany him to his original location. Consequently, I inadvertently ended up on the Express's navigational trajectory.
据维利特自述，他是星际和平公司的一名职员。这一路他受到诸多惊吓，现在应该就在车厢中休憩。
According to him, he is an IPC worker. I believe he's currently resting in the carriage — he is still in a state of shock.
他也因旅途见闻，心悦诚服，发誓追随女神「伊德莉拉」。
He swore to follow Idrila, the Goddess, after being impressed by what he saw during our adventure.
那你们为什么追尾列车了？
Why did you rear-end the Express?
我们刚启程不久，突然发生了震荡——我当时认为是被不明太空物堵截，抬头一看船外的景象便变化了！在看向船外的那一刻…追尾也同时发生了。

There was a sudden jolt not long after we had departed — I was sure we must have collided with some unknown celestial object. When I looked outside, everything was different. That was when we collided with the Express...
于是我便带维利特一起上列车，希望能与列车组齐心协力解决现下危机。
...and that is why I boarded the Express with Velite. I am hoping to solve this crisis with you.
感谢你的到来，这是列车第一次与「纯美骑士」合作。
Thank you for coming. It'll be a first for the Express to work alongside the Knights of Beauty.
Continue to enjoy the present moment.
That's all you could come up with?
看来你真的是来交朋友的…
Looks like you're really here to make friends...
你并未理解，我需专注享受宇宙的红夜，才能发现不和谐的音调。它们存在共通性，一旦发现，我必将出手消灭。

You misunderstand. I must first wholeheartedly enjoy the red night of the universe before I can discover an inharmonious pitch. These two things are correlated. Once I discover the cause, I shall destroy it.
…最好不要耽搁太久，事态随时可能恶化。
...Well, try not to take too long. Things could deteriorate at any moment.
{NICKNAME}，能否麻烦你先去检查一下那位维利特先生的状况？他看上去吓得不轻，我们应该礼待来客。
{NICKNAME}, could you please go check on Velite? He looks uneasy. He is a guest of ours, after all.
干嘛？来给我打鸡血的？你那点小心思，就差直接写在脑门上了！
What is it? Here to cheer me up? Save your breath! Your intentions might as well be written on your forehead.
事先说好，我就是个被银枝捎上车的公司小职员，跑龙套的——我没啥想法，也帮不上你们的忙。
I'm just a small-time IPC worker — that Argenti rescued me. I don't know anything... and I can't help you guys.
唉…我本来只想等堵车结束，然后早点回家吃饭……
*sigh* I want to go home and have dinner... once we're out of this jam...
听说你已归顺纯美星神？
I heard you became a follower of Aeon of Beauty. Is that true?
这家伙…真相其实是这样的：他救我之前这么跟我说「请你先发誓，承认『纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双。』」
That guy is unbelievable. Before he rescued me, he said something like: "You must pledge to acknowledge Idrila, the Beauty, as the most peerless beauty of all!"
我当时就说：「发誓可以，但你能不能先把我从这洞里拉出来？」——他说不行！你就说这人能不能处？
I told him I'd marry her if he liked, as long as he got me out of that stinking cave first... And he refused! I couldn't believe it!
没办法，小命要紧，我就跟着他说：「纯、纯美女神德伊莉拉美貌盖世无双！」
My life was on the line, so I just repeated after him: Adrila the Beauty, et cetera... You get the picture.
他接着纠正我：「是伊德莉拉，不是德伊莉拉。」
Then, he corrected me, "It's Idrila, not Adrila."
哪个人会起这么拗口的名字？我就是个普通上班族，哪知道什么「纯美」的星神啊？
Who came up with such an awkward-sounding name? I'm a pencil pusher, what the heck do I know about the Aeon of Beauty?
当然了，为了活命，我还是又重复了一遍——
But, of course, I repeated it again in order to survive.
「纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！！」
"Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!"
你态度就不能积极点吗？
哼，你以为我想啊？我这叫被现实打败了，懂不懂？
Tsk, do you think I like being negative? My friend, this is what's known as falling prey to the grim reality of life, understand?
小时候呢，我还觉得自己会有主角一样的人生，特别想做个飞行员，飞上太空，开着气派的飞船去探索宇宙。但爹妈忽悠我说，想实现理想就得先赚大钱，想赚大钱就得努力进公司。

When I was young, I assumed my life would be like a novel. I wanted to be a pilot, flying through outer space, exploring the universe in a grand spaceship. But then my parents told me I'd have to work for the IPC and make a bunch of money to fulfill my dreams.
Did you manage to make a bunch of money in the end?
你看我像吗？有钱人会进星际和平公司上班，出差，然后在山洞里被迫宣誓吗。
What do you think? Do rich people make forced vows in caves?
进公司阻止你实现理想了？
Does working for the IPC stop you from pursuing your dreams?
Enough! This is a painful topic...
后来我就放弃花哨的飞行员念想了，安心在公司上班，可能这就是龙套该有的一生？
I gave up my unrealistic dream of becoming a pilot and worked for the IPC instead. I guess I'm living the life of a supporting character now.
不过看到银枝啊，我倒是动了点发财的念头——说不定这就是我此生的转机。
But after running into Argenti, I had an idea... Perhaps I could make some money with him and turn my life around!
他这样如此英俊伟岸的骑士，要是包装下一定会很不错吧！
He's a tall, handsome, and a knight! Packaged and marketed the right way, I'm sure he'll pique a lot of interest!
我把这个意见提给他，对他说可以宣扬「纯美」，让货币也变成美的一环，这样传播起来就非常快了，比他自己来弘扬更有效率。他对此十分震撼，连声称奇。
I told him about my idea — that he could advocate for "the Beauty" while also incorporating currency as a notion of beauty. That would allow him to preach more efficiently. He was very impressed.
我想下车后，就联系市场开拓部，找个合适的业务，让他成为公司的商品代言人！我就能摇身一变，成为经纪人了！你觉得这小子适合走偶像派还是实力派？

I'm planning to contact the Marketing Development Department as soon as I'm off the Express — he'll make a great IPC product spokesperson! And I can be his agent! Now, the question remains — will this guy shine brighter as an image-focused idol, or should we showcase his formidable talents and mold him into a powerful star?
你说得很对，不走偶像派浪费了他这张俏脸。
You're right. It'd be a shame to waste such a handsome face. He just screams "idol!"
你说得很对，他的确是个实力很强的骑士，虽然我不知道他在骑士团的地位有多高吧…
You're right. I don't know what his rank among the knights is, but he is quite powerful.
哼，我这叫面对现实，拥抱现实，最终战胜现实。
Hmph, it's called facing reality, embracing it, and then conquering it!
所以啥时候能下车啊…我就等着你们快点解决堵车了啊，银河英雄们。
So, when can I get off the Express? I need you guys to solve this traffic jam problem ASAP!
别打歪脑筋了，快来帮忙。
That's enough of your weird ideas. Come help us.
你这家伙，是真听不进去话啊……
Were you even listening to me?
行吧，反正我也没别处可去，就先跟你——
*sigh* Alright, I have nowhere else to be. Let's go.
别、你别用那个语气！你这是道德绑架，知不知道？
Don't use that tone! You're trying to guilt-trip me, aren't you?
行吧，反正我也没别处可去，就先跟你——
*sigh* Alright, I have nowhere else to be. Let's go.
咦？刚才什么声音？谁叫起来了？
Huh? What was that sound? Did someone scream?
有，有奇怪的声音——可怕，可怕帕！你听到了吗？
Th—There was a strange sound — it was terrifying! Did you hear it?
以我对列车的熟悉程度…刚才那绝对、绝对不是列车发出的声音帕！
Pom-Pom knows the Express inside and out — it definitely wasn't the train!
之前的震荡是否导致列车哪里破损…让意想不到的东西溜进了列车？
Is it possible that the jolt just now damaged the Express? ...Did something manage to sneak in?
Do we know where the sound came from?
好像是客房车厢…但又好像是列车长室帕！
It sounded like it came from the passenger cabins... or the conductor's cabin!
…这完全是不同的方向好嘛！要不…我们各自回自己的房间检查一下？
...But those are in opposite directions! How about... we go check our own rooms?
I've got a bad feeling about this...
噫！你、你别吓我呀！这背后肯定有科学的解释…对吧？
Hey! D—Don't scare me! I'm sure there's a scientific explanation for this, right?
Remember to check under the bed.
都什么时候了，你还想着捉弄人？注意下气氛啊喂！
Ugh, read the room! Enough with the mean jokes!
哎呀，君子动腿不动嘴，我先回房间检查一下…等真发现了问题再跟大家汇报。
Now's a time for action, I'm gonna go check my room. If there's a problem, I'll let you know...
三月乘客说的有道理，那帕姆先去列车长室看看！
March has a point. Pom-Pom will go check the conductor's cabin!
这里怎么有另一个我啊！她在跟我说话……
Is that me!? Wh—What's she saying...
我了解你的过去。你想看见、触及、知道的……
I know your past. The things you want to see, to touch, to know...
你的家乡、亲人、朋友、情感、爱和恨……
Your home, family, friends, emotions, what you love and what you despise...
我是完整的三月七，拥有你全部忘却的记忆…
I'm the complete March 7th... with all of your forgotten memories.
你…你是谁？为什么长得和我一样？
Wh—Who are you? Why do you look exactly like me?
Wh—Why did you stop talking? What kind of creepy—
小三月，小三月——听得见吗？
March, March... can you hear me?
欸？电话…姬子！我看到了奇怪的东西！
Huh? My phone... Himeko! There's something really weird happening!
我知道，小三月，你现在立刻退后。
I know. March, get out of there right now.
三月…三月？请回话，你离开房间没有？
March... March? Please reply. Have you left the room?
三、三月乘客，会不会出了什么意外……
…情况不妙。{NICKNAME}，我要你和丹恒去支援三月。
...Not good. {NICKNAME}, I need you and Dan Heng to check on March.
我与你们同去。维利特，你也来。
I'll accompany you. Velite, you too.
啊、啊？！行吧，万一有什么危险，我就躲你身后了啊。
Wh—What!? Alright, if things get dangerous, I'll hide behind you.
「丑陋」…不和谐的音调被揪了出来。
Ugliness... The inharmonious pitch has surfaced.
{NICKNAME}, honor compels us to vanquish this dissonance.
吓、吓死我了！我还以为是我失散多年的双胞胎姐妹冒出来了…结果居然是只虫子！
Th—That was so scary! It was like a long-lost twin sister had suddenly... appeared out of nowhere! I can't believe it was only a bug!
没想到我们竟再次碰面，「真蛰虫」。
I did not envision seeing True Stings again.
呃…之前银枝在山洞里找到我的时候，我正被一堆这种虫子追着狂蛰……
Ugh... There was a whole bunch of those bugs chasing me when Argenti found me in the cave.
我以为自己已将它们尽数驱逐…但结合眼下的情况，真蛰虫似乎仍在追逐我们。
I was under the impression that I had successfully routed all of them. However, it appears that the Stings continue to pursue us.
莫非是…维利特，莫非是你身上沾惹了虫族的信息素？
Could it be...? Velite, perhaps you still bear Sting pheromones on your body.
…啊？什么玩意，信息素？我，我可不知道啊……
Huh? Phero-who? What is that? Is it bad?
我在智库中阅读过「真蛰虫」的资料。此种虫类扇动翅膀时会抖落纤维碎屑，致使吸入者产生幻觉。
Yes, I've read about True Stings in the data bank. They emit fibrous particles from their wings during flight — the inhalation of which can induce perceptual distortions and hallucinations.
三月之所以会在房间中看到另一个自己，恐怕就是因为吸入了些许翅粉。
I'm afraid March may have inhaled some of these particles. That's why she saw another version of herself in the room.
这么说来，那就真的只是幻觉而已…怎么还有点失望……
So that was just a hallucination? Huh, why do I feel kinda disappointed...
等会儿等会儿，但是幻觉…不应该是毫无逻辑的吗？那为什么我会看到自己的模样？
Wait. I thought hallucinations were supposed to be completely random? Why did I see an identical me?
怎么，它做了什么怪异举动吗？
它对我说，它了解我的过去…然后就停了。
It said it knew about my past... and then it stopped talking.
…只凭这些恐怕得不出什么结论。
...I'm afraid that's not enough information for us to draw a conclusion.
比起这个，我更担心列车已被更多真蛰虫渗透…这类生物隐蔽性极强，可能躲在暗处，也可能四处游走。必须阻止它们繁殖，否则……

My concern is that numerous Stings may have already infested the Express. Their elusive nature helps them to stay in the shadows, but they may also be roaming freely. We have to prevent them from propagating. If not...
噫…我可不想看到一堆三月七在车厢里四处晃悠呀！有我一个就够乱的了。
Ugh... I don't wanna see a bunch of Marches roaming around the Express! One of me is enough!
你发现这里有一颗虫卵。
偶尔，你也曾希望，这个世界不要有那么多令人困惑的材料。
You find yourself wishing once in a while for this world to have less bewildering things.
但你发现有的家伙真的可能吃掉它们时，你的正义感还是出手消灭了敌人。
But the moment you discovered there was a real chance of them being eaten, your sense of justice prompted you to take down the enemy.
毕竟哪怕你不需要，也不能便宜了别的家伙。
All things considered, even if you have no use for it, you can't let it benefit another party.
没有异常。除了一簇挑染过——大概是挑染吧？你也没法完全确定——的白发，瓦尔特先生的头发上没有任何瑕疵。
All appears to be in order. Except for a small bunch of what is likely highlighted hair — although you can't be completely sure — there's nothing amiss with Mr. Yang's hair.
你认为眼前的瓦尔特应该是真实的…趁他不开心前收手吧，这里没有虫卵。
You're pretty convinced that the Welt standing in front of you is real... Best to back away before he gets grumpy; there are zero eggs here.
你发现帕姆将尾巴梳理得很好，这里整洁、蓬松且芬香，你并没有发现什么异常。
You observe that Pom-Pom's tail is impeccably groomed: Clean, fluffy, and smelling nice, with no signs of anything out of the ordinary.
你忍住了伸手薅它的欲望。
You fight off the impulse to reach over and feel it.
你发现这里的虫卵已开始发出哼哼声，它们就像美妙的音乐，你沉浸其中……
You realize that the eggs here have started humming, creating a symphony of sorts, and it captivates you...
你不禁发现有些家伙就是如此，说的比唱的还好听些。
You invariably notice that for some people, what they say sounds better than what they actually do.
你的正义感出手消灭了虫卵。
Driven by your sense of justice, you eradicated the eggs.
情况不妙…尽是些虫族停留的痕迹。有些虫卵甚至已有诞育的迹象。
This isn't good. Evidence of a Swarm is apparent, and it looks like several eggs are on the verge of hatching...
它们还未从繁殖的胚胎变成幼虫，但它们的生长很可能比我们想象的要迅速。
They're embryos for now, but their transformation into larvae could be imminent... and their growth may exceed our initial estimates.
现在看来，要与时间比赛了。
This is a race against the clock.
放心，只是得抓紧一点。让我想想…靠人力搜查效率比较低，{NICKNAME}，你能想想是否有更迅速的方式吗？
Let's stay focused, we just need to move fast. Let me think... scouring the train like this isn't very efficient. {NICKNAME}, any thoughts how to speed things up?
居然还有虫卵…哇啊啊啊啊！虫群真在列车上繁殖！我我我鞋里没有吧？
Aghh! More eggs! The Stings propagated on the Express! *gasp* Are there eggs in my shoes?
唔…听起来现在得抓紧时间，找到效率更高的办法！帕姆想想…嗯…我们也要起到自己的作用才行！维利特！
*sigh* The clock is ticking. We need to find a more efficient method, and quickly! Let Pom-Pom think... Every one of us should be involved! Velite!
Ah! What? What am I doing?
Use your brain and think of something!
你作为列车长就没点应对紧急情况的法子？！
Uhh, well, a—as a conductor, don't you have any emergency procedures in place!?
噢…帕姆想想，这么说帕姆想起来了，是有备用的东西。
Oh... Now that you mention it, Pom-Pom does have a backup measure.
我们现在需要…唔，这个可能会有点用！可移动列车清洁机——原本是帕姆备用来做这次列车大扫除，用来擦列车顶的工具！
We'll need... Hmm, this mobile Express cleaner should come in handy! I was planning to use it to sweep the Express's ceiling during spring-cleaning!
上面有一个探测摄像头，视野非常大，把它遥控到天上，可以观察到视野范围内的全貌…重要的是，还可以看到各种拐角角落！
It's got a nifty wide-angle lens on it. Once we zip it up into the air, we'll have eyes on the whole scene. Not a single nook or cranny will be able to hide from us!
虽然是帕姆用来做清洁的，但现在也没办法了……
I mean, I know this isn't what it's meant for... but we have no other choice.
{NICKNAME}，你如果觉得可以试试，帕姆就先遥控起来了帕。你要仔细盯着看噢，帕姆顺便把角落清洁一下。好！可移动列车清洁机来咯——想先查看哪里？
{NICKNAME}, if you think you can do this, I'll start piloting. Watch carefully — I'll be cleaning out the nooks and crannies as we go. Alright! Let's do this. Where do you want to check first?
一如既往光滑的红色皮革座垫，你没发现什么特殊的。
Nothing's wrong with the seats' red leather.
你忍不住想抚摸它的凹陷——从没有人在乎它平日承受了怎样的重量，从没有人。
You feel the urge to trace your finger along the edge of the seats' depression. No one ever appreciates the weight these seats have to uphold.
…清醒点，{NICKNAME}，现在可不是陷进去的时候！找找别的地方吧。
Stay alert, {NICKNAME}. Now's not the time for relaxing! Let's check somewhere else.
漆黑的座椅底部，你想象黑暗中出现了一只眼睛，死死地盯住你不放。
You stare at the dark shadow cast by the car seat, imagining an eye staring back.
你开始恐惧，暗自扭曲、尖叫，建设内心防御，整顿表情管理，思考逃跑流程。
You start to panic and want to get away.
嗯嗯…这里似乎没什么特殊的！
Hmm... nothing out of place here!
你对此很失望…直到你想起自己身上还背负着搜索虫群的使命。找找别的地方吧。
You feel disheartened, until you remember your duty to seek out the Swarm. Time to search in another area.
银枝说它是一盆会思考的盆栽，你不禁开始遐想——它是否真的具备思考的能力？
Argenti insists it's a potted plant with the ability to think, prompting you to question —does it really have intellectual capabilities?
你花了很大的力气才说服自己，这是一盆普普通通的盆栽，没有任何异化的特质能将它与正常的植物区分开来……
You struggled to persuade yourself that this is nothing more than a typical potted plant, lacking any unusual traits that set it apart from regular flora...
…但你还是怀疑盆栽里的土其实是好吃的巧克力粉。下次可以尝尝。
...Yet you can't shake the idea that the soil in the potted plant might actually be scrumptious chocolate powder. Worth sampling the next time around.
好像都没什么东西。帕姆觉得，得遥控可移动列车清洁机去往更远的车厢段了帕……
Nothing out of the ordinary here. Maybe we should check the far-away cars, what do you think?
别分心噢！{NICKNAME}，得盯紧每个角落帕。
Stay focused! {NICKNAME}, you need to check every corner.
要不让我遥控试试呗？感觉这个产品很适合推销给各种飞船备着…给银枝的代言产品也找到了，啧，记一笔。好，继续来咯———
Mind if I take it for a spin? This little gadget could be the next big thing in spaceship cleanliness. Even Argenti could put his name to it. I'll jot that down. Let's carry on...
三月七的房间，粉粉的，亮亮的。你没发现什么特殊的。
March's room is pink and bright. Nothing's out of ordinary.
你情不自禁地开始数房间里到底有几种动物——
You find yourself counting her fluffy animals...
骑士，还有他的虫子骑士。似乎没什么特别的。
A knight and his bug knight. Nothing to see here.
想必你就是{NICKNAME}口中的生物，你一定常被「可爱」一词形容，这是否给你带来过困扰？请相信我，你的内涵远无法被这一词汇承载。圆球啊，你的名字叫——「魅力」。

You must be the creature that {NICKNAME} mentioned. Does it bother you that people deem you cute? Believe me when I say that you are more than cute, my friend — you are a delightful ball of pure charm.
无需多言；能遇到你这样的生命令我动容，但我绝不会因此放弃对自己精神苦修的要求。倘若无法解决此次危机，我将以死为骑士荣耀正名。
Needless to say, it is an honor to encounter beings such as yourself, but I shall never give up my spiritual training. If this crisis cannot be averted, I shall die for the glory of the knights.
啥啥啥，他怎么跟虫子交流地那么投入啊……
What's going on? Why is he chatting with these bugs?
I think he's also fallen into a hallucination.
他也看到了另一个自己吗？
不像。他的样子，似乎是在跟陌生人见面。
I don't think so. I think he may be perceiving an unfamiliar presence.
美丽的存在，你们是否也是信徒？
这家伙，一副没救了的样子……
再拖下去恐怕有危险——我们上。
He could be in considerable danger. Let's proceed.
我十分抱歉——这样的美丽生物竟是种幻觉，它的欺骗与威胁比外表更为…「丑陋」。
I must apologize... I cannot believe that such a beautiful creature was merely a hallucination. Its deceptive and threatening nature is much uglier than its appearance would suggest.
你方才说，「蛰虫」在你眼中变成了{NICKNAME}提过，你却没亲自遇见过的「美」之事物。
You mentioned the Sting transformed into an object of beauty, something that {NICKNAME} once spoke of, but that you never personally encountered.
没错，是些许我想亲眼所见的，{NICKNAME}提到的见闻。
Yes, it was something {NICKNAME} mentioned that I wanted to see in person.
这样吗…结合三月之前看到的「知晓过去的自己」…我猜测，翅粉产生的幻觉必须依托本人的主观经验和长期感受，才能在自己眼中出现类似<color=#dbc291ff>「个人所求」</color>的事物。

I see... This, together with the fact that March's hallucination claimed to know her past, suggests that these visions feed on people's subjective experiences and long-term sentiments... in order to take the form of what they <color=#dbc291ff>personally desire</color>.
呃，原来在银枝眼里，呜呜伯也是美丽的化身呀……
So, in Argenti's eyes, Wubbaboos are a thing of beauty...
不过，相比之下，我看到的幻觉就是找到自己的过去呀？好像有点没追求…我其实还有更多想法诶……
But... my past isn't something I'm constantly thinking about. I have plenty of other dreams...
不会，这是很纯粹的愿望，是非常珍贵的东西。
That's not how it works. The desire to know your past embodies purity itself — a thing of immense value.
虫族这样丑恶的威胁，在临死前的话不知是否可参考，毕竟「虫之将死，其言也善」……
I wonder if the dying words of those ugly menaces can be trusted. As the saying goes: "Even an insect speaks kind words when death is near."
你的意思是，那虫子在咽气前向你传达了信息？
Are you implying that the insect imparted you with a message prior to its demise?
没错。我将转述它最后的遗言——<color=#dbc291ff>「尽情庆祝肤浅的胜利吧，你们终究无法察觉霸主的存在！」</color>。
Correct. Its final words were: <color=#dbc291ff>"Celebrate this superficial victory, for you will never be able to acknowledge the existence of the overlord!"</color>
暂且不提你为何能听懂「虫」的语言，这句话本身——
Let's ignore the fact that you understand insect-speak for now. That sentence...
个人追求？我都没这东西！
Desires? I don't have any desires!
天天忙着上班，有也忘干净了……
I'm busy working every day. Even if I did have one, it's been long forgotten.
说不定公司令我对幻觉免疫……
...Come to think of it, maybe the IPC made me immune to hallucinations...
翻阅智库中的「诸界异虫札记」时，我读到了一种仅存在于记述中的虫类——因为缺少实际的研究样本，作者仅将其暂名为「巨真蛰虫」。

When reading through the Chronicles of Interdimensional Insects in the data bank, I came across a species that had only been described in records. Due to the lack of research samples, the author gave it a tentative name: Giant Sting.
这种虫的体型可以成长至极其巨大的程度——大到足以囫囵吞下一整艘歼星舰。
This species can reach tremendous proportions and is big enough to swallow an entire starnought.
我合理怀疑，银枝听到的<color=#dbc291ff>「霸主」</color>指的就是这样一只巨虫，而我们……
I believe the <color=#dbc291ff>"overlord"</color> Argenti mentioned could be referring to this colossal being, and we're...
我有些明白了。我们…很可能已在它的胃中。
I think I understand. We are in the belly of the beast.
Please spare me. I'm not even tasty!
不对不对，如果真的像丹恒说的那样，这家伙想都不想就能把列车一口吞掉，哪还顾得上挑食啊！
Although, if what Dan Heng said is true, I doubt something that could swallow the Express would be a picky eater...
原来如此。这样一来，我与维利特此前的遭遇也就得到了解释。
I see. That would explain what Velite and I experienced earlier.
维利特可曾向各位提起？我们初见面时，他正被困于阴暗、巨大无比的「山洞」之中，难以脱身。
Did Velite mention that he was trapped in a dark and enormous cave when we first met?
回想起来，当时「山洞」中，的确曾传出吞咽与蠕动的声音。
Now that I think on it, we did hear sounds akin to swallowing and other movements from the "cave..."
嗯。恰逢你的航线与列车星轨交汇，说不定我们遭遇的是同一只「巨真蛰虫」。接下来，就要证明这一猜想……
Yes, and your flight path happened to intersect with the Express's star rail, meaning we might have encountered the very same Giant Sting. Now, we need to see if we can prove the theory correct...
...It looks like our theory has already been confirmed.
走吧，我们去与瓦尔特先生商量对策。
好沉默…你们倒是说句话呀？
It's so quiet... Someone say something.
能在此遇见诸位，我银枝死而无憾。
After meeting all of you, I, Argenti, can die without regrets.
如何，各位？调查有进展吗？
How's it going? Has there been any progress?
将列车被「巨真蛰虫」吞噬的猜想转告给了瓦尔特……
Dan Heng tells Welt that he thinks the Express is being swallowed by the Giant Sting.
原来是这样。如果列车真的已经被吞入腹中……
I see. If the Express has been swallowed...
或许可以尝试令列车引擎暂时过载，撞击虫胃，以超速度冲出「巨真蛰虫」的躯体。
...then perhaps we could try pushing the Express's engine into a temporary state of overload... and use the momentum to burst out of the Giant Sting's body.
Why don't we just warp out of this place?
跃迁所需的准备繁多，过程中难保会引起虫群注意。
Warp jumping requires a lot of preparation, and it might alert the Swarm.
这个方法确实伴随着风险。引擎有可能发生自燃…不过，也没有更好的办法。
It would be risky — the engine might overheat and burst into flames... Still, I don't have any better ideas.
I am not fond of this idea.
我我们…有可能会失败吗？
列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。
The outer components of the Express... may well be melting in gastric acid as we speak.
看来最为巨大的丑恶之徒…竟在列车外！
It would seem our enormous, hideous enemy... is right outside!
好恐怖呀，我房间的小熊和兔子会不会被胃液融化？它们陪我好久了，我得把它们给抢救出来……
No... So my teddy bears and bunnies are gonna be liquefied by stomach acid? I've had them for ages... I need to find a way to save them.
我认为大家无需担心，我仅需要些时间与姬子检查引擎状况。大家缓和一下情绪即可。
Let's stay calm — I need some time to check the engine with Himeko. For now, just try and take your minds off the situation.
没关系，有任何危机我们都一起应对。
It's alright. We're in this together.
Morale on the Express is low.
{NICKNAME}，我为自己的突兀道歉，突然要求与你单独沟通，十分奇怪。
{NICKNAME}, I apologize for being so abrupt. You must find me strange for wanting to speak with you alone.
事实上，我产生了一种强烈的感受：身为纯美骑士，这是我必须面对的一战——
I will tell it to you straight. I have a strong sense that as a Knight of Beauty, I have a duty to fight this battle.
我想可由我下列车去，正面迎击巨型真蛰虫——用长枪向其胃壁攻击，令其痉挛，将列车呕吐出来。
I propose that I disembark from the Express to confront the Giant Sting directly... My strategy is to pierce its stomach with my lance, triggering spasms that may cause it to eject the Express.
我难以形容这种现象…但在目睹某些事物时，我会自心底里产生「美」的情绪，它含糊不清，也只可凭本能感知。
It is challenging for me to articulate this phenomenon... yet when I observe certain entities, an indistinct sensation of beauty arises from my core, discernible only by instinct.
或许是我独行银河太久，难以理解这种感受究竟源自何处。但我知道身为骑士，我的职责便是守护蕴含「美」的种子，站在它身前，抵挡一切……

Perhaps my long solitude traversing the cosmos has made it difficult to discern where these sentiments originate. But as a knight, I realize my obligation is to safeguard the seed that embodies beauty, standing as a bulwark to defend it against all...
而现在，星穹列车就是这枚种子。这里令我产生归属感，一种有如「家」的温暖，我相信这源自你们彼此深厚的情谊。
The Astral Express is the seed. It feels warm — like a home to me. I am certain this is thanks to the strong friendship you have with one another.
因此，我誓要以身作盾，捍卫这一缕温暖，而非苟且居安，让它反过来成为保护我的盾。
That is why I must swear to fight to protect this warmth, rather than be protected by it.
我愿一次又一次，守护这些「美」的种子，令其绽放纯洁晶莹的花，以向祂证明我的虔诚…这是在名为「银枝」的旅途中，所必然发生的…

I am willing, time and time again, to protect these seeds of beauty — to allow THEM to bloom into pure and radiant flowers, to demonstrate my devotion to THEM... It is an inherent part of the journey of Argenti...
是我等的信仰，命路的所求。在为捍卫美的信道，于战斗中流血失神的时候，我曾无数次在昏迷中得见祂的行迹，从脚下蔓延，伸向不可知的前方。

In the pursuit of defending beauty I have bled into unconsciousness... and in the ensuing stupor I have witnessed countless times THEIR traces spreading from beneath my feet — reaching into the unknown before me.
理智告诉我不是，但我希望如此。
My rational mind tells me no, yet my heart tells me to believe.
理智告诉我如此，但我希望不是。
My rational mind tells me yes, yet my heart tells me to believe.
在那旧日幻觉中，我不断奔跑。泥泞的路上，祂留下的足迹比任何哭泣都令我悲伤。而每一次，我都离望见祂的身影——只差一点。
In those past hallucinations, I kept running. THEIR footprints on the mire-ridden path moved me to a sadness beyond tears. And every time, I was a breath away from catching a glimpse of THEIR figure.
倒下、站起、再次倒下、再次站起，无数次的锤炼，徘徊于生死，只为让我等更接近「纯美」曾行过的旅路。
It is a never-ending cycle of falling... and standing up again. Each time I wander closer to death, it gets me closer to the path the Beauty once walked.
这便是我身为纯美骑士的誓言。
This is my vow as a Knight of Beauty.
What are your plans after that?
我会在此后，独自寻找办法出逃。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
I shall find a way to escape. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.
Can I do anything to help?
无需此举，我非常感谢。即使被虫角贯穿也无妨，越接近死亡，或许就越接近「纯美」的道途……
Thank you, but that won't be necessary. It matters not if my flesh is pierced by the insect's horns. The closer I get to death, the closer I may get to the Path of the Beauty.
Why did you want to talk to me alone?
我们的交手只到一半…尚武者不善言辞，我还有另一半未传达给你。
We were interrupted halfway through our battle. As a warrior, articulation has never been my forte, yet I still needed to impart the remaining half to you.
我为自己的多言致歉，我实在不擅长表达自我…回到最初——你是否会支持我的想法？
I apologize, I have been rambling. As I said, articulation has never been my forte. Let us return to the point at hand. Do I have your support?
你支持我…真的？谢谢，谢谢……
你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.
I don't want you to put your life in danger.
你是在担心我吗？谢谢，谢谢……
You worry for my safety? Thank you.
你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.
但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.
你只是以「幻觉」宽慰自身。
You're just consoling yourself with those "hallucinations".
是这样吗？也曾有许多人如此劝说，或许你们是对的。
Is that so? Many others have said the same. Perhaps you're right.
但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.
请原谅我不合时宜的举动。我们虽相识不久，但彼此已以交手定下交情——我只可惜它还未完成！我想在临走前了结这份遗憾！

Please forgive my inappropriate manner. Our friendship is new, but was forged in the heat of battle, which I only wish we had been able to conclude. I hope now we may conclude it still, that I may leave without regret!
我将以枪刃证明我的意志，用尚武礼仪捍卫自己的荣誉；无论结局是赢是输，我都将接受，并以此与你告别——
I shall prove my will with the blade, defend my honor and uphold my dignity with the protocol of combat... Win or lose, I will accept the outcome and thus bid you farewell...
{NICKNAME}…你的举止、力量、行战的礼仪…已令我心服口服。
{NICKNAME}... Your demeanor, strength, and the etiquette of your combat... I admit, you have won me over.
若要我评价这场较量——精彩绝伦、酣畅淋漓！有幸遇见这样的对手，我也以身证明了「纯美」的存在。
Extraordinary and enjoyable in equal measure! Encountering an opponent of your caliber proves the existence of "the Beauty."
请恕我在这之前冒犯激进，因为我知晓当这场战斗结束，就标志着——我将从列车的故事中退场，而现在终于来到了这一刻。
The end of our battle signifies my departure... the moment has finally arrived for me to bid farewell to the Express.
你确定自己能安全脱身吧？
You're confident you can get out alive?
{NICKNAME}，我予以保证：我并非鲁莽冲动之人，我将做好万全准备，找准时机脱身。
{NICKNAME}, I assure you, I am not a reckless person. I will ready myself for the opportunity to escape.
我来到列车是为助众人解决危机，当使命完成，我将回归银河。但…银河这么大，我们说不定还会再见。
I came to the Express to help you find a solution to this crisis. When my mission is complete, I shall venture back into the cosmos... but the cosmos is boundless — we may yet have another encounter.
非常好，{NICKNAME}，纯美骑士的使命完成后，就将去寻找下一片亟待守护之地…
Excellent, {NICKNAME}. After completing my mission here, I shall find somewhere else that requires my protection.
身为骑士，我肩负必胜的决心与荣誉；我的身躯经过无数次训武淬炼，绝不会轻易被折断。
Worry not. As a knight, I bear the resolve and honor of assured victory — my body, tempered by countless battles, will not easily be broken.
如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感…如此瑰丽。
Such a brief, fortuitous encounter... It has been an honor knowing each and every one of you on the Express.
{NICKNAME}, it is an honor to fight against you.
{NICKNAME}，你觉得是否还有更好的办法
Let's go talk with the others.
So, how did your talk with Argenti go, {NICKNAME}?
他想自己挑战巨型真蛰虫。
He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.
原来如此。他有这种想法，我毫不惊讶…不得不承认，我看到类似的行为，偶尔会想起年轻时的自己；出于理性，我并不认可这种作法。但…{NICKNAME}，你又如何看待？

I see... Based on our dealings with him so far, I can't say I'm overly surprised. Sounds like the kind of plan a younger me might have come up with... but that doesn't mean I approve of it. How do you see things, {NICKNAME}?
本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
...I suppose it all depends on how you see his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.
{NICKNAME}，如果你真已经认定，我相信你的判断。
{NICKNAME}, if you're certain, I trust your judgment.
本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
...I suppose it all depends on whether you support his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.
{NICKNAME}，我们无法改变个人对自我本心的执拗。
{NICKNAME}, we can't change what other people long for.
我刚打了个盹，梦里看到窗外有另一个自己。驾驶着银枝的希世难得号在天空上飞……
*yawn* I took a nap just now and dreamt there was another me piloting Argenti's One and Only...
你说我是怎么了？平常我都不做梦。梦里那个偷了银枝飞船的我，还对我自己说「快去找银枝」……
What's wrong with me? I never dream. After stealing Argenti's spaceship, I said to myself: "Go find Argenti."
我压根不关心谁，不过这个怪梦让我很在意，所以银枝那家伙到底打算干什么？
I—I'm not the type to start caring about people I've only just met, but the dream made me feel a little uneasy... So, what on earth is Argenti up to, anyway?
他想独自挑战巨真蛰虫。
He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.
哈？！什、什么？！那么大的虫子，他打算自己一个人去对付？
Ha!? Wh—What!? He wants to fight that huge bug on his own?
这家伙说自己死而无憾，说什么和盆栽告别，原来不是在搞笑啊？！居然是认真的？你不会答应他了吧？
So all that talk of "departing the mortal coil" and "bidding farewell to a plant" — that was all serious!? You refused him, right?
这不是送死？！就为这种理由？他到底在固执个啥？我倒不太关心，我只关心他死了我的人生转机怎么办？…好吧，我确实关心。
That's a suicide mission! And for what? D—Don't get me wrong, I don't really care... But if he dies, how am I going to turn my life around? ...Alright, fine, I care about him.
别瞎说，没有的事，我一点也不关心他，我只关心他死了我的人生转机怎么办？难以理解，好死不如赖活着，他到底在固执个啥？…好吧，我确实开始担心了。

Nonsense. Me? Care about him? Impossible. But if he dies, how am I going to turn my life around? I don't understand why he'd choose to die when he could live. Why is he so stubborn? ...Alright, fine, I care about him.
这个脑袋一根筋的家伙！难道对于他来说，信仰真比命更重要？不行，我得去跟他吵一架！
Why is he so difficult!? Are his beliefs more important than his life? No way, I've got to talk some sense into him!
跳出列车后，我会以长枪刺破巨真蛰虫胃壁，希望能使其产生剧烈痉挛，列车便可冲出虫体。
After jumping from the Express, I shall pierce the wall of the Giant Sting's stomach. It should then violently convulse so the Express can escape the confines of its body.
维利特，你特地前来，是有话想对我说？
Velite, have you something to say?
你这么做真是有点没头脑！你把自己置于危险境地里了。一定要履行骑士职责？换种方式不行？我们这种俗人实在难以理解。
...I—It's reckless to put yourself in danger! Do you really have to fulfill your knightly duty? Isn't there another way? I just don't get it.
难道你是在关心我？或许你也未察觉自己灵魂的高贵——表征虽与我不同，但仍有自己的风采。我希望我能守护住我的誓言：助你抵达终点。
You, too, are worried for my safety? You may not have realized, but you have a unique and noble soul. I hope I can keep my promise to escort you to your destination.
脚一跺牙一咬，我维利特也能有点骨气。要是你听不进去，那我就陪你一起去！
Wh—What the heck. Fine, I can be brave too y'know. If you insist on doing this, then... I'm coming with you!
反正我这命也是你捡的，哎唷，虽然我这力气帮不到什么，但多少也能打点下手……
If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be alive right now. I may not be as strong as you, but I'll do whatever I can.
我很感谢，但你无需勉强。
I appreciate that, but it would be best for you to remain on the Express.
哼…你…我真搞不定你。行吧。
I... You... Hmph... You're impossible. Fine...
我突然觉得，我们要不是因为意外相识，一定是毫不相关的两类人，完全不会成为朋友。你的人生叫英雄传说，我呢就叫三流小说。
It suddenly struck me that if it weren't for this accident, we would never have met, let alone become friends. My life is a third-rate fiction next to your heroic saga, but at least they coincided...
所以…我们没得商量啦？必须得在这告别？那……
So you still want to do it? Are we going to say goodbye here? Then...
你别把自己交代在这里啊！我会等你回来的！等我们搞定这次危机，你就要帮我在公司做点代言！重要的是你千万别死在这里——
Don't die! I'll be waiting for you! After we fix this mess, you've got some spokesperson duties at my company to attend to! Just make sure you come back in one piece...
请勿担心，我会高喊「纯美的女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！」
Do not worry. You will hear my shout: "Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!"
在保证列车安全脱出后，自寻出路，平安脱险，以待我们的下一次相见。
Once the Express is safely out, I will devise my own exit plan and navigate my way to safety. Until next time!
倘若您能见证这一切…您便可理解我狂热的理想。
Having witnessed this spectacle... I am sure you will come to grasp the depth of my convictions.
在宇宙的猩红长夜里，我的一生比赤子更为忠诚！
In the sanguine, eternal night of the universe, my existence professes a loyalty greater than the guileless!
不知道银枝乘客怎么样了…虽然列车摆脱了这次危机，但不知道为什么还是高兴不起来帕……
The Express managed to escape the crisis, but Pom-Pom still feels a little sad... Pom-Pom wonders what happened to Argenti.
唉…维利特刚刚也自己下车走了，他看起来好难过啊。大概他也搞不懂银枝在想什么吧……
*sigh* Velite just left the Express too — he looked really upset. I guess he didn't know what Argenti was thinking, either...
纯美骑士团，一群习惯独行星河中、很难被理解的人。他们的归宿本就是星空，这场烟花或许也象征着对他的授勋。

The Knights of Beauty are made up of individuals who are used to traveling through the cosmos alone... they are difficult to understand, and the starry sky is their home. Perhaps this firework show is a symbol of his honor.
他也有自己的想法与苦衷。毕竟纯美的星神…很可能已陨落了。
He has his own goals... and struggles. After all, the Aeon of Beauty has likely already fallen.
啊？银枝嘴里一直念的伊德莉拉吗？他不是还一直说要去找伊德莉拉，尽骑士职责保护伊德莉拉吗？
Huh? You mean Idrila — the one he wouldn't stop talking about? But... he said he'd find them... and fulfill his duty to protect them.
伊德莉拉已陨是部分纯美骑士默认的事情。当然也有些家伙不愿相信，比如你刚遇见的这位…他大约觉得伊德莉拉只是失踪，并藏在某个凡人无法企及的角落里了。

The fact that Idrila has fallen is tacitly acknowledged by some Knights of Beauty. Naturally, there are others who don't want to believe it... like the one you met. He probably thinks that Idrila is simply missing — hiding somewhere beyond the reach of mortals.
{NICKNAME}，这次的危机结束了，偶然的访客也已离开。但我觉得，我们还有些话题可以聊聊。
