{NICKNAME}, the crisis is over, and our unexpected guest has left, but I think there's still something we should talk about.
比如…你觉得…什么是「纯美」？
那一定是双非常美的眼睛。
那就是所有人梦寐以求的美好生活。
Sounds like a wonderful life — I'm sure many have dreams of that.
如痴如狂地观看小猫咪进食。
Haha, you have a wild imagination.
That which exists between the Crew...
「纯美」的形态各异、变化万千，每个人心里的答案都不同…我很好奇，纯美骑士在银河中追寻的究竟是什么？
Beauty takes many forms, and different people have different answers... I wonder what exactly it is that the Knights of Beauty are pursuing through the cosmos.
假设银枝找到了「失踪」的伊德莉拉，以人类的双眼，他能辨认出来吗？还是面对自己所执着的「祂」，却像盲人一样视而不见，甚至浑然不觉……

Let's assume that Argenti finds the "missing" Idrila. Will he be able to recognize THEM with his human eyes? Or, obsessed with his version of "THEM," will he turn a blind eye and not even see THEM for who THEY are?
是哦，他真的像是会在眼睛上蒙上白布，然后要在自己附加的这种严苛筹码里与木桩对战、修炼自己的人。
Mm... It did seem like he had a kind of... tunnel vision. And it sounded like he was holding himself to unreachable standards to attain his dreams.
我是不懂诶，反正嘛，要是有一天，看到他在贝洛伯格翻垃圾桶，对着里面大喊「伊德莉拉，你在吗！在吗在吗在吗！」我，我好像也不意外……
I didn't quite wrap my head around him... I guess if we're ever back in Belobog and see a red-headed knight shouting into trashcans — "Idrila, are you in there!? Idrilaaaa!" ...I won't be surprised.
不过那又怎么样咧？我还是觉得他是个好人呀…虽然怪怪的……
But, so what? I still think he was a nice guy, even if he was a bit weird...
唉…我们原本是要去哪里来着帕？
*sigh* Where were we supposed to be going again?
咦…有点奇怪帕。帕姆刚刚选定了行进的路线……
Hmm... something seems off. Pom-Pom already selected a route...
现在前进的方向有一点小偏差。让帕姆看看…列车长对航行的把控向来精准无误，如果发生一点小偏差就已经非常奇怪了帕。
We've seemingly gone off course... Strange, Pom-Pom's navigation is always precise.
得提高警惕！不知道是不是附近有什么奇怪的磁场，干扰列车行进了…{NICKNAME}乘客，跟帕姆一起去控制室看看吧？
Stay vigilant! There might be a magnetic field nearby interfering with the Express' navigation system. {NICKNAME}, let's take a look in the control room.
{NICKNAME}，三月，列车行进被阻塞了。方才的骚动造成了连锁反应。
{NICKNAME}, March, the Express encountered an obstruction. The disturbance triggered a chain reaction.
…一辆飞船与列车发生了追尾。
...The Express was struck from behind by another vessel.
啥情况，列车还能被追尾？
*sigh* How do you crash into someone in space...
有别的飞船也在这片区域遭遇阻塞，一时没有控制好速度。追尾发生后，有两个家伙找上列车来了。
Another vessel in our vicinity encountered the same obstruction and was unable to control its velocity. After the collision, two individuals found their way onto the Express.
Are they trying to extract compensation?
我们不找交警对付他们就不错啦！
这可不多见！但不知道是不是好人。
Guests? I don't think they're here for tea...
要是来找列车麻烦，本姑娘可要出手了！走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去看看是什么情况。
Hmph, if they're here to stir up trouble, I'll teach them a lesson! {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out.
That visitor with the red hair...
他上车后一直在盆栽前思考…
...he's been lost in thought since he came aboard...
嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.
走啦，{NICKNAME}，我们快去找他们聊聊看。
看来星穹列车并无大碍，只是这追尾事件…有些稀奇了，连我也是头一次经历。
The Astral Express seems fine, but a collision like this in space is... a little unusual. Even for me, it's a first.
那位访客看上去是一位骑士…还带着一位随从？
That visitor appears to be a knight... and it looks like he has a servant?
{NICKNAME}乘客！看来我们堵在去洗车星的路上了！
It seems like we're stuck, {NICKNAME}. Washtopia will have to wait a little longer!
嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.
你俩怎么就打起来了？！不过打完…你俩好像还挺合得来的嘛。
What was that all about!? *sigh* It does seem like you're on better terms after the fight.
{NICKNAME}，能否麻烦你先去检查一下那位维利特先生的状况？他看上去吓得不轻，我们应该礼待来客。
{NICKNAME}, could you please go check on Velite? He looks uneasy. He is a guest of ours, after all.
怎么样，有什么解决办法吗？
How do we stand? Is there a way to resolve this situation?
唉…帕姆也在想办法帕！让帕姆看看附近有没有什么线索！
*sigh* Pom-Pom's still thinking, let me see if there are any clues nearby!
刚，刚刚的声音…帕姆怎么了？！
Wh—What was that... Did something happen to Pom-Pom!?
怎么了？{NICKNAME}，我正在「享受当下」。
{NICKNAME}, may I help you? I am currently enjoying the present moment.
靠人力搜查效率比较低，{NICKNAME}，你能想想是否有更迅速的方式吗？
Scouring the train like this isn't very efficient. {NICKNAME}, any thoughts how to speed thing s up?
我…怎么会看到另一个我呀？
Why... Why did I see another me?
现在看来，要与时间比赛了。
This is a race against the clock.
没想到竟再次碰面…「真蛰虫」。
I did not envision seeing True Stings again.
列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。这真是难以想象的图景…
The outer wall of the Express is probably melting in gastric acid. I can't even imagine what it must look like.
列车…被吞进了虫子的胃里？
So... the train has been swallowed by a giant bug? And we're inside its stomach?
非常意外的情况…连我也未想到。
This is really a curveball... you couldn't make it up.
没关系，有任何危机我们都一起应对。
It's alright. We're in this together.
看来最为巨大的丑恶之徒…竟在列车外！
It would seem our enormous, hideous enemy... is right outside!
怎会有这么离奇的事！我居然第二次被山洞给吞了…难道这就是我的命运？……
How is this even possible!? I've been swallowed by a "cave" twice now. Is this my destiny?
得赶紧从真蛰虫胃里出去帕！帕姆，帕姆一点也不想列车受到伤害帕…
We need to get out of the Sting's stomach as soon as possible! Pom-Pom doesn't want the Express to sustain damage...
我正在向盆栽进行最后的告别；正如与你们的相遇，能与这列车上诸多生命交友，与大家探讨「纯美」之道，我亦死而无憾！

I am bidding farewell to this flora. After having made friends with all the beings on the Express, and having discussed "the Beauty" with each of you, I can now depart this mortal coil without regret!
这家伙刚刚就一直抱着盆栽…这短短时间居然和盆栽建立起深厚情谊来了？虽然我也会担心房间里的玩偶……
Ugh, can you and the fern get a room already? How can anyone establish a bond with a houseplant? ...Although I guess you could say the same about me and my teddy bears...
列车是众人的家，我们遇到什么事都一起面对帕！呜哇，还好{NICKNAME}乘客也回来了…虽然，虽然有点不赶巧了帕。
The Express is home to all of us — no matter what happens, we're in this together! Woo-hoo, you're back! Although I guess that doesn't change our odds...
我从没有想过，第一次和你们见面竟然就可能是拜拜。哎，看来现在也做不了什么，我维利特就把自己最后的时间，用来听你们说说列车的故事吧……
Who knew our first meeting would be our last... *sigh* It's hopeless. I'll just spend the rest of my short life listening to your ramblings about the Express, I suppose...
别瞎说，怎么就拜拜了！不过到这个时候，你终于开始对列车有感情了，帕姆也很欣慰帕，让帕姆想想故事从哪里说起才好……
Nonsense. This won't be our last meeting! But I'm happy the Express has started to grow on you. Now... where should Pom-Pom start the story?
一起呆久了总有感情是不是！不过先停一停啊！我虽然这么说，但列车还是能最后挣扎一下的吧？！
Gah! Are you really about to tell a story? Look, it's been nice meeting you all and I'd love to shoot the breeze, but are you people really just gonna give up!?
维利特，我会护送你抵达终点；骑士会信守诺言。
Velite, I will escort you to your destination. A knight always keeps his word.
你别以为一直说这种话我就会感动啊，我这人可是出了名的铁石心肠！
*sniff* Don't assume you can reassure me that easily. I've got a heart of stone, you hear?
好啦，大家都打起精神来！越到这种时候，我们就越要多传递传递信心呀！
Okay, that's enough! In times like this, we should be trying to give each other hope!
你其实也很担心列车吧？
You're worried about the Express, just like everyone else, right?
没，没有的事儿！这么小的麻烦，我们肯定能搞定的啦！
N—No! The Express is strong — I'm sure we can think of something!
三月也会担心…这也很正常。麻烦你安慰大家了，{NICKNAME}。
It's rare to see March genuinely worried... but given the circumstances. {NICKNAME}, maybe you could try reassuring some of the crew.
列车在「开拓」中总会遇到各种各样的困难…不止现在这一次，在可预见的未来…我毫不怀疑会发生很多类似的事，但我们仍不会停止「开拓」。
The Express has faced all kinds of obstacles on its journey — today is just another one. It's no reason to stop trailblazing.
这也是「开拓」的意义所在…我们都必须面对挑战。在这个过程中，大家才会获得历练与成长。
Such is the very essence of trailblazing. It is through these trials that we find wisdom and maturity.
我已对引擎检查完毕。跃迁装置虽无法即刻启动，但暂时加速应当还可以尝试。如果各位没有强烈的反对意见，我们就开始准备……

I've completed the engine inspection. Though the warp device isn't immediately operational, I believe we can still manage brief spurts of acceleration. Unless there are any major objections, I'll begin preparations.
瓦尔特先生——请稍等片刻。
很抱歉——我突然产生了一个想法，或许能够帮助各位解决危机。在列车准备期间，我希望能获得与{NICKNAME}单独讨论的机会。
I've suddenly happened upon an idea that might just help resolve our crisis. While the Express is being prepared, I would like to speak with {NICKNAME} in private.
你！都这种时候了，还不能有话直说嘛？
Seriously? Can't you just tell all of us?
这个想法…如果当众提出，定会被你们立刻否定。但身为骑士，我一定要帮助列车解决问题。
Were I to air such a proposition among you, verily, it would be dismissed in an instant. Yet as a knight, it is my duty to aid the Express in resolving this issue.
啊？都已经提前做好这种心理准备了吗……
Oh? So you're a mind reader now, too...?
看来你似乎有所打算。虽然我并不清楚纯美骑士的传统，但…三月，不着急。
At this stage, any plan is a plan worth hearing. March — hang fire. Let's see where this leads us.
列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。这真是难以想象的图景…
The exterior of the Express might be melting in gastric acid... I can't even imagine what it must look like.
啊？！银枝想一个人下车挑战巨真蛰虫？！
What!? Argenti wants to leave the Express and fight the Giant Sting alone!?
本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对那份「幻觉」的执着。
It all depends on whether you support his dedication to that hallucination.
如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感如此美丽。
So brief... so unexpected. The chance to get to know all of you on the Express... to witness the beauty of your emotions... is something I'll never forget.
啊啊啊？银枝乘客要自己去？不行不行帕！那也太危险了！
Wh—What? Argenti wants to go by himself? No way! That's too dangerous!
银枝应该会觉得…这场烟花很美吧。
I bet Argenti would think these fireworks were really... beautiful.
虽然相识不久，但这家伙人也挺不错的。
We didn't know him very long, but he was a pretty nice guy.
Tsk, I hope he made it...
幻觉，依托于主观感受、经验，是为看到的一种…个人所求…
Hallucinations draw on people's feelings and experiences... and can come to represent what we seek the most.
呜哇！{NICKNAME}乘客！你终于回来了！没想到列车大扫除之日这么快就来了帕……
Wow! {NICKNAME}, you're finally back — and just in time for the Express's grand spring cleaning!
{NICKNAME}乘客不知道吧？哼哼，在这宇宙里啊，存在着不少洗车星，它们就像宇宙中为交通工具提供的休息站，而且彼此距离很近，不用启动跃迁装置就能到达！

{NICKNAME}, have you ever heard of a "Washtopia"? It's a place where space vehicles can stop to rest — there are plenty of them throughout the universe. They're close enough together that you can travel between them without even activating a warp device.
You want me to help with the spring cleaning?
有洗车星应该不用我们动手了吧…
Phew, so the Washtopia can take care of the spring cleaning...
帕姆也这么想过…但很可惜不行！
That's what Pom-Pom used to think... but it's not that simple!
洗车星只会帮忙清洁列车车厢的外壳帕，星球上的站点工作人员会把外壳擦得锃亮…不过列车里的座垫、房间、窗户，和那些边边角角的地方…还得我们自己来！
Washtopias only clean the exterior of the train — and they do a great job, too! However, the seats, rooms, windows — all the nooks and crannies inside the Express... we have to do those ourselves!
{NICKNAME}乘客刚在列车落脚，要不要先休息一下，跟大家聊聊天？如果准备得差不多了就可以来找我帕，我们就准备出发咯。
{NICKNAME}, since you only just got back, why not take a little rest and chat with the Crew? Once you're ready, come find Pom-Pom and we'll prepare to depart.
噢？好久不见，是帕姆喊你回来的？
Oh? It's been a while. Did Pom-Pom call you back?
听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.
星穹列车的确需要定期清理、维护，毕竟这里可是列车组共同的「家」…用心呵护它吧，{NICKNAME}。
The Astral Express needs periodic cleaning and maintenance — it's home to the whole crew, after all. Let's take good care of it, {NICKNAME}.
列车的年度大清洁？我最喜欢整理房间了，一定要趁这次机会好好把各种地方都擦得干干净净的！
The annual Express spring cleaning? I love tidying rooms! I'll clean everywhere as best I can!
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. How have you been?
听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.
的确。按照以往的时间来看，已经到了不得不开工的日子，因此帕姆才会如此着急。
Indeed — it's about that time. I guess that explains why Pom-Pom is in such a hurry.
听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.
Yes, I intend to participate in the efforts as well.
怎么样啦？{NICKNAME}乘客，你准备好我们就开始前往洗车星咯！
How is everything, {NICKNAME}? If you're ready, let's head to the Washtopia!
等你准备好后就回来找我！
Alright! Come see Pom-Pom when you're ready!
（抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆）
(Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories)
（当前收集的记忆盲点无法唤醒模糊的记忆，请收集更多记忆盲点）

抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆
Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories
（艾丝妲不在么…去跟黑塔说一声好了。）
(Is Asta not here...? I'll go let Herta know.)
（总之先去她办公室看看什么情况吧。）
(Anyways, let's go to her office to see what's going on.)
又见面了，还记得我么——不记得也无所谓，我没有期待。
Ah, we cross paths again. Do you remember me? Of course, why would you? Memory is such a fickle thing, after all.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，此刻你一定有满腹疑问。稍安勿躁，艾丝妲会一一向你说明。
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, you must have many questions. Please be patient, Asta will explain it all to you.
前情你大致也知道了。几个系统时前，黑塔女士的一具人偶遭到了原因未知的袭击，下落不明，信号也始终无法定位。

You probably know the gist of things already. A few system hours ago, one of Madam Herta's puppets was attacked by an unknown perpetrator. We don't know the location of the puppet, and we can't pinpoint its signal.
没有。袭击发生的地点是站外基台，不在监控范围内。
No. The attack happened on a base outside the station — beyond the surveillance cameras' range.
黑塔女士没把这事放在心上，外出巡访去了。
She's away on a visit. This issue didn't seem to trouble her much.
事件发生前，她受到了公司的邀请。
She received an invitation from the IPC before the attack occurred.
是技术研发部。亚婆离女士是位能人，但手下尽是些门外汉，野心勃勃，充满热情，脑袋却一点没有——大小可以和原始人一较高下。

Ah, the Technology Department. Charming little place, isn't it? Madam Yabuli does possess some semblance of competence, but her subordinates? Oh, they're a riot — brimming with enthusiasm yet utterly devoid of intellect. It's as if evolution halted prematurely for them.
他们想和黑塔开展一些合作，邀请我同行，担任技术顾问。我欣然接受，好近距离观察这群「大聪明俱乐部」的会员如何将公司财产挥霍一空。

They want to start some new collaborations with Herta and have graciously extended an invite for me to play the role of science consultant. It's delightfully amusing. I can't wait to witness firsthand how these geniuses from the so-called "Super Smart Club" squander the IPC's vast resources.
不过…时机过于严丝合缝了。也许是有人走漏风声，让袭击者利用了此事。而黑塔似乎对这类挑衅见怪不怪，也让我对个中蹊跷甚是好奇。

However... this attack was timed a little too well. I can't help but wonder if someone leaked this information, and the attackers seized the opportunity. Herta's aloof response to these juvenile provocations? Almost as intriguing. What a delightful little puzzle.
早就听闻拉帝奥先生是学会的翘楚，您愿意协助，是我们的荣幸。
I've long heard that you're one of the best researchers in the Guild, Dr. Ratio. We are honored to have your assistance.
恭维就免了，你我的时间都很宝贵。况且在一位天才面前谈论凡人的翘楚，在我看来多少有些幽默。
Save your flattery. Time is hardly a luxury we can squander. To debate the merits of mere mortals in the company of an actual genius? Quite the paradox, if you ask me.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，告诉我——最后一次见到那具人偶时，你做了什么？
Excuse me, {NICKNAME}, tell me — what were you doing the last time you saw that puppet?
嗯？好、好像有这么回事…又好像没有？
Huh? I—I do remember that happening... I think?
什么，跟佩佩玩不带我是吧？
（仔细想想，那个时候我好像在……）
感谢这一大段冗长而沉闷的叙述，你一定累了吧——反正我是听累了。
I commend your stamina for recounting that interminable tale — you must be exhausted. My ears certainly are.
所以，你和黑塔的最后一面是在她的办公室。你接下委托，为寻找奇物四处奔波，而对其他事浑然不知，直到艾丝妲小姐联络了你。

So, to sum it up, the last time you laid eyes on Herta was in her office. She sent you on a wild goose chase for some trinket, the Curio, after which you knew nothing else until Lady Asta contacted you.
如果这就是你的主张，那换我提问了：有任何人能证明此事么？
If that's the narrative you're sticking to, then indulge me: Who, pray tell, can substantiate this captivating drama?
不，她并不在现场，只是从你口中听的转述——这无法构成证明。
A second-hand account, she wasn't at the scene. Hearsay hardly counts as compelling evidence, now, does it?
抱歉，黑塔并未向我提及此事。
Apologies. Herta did not mention this to me.
逻辑：可以向黑塔本人求证。
Affirmation: We can ask Herta herself.
嗯，现在迈开腿开始奔跑，或许能在四个系统时后追上公司的接驳星船——眼下，没有第三者能为{F#她}{M#他}作证。
Well, if you lace up those boots and start sprinting now, you might just catch the IPC shuttle in four system hours. But as it stands, not a single soul can corroborate {F#her}{M#his} story.
拉帝奥先生，你的提问方式总有种先入为主的倾向。
Mr. Ratio, your style of questioning would seem to have a preconceived bias.
失礼了，是我的坏习惯。从事学术研究的人，总会变得很难相信一件事。相反，质疑它要容易得多。
Apologies, it's an unfortunate habit of mine. When one is immersed in academic research, skepticism comes far more naturally than belief.
就经验来看，这也是最高效的做法：怀着否定的心态求索，也是一种求索，同样能帮助我们抵达正确的终点。
It is also the most efficient method, judging from my experience — seeking answers with a negative hypothesis in mind is still valid research. It can still help us reach the truth.
如果{F#她}{M#他}确实无罪，就用回答来为自己洗脱嫌疑吧。
If {F#she}{M#he} is truly innocent, {F#she}{M#he} can clear {F#her}{M#his} name with answers.
…如果两起事件确是同一人所为，那你的嫌疑会下降许多。但前提是系统中有你主张存在的记录。
...If these two incidents were caused by the same person, then the suspicion put on you would decrease... provided that this fire-suppression record does exist in the system.
去主控室看看就知道了，出发吧…咦，有什么动静？
We'll see in the main control room. Let's go... Huh? What was that?
…对了，再帮我做件事，那奇物丢了，我不能放着不管。有空帮我找找——你应该能办到。
...Oh, right, I need your help with something else. That Curio's gone missing, and I can't just forget about it. Go find it for me when you have the time. I'm sure you can manage that, can't you?
以防你没记住，我再描述一下：那是一种■■■■，没有实体，但拥有生命。
Let me describe it again, in case you forgot: It's an ■■■■. It's alive, but it doesn't have a body.
见着它的痕迹，就给我发个信号。
Send me a signal when you see traces of it.
（她似乎提到了令人在意的事，但我想不起来了。）
(I think she mentioned something important, but I can't remember.)
(If only there were some hints, then maybe...)
总之，好好干吧。我要出门一趟，想找人帮忙，你可以问<color=#dbc291ff>艾丝妲</color>。
Anyway, keep up the good work. I need to go out for a bit. Go ask <color=#dbc291ff>Asta</color> if you want someone to help you.

(My memory is kind of hazy. What did I do after that?)

(I think Herta mentioned Asta... That's right, I think I visited Asta...)
以防你没记住，我再描述一下：那是一种<color=#dbc291ff>能量生命</color>，没有实体，但拥有生命。
Let me describe it again, in case you forgot: It's an <color=#dbc291ff>energy lifeform</color>. It's alive, but it doesn't have a body.
见着它的痕迹，就给我发个信号。

重点不是这个。如果不是和<color=#dbc291ff>天才俱乐部</color>有关，我才不会管它。
That's not the point. I wouldn't be bothering with it if it didn't have something to do with the <color=#dbc291ff>Genius Society</color>.
总之，好好干吧。我要出门一趟，想找人帮忙，你可以问艾丝妲。
Anyway, keep up the good work. I need to go out for a bit. Go ask Asta if you want someone to help you.

哟，猹哥，什么风把您给吹来了？好久不见，想死兄弟我了。
Hey, what brings you here, Rich? It's been so long!
嗯嗯，没有啦没有啦，还好的啦。
Heh, I'm not that wonderful. I'm just okay.
那必须是妥妥贴贴。毕竟只要钱到位，什么都好办。
It's all taken care of. As long as the money's there, it's all good.
这是你要的账号，绿色干净，直连内网毫无压力。
Here's the account you asked for. It's legit and secure, allowing you to connect straight to the intranet.
嗯嗯，好的好的，您有事儿说事。

那您可太看得起我了，我就是一搞内购的，顺带做点无本买卖。
You flatter me — I'm just a peddler doing a little business on the side.
小打小闹，上不了台面的。你要是搁学会那儿发达了，苟富贵，勿相忘。

嗯嗯，好的好的，您有事儿说事。

See this material here? People are so inconsiderate — how's someone like me supposed to make out the small print?
我年纪大啦，眼也花啦，你看要不……
I'm not getting any younger and my eyesight is failing. Do you think you can...?
几次啦？这是第几次啦？！老东西我跟你讲你不要蹬鼻子上……
Again? How many times has it been!? You're really pushing my buttons...
哟，乖乖小年轻，又来一个。好好好，人多点好，多点好。
Oh, another smart-looking youngster. Wonderful — it's about time we had some new recruits.
什么，你说艾丝妲叫你来找我？无实体但有生命的奇物…奇物不该问界种科吗，关密卷科什么事？
Huh, Asta told you to find me? A curio that doesn't have a body but is alive... Isn't the Department of Ecology full of Curio experts? That's got nothing to do with the Department of Insight.
不过，我倒是听说过类似的东西。听一位出外勤的同事说，仙舟联盟就有这种生命。
However, I've heard of such a species. A colleague who came back from a business trip said that the Xianzhou Alliance has lifeforms like that.
啊，我只是转述啊，没有要帮你的意思。唉，最近空间站的气氛越来越怪了，随便站队很危险的。
Uh, don't get me wrong, I was merely relaying information. I didn't mean I'd help you. *sigh* The atmosphere on the space station has been getting stranger lately. It's risky taking sides.
（埃美丽提到的仙舟物种似乎就是启发了阿德勒的东西。）

…唔，没有实体，但有生命的奇物？抱歉，我一时没有头绪……
...Hmm, a Curio that's alive but doesn't have a body? Sorry, but nothing comes to mind...

...After the Legion's invasion, the space station has been under constant scrutiny. Physical damage can be easily repaired, but it takes a long time to heal the wounds in people's hearts.
袭击过后，科员中就一直有人对空间站的管理和安保抱有质疑。

本来重建与复兴的成果已经抚平了一些噪音，但最近<color=#dbc291ff>科员的连续失踪</color>又让事情再度发酵了。

大家好不容易才从灾难中缓过神，我担心不安扩散，就封锁了消息，让防卫科秘密调查。
People were just starting to regain their footing after the catastrophe. I didn't want panic to spread, so I suppressed the reports and told the Security Department to investigate in secret.

咦？可空间站哪里都没有着火的痕迹呀……
Huh? But there are no signs of a fire anywhere in the space station...
这正是奇怪的地方。但眼下，这一信息还有更重要的意义。
That's what's so odd about it — but this information has an additional layer of importance.
虽然不能作为直接证据，但如果人偶遇袭前后，系统中也出现了灭火装置的启动记录……
This may not be direct evidence, but if the system also recorded the fire-suppression system activating when the puppet was attacked...
那就有充足的理由怀疑，两起事件彼此相关。
...then there's ample evidence to indicate that these two cases are linked.
你再怎么怀疑，我也只是一个被意外卷入的无关人士。
Doubt me all you like. I'm just an outsider who got unexpectedly dragged into this mess.
——和同样被意外卷入，却开始扮演审问者的你没什么不同。
You and I are no different — we both stumbled into this, but you decided to assume the role of interrogator.
I remember now. Back then... back then...
That's enough pretending. Please be quiet.
很遗憾发生了这种事…事态紧急，你们需要什么，防卫科一定全力相助。
Not good... this is serious. The Security Department will do whatever we can to help you.
一份失踪科员的名单，和他们的详细信息。
A list of the missing researchers and their details.
可以是可以，但防卫科详细排查了他们的身份背景和人际关系，没发现什么共同点。泯灭帮是伙亡命徒，可能是无差别袭击……

...Sure, but the Security Department already combed through their backgrounds and personal relationships — we didn't find anything odd. The Annihilation Gang are a group of diehard thugs — they might be attacking indiscriminately...
一份失踪科员的名单，和他们的详细信息。
A list of the missing researchers and their details.
拿着，记住这些名字，然后找个消息灵通的朋友，就说你想知道这些人的联系。
Take it. Remember these names — find a friend who's tuned in to the gossip around here and tell them you want to know the relationship between these people.
What do you have in mind?
不知道，取决于你的朋友。
I don't know. That depends on your friend.
还有什么需要我做的么？
What else do you need me to do?
带我去见那个「界种科最了解奇物的人」。
Take me to the one who knows the most about Curios within the Department of Ecology, if you would be so kind.
最开始我还没在意，毕竟阿德勒平时就常常不见人影。
I didn't really notice at first — Adler's difficult to get a hold of at the best of times...
但已经好几个系统时了，我一直联系不上他，甚至调用监控都找不到他的踪影……
...but it's been a few system hours, and I still can't reach him. Even the surveillance cameras can't find any trace...
最后一次见他，是在主控舱段，和应物科的温世玲在一起。
The last time I saw him was in the master control zone. He was with Wen Shiling from the Department of Implement Arts.
带路吧。你说过这个阿德勒似乎有什么线索，但没来得及说出口。
Lead the way. You said Adler was on the verge of a discovery, yet couldn't confer his knowledge. Intriguing and frustrating, to say the least.
如果他的失踪也和袭击有关——恐怕他真的意识到了什么。
If his disappearance is also related to the case here, then maybe he really did stumble upon something important.
（的确。记得当时启发阿德勒的关键词是「能量生命」，冥火大公也是一种元素生命，只是巧合么？）
(True... the keywords that got Adler thinking were "Energy Lifeforms." Duke Inferno is also an energy lifeform. Coincidence?)
玩失踪，我叫你玩失踪，别让我再见到你！
Fine — disappear! I don't ever wanna see your face again!
是你啊，我跟你说，阿德勒，阿德勒他不见了呜呜呜啊啊啊啊……
Oh, it's you! It's Adler... Adler disappeared! *sob*
What did Adler do to you?
阿德勒，阿德勒他不见了呜呜呜啊啊啊啊……
他、他最近很奇怪，老在研究什么人体自燃、灵异现象……
H—He's been acting really weird recently — always researching stuff like spontaneous combustion, supernatural activities...
我叫他，他也不理我，嘴里还念念有词，神神叨叨的。
He doesn't even answer me when I speak to him. H—He was talking to himself...
Who said I want him back!?
但如果你们要找他…最后一次见到他时，他一直在翻这本小册子。
But if you want to find him... he was reading this booklet the last time I saw him.
虽然我不知道他究竟在找什么，但希望对你们有用……
I don't know exactly what he's searching for, but I hope it can help you...
看你的脸色，不像什么好消息。
哦，失踪的科员是声讨管理层的意见领袖，这就有些耐人寻味了。
So the researchers who disappeared were at the forefront of challenging management. Isn't that a curious puzzle piece?
在你回消息的时候，我也翻完了这本册子。上面记录了几位天才俱乐部会员的生平——不乏一些有趣的信息。
I finished browsing through this booklet while you were replying to messages. It recorded the lives of a few Genius Society members — I'd say it contains some interesting information.
是时候回去和艾丝妲小姐，还有螺丝咕姆先生聊一聊了。
It's time to go back and chat with Lady Asta and Mr. Screwllum.
一纸宣战书，一封预告函——你们被盯上了。军团余波未息，泯灭帮便紧随其后，看来比起智识，贵空间站和毁灭的命途更投缘。

A declaration of war and an announcement of what's to come — they have set their sights on you. The Legion's impact remains, and the Annihilation Gang is already paying a visit. It almost seems like this space station is more suited for the Path of Destruction than Erudition.
这位「冥火大公」阿弗利特是诞自已灭星球「陀斐特」的生命。无时无刻不在燃烧的火魔一族视纳努克为皇帝，称其为恩主，却从未得到星神的瞥视。

This "Duke Inferno," Ifrit, is a lifeform that hails from Fetora — a world long since destroyed. His race, the ever-burning fire demons, regard Nanook as their emperor and savior, but the Aeon has never cast their gaze upon them.
一群可怜的疯子。我喜欢原始博士的评价：「纳努克从所谓『泯灭帮』身上看到的价值，或许还远不及一个故意将花瓶打碎的婴孩」。

A group of pitiful lunatics. I like Dr. Primitive's assessment of them: "The value Nanook sees in the Annihilation Gang is perhaps far less than what one might see in a child who deliberately broke a vase."
火魔天性凶暴，燃烧和破坏是他们的本能。而阿弗利特尤为邪恶残忍，他所领导的「永火官邸」甚至和同为泯灭帮的「耶佩拉兄弟会」是死敌。

The fire demons have a cruel temper and instinctively ignite and destroy items. Ifrit is particularly evil and cruel, even among his kin. The Ever-Flame Mansion he heads is even the archenemy of the Jepella Brotherhood, despite both groups belonging to the Annihilation Gang.
耶佩拉兄弟会，似乎在哪儿见过这个名字……
Jepella Brotherhood... I've heard that name somewhere...
在星核猎手的通缉令上，他们被指控与耶佩拉叛乱案有关——导致了兄弟会的覆灭。
On the Stellaron Hunters' wanted posters, they stand accused of inciting the Jepella Rebellion — the uprising that caused the downfall of the Brotherhood.
耶佩拉宫在烈焰中倾倒，而后阿弗利特的势力日益壮大，你相信这只是巧合？
The Jepella Palace crumbled in the scorching flames, and Ifrit's power has grown by the day ever since. Would you believe it to be merely a coincidence?
同样的事马上就要在空间站上演了。身为火魔，他当然擅长人体自燃的把戏，科员和人偶的失踪也都是计划的一部分，而在这之后……

Something similar is about to happen here. Spontaneous combustion? For him, it's as routine as me finding fault in everything. The disappearance of researchers and the puppet were all part of the plan. And after that...
那条视频很快就会在空间站传开。看着吧，用不了多久，「黑塔」就会变成一片火海。
That video will soon circulate, and this station's fate? Flames, nothing but flames.
要毁灭的，恐怕不止信任。
I'm afraid more than trust will be destroyed here.
不想坐以待毙，就采取行动。你，跟我走。
We need to start acting now if you want to survive. You — come with me.
不然呢，让他们俩到处乱跑，把「空间站出事了」写脸上？
You have a superior strategy? Pray tell. Do we set the two of them loose, turning whispered fears into full-blown pandemonium?
这么做就落了下乘…我会留在这里，尽力控制消息扩散，期间调查就拜托你们了。
If we did that, we'd be at a disadvantage... I'll stay here and try to contain the news as best I can. Please investigate the issue quickly.
我派人监控黑网，勉强限制了视频的传播，事态暂时没有进一步发酵。你们那边呢，结果如何？
I've been monitoring the Dark Web — I barely managed to stop the video from spreading. The incident hasn't grown any bigger — for now. How are things with you?
不容乐观，或者换种说法——糟透了。
Less than promising, or to use a different phrase — we're in deep trouble.
时间紧迫，这就从头梳理一遍现状吧。从已知信息中，可以发现三个突破口……
We're running out of time, let's retrace our steps and evaluate the situation. From the data we've collected, there are three avenues we can explore...
首先，是阿德勒的失踪，他一定抓住了什么关键线索。
First, Adler's disappearance. He must have come across some vital information.
其次，是受害者的共同点，当然，这是个不怎么愉快的话题。
The next angle is what the victims have in common — distasteful as that discussion may be.
最后，是冥火大公的能力，也就是「人体自燃」的秘密。
Last, is the abilities of Duke Inferno and the secret of spontaneous human combustion.
The link between the three is...
你认为，阿德勒的发现引起了敌人的注意。
You think that Adler's discovery drew the enemy's attention.
正是。而且我已弄清了他发现的东西。
Indeed. And I already know what he found.
只看明面上的资料，这些消失的科员并无共通性。
A mere glance at their background would indicate they share no commonalities.
但在调查了网络浏览记录后，{NICKNAME}发现他们都是空间站黑网的意见领袖。
However, after browsing through their online records, {NICKNAME} discovered they all wield influence on the space station's Dark Web.
这意味着什么，艾丝妲小姐一定很清楚吧。
Lady Asta must know what this means.
关于这一点，{NICKNAME}想必也已知晓。
陀斐特的火魔，泯灭帮的大公…<color=#dbc291ff>阿弗利特身上还有一个秘密</color>。
The fire demon of Fetora, the Duke of the Annihilation Gang... <color=#dbc291ff>There is another secret with Ifrit</color>.
在过去永火官邸引发的混乱中，曾有人目击「暴徒自火焰中降临」的景象。
During prior unrest instigated by the Ever-Flame Mansion, some testified to seeing "miscreants materialize from the inferno."
冥火大公的火焰具有某种特殊的性质，而这种性质…正是「人体自燃」的秘密所在。
The flickering tongues of Duke Inferno's fire carry a certain property, and this property... is the secret behind spontaneous human combustion.
看——答案已经呼之欲出了。
Look — the answer is right there.
I understand. So the answer is... is...
Tenuous connections. Enough of this nonsense.
这本小册子上记载着一种能穿梭相位的火焰，据说其「燃烧诸界，留下了众多火焰后裔」。
This booklet describes a kind of fire that can phase through dimensions, claiming it "burns through worlds, leaving numerous scions of flame behind".
这种火焰的火种…想必就是黑塔丢失的奇物。而冥火大公则是火焰的后裔。
The kindling of this unique flame... must be the missing Curio that Herta's been searching for. And Duke Inferno is evidently spawned from it.
恐怕这就是阿德勒在调查中发现的真相。
I fear that is the truth Adler discovered.
The link between the three is...
是「相位灵火」，#29丝丝喀尔的造物。她是位了不起的天才，聪明，善良，而且谦卑。
It's the Phase Flame, the creation of member #29, Sserkal. She was an amazing genius. Intelligent, kind, and humble.
但可惜，以人类的时间观念来界定，她只活了短暂的二十九天。
However, she lived for a mere <unbreak>29</unbreak> days on the human calendar. Such a pity.
相位灵火甫一出生就变换到了其他相位，等归来时，丝丝喀尔已然寿终正寝。此后它就这样不断变换相位，再难以被捕捉。

The Phase Flame shifted into a different phase as soon as it was created. When it returned to this phase, Sserkal had already passed away. It then continued to shift through phases, making its capture impossible.
曾有人偶然窥见相位灵火的踪迹，捕得一绺子火。黑塔将其收下，又借予阮•梅研究，不想灵火火种却因此丢失。
Somebody was once able to glimpse the traces of the Phase Flame, and obtained a wisp of its kindling. Herta kept it and lent it to Ruan Mei for her research, but the kindling was lost in the process.
如果阿弗利特也是相位灵火的后裔，此事的全貌就清晰可见了。
If Ifrit is a scion of the Phase Flame, then the entire incident is now clear as day.
毫无疑问，黑塔委托{NICKNAME}寻找的奇物就是「相位灵火」的火种。
Undoubtedly, the Curio Herta asked {NICKNAME} to find was the Phase Flame.
而阿德勒通过「能量生命」这一点，早早察觉了<color=#dbc291ff>人体自燃和相位灵火的关系</color>。
And Adler already discovered the <color=#dbc291ff>relationship between spontaneous human combustion and the Phase Flame</color> through the concept of "energy lifeforms."
据温世玲所说，阿德勒在消失前始终念叨着「香味」一词。
Wen Shiling said Adler kept muttering about a "phrase" before he disappeared.
但那恐怕是「相位」——他在这本小册子中看到了#29丝丝喀尔的专题，验证了自己的猜想。
It probably should have been "Phase." He saw member #29 Sserkal's research topic in this booklet and verified his hypothesis.
身为其后裔，冥火大公有着和相位灵火相似的能力。恐怕他无法做到「相位变换」，但能实现劣化的「空间转移」。
As a scion of the Phase Flame, Duke Inferno would naturally share similar capabilities. Full-on phase shifting may be a bit too ambitious for him, but teleportation? That's likely more his speed.
这就是人体自燃的真相：科员们并非消失，而是被「转移」了。
That is the truth of the spontaneous human combustion — the researchers didn't disappear — they were "moved."
I understand. So the answer is... is...
Tenuous connections. Enough of this nonsense.
(This piece of evidence is indeed more convincing...)
受害者们的下落，暂时还不得而知。但至此，冥火大公的计划已然明了。
We don't know where the victims went, but Duke Inferno's plan is now clear.
突如其来的连续失踪，无疑是培育混乱的最佳温床。
And the sudden and consecutive disappearances provided the best environment for chaos to fester.
待到不安的种子生根发芽，便发出袭击声明，将暗中发酵的危机推至台前，催它生长，开花结果。
Once the seed of unrest has sprouted, he will then send out an announcement for an imminent attack. It will push the crisis from the dark into the light, catalyzing it into new growth and bloom.
而下一步，啪——就是点燃火星。看看这些失踪的科员，假设他们的共同点被人发现，会是什么后果？不用我多说。
The next step would be to ignite the spark. Look at those researchers who disappeared — what would happen if someone realized their similarities? I need to say no more.
一切都是布好的陷阱，目的从一开始就是挑起空间站的内乱！
It was all a premeditated trap to stir up chaos on the space station!
Indeed. It needs one more spark.
如果止步于此，你还有辩解的机会。换作是我……
If you limit your involvement to this, there's still room for excuses. If it were me...
冷静。艾丝妲只是被传送走了，并无生命危险。
Stay calm. Asta was merely teleported — her life was not in danger.
通过实际接触，我确认阿弗利特的火焰只是原始灵火的火星，不具备相位变换能力。逻辑：艾丝妲仍在空间站内。

Based on firsthand experience, I have ascertained that Ifrit's flame is simply a splinter of the primordial Phase Flame — lacking any phase-shift ability. Logic: Asta is still within the confines of the space station.
那团火焰一定还在舱段某处。找到它，总有办法把她带回来。
That flame must still be somewhere inside the station. Find it, and we'll find a way to bring her back.
呵呵，只是一点火星？来自天才的傲慢倒是令我甚感投缘。
Hahaha... a splinter, you say? The arrogance of the gifted is charming, in its own way.
道路被火焰吞没了！它刚刚完成了一次转移。
The way is awash with flames! It must have just teleported!
小心点——准备好冲进火海。
Be careful — get ready to dash into the fire.
看，还在空间站内。和螺丝咕姆说的一样，它无法逃出这里。
See, it's still in the space station. Like Screwllum said, it cannot escape from here.
你知道对待穷途末路的猎物该怎么做么？——追逐，直至死地。
Do you know what to do with cornered prey? Hunt it to the death.
他果然出意外了…我们上！
As I thought, he's in trouble... Let's go!
无知的愚者盲目追逐火光，殊不知毁灭的恩赐已然落在脚旁。
Ignorant fools blindly chasing the firelight — not knowing that the blessings of Destruction already lie at their feet.
难怪恩主的军团亲临，也未能将此地净化，至此，我就暂且承认自己的鲁莽吧。
It is little wonder that even the descent of the savior's Legion was unable to cleanse this place. I will acknowledge my brashness... for now.
但下一次，我将亲自造访，用冥火为你们献上罪业的悼亡。
But next time, expect no intermediaries. I will come to personally offer you the demise of your sins with infernal fire.
寄宿在其中的微弱意识消失了，冥火大公抛弃了这团火焰……
The small fragment of consciousness in there is gone. Duke Inferno has discarded this fire...
啧…拖延时间的无聊把戏，差不多得了。
Ah, the banal theatrics of stalling. Let's not, shall we?
所谓「暴徒自火焰中降临」，就这点程度？看来原始博士所言不假。
So this is the extent of "miscreants materializing from the inferno"? Seems like Dr. Primitive wasn't wrong.
火势在减弱，它要逃了——你，看好艾丝妲小姐的下落。
The fire is weakening, it's preparing to flee. You — keep your eye out for Lady Asta's whereabouts.
事件余波未熄，你们应该还有很多事要处理吧？还是说，空间站的安危与你无关？
Fallout from this incident remains. Surely you have plenty of pressing matters to attend to? Or is the safety of the space station beneath your concern?
答案：我正是为此而来。毕竟事件真正的主角——在这里。
Answer: That is exactly why I came. After all, the principal figure in this whole affair... is right here.
…是从什么时候开始怀疑我的？
Haha... When did you start to doubt me?
「从事学术研究的人，总会变得很难相信一件事。相反，质疑它要容易得多。」
"When one is immersed in academic research, skepticism comes far more naturally than belief."
从一开始，拉帝奥先生。我也有和你一样的坏习惯。
I've had the same bad habit as you since the beginning, Mr. Ratio.
我深感荣幸，螺丝咕姆先生。可既然你早已看穿，又为何一言不发？
I must say, I'm quite honored, Mr. Screwllum, but do explain — why opt for silent wisdom when you already had the pieces of the puzzle?
出于好奇。逻辑：我做了和你一样的决定：同行，观察。
For curiosity's sake. Affirmation: I made the same decision as you. To accompany and observe.
哦…那你又是何时确信的？
Oh... and when did you become convinced?
以结果而言，除去轻微的精神损伤，没有科员在这场袭击中受到实质性的伤害。这不符合泯灭帮的作风。
Objectively speaking, aside from some minor spiritual trauma, no researchers were hurt in this attack... which never aligned with the Annihilation Gang's modus operandi.
逻辑：是第三者救了他们。
Logic: A third party saved them.
若非我偶然取得灵火火种，出手干涉了冥火的传送，那些人早已是漂在窗外的太空垃圾了。
Had I not fortuitously acquired a spark of the Phase Flame and intervened in Duke Inferno's teleportation, those people would already be space waste — floating past the windows here.
You are more candid than I calculated.
但终究在你的计算中，不是么？
But still behaving within your calculations, no?
最后一个问题：螺丝咕姆，天才如你，能算出我这么做的理由么？
One last question. Screwllum, genius though you are, can you deduce why I did this?
我无法确定，只能做出推论：对弱者出手相救，是医者仁心；此后袖手旁观，任事态发酵，是学者的严厉。
I cannot be sure. I can only hypothesize. Helping the weak hints at the merciful instinct of a medical doctor, but maintaining a cool, detached observation reveals the strictness of a scholar...
而身居幕后，掌控全局——则是向天才寄出的挑战。
...and pulling the strings from behind the curtain is akin to laying down the gauntlet to a genius.
螺丝星的君王果然通晓人心，只可惜也和天才一样远离凡众——你还是错了一点。
The ruler of Planet Screwllum is indeed well-versed in the human mind. It's a pity you are as much in the ivory tower as other geniuses — you still got one thing wrong.
袖手旁观才是真正的医治：这世上有种顽疾名为「愚钝」，比任何病症都更难根除。
To stand aside and observe is the best treatment one can give. There is a disease called "foolishness" that is harder to cure than any ailment.
智识的命途既无道理，也无逻辑，天才们漫步繁星，凡庸却连一处脚印都无法追及。庸人只得学着独立行走，在跌倒爬起中度过碌碌一生。

The Path of Erudition has neither reason nor logic. While geniuses wander among the stars, the ordinary can't even trace their footsteps. Those less gifted have no choice but to walk alone, enduring a lifetime of tumbles and triumphs...
但失败的人生同样是人生，他们有权品尝至最后；也只有摔倒在地，无人扶起的时候，愚者才能领悟如何站起。
...but even a life marked by failure is a life worth living — it is only in moments of solitude and despair, when help is absent, that fools grasp how to pick themselves up.
我有洁癖，见不得笨蛋、傻瓜、白痴，看见了，就想死——可惜这空间站也和博识学会一样，并无天才，遍地凡庸。

I have a fastidious nature — I cannot stand fools, idiots, or imbeciles. Seeing them fills me with dread. Regrettably, this space station is just like the Intelligentsia Guild — devoid of geniuses and filled with mediocrity.
你想要根除的，是科员对「天才」的盲信。
You wish to uproot the researchers' blind worship of geniuses.
我只是列出自己的质疑，至于答案…他们自会解明。
I am only laying out my questions. As for the answers... They'll find them themselves.
怀着否定的心态求索，也是一种求索，同样能帮助我们抵达正确的终点。一群庸人若要开悟，这是必经的过程。

Pursuit tinged with negativity is still pursuit, and it is capable of leading us to the right conclusion. For the masses of the mediocre to reach a level of awareness — this is a necessary rite of passage.
比起学者，你的确更像一位「医生」。
You are indeed more like a "medical doctor" than a scholar.
至于我留下的点点星火……
As for the spark I leave behind...
相信艾丝妲能妥善处理。
I believe Asta will deal with it properly.
It is also a lesson I left for her.
那么，告辞了，希望未来也能有机会与诸位天才相遇。相信届时，也会如今日这般……
With that, I take my leave. I look forward to future encounters with such brilliant minds. Let's hope they're as memorable as those we had today.
我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。

I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.
拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.
冥火也是一种能量生命，会被显像仪捕捉到痕迹。跟上它。
The infernal fire is also a form of energy lifeform. The imaging device will pick up its trace. Follow it.
Good work. You did very well.
请放心，艾丝妲只是受了些惊吓，正在医疗室内恢复。
Rest assured, Asta only had a fright. She is recovering in the Clinic.
以及，在你们追踪敌人的过程中，防卫科找到了失踪的受害者。结论：他们都很安全。
While you were chasing the enemy, the Security Department also found the missing researchers. Affirmation: They are all safe and sound.
It was all thanks to Adler.
他们都落入了一件空间奇物中，深陷其间无法脱身，直到界种科最了解奇物的人从内部解开了它。
They fell into a spatial Curio and could not leave until the Department of Ecology's most knowledgeable Curio expert solved it from within.
阿兰带人赶到时，这些失踪者大多因过度惊吓而奄奄一息，但都没有生命危险。
Many of them were shaken by their experience when Arlan found them, but they are otherwise fine.
Why do I feel like you didn't do much...?
此间事了，相信剩下的风波靠空间站内部便能自行平息。我替黑塔感谢你的付出，{M#先生}{F#女士}。
This business is over, and I believe the space station will be able to deal with any internal aftershocks. In Herta's stead, I thank for your efforts, {F#Madam}{M#Sir}.
不过在整起事件中，还有一重疑问尚未得到解决。
But there is one mystery that remains unsolved...
而那是我应当去处理的事了。
Haha, and that is something I must deal with myself.
火焰在熄灭…这空间…有古怪……
The fire is dying... This place is... strange...
它还在试图挣扎。折叠空间的状态变化了，一看便知它逃去了哪里。
It's still resisting. The fold in the space has shifted. I can deduce its escape route with a mere glance.
人类…为什么？这与你无关……
Human... why? This has nothing to do with you...
火焰在逐渐衰弱，冥火大公无法再维持它了。
The flame is getting weaker. Duke Inferno can't maintain it anymore.
看来这场追逐，该到头了。
Seems like this chase is about to end.
请开始你的陈述——想清楚，再发言。
Please, begin your statement — and try to think before you speak.
请开始你的陈述——想清楚，再发言。
Please, begin your statement — and try to think before you speak.
我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。

I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.
拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.
冥火也是一种能量生命，会被显像仪捕捉到痕迹。跟上它。
The infernal fire is also a form of energy lifeform. The imaging device will pick up its trace. Follow it.
看来冥火大公并未亲临空间站，只是趁乱将一团冥火投入此地，让它四处游移，狩猎科员。若冥火熄灭，他的阴谋也将荡然无存。

It seems that Duke Inferno didn't deign to personally grace the space station. He merely cast infernal fire into our midst to wreak havoc among the researchers. When the fire fizzles out, his malevolent plans will vanish without a trace.
我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。

I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.
拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.
人流散去后，这里就会变得十分宁静呢，就像我曾经去过的…「无人之地」。
As the masses depart, there's an enveloping calm here... just like the "No Man's Land" I ventured to in the past.
是的，我与母亲二人在那里度过了十一个漫长的极夜。
Yes. My mother and I once spent <unbreak>11</unbreak> long polar nights there.
我本以为#4波尔卡•卡卡目把俱乐部会员抹消得差不多了，没抱多少希望…哦，瞧瞧是谁来了？
I thought member #4, Polka Kakamond, had gotten rid of most of the Society members. I didn't have a lot of hope for this... Oh? Look who's here.
There's quite the crowd here today...
当然，这可是三位天才的聚首。
Of course. This is a summit between three geniuses.
近期正值特殊时期，各科室都在为迎接天才俱乐部的大人物到来做准备。
It's a special time — all departments are preparing to welcome distinguished guests from the Genius Society.
阮•梅女士为人低调，一堆人迎接可能不太适应，我就让科员顺从她的性子，一切从简。
Madam Ruan Mei doesn't like fanfare and probably wouldn't appreciate a crowd to welcome her, so I asked the researchers to keep things simple.
我前几日带她参观俱乐部成员的画像，让科员们为她也做一幅，但她拒绝了。
I took her to see the portraits of the Society members a few days ago. I wanted to have the researchers make one for her as well, but she declined the offer.
真搞不懂。算了，她开心就好。
I don't get it. Whatever. As long as she's happy.
我听说阮•梅小姐爱吃糕点，就让科员们准备了湛蓝星的传统点心。她似乎每一种都很喜欢。
I heard Miss Ruan Mei likes snacks and pastries, so I asked the researchers to prepare some traditional desserts from the Blue. All of them seemed to tickle her fancy.
Would I be able to meet Ruan Mei?
能啊，你自己去找她。她一来就问我借走了相位灵火做研究，然后就找不着人了。
Of course, go find her yourself. She borrowed the Phase Flame to do some research as soon as she got here — haven't seen a trace of her since.
Is Ruan Mei a great person?
你这问题，就像在问「黑塔很伟大吗」——答案显而易见。
That's like asking "Is Herta a great person?" The answer is obvious!
阮•梅小姐是位不折不扣的学者。听闻她此前在沙漠行星小憩，离开时已创造了当地的物种繁荣大奇迹。
Miss Ruan Mei is the very image of a scholar. I heard she once took a little vacation on a desert planet. By the time she left, she'd miraculously created a boom in the local ecology!
她只是随便找了个荒无人烟的地方试验她的「生命螺旋体系」吧。阮•梅很有才华，可惜她几乎不与人往来，活得像个隐居者。
She just wanted somewhere uninhabited to experiment with her "Life Helix System." Ruan Mei is certainly very talented, but she hardly interacts with anyone. She lives like a hermit. Pity.
行了，能成为黑塔学术伙伴的人，还用多说什么呢？{NICKNAME}，听够了就出发吧。看你能不能找到她咯。
Anyway. What more needs to be said for someone smart enough to become Herta's research partner, hmm? Hurry up and head out, {NICKNAME}. See if you can find her.
Where is Ruan Mei right now?
不清楚，但阮•梅小姐似乎对生活琐事不太关心，日常只出入主控舱段和月台。或许你可以去附近找找？
I'm not sure, but she doesn't seem to get around much. She spends most of her time between the master control zone and the railway platform. Maybe you can start your search there?
Hello. I hope I didn't startle you.
这是我的工作习惯。通过触碰打开知觉，让关于生命的细节涌入脑海，这能帮助我了解你的生物结构。
This is a work habit of mine — using touch to open my senses and letting the details of your biological existence flood into my brain helps me understand your construction as a living organism.
这是解构与再塑的基础。别紧张，你很健康——是个完美的实验样本。我喜欢完美的实验样本。
Such is the basis of deconstruction and reconstruction. Do not be concerned. You are very healthy — in fact, impeccably so. A perfect experimental specimen. I like perfect experimental specimens.
嗯，我也很高兴。我们在模拟宇宙见过。
Yes, I'm happy to meet you too. We've met before in the Simulated Universe.
There's a bit of cake on the corner of your mouth...
我正在欣赏风景，看得有些失神了。
I expect the views here had me lost in thought...
我不常出入空间站，今天才发现这里，视野开阔，令人安神。适合配上一点荷叶、梅花、糯米，还有糖霜的清香。

I don't usually go in and out of the space station, and only discovered today that it was blessed with such calm, open views. It is a wonderful fit for the sweet fragrance of lotus leaves, plum blossom, sticky rice, and frosting sugar.
来这里，看，湛蓝的行星就在我们脚下，它如此充满活力。这甜点也很好吃，分你一半。
Come here. Look, the blue planet is directly below us. It is so full of life. This dessert is very delicious. Here, take half.
不喜欢吗？我为它付出了很多努力，你应该尝尝。
You don't like it? I worked very hard on it. You should at least have a try.
甜美的糕点总让人想起花绽开的模样，一口、一口吃下去，香气就会留在唇齿之间。
Delicious desserts remind people of how flowers look when they bloom. Ingest this dessert one bite at a time, and the sweetness will linger in your mouth.
I hope you like it too.
好吃吗？下次可以多为你渍一点。去探望斯蒂芬•劳艾德的时候，我总会带些草莓糕，不然他不会露面。
So, what do you think? I can certainly prepare more for you. It's become somewhat of a tradition to bring strawberry pastries when I visit Stephen Lloyd. His attendance seems quite dependent on them.
嗯，极好的糕点。十克方糖，一朵风干的盐渍梅花。烘焙与烹饪，和培育宇宙同理，火候要掌握好，心思要缜密，遇到任何状况…都不能慌乱。

Mmm, an outstanding dessert. Ten grams of cubed sugar, one dried and salt-preserved plum blossom. Baking and cooking are the same as nurturing a universe. The heat must be controlled, planning must be meticulous, and one must not panic... no matter what happens.
可惜，空间站的人还是多了些，嘈杂的声音和点心不够般配。那么……
Unfortunately, there are still too many people in the space station. The clamor is not fitting for desserts. By the way...
{NICKNAME}, do you remember what my "research" is about?
不记得了，我只喜欢研究马桶的小故事。
No. My research area is short stories about toilets.
(What's going on... what am I... talking about?)
这样啊，很可爱的爱好呢。
I see. What a cute hobby.
但要记得，以后遇到类似的事情，在弄明白发生了什么前，要先把表情藏起来，否则……
But remember, the next time something like this happens it's crucial to mask your expression until you've ascertained the situation. If not...
...you'll be full of weaknesses that others can see through.
我们再来一遍吧。现在，{NICKNAME}，你还想问什么？
Let's try again. Now, {NICKNAME}, what else would you like to ask?
What did you do to me...
点心很好吃，我还想再吃一点。
The dessert was tasty. I would like more.
(Wh—Why can't I say what I want to say!?)
是个贪吃的孩子呢。可以，我会把配方告诉你。
You have quite the appetite. Alright, I'll give you the recipe.
跟我走走吧。吃完可口的点心后，散步是最合适的消遣。
Come and have a walk with me. A stroll is the most appropriate post-dessert activity.
什么？空间站收容「危险实验品」的地方？
What? A place where the space station stores "dangerous experimental results"?
正常人打听这个做什么…等等，是不是有人派你来套我话！
Why would anyone want to know that... Wait! Did someone send you here to try to get things out of me?
我可没在空间站搞什么小生意啊。我一点也不知道什么特殊的藏物地点，更没倒卖过什么破铜烂铁啊，奇珍异宝啊，废弃奇物啊之类的。

I'm not doing any private business on the space station! I have absolutely no knowledge of any special hiding places. And I certainly haven't sold any old junk, rare treasures, or discarded Curios or anything like that!
哼，我没在掩盖什么！倒是你鬼鬼祟祟的，到底想干嘛？
Hmph, I'm not hiding anything at all! You're the sneaky one! What do you want?
Ruan Mei asked me to do this.
你真可爱！能给我签个名吗？
You're so cute! Can I get an autograph?
（……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
(...So I really can't say anything about her.)
签名？你这是要干嘛，鬼鬼祟祟的，吓人！
Autograph? What are you on about!? You're freaking me out!
不说为什么，我是不会回答的。
I won't talk to you if you don't tell me why you're here.
我听说空间站有些动荡。
I heard there are some problems on the space station.
…喔，是这事？这你都知道，消息蛮灵通的嘛。这会儿空间站一团乱，有大人物要来，大家原本就够忙的，又不知道哪冒出来一堆小怪物。

...Oh, that? You've got pretty good contacts if you know that already. The space station is a mess. Everyone's already swamped as it is, and now out of nowhere, there are a bunch of little creatures popping up.
阮•梅让我回收泄漏的实验体。
Ruan Mei is asking for me to recover the leaked experimental specimens.
我来解决空间站的麻烦！
I'll solve the space station's problems!
（…果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
(...So I really can't say anything about her.)
…喔，是这事？这你都知道，消息蛮灵通的嘛。这会儿空间站一团乱，有大人物要来，大家原本就够忙的，又不知道哪冒出来一堆小怪物。

...Oh, that? You've got pretty good contacts if you know that already. The space station is a mess. Everyone's already swamped as it is, and now out of nowhere, there are a bunch of little creatures popping up.
你要解决这事，就去收容舱段看看吧。去了就明白了。
If you want to solve the problem, go check out the storage zone. Then you'll understand.
抱歉，好像说了很难懂的话。别紧张，我并无敌意，我没有对你的语言中枢下手，那样太失礼了…我只是加了一点小调剂。

My apologies, it appears my words have left you perplexed. Please, don't be on edge — I bear no ill will. I haven't interfered with your linguistic faculties — such an act would be impolite... I merely made a minor adjustment.
此前几日，我向黑塔暗示对你有兴趣。因为我想让你成为「助手」，你是合适的人选——在模拟宇宙为数不多的接触中，我如此确信。

A few days ago, I made my interest in you known to Herta. My intention is for you to serve as an "assistant." Based on our interactions within the Simulated Universe, I firmly believe you fit the bill.
但世上没有不透风的墙，我很难信任自己之外的人。缜密研究中有任何一个数据出错，都会产生问题。我讨厌不受控制的问题。
I find extending trust beyond myself is challenging. A single error in detailed research can generate issues, and I despise matters that escape my control.
所以，这糕点里加了 <color=#dbc291ff>「反吐真剂」</color>。它对你的身体无害，只是会让你在回答与我相关的问题时，无法说出真实的想法。
Therefore, I added <color=#dbc291ff>Anti-Truth Serum</color> to this dessert. It will not harm you. However, you will be unable to say what you truly think when answering questions related to me.
把它当作一层保护吧，保护我的研究，也保护你的人身安全。等解决了那些麻烦，我就会给你解药。
Treat it as a layer of protection. This will shield my research and your personal safety. Once the problems have been dealt with, I'll give you the antidote.
作为当助手的回报，我可以给你「奖励」，任何你想要的我都可以满足。
I can also reward you as compensation for being my assistant. I will fulfill your every wish.
是的，一些由我亲手造就的问题。
Yes... problems wrought by my own hand.
你很在意吗？我想我们有机会敞开心扉，只是需要时间。
Does that bother you? I believe we will be able to be frank with each other, but that needs time.
Then I'll grant you even greater rewards.
抵达空间站时，我向黑塔借来#29丝丝喀尔的造物「相位灵火」，希望能从其他会员的研究成果中得到一些启发。
When I first arrived on the space station, I borrowed the Phase Flame from Herta — it's an invention of member #29 Sserkal. I hoped to be enlightened by other Society members' results.
我的确有了点灵感，便尝试在空间站进行生命培育。
A surge of creativity led me to explore the cultivation of life on the space station.
在我的想象中，这会是一种…生来就是「天才」的全新生命。我打算以天才俱乐部#8拉姆为它们命名……
In my imagination, these lifeforms would be a new variety that are born as geniuses. I planned to name them after Lambda, member #8 of the Genius Society...
但不知是哪里出了差错，它们拥有了自己的意识，却和天才全然无关。
I don't know where it went wrong. They possess their own sentience, but are nowhere near geniuses.
而且，我的放养教育似乎起了反效果。前些天，在一次泄露中，几只崭新培育的「小生命」逃了出来，流窜在空间站中。
Moreover, my "free-range" approach seems to have backfired. In a lab leak incident a few days ago, some of these "little lifeforms" ran away and scattered all over the space station.
我不希望让黑塔或艾丝妲介入这件事，所以…我希望你来帮我回收这些「小生命」。
I do not wish for Herta or Asta to be involved in this. Therefore... I'm hoping you can assist in recovering these little lifeforms.
You can try trusting me, you know.
Why don't you want them to know?
这件事与他们无关。而且参与的人多了，就会有麻烦。
This has nothing to do with them. Besides, the more people involved, the more problems there will be.
空间站的科员们应该还只当它们是外来访客。我不想现身惊动更多人，引起不必要的麻烦。
The researchers are still treating these entities as visitors... I want to steer clear of making my presence known, so as not to cause undue disturbances.
拜托你了。回收的「小生命」只需找一个地点收容即可。界种科科员应该对此比较熟悉，会给你合适的推荐。

I entrust this to you. Once the little lifeforms are collected, simply find a proper place for them. The researchers in the Department of Ecology should know about this and provide you with suitable advice.
芝士流心说「阮•梅女士终于意识到了本天才！」
Molten Cheese Tart says, "Madam Ruan Mei has finally recognized my ingenuity!"
芝士流心说「阮•梅女士是否承认本天才是成功的作品？」
Molten Cheese Tart says, "Does Madam Ruan Mei recognize me as a masterpiece?"
芝士流心说「阮•梅女士还未认可我是合格的生命。我还要继续努力！」啊！多么积极的芝士流心！
Molten Cheese Tart says, "Madam Ruan Mei still has not recognized me as a lifeform that passes the requirements. I need to work harder!" Ah! Such an enthusiastic Molten Cheese Tart!
有一种思念，叫造物主，对于世界，你只是一个人，而对于我，你就是整个世界——啊！阮•梅女士！
There's a kind of attachment reserved for the creator. To the world, you are but one person. But to me, you are the entire world — Ahh, Madam Ruan Mei!
嘿，你。就是你——你没什么想对芝士流心说的吗？你至少该表达下对芝士流心的追随吧？别让我们怀疑你是「豆沙灰灰」派来的奸细！

Hey, you. Yes, you — don't you have anything you wanna say to Molten Cheese Tart? You should at least express how you would like to follow Molten Cheese Tart! We wouldn't want to mistake you for an agent of Gray Bean Paste, would we?
Get lost and get as far away from here as you can!
阮•梅是不可能喜欢你的！
There's no way Ruan Mei would like you!
你这个没心没肺的点心。

(...I almost forgot, I can't say anything about Ruan Mei.)
哎唷，芝士流心大人虽然看起来充满激情，但内心可是非常细腻的！
Oh, the honorable Molten Cheese Tart may have a crispy exterior, but deep down inside, it's incredibly sensitive and delicate.
它这么努力，不就是为了得到阮•梅女士的关注嘛！
It's working so hard just to get Madam Ruan Mei's attention!
天才俱乐部#81阮•梅——响当当的大人物，生命培育领域的大师，很多科员都对她慕名已久！
Ruan Mei, member #81 of the Genius Society — a resounding name in science and the veritable epitome of lifeform cultivation. Researchers here have heard so much about her for so long!
可她一来空间站就鸠占鹊巢，黑塔女士也完全不管……
But once she arrived on the space station, she just took over everything. And what did Madam Herta do? Absolutely nothing...
Never fear, the Galactic Baseballer is here!
是啊，把空间站当自己家了，到处都是她的研究笔记，扔了一地！
Yes, she's treating this place like her backyard! She's leaving her research notes all over the floor!
结果反倒有一堆人追着她的手稿看个不停……
The end result? Everyone's obsessed with getting their hands on them...
阮•梅在做研究时喜欢用空间站的收音机听一些东西。
Ruan Mei likes to listen to the space station radio during her research.
嘘，有些小科员是她的狂热粉丝，会对着她的收音机不停调台，搜刮她平常的爱好！你知道阮•梅女士喜欢听什么吗？
Some of us younger researchers are her superfans — we're always scanning different frequencies to find out what her tastes are! Do you know her favorite tunes, by any chance?
阮•梅喜欢听新式的戏曲。
Ruan Mei likes to listen to new-style opera.
不知道，我都用收音机听相声。
No idea. I just listen to comedy skits.
（……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
(...So I really can't say anything about her.)
不愧是你，看上去就像会说相声的。
As expected. You look like you belong in a comedy skit yourself.
阮•梅喜欢听新式的评书。
Ruan Mei likes to listen to new-style storytelling.
不知道，我都用收音机听相声。
No idea. I just listen to comedy skits.
（……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
(...So I really can't say anything about her.)
不愧是你，看上去就像会说相声的。
As expected. You look like you belong in a comedy skit yourself.
听说阮•梅女士对糕点的口味十分挑剔。{NICKNAME}，你了解阮•梅究竟喜欢什么吗？
I heard Madam Ruan Mei is very picky when it comes to snacks. {NICKNAME}, do you know what her favorites are?
阮•梅喜欢新渍的梅花糕。
Ruan Mei likes plum blossom cakes that are freshly salted.
不知道她，但我喜欢吃西瓜口味的。
I don't know about her, but I loooove fermented herring.
（……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
(...So I really can't say anything about her.)
Did I ask about your favorites? Also, that's disgusting — what's wrong with you?
嘿，看我搞到了什么？据说这是他们通过流言还原出来的，低配版阮•梅生命培育配方。
Hey, guess what I got my hands on? Word on the street is that this is the downgraded version of Ruan Mei's life cultivation formula.
上面这么写着：十克拉的灵性、一吨的练习、三十微粒的星震、一点点余清涂女士的毒酒。曾制造出不停说话的椅子：没什么本事，但嘴很毒，已经拆成木头烧火了。

It says: <unbreak>10</unbreak> carats of ingenuity, 1 tonne of practice, <unbreak>30</unbreak> particles of starquake, and a few drops of poisonous liquor from Madam Yu Qingtu. Rumor has it that it once created a talking chair! Not a particularly intelligent one, but boy did it have a sharp tongue — they dismantled it and used it for firewood. Can you believe it?
咱们试试呗。首先要选择原料。
Let's give it a shot, shall we? First things first, we need to pick out the ingredients.
A confidence that came out of nowhere
一口气喝两瓶卡利白的勇气！
Courage to drink 2 bottles of Kapo-Kali in one go!
嗯…还得再加点好东西。别洒多了……
Hmm... we need to add some other good stuff in. But don't go overboard...
嗯…现在把它们混在一起，等等！配方上说「阮•梅在培育生命时会有不同的表现……」
Mm... and now we mix them together. Wait! It says on the recipe: "Ruan Mei makes different expressions when nurturing life..."
The corner of Ruan Mei's mouth twitches
阮•梅正克制自己的情绪
Ruan Mei is suppressing her emotions
嘶…你自己看你培育出了什么吧。
Yikes... take a look at what you just cultivated.
你身边不知从何处冒出一位科员……
A researcher appears out of nowhere next to you...
你培育出了一个复制版扑满！
You have nurtured a copy of a Trotter!
你培育出了一个牛奶五仁味生命！
You have nurtured a copy of a five nut milk-flavored lifeform!
你培育出了一个香菜麻酱味生命！
You have nurtured a coriander sesame paste lifeform!
你培育出了一个复制版相位灵火！
You have nurtured a copy of a Phase Flame!
「芝士流心」是最棒的！它的情绪感染力如此之强，它的正能量感染了我们所有人。
Molten Cheese Tart is the best! Its outlook is infectious! Its positive mood has influenced us all!
我们的口号是什么来着？第一，停止抱怨，调整心态，用美味的芝士流心止住负能量的传递。
What's our slogan again? One: Stop complaining, change your attitude, and use the delicious Molten Cheese Tart to stop the flow of negative energy.
第二，自我赋能，提高行动力，走在芝士流心的极致信念上。
Two: Energize yourself, increase your capacity for action, and walk on the path of Molten Cheese Tart's absolute conviction.
我们的教旨在于——「芝士流心味最佳」！
Our creed: Molten Cheese Tart is the best!
你不知道吧，「芝士流心」是阮•梅女士的头号追随者，它用这种方式进行宣教。献上爱心的人，都表达了对阮•梅女士的尊敬与爱戴。
Oh praise be! You don't know? Molten Cheese Tart is Madam Ruan Mei's top fan! This is how it preaches. Those who offer their love are expressing admiration and affection for Miss Ruan Mei.
螺丝咕姆的追随者们呢？
螺丝咕姆先生的追随者都比较理性，但他们也在翘首以盼机械贵族的到来。
Let me tell you something, Mr. Screwllum's followers are all very logical, but they're just awaiting the arrival of the mechanical aristocracy.
哼，看你也有兴趣，我就告诉你觐见芝士流心大人的方法吧，你得自己努力——
Hmph, since you're so interested, I'll tell you how to secure an audience with the honorable Molten Cheese Tart. You'll need to work hard to get there.
<color=#dbc291ff>把「爱心」贴满阮•梅女士曾路过的地方</color>，只要你足够诚心，芝士流心大人就会现身！
You need to <color=#dbc291ff>plaster hearts wherever Madam Ruan Mei has been</color>. If you're sincere enough, the honorable Molten Cheese Tart will show itself!
I am humbled to meet the Molten Cheese Tart!
你！还愣着干啥？哦，听不懂大人的语言？没关系，为了应对这种情况，我们专门调制了联觉信标！
What are you frozen in place for? Oh, you don't understand the honorable tart? That's okay! No worries, for situations like this, we've specifically concocted a Synesthesia Beacon!
（哇咔咔——我就是天才，天才中的天才！）
(Wakaka — I'm a genius! A genius among geniuses!)
立即解除特殊的联觉信标。
Immediately deactivate the specific Synesthesia Beacon.
其实芝士流心大人一直在和「豆沙灰灰」进行口味抗争。芝士流心大人坚信人们的生活要积极向上。

You see, the honorable Molten Cheese Tart has always been fighting against Gray Bean Paste in terms of flavor. The honorable Molten Cheese Tart is a firm believer that people's lives need to be optimistic.
它们都希望自己能够获得阮•梅女士的认可，很不容易。
They both hope to receive Madam Ruan Mei's recognition and have been working so hard.
阮•梅怎么把糕点培育成了生命…
How did Ruan Mei make desserts into lifeforms...
You need to call it the honorable Molten Cheese Tart!
You like the taste of Molten Cheese Tart?
那当然了，咱这也没有支持豆沙灰灰的呀。
Of course. It's not like we have any followers of Gray Bean Paste here.
来闹事的也都被策反了，从抗拒芝士流心到爱上芝士流心。
All the ones who came here to stir up trouble have been converted by us. They went from refusing Molten Cheese Tart to loving it.
这就叫口味上的概念吞并。
This is called "conceptual annexation of tastes."
我只有一事不解。芝士流心大人这么优秀，为什么得不到阮•梅女士的认可呢？它真的很渴望她的爱……
It's genuinely puzzling. Despite Molten Cheese Tart's remarkable qualities, why hasn't Madam Ruan Mei acknowledged it? It's clear that it yearns for her love.
造物主对造物的爱？亲情？不太像…爱情？更不是那么回事儿了！
Love from the creator to her creation? Familial love? Doesn't sound right... romantic love? Definitely not!
我说不清楚！我连宇宙的尽头在哪里都不知道，怎么会知道「爱」是什么？
I don't know! Expecting me to understand "love" is like asking me to map the farthest reaches of the universe!
但有爱就对了！爱就要大声说出来——这就是芝士流心大人的信念！
Remember, as long as love is your compass, you're on the right track. And in the wise words of the honorable Molten Cheese Tart: Love must be shouted from the rooftops!
可以让我跟「芝士流心」单独说话吗？
Can I talk alone with Molten Cheese Tart?
这，这得征求大人自己的意见……
Th—That depends on if the honorable Tart agrees to it...
哦？芝士流心大人同意了！
Oh? The honorable Molten Cheese Tart has agreed!
你试图与「阮•梅」造物交流，并把它弄走……
You try to communicate with Ruan Mei's creation and get it away...
它睁大无辜的双眼。现在你得向它说明，这是为了把它送回阮•梅身边，不得不做的……
It opens its innocent eyes wide. You now have to explain to it that this has to be done in order to send it back to Ruan Mei's side...
说！为什么在空间站闹事？
Confess! Why are you stirring up trouble on the space station!
它似乎认为，只有充满激情，才能得到阮•梅的肯定。

说！你喜欢芝士流心口味？
Confess! Do you like molten cheese tarts?
它似乎认为，这是可以带来幸福的口味。

它似乎为自己是个不合格的「生命」而心有不甘。
It seems resentful for being an "unqualified" life form.
它好像要大干一番事业！它希望将自己的理念做到极致——邀请你的加入！
It seems eager to achieve great things! It wants to fully embrace its own philosophy and is inviting you to join in!
你得下点狠心，相信这是对它更好的归宿……
You have to be firm, believing this is the best place for it...
怜爱地开启异空间传送装置。
狠心地开启异空间传送装置。
你发现「阮•梅」造物根本放不进去……
You realized Ruan Mei's creation cannot be put in at all...
「阮•梅」的小生命被你无情地冲走了，它会被安全地送往收容舱。
Ruan Mei's little lifeform was ruthlessly flushed down the john. It will be safely transported to storage zone.
黑塔把我和螺丝咕姆叫来空间站，为了商议些重要的议题。她还给斯蒂芬发了邀请，但他没回信，黑塔似乎不想再等了。
Herta called Screwllum and I to the space station to discuss some important topics. She also sent an invite to Stephen, but he didn't reply and Herta didn't seem to want to wait any longer.
接下来…我希望你陪我一同出席。
And now... I wish for you to attend this meeting with me.
我不想黑塔为那些琐事操无谓的心，虽然她多半也不会在乎。
I don't want Herta to worry herself over these frivolous matters, even though she probably wouldn't care anyway.
以防万一，我需要一位能帮我说话的人——也就是你。
Just in case, I want someone who will be on my side — in other words, you.
帮我个忙吧，很简单：首先，不要透露我的秘密；其次，不要多问；最后，管理好自己的表情。
Help me — it'll be easy. Just remember: My secret stays with you. Don't pry too much, and keep your expressions in check.
嗨，阮•梅，等你好久了。哦，你也来了？看来你们相处得挺愉快。
Hi, Ruan Mei, I've been waiting for you. Oh, you're here too? Looks like you two have become quite friendly.
很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}。逻辑：重逢来得比推测中更早些。
It's good to see you, {F#madam}{M#sir}. Affirmation: This reunion has happened earlier than my calculations predicted.
虽然没有邀请你——但欢迎，{NICKNAME}，记住这历史性的一刻。三位天才共处一室，这事有多久没发生了？下一次又得多久以后？

Though you weren't invited, I welcome you to remember this historical moment, {NICKNAME}. How long has it been since three geniuses were in the same room together? And how long will we have to wait for it to happen again?
肯定：除模拟宇宙外，我们少有彼此交流的契机。我很期待这次碰撞会带来怎样的思想火花。
Affirmative. Discounting our discussions on the Simulated Universe, our interactions are scarce. I look forward to the innovative ideas that may emerge from this juxtaposition of minds.
那我就开门见山了——我认为是时候为模拟宇宙再找一位合作伙伴了。
Let me get straight to the point. I think it's time to find another partner for the Simulated Universe.
不，怎么会？斯蒂芬不想掺和这事，投了弃权票——行吧，我尊重每个人的生活方式，但他没机会参与这场决策了。

No, of course not! Stephen doesn't want to get involved and voted to abstain — whatever. Look, I respect the way people want to live, but he doesn't have the chance to be involved in this decision-making anymore.
提问：为模拟宇宙引入第五位合作者？
Question: Are we introducing a fifth partner for the Simulated Universe?
我们聚在这里的理由，各位心里都清楚。除了「答案」，还有什么能把天才俱乐部的家伙召集在一起？
The reason for our gathering is clear to everyone present. What else could prompt such a gathering of brilliant minds except for the "answer"?
没人能拒绝星神的秘密，赞达尔也做不到。会有人回应我们的。
No one can refuse the secret of the Aeons, not even Zandar. We'll definitely get a response.
如果来的人是波尔卡•卡卡目呢？
What if the responder is Polka Kakamond?
那不是正好？「寂静领主」——你在听吗？我是#83黑塔，我想见你。我们一定会有很多共同话题！
That'd be great! Hey, Lord of Silence, are you listening? I'm member #83, Herta, and I want to meet you. I believe you and I will have a lot to talk about.
波尔卡•卡卡目应该不会回应。她失去音讯很久了。
