概率：#64原始博士可能会出现。
Probability: Member #64, Dr. Primitive, may appear.
哦，那不行。且不论原始博士那堆劣迹斑斑的研究，他和巡海游侠的恩怨肯定会被公司大做文章。别了，我可不想模拟宇宙沾上奇奇怪怪的舆论。

That's a hard pass. Given Dr. Primitive's shady research practices and his tussle with the Galaxy Rangers, the IPC will surely turn this into a media circus... he can get lost. I'd prefer it if the Simulated Universe remained scandal-free.
余清涂呢？阮•梅，你和她还有往来吗——她还活着吗？
What about Yu Qingtu? Are you still in touch with her, Ruan Mei? Is she still alive?
…如果要谈论这个话题，可以让{F#她}{M#他}先离席吗？因为过程会很漫长…且无趣，不必占用别人的时间。
...Can we ask {F#her}{M#him} to leave if we are to discuss this topic? The process will be long... and boring. There's no need to take up other people's time.
哦，当然可以，{F#她}{M#他}本来就是你带进来的。你决定就好。
Of course. You brought {F#her}{M#him} in, after all. It's up to you.
Alright, let me walk you out.
Aaaand what the heck is this?
{NICKNAME}，这个阮•梅的「切片」，你在模拟宇宙里见过吗？
{NICKNAME}, this fragment of Ruan Mei — have you seen it in the Simulated Universe before?
The Simulated Universe is my home!
应该是个偶然产生的错误事件。
行吧，无所谓，我习惯睁一只眼闭一只眼，省事。只是有点好奇，阮•梅，你会继续留着它吗？
Fine, I'm used to turning a blind eye to these things — it makes life easier. I am curious though... are you gonna keep it, Ruan Mei?
会吧，根据记录，{NICKNAME}挺喜欢这个事件。
I probably will. Records indicate {NICKNAME} likes this Occurrence.
行，我同意。只要对研究有益，你想做什么都无妨。
Alright, I agree. As long as it helps you with your research, you can do whatever you want.
幸好只是虚惊一场。不过会议是我最头疼的事物…看样子很难脱身，得在这里待上一段时间了。
Thankfully, it was just a minor scare. Still, meetings give me such a headache... It seems I'll have to stay put for a while.
我见你回收了主控舱段的生命体，非常感谢。你做得很好。
I see that you've recovered the lifeform in the master control zone. Thank you, well done.
I didn't end up saying anything.
是我谨小慎微了，习惯使然，抱歉。
I was simply being overly cautious. It is a habit of mine. Apologies.
Is there something I shouldn't hear?
没有，你误会了。我只是觉得黑塔开会的这段时间，你能更方便地出入空间站。
No. You misunderstand. While Herta is tied up in meetings, you might find it more convenient to roam the space station.
有些事我得早点告诉你，等会议结束…或许就来不及了。
There are some things that I must tell you now. If I wait for the meeting to finish... then it might be too late.
我的生命体回收…还没完成，它们不止一个。还有一些，被存放在某个封闭的舱段。
The retrieval of my lifeforms isn't complete yet. There's more than just one, and some are stored in a sealed zone.
黑塔用那里接待各路银河来客，或是天才俱乐部会员。但受军团入侵影响，它不再对外开放了。
Herta uses that place to welcome visitors from across the stars, or to welcome members of the Genius Society. However, due to the Legion's invasion, it is no longer open to the public.
如今，那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
And now my "headache" is stored there.
There are other zones in the space station?
嗯，空间站的秘密远比你想的更多，黑塔也是。
There's much you don't know about the space station, and even more about Herta.
一些信息倒是可以透露：那里也会用来接待非人形的访客，有连通外空的接驳车。
But there is some information I can give you. That place is also used to welcome non-humanoid visitors and has a shuttle that connects to outer space.
So Herta gave you permission to use this place?
她给了我权限，没有再过问。
She gave me permission and said no more.
我把自己的指令卡给你。把手给我，我为你将指纹录入其中。
I'm giving you my access card. Give me your hand, and I'll input your fingerprint into it.
{NICKNAME}，注意安全。如果你遇见实在解决不了的危险，就给个信号，我会不顾影响，亲自出面。
Stay vigilant, {NICKNAME}. Should you come across a threat you can't handle, just alert me. I'll come to your aid, no matter what.
记住，在舱段中央，有一个巨大的…培养皿。那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
Remember, there is a giant... incubator... in the middle of the zone. That's where my "headache" is stored.
等你回来后，就来月台找我。那时你会明白一切。
Once you're back, come find me on the railway platform. Then you'll understand everything.
空间站的空气令人舒适。结论：知识在其中流淌。
The air in the space station has a pleasant quality. Affirmation: Knowledge flows within it.
会有第五位天才加入吗？
Will there be a fifth genius joining?
我期待另一种思想的加入。我将等待尊贵的来客，予以对方最高的礼节，相信知性的火光将在摩擦中迸发。
We anticipate the inclusion of a different perspective. I await our esteemed guest and shall offer the highest courtesies — I'm confident that our discussions will generate illuminating insights.
I want to know about member #64, Dr. Primitive.
我并不知晓他的真名。原始博士曾犯下诸多反人类罪行，因此有人猜测他并非有机生命。逻辑：无机生命与有机生命都应崇尚和平。

Dr. Primitive's true identity is not known to me. His previous transgressions against humanity lead some to conclude he may be an inorganic entity. Affirmation: All beings, organic or otherwise, should value peace.
你还会在空间站停留多久？
How long will you be staying on the space station?
我将再驻足一段时间。艾丝妲小姐近日表现出对空间站一些骚乱的担忧，结论：我将观察片刻。
I will stay for a while longer. Lady Asta has recently expressed concerns regarding disturbances on the space station. Conclusion: Extended observation is necessary.
监控器良好运行着，监控着阳光房的植物培育状态。
The monitor is running smoothly, keeping an eye on the growth of the plants in the Sunroom.
（用来监控阮•梅培育的生物生长情况…？）
(Used to monitor the growth of Ruan Mei's creations...?)
它称自己是豆沙灰灰味的。
It refers to itself as "Gray Bean Paste"
Are you hiding in the dessert?
它称自己与外壳是一体的。
It claims to be connected with its shell.
它看起来十分忧愁，泪水倾泻而出。
It looks deeply distressed, crying profusely.
（我不是…阮•梅认可的作品…呜呜…）
(I'm not one of Ruan Mei's recognized works... *sob*...)
（负能量太多…不喜欢负能量，呜呜……）
(Too much negative energy... don't like negative energy, *sob*...)
你也有自己的天才之处！
You are a genius in your own way!
它似乎觉得自己的情绪感染力也十分天才。
It seems to believe that its emotional infectiousness is also quite genius.
人人都有负能量的时候。
Everyone feels down once in a while.
它似乎非常歉疚，它的眼里闪烁着一丝不甘，似乎想要得到阮•梅的认可。
It seems deeply remorseful, and there's a glint of resentment in its eyes, as if it yearns for Ruan Mei's acknowledgment.
#23阿茶在机械城中的最后岁月给予了我启发，如她那般长寿的生命也会走到尽头。
The final days that Genius Society member #23, Acha, spent in the Mechanical City showed me that even the longest of lives, such as hers, have a limit.
现在我可以确定，本次培育结果为：不合格。
I'm now certain that the outcome of this cultivation is: Failure.
生命的形式成千上万，也因此证明形式本身并无意义。
Life can exist in thousands of different forms, which means the form itself has no purpose.
这些生命在各自的概念上走得十分遥远，甚至能引发通感的连锁反应…但这并不是我想要的。
These lifeforms are very advanced in their own concepts, and can even trigger chain reactions such as synesthesia... but that is not what I desire.
我开始迷茫了。「生命的本质」这一提问，是否原本就没有答案？#1赞达尔，你也曾这样迷茫…且绝望过吗？
I am starting to feel lost. Perhaps the question "what is the essence of life" never had an answer? Member #1, Zandar, have you ever felt this lost... or resigned?
生命五光十色，我坚信如此。它的绚丽如乱花迷眼，而我要从中采撷永不枯萎的那一枝。
Life is countless and varied in form. I firmly believe in that. Its beauty is like a myriad of flowers, and I want to pluck the one that never wilts.
事物的规律总是外表庞杂动人，内在却简单质朴。万物归因，一行公式可解众生迷茫。

The patterns of all things always have complicated and enchanting exteriors, while their inner essences remain simple and plain. If we were to trace things back to their roots, just one equation would be enough to solve the confusion of all life.
自懂事起，我就乐于观察微观生物的生命痕迹，譬如黏菌吞噬物体的速率；我也将宏观的世界尽收眼底，研习宇宙至今的发展进程——都很简单。

Ever since I was a child, I have always delighted in observing aspects of microscopic creatures... such as the speed with which slime molds devour objects. I have also gazed far and wide across the macroscopic world, investigating the progress of the universe up to this day — it was all very simple.
我要弄清的是「生命的本质」，每一个体都拥有，却不自知的事物——无论是存在的物质性，还是超出物质之外的不可知物。
I wish to discover "the true essence of life," something that all individuals possess unknowingly, whether it is the materialism of their existence or an unknown entity beyond corporeal realms.
为避免对科学产生盲从，我谨慎提出质疑——阮•梅能否如坐标轴般剥去外界纷扰，探明生命最本源、也最美丽的存在形式？

To avoid blind faith in science, I cautiously raised a query... Would Ruan Mei be able to peel away external influences? Just like pinpointing a coordinate, would she be able to uncover life's most primordial and beautiful form of existence...?
我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。那就是……
I thought of one "lifeform" that would truly lie beyond my reach, and that is...
隐藏房间，嘶嘶。仅「阮•梅」女士可使用。请出示凭证，嘶嘶。
Hidden room, *buzz*. Only Madam Ruan Mei has permissions. Please submit your ID, *buzz*.
选择以下服务：一，历史培育记录查询。二，无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
Select from the below services: 1. Check historical incubation records. 2. Inorganic lifeform companionship chat service.
无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。
I thought of one lifeform that would truly lie beyond my reach.
令使为何物，我不得甚解。
I cannot comprehend what an Emanator is.
学者将其视作星神力量的代行。那么，是从何时开始，又是在哪一点上，它变得比其他生命都更接近「星神」？
Scholars view them as the executors of the Aeons' power. So, when did it begin, and at what point did they become closer to the "Aeons" than any other lifeform?
起初，我试图培育一位天才。但我失败了，此题尚不可解，还有漫长的路要探索。
At first, I tried to create a genius. I failed. That question has no solution yet, and a long journey of discovery still lies ahead.
但宇宙间的命途并非只有「智识」一条，如果抛却理性，在其他路径上是否存在更原始、也更纯粹的「令使」？
However, Erudition isn't the only Path in the Universe. If we set logic aside, would there be more primitive and pure "Emanators" on other Paths?
塔伊兹育罗斯，通过模拟宇宙，我得以窥见寰宇蝗灾的始末，攫取虫皇及其子嗣的数据，复制、培育，从而开辟全新的研究分支。

Tayzzyronth. I was able to see the beginning and end of The Swarm Disaster through the Simulated Universe, obtain data on the Imperator Insectorum and their descendants, replicate them, nurture them, and create a brand-new scientific discipline.
很合理的判断，我一定会成功。由我还原出的「它」将绽放前所未有的生命。
It is a logical decision. I will certainly succeed. The entity that I reconstruct will bloom into a life never before seen.
黑塔和螺丝咕姆会喜欢这个实验吗？应该不会。所以在他们察觉前……
Will Herta and Screwllum like this experiment? Most likely not. Therefore, before they realize what I am doing...
…我得加快动作，并寻找一位合适的「助手」。
...I must hurry my work, as well as find a fitting "assistant."
选择以下服务：一，访客记录查询。二，「培养皿」入口开启。
Select from the below services: 1. Check visitor records. 2. Open incubator entrance.
天才们的会议结束了，关于模拟宇宙的未来…结论并不重要，重要的是你那边。
The meeting of geniuses is over. As for the future of the Simulated Universe... That conclusion isn't important. What's important is your task.
看样子…你生气了，对吧？对不起，我没什么可辩解的。时至今日，我的实验失败了无数次，结局也总在预料之内。
You look... upset, correct? I regret my actions. There's no defending what I've done. Time and again, my experiments have fallen short, and they've always yielded predictable results.
我创造了一个「复制体」，但它和那位令使的距离…终究遥不可及。
I made a clone, but it... doesn't hold a candle to the Emanator.
嗯，和计算结果一致：<unbreak>56</unbreak>秒，分毫不差。
Exactly as predicted: <unbreak>56</unbreak> seconds, on the dot.
You didn't have to lie to me.
我该怎么向你解释呢？我不擅长与人交流……
How should I have explained it to you? I'm not good at communicating with others...
受困于时间和场地，它的生命编组只能算半成品。我复现出它诞育的瞬间，但很快，它就会化作粒子消散。

Restrained by time and place, its code of life could only be considered an incomplete attempt. I managed to replicate the moment it was born, however, it would soon disappear and be reduced to particles.
和所有的生命形式一样，在走向终点的过程中逐渐迎来结局——我并不排斥这点。
Like every living being, it inevitably faced its demise as it journeyed towards the end — I find no fault in that.
但短暂的一生也应有意义。我想知道它能做到些什么，这代表了我在未理解的领域中走出了多远。
However, even the briefest life should have meaning. I want to know the limits of its capacity. It will indicate how far I've gone in a field completely incomprehensible to me.
「微不足道的一步」——和预想中一样的答案。
Haha, and it was "a minuscule step" — just as I had predicted.
我说过，如果你遇见难以逾越的危险，我会出手将其击落。
I did say that if a danger proved too great for you, I would personally step in to confront it.
Are you going to keep researching?
是，我以此屏蔽嘈杂的噪音。不得不承认，研究曾令我过分痴迷——那不是段很好的时间。但现在，我更加得心应手了。
Indeed, this is how I keep the distractions at bay. I have to admit that research once made me obsessive — that wasn't a good period in my life, though I now navigate it much more smoothly.
What about life outside of research?
我没有除研究以外的生活。人们总认为这样的代价超乎想象，但对于我，它似乎可以接受。
I do not have a life outside of research. People always think this price is unimaginable, but it seems rather acceptable to me.
事实上，我并不喜欢一切总如我规划的那样进行，没有变数的实验是乏味的。
I must admit, I'm not fond of scenarios where everything aligns perfectly with my expectations. An experiment should have its unforeseen twists.
也因此，我很高兴。在这个几乎都是「如期到来」的故事中，还是有着「意外之喜」。
That's where the joy lies. Even the most predictable storylines can have their pleasant surprises.
不用将答案告诉我，我只是…有感而发。该如何照顾它们？留在空间站或许是最好的选择。
There is no need to tell me your answer. I just... felt like asking the question. How should I take care of them? Perhaps leaving them at the space station is the best choice.
我这样很不负责吧，抱歉。对于自己的造物，我常常不知如何面对。
Do I seem irresponsible? I'm sorry. I am often at a loss as to how to face my own creations.
「反吐真剂」的药效也将过去。日后若有人提起我，你随意便是，或者说不曾相识也好。
The effects of the Anti-Truth Serum will also wear off. If others mention me to you in the future, you can answer however you like, or even pretend you never knew me.
反正，我们之间的记忆很快也会如烟雾一样消散。
After all, your memory of me will soon dissipate like smoke.
世上没有不透风的墙，因一些不愿提起的往事，我很难信任自己之外的人。
Over time, hidden truths tend to surface. Past traumas, which I'd rather leave behind, have made me skeptical about trusting anyone but myself.
如果不希望秘密泄露，最彻底的方法就是将其销毁。「反吐真剂」的尾调会让你忘记我们共同经历的这一小段时光。
If I do not want a secret revealed, the most foolproof way is to destroy it. The Anti-Truth Serum will make you forget the brief period we spent together.
它不会立即生效，而是一个缓慢、朦胧的过程——就像荷叶、梅花、糯米，还有糖霜的清香。
It won't take effect immediately. It is a slow, intangible process — like the sweet fragrance of lotus leaves, plum blossom, sticky rice, and frosting sugar.
你或许会想起有人在空间站做了任性的实验，但不会再记得是谁。也许有一天我们又重新相遇，但你不会再把我与这件事联系在一起。

Perhaps you will remember someone performed selfish experiments on the space station, but you will no longer remember their identity. Perhaps we will meet again someday, but you won't be able to connect me with the recollection.
这样，生命与生命之间的牵绊就会被抹去。友情、秘密、纠葛、欺骗，都会一同烟消云散。
That way, the connection between lifeforms will be erased. Friendships, secrets, grudges, lies, all will disappear.
这样会让我们…更加轻松。
It will make our lives... more relaxing.
If that is your wish, I will forget you.
螺丝咕姆还会继续留在空间站一段时间，他和黑塔还有问题没有解决。我很快就要走了，但不会特意跟大家道别。
Screwllum will stay on the space station for a while longer. He and Herta still have problems they need to solve. As for me, I'm leaving soon and won't bother with goodbyes.
还记得我提过的「无人之地」吗？等研究告一段落，在间歇的休息时间，我打算再一个人去看看。
Do you still remember the "No Man's Land" I mentioned? I'm considering a solo trip back there during my research downtime, just to see how things are.
偶尔，我会想念#55余清涂，每逢告别，她总会给我调制一些好喝的饮品。
I miss member #55, Yu Qingtu sometimes. She used to always make something delicious for me to drink every time we parted ways.
希望不要遇到#4波尔卡•卡卡目，不然可能会很麻烦。
I hope I won't meet member #4 Polka Kakamond. That would be quite troublesome.
不知道下一次天才聚会是什么时候。{NICKNAME}，还有什么想对我说的吗？
Who knows when the next gathering of geniuses will be? Do you have anything else you want to say to me, {NICKNAME}?
…我难以回答。感谢你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
...I find that difficult to answer. I thank you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.
希望你回去看看造物们吧。
I hope you'll come back and visit your creations.
嗯，我答应你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
Mm, I promise I will, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.
如果有机会，如果你愿意——等再次相识后，我们可以一同去「无人之地」，航行于平静的冰川上。
If fate allows and you're interested, upon our next meeting, we could journey to No Man's Land and traverse its tranquil glaciers...
但那样的话，它对我们二人就都不是「无人之地」了。真是一道难题啊。
...though I suppose it wouldn't be No Man's Land anymore... What a conundrum.
(Ruan Mei... a name that's both new... and familiar.)
(There's someone next to the railway platform. Could she be...?)
人流散去后，这里就会变得十分宁静呢，就像我曾经去过的「无人之地」。
As the masses depart, there's an enveloping calm here, just like in the "No Man's Land" I've ventured to in the past.
{NICKNAME}…你能想象一个没有生命的世界吗？
{NICKNAME}... Can you imagine a completely lifeless world?
在那里，一眼可以望见地平线尽头的恒星。
From there, you can glimpse the stars that lie at the very edge of the horizon.
巨大的蓝绿色恒星沿着星轨运行，万丈光芒下，只有白茫茫的天地。
Following its celestial trajectory, the great teal star illuminates an endless sea of white across both the sky and land.
我和母亲在平静的冰川上航行，在世界中寻找生命的痕迹，邂逅各种奇异的现象。
My mother and I navigated calm glaciers looking for signs of life on that world... and encountered many bizarre phenomena.
就像在拼图堆成的小山中寻找唯一正确的那片，过程千奇百怪，无比艰辛，却又令人感动，令人着迷。
It was like finding the single correct piece in a mountain of jigsaw pieces. The process was convoluted and unimaginably difficult, but it was touching and enthralling as well.
此后每次遇见同样的风景，我都忍不住驻足停留。
From then on, whenever I come across a familiar scene, I find myself pausing to take it all in.
(There are so many people... this seems to be the place)
就是阮•梅培育的「小生命」？
Come along, {NICKNAME}. I'll see you out.
看来是我多心了，黑塔只是一时兴起…很符合她的作风。
It appears I was overthinking things. Impulsive behavior is pretty characteristic of her after all.
它似乎在提醒你路上有着可能的威胁……
It seems to be warning you of potential threats ahead...
（它似乎怕你害怕，为你哼起了歌…）
(It seems to sense your fear and starts humming a song for you...)
（阮•梅造物们手拉手，大家围成一圈。）
(In a circle, Ruan Mei's creations join hands with each other.)
（阮•梅把开心与悲伤，全部搓成一团。）
（阮•梅、阮•梅，为什么不回头看看我们？ ）
(Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, why do you not turn back to look at us?)
（阮•梅、阮•梅，你前进的路通往何方？ ）
(Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, where does your path lead?)
(...Is there no place for us, where you're going?)
(I never imagined there'd be so many of them...)
（你也在这儿？看来这里就是单向通道的另一头。）
(You're here too? Seems like this is the other end of that one-way path.)
(Are you telling me to keep going?)
(Huh? There's someone in the distance... who is that?)
（好大的房间…空间站还有这么开阔的地方？）
(This is huge... The space station has an area this big?)
（一位「繁育」令使的复制体？！怎么可能…）
(An Emanator of Propagation clone!? How can that be...?)
（这算结束了吗…必须得回去找阮•梅问个明白！）
(Is it over...? I need to get some answers out of Ruan Mei!)
日照时间的长短是影响情绪的重要因素，多晒星光被证明是有效缓解负面情绪的方法。
The duration of sunlight exposure is a crucial factor affecting mood. Basking in starlight has been proven to be an effective method to alleviate negative emotions.
我必须承认，在过程中诞生的这些小家伙，它们有时令人动容。
I have to admit that these little ones born in the process... sometimes move me.
在它们身上，我看到一种类人反应，是与神性截然相反的概念——它们具有感情。
I see a human-like response in them. It is a concept completely opposite to that of divinity — they have emotions.
感情的表征可能是积极，也可能是消极。但其中，植根心底的爱是永恒不变的东西。
Emotions may be either positive or negative. However, the love rooted in the depths of their heart is eternal and unchanging.
它们离天才尚有距离，因而无法分辨这种爱是友情？爱情？还是亲情？
They are still a long way from becoming geniuses and are therefore unable to discern whether this love is one of friendship, romance, or familial love.
可天才就能将其分辨吗？至少我做不到…我不理解「爱」为何物，也无从回应它们的感情。
That being said, can even geniuses tell the difference? I cannot, at least... I do not understand what "love" is and cannot respond to their feelings.
{NICKNAME}, do you believe my actions were wrong?
愣着做什么，你时间很多吗？我看不像。坐电梯下去，你要找的东西就在那里。
Are you waiting for a sign? Time is ticking. Descend via the elevator — what you seek is there.
You know what I'm looking for?
提问之前，不如先想一想，答案是否对你要解决的问题有益。
Have you considered whether the answer to your question will be of any relevance to our current predicament?
如果没有，最好别问，显然你我的时间都很宝贵。
If a question is of no help, then don't ask it. Time is clearly precious to the both of us.
…算了，就当做个示范：我知道你是谁，也知道你在为阮•梅办事；我本是空间站的访客，误入此地，目睹了她的实验。

*sigh* ...Never mind. Allow me to clarify something. I know exactly who you are, and I'm aware you are in Ruan Mei's employ. This was not my intended destination — I just happened to find my way here during my visit and saw what she was up to.
我的目的大抵和你相同，既然你来了，我便不会干涉；可如果你失败，我就会强硬介入，阻止一些不必要的麻烦。
My goals are roughly aligned with yours. Since you're here, I won't intercede... but should you fail, I will be forced to prevent some avoidable misfortunes.
你知道这些就够了——一共两句话，非常高效的沟通。
That's all you need to know. Just two paragraphs. Very effective communication.
You're not a bad person after all.
因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.
Why do you wear an alabaster head...
因为我见不得蠢材，当然，他们也不想见我。
Because I can't bear to see idiots. Of course, they wouldn't want to see me either.
Thank you for telling me that.
因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.
真正的「阮•梅造物」就藏在下方的巨型培养皿中。
The real "Ruan Mei's Creation" is hidden in the giant incubator below us.
走吧。顺着这趟电梯，敬请见证——「天才的杰作」。
Go. Take the elevator and bear witness to this "Genius' Masterpiece."
哼哼，你不知道吧，芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，后来联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物，给她写了一封信！
Hmm, did you know that Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste later teamed up with various creatures cultivated by Ruan Mei, and wrote her a letter!
就叫做「走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！」
Let's call it "Walking Your Own Path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!"
（被封闭的舱段…会是什么样子？）
(What would a sealed zone... look like?)
（这家伙是怎么回事？看起来和主控舱段的不一样…）
(What's up with this unit? It looks different from the one in the master control zone...)
嘶嘶，黑塔女士，开启舱段。嘶嘶，用以接待，异界物种，银河访客。
*buzz* Madam Herta, open zone. *buzz* To welcome, alien species, galactic visitors.
高危警戒区域，嘶嘶。服务人员，无机生命，嘶嘶。
High-risk zone, *buzz*. Service staff, inorganic lifeforms, *buzz*.
已授权给：「阮•梅」女士。黑塔女士：都行，她开心就好。嘶嘶。
Permissions status: Madam Ruan Mei, permissions granted. Madam Herta: Fine. As long as it keeps her happy. *buzz*.
嘶嘶，是小炒饭机器人的双生机器，炒冷饭机器人。嘶嘶。
*buzz* I am a twin of the Rice-Frying Robot. I am the Leftover Rice-Frying Robot. *buzz*
维持舱段运转。无机生命的工作。嘶嘶。
Maintain zone operation. Job of inorganic lifeforms. *buzz*
各类贵宾。嘶嘶。可能有危险人士，嘶嘶。
Many esteemed guests. *buzz*. May include dangerous persons. *buzz*
黑塔女士的危险奇物收容。嘶嘶。
Storage for Madam Herta's dangerous Curios. *buzz*
阮•梅女士的生命培育。嘶嘶。
接待，嘶嘶，{NICKNAME}。请问需要查询什么？
地下一层，中转中枢，嘶嘶。

Conclusion: You cannot enter. *buzz* Probability: <unbreak>50%</unbreak>. Other paths are open.
建议：前往地下，寻找培育路径记录，嘶嘶。
Suggestion: Proceed to basement. Locate records of cultivation path. *buzz*
I want to see visitor logs.
会有第五位天才加入吗？
Will there be a fifth genius joining?
想了解#4 波尔卡•卡卡目。
I want to know about member #4, Polka Kakamond.
女人。她脖子上的丝巾挺时髦，我对她很感兴趣。
Female. Wears a fashionable scarf. I find her rather fascinating.
你审视着阮•梅造物，它似乎仍在悲伤地等待阮•梅来接它。
You gaze at Ruan Mei's creation, which appears to still be waiting sadly for Ruan Mei to come get it.
A hint of compassion tugs at your heart.
（得找个地方安置这小家伙…刚才的声音似乎就在附近，是从锁住的房间传来的，怎么进去呢？）
(I need to find a place for this little one... That sound seems to be from that locked room. How do I get in?)
听说最近有大人物要来。
I heard that a big shot is coming soon.
Come on, time to eat, I'm starving.
So this is the space station!
I heard that when Ruan Mei is researching...
Madam Herta doesn't care about her at all...
相位灵火的火种很有趣，可惜研究还未完成，它就消失不见了；我开启了新的尝试。
The kindling for the Phase Flame is fascinating. Unfortunately, before the research could be completed, it vanished. I've initiated new attempts.
这次的两个样本生长状态良好。我在「概念」中加入了个人的口味喜好，我不确定这么做的结果。
The growth status of the two samples this time is promising. I incorporated personal taste preferences into the concept, but, I'm uncertain of the outcome of such an action.
它们同时拥有两种情绪体征：可爱、软弱、敏感、爱哭；凶悍、教唆、霸道、自信。
They simultaneously possess two sets of emotional traits. They are at once cute, weak, sentimental, and sensitive... yet are also fierce, instigating, demanding, and confident.
有趣的是，它们也拥有一种倾向；思念自己的造物主，对其产生如同天然存在的，婴儿对母亲、生命对食物、人与人的、奇怪的「情感」。

Interestingly, they also possess a kind of inclination — a yearning for their creator. It manifests as a natural, inherent emotion — similar to that of a baby towards its mother... Life towards sustenance, or the peculiar bond between humans.
黑塔把我和螺丝咕姆叫来空间站，为了商议些重要的议题。她还给斯蒂芬发了邀请，但他没回信，黑塔似乎不想再等了。
Herta called Screwllum and I to the space station to discuss some important topics. She also sent an invite to Stephen, but he didn't reply and Herta didn't seem to want to wait any longer.
接下来…我希望你陪我一同出席。
And now... I wish for you to attend this meeting with me.
Ruan Mei's creation jumps onto the table!
（芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物给她写的一封信。）
(Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste teamed up with various creatures nurtured by Ruan Mei and wrote her a letter.)
（翻译：走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！）
(Translation: "Walk your own path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!")
它居然发出了我的声音！
培养皿残渣已清扫……处理中……
Growth container fragments have been cleaned up... Processing...
本区域清扫完毕，等待执行下个队列的清扫计划。
This area has been cleaned. Waiting to execute the next cleaning plan in line.
来得正好，我们刚打开「空间站特产」。
Perfect timing, we just opened the "space station souvenirs."
Where are the space station souvenirs?
这台小机器人就是他们的「特产」。
This little robot is one of their "souvenirs."
他们和公司联合研发，虽然技术上还不算最尖端，但市场反响很好，给空间站带来不少创收。
They developed it alongside the IPC. Although it's not exactly cutting-edge technology, they've gotten a great market response and brought the space station a lot of revenue.
I've seen so many of these things.
嗯，艾丝妲批量采购了好几个批次，空间站里一直沿用到现在。
Yeah, Asta bought loads of them in bulk. They still use them on the space station to this day.
这台机器人是最新版，搭载了空间站研发的智能系统，能自主工作，感觉和人工智能助手没什么区别。
This one is the newest model equipped with an intelligence system they developed on the space station. It can work autonomously and it feels no different to an AI assistant.
唔，那位维修工程师还是太热心了，因为星穹列车给他帮了些小忙，他便坚持要抱着小机器人一路走到月台，还要亲自送到列车上……

I still think that engineer went overboard. Just because the Astral Express helped them out with some stuff before, he insisted on bringing that little robot all the way to the railway platform and delivering it to the Express personally.
之前到访空间站的时候，在某些舱段遇到小机器人失灵，我和丹恒就顺手调试了下。
When we went to the space station before, there were a few little robots that had crashed in various zones. Dan Heng and I went and debugged them as we were passing through.
还有小三月，她帮应物科测试了下多维扫描仪。
March also helped the Department of Implement Arts test their multidimensional scanner.
Why does that name sound familiar...
What, do you not remember them?
{NICKNAME}，我可是听那位工程师说，之前是你帮他修好了机器人，他一直跟我们夸你呢。
{NICKNAME}, I heard that engineer say that it was you that helped them with the robot repairs before. He was always telling us great things about you.
虽然我们在空间站的确帮过不少忙，但那都是小事，反倒是科员们太客气了。
We may have helped the space station with a few things in the past, but they were just little jobs. I really think the researchers are being too kind.
这些琐事也占不了我们太多时间，而星穹列车和黑塔空间站一直保持着良好的关系，能帮的还是尽量帮一下。

These trivial things really don't take up too much of our time. Plus, the Astral Express and the Herta Space Station have always maintained a good relationship. It makes sense that we help them as much as we can.
You all have that much time on your hands?
Do you not find it irritating?
{NICKNAME}，那你觉得，开拓者应该做什么呢？
Well, what do you think a Trailblazer should do then, {NICKNAME}?
Exploring new worlds is more important.
原来{NICKNAME}是这样想的啊…但在我看来，旅途很长，可我们并不是每天都在忙着做什么惊天动地的大事。绝大部分时间，我们都在处理各种琐事。

I didn't realize you felt that way, {NICKNAME}... If you ask me, our journeys are long, and it's not like we're dealing with earth-shattering events every single day. We spend most of our time dealing with trivial matters like this.
可正是这些看似微不足道的小事，构成了真正的开拓之旅。
But, it is precisely these kinds of small, menial tasks that form a trailblazing expedition.
琐事就交给其他人干吧。
Can't we just get someone else in to do the menial jobs?
我明白了…原来你是这样想的。这样吧…不如我们做个小实验？
I see... So that's what you think. How about this... Why don't we do a little experiment?
从你登上星穹列车后第一次到访的世界开始，去看看那些接受过星穹列车帮助的人现在过得如何，说不定会有意想不到的发现。

Why don't you go and see how the people who received help from the Astral Express are doing now, starting with the first world you visited after boarding the Express? I think you might discover something quite unexpected.
姬子在小机器人的顶部轻轻按了一下，激活了小机器人。
Himeko lightly tapped the top of the little robot to activate it.
检测到新访客。正在扫描…扫描成功！
New visitor detected. Scanning... Scanning complete!
已载入列车轨迹数据，导航服务已开启。
Express trail data downloaded successfully, navigation system engaged.
输入的数据比较少，它还需要接收大量的外部训练。带上它吧，跟着你一起，它会越来越智能。
There hasn't been much data uploaded to it, it will still need a massive amount of external training. Take it with you, and it will gradually grow smarter as you travel.
已确认出行目标，抵达目的地时，将自动记录使用者的信息。
Destination confirmed. User information will be recorded on arrival at the target location.
我这算是被你们流放了吗？
Does this mean you're exiling me?
怎么会这么想？要说流放的话，我们可是把列车组最小的成员从帕姆手上挖过来送你了。
Why would you think that? If anyone is being exiled, we've taken the Express Crew's tiniest member, wrenched them from Pom-Pom's arms and gifted them to you.
与其说是「流放」，不如当做我请你帮个忙吧？
I think it's better to take this as me asking you for a favor than considering it "exile?"
其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.
So I just go now? Is this not a bit sudden?
等你准备好了再出发。你可以先熟悉一下这位「小助手」。
You can take some time to prepare before you head off. Why not get used to working with your "trusty assistant" first?
已设置为自适应模式，待机中……
{NICKNAME}，不用着急，每到一个地方，重要的是用心去观察与感受——看看那些对我们而言微不足道的「小事」，究竟在人们心中留下了什么。
{NICKNAME}, there's no need to fret. Just pay attention to what you feel in your heart in each area you go to — go and see just how those "trivial jobs" we did for people affected them.
已将目的地添加至待办事项，用户可随时启动导航程序。
Destination has been added to to-do list. The user can activate the navigation protocol at any time.
Alright, I'll go and check it out when I get time.
要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.
当然，你要是实在不感兴趣，也可以将这件事暂且搁置，回头我再问问小三月他们。
Of course, if you really aren't interested at all, you can put this matter aside for now. I can always ask March and the others another time.
要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.
其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.
系统已激活，用户身份已确认。
正在载入日程数据…载入中…载入完成。
Loading itinerary data... Loading... Loading complete.
Let's take a look at the navigation system.
已完成星穹列车航线数据的同步。已锁定第一个目标地点：贝洛伯格-行政区-中央广场。
Synchronization with Astral Express navigation data complete. Locked on to first target destination: Belobog Administrative District — Central Plaza.
正在调取最近联系人数据…调取中…调取成功。
Retrieving recent contact data... Retrieving... Data retrieval complete.
当前目标人物为「华劳斯」。
Oh, I know Wallace very well.
已更新用户数据，导航关闭，请自行联络。
User data updated. Navigation disabled. Please make contact with the target personally.
根据历史记录，当前区域无危险因素。无需开启远程通讯模式，请在附近区域内搜索目标人物行踪。
According to historical records, there are no threats to be found in the current domain. Remote communication mode is not required. Please locate the target's whereabouts within the current domain.
雷金先生，我虽然还是没听懂您的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，但我的直觉告诉我，这是一项震古烁今的发现。
Mr. Regin, though I still do not fully understand your "big universe time tunnel" theory, my intuition tells me that this is an era-defining discovery!
没关系，华劳斯，你能感受到这项理论的伟大，就已经胜过全宇宙<unbreak>99.99%</unbreak>的人了。来，我再用更加通俗易懂的方式给你解释一遍……

Fear not, Wallace. The very fact that you are able to sense the greatness of my theory already places you above <unbreak>99.99%</unbreak> of people in the universe. Come, I will find an even simpler way to explain it to you...
Wallace, don't fall for Regin's tricks.
Who said that!? Are you slandering my name?
不是，哥们你俩在干什么？
Of course not. What are you two doing?
干什么？当然是传播科学啊。
What am I doing? Spreading scientific theory, of course!
{NICKNAME}，好久不见，你来得正好。请允许我隆重的向你介绍我的挚友，伟大的科学家，宇宙真理道路上的探索者——雷金先生。
{NICKNAME}, it's been a while. You came at just the right time! Please allow me to introduce my dear friend, great scientist, and explorer on the path of universal truth — Mr. Regin.
我和{NICKNAME}是老熟人了，之前{F#她}{M#他}多次帮我向教育部递交过论文，虽然一次也没成功。
{NICKNAME} and I go way back. {F#She}{M#He} has helped me submit my papers to the Ministry of Education many times. Although, none of them were ever successful...
不过也多亏{F#她}{M#他}把事办砸，我才决定自己创立科学期刊，才有机会结识华劳斯。
Although, it is thanks to {F#her}{M#his} screw-ups that I finally decided to make my own scientific publication. Without that, I would never have had the chance to meet Wallace.
I didn't expect you two to be friends?
纠正下，不是朋友，是挚友。
I'll stop you there. We are not just friends, we are best friends.
没错，没有比华劳斯更懂我的人了。
That's right, no one knows me better than Wallace.
Congratulations, you have both fulfilled your dreams.
谢谢，认识雷金先生之后，我曾经空虚的生活变得充实了，每天都能学习到很多新知识。
Thank you. My boring life has become so fulfilling since I met Mr. Regin. I get to learn all sorts of new things every day.
填充你生活的不是我，是科学。
It was not me that made your life fulfilling. It was science.
这也许就是书本里说的，两个孤独且高尚的灵魂最终会走到一起。
Perhaps this is what authors mean when they speak of lonely but noble souls finding their way to be together.
更值得庆幸的是，我们的友谊还产生出了结晶——《民间科学》。作为贝洛伯格第一部私人创办的科学期刊，我很荣幸成为它的赞助人。

What's even more worth celebrating is that our friendship has also produced something great — Citizen Science. As the first privately owned scientific journal in Belobog, I am honored to become one of its sponsors.
华劳斯，我永远不会忘记你的雪中送炭，我一定会把期刊办成，让我俩的名字共同镌刻在贝洛伯格的科学史上！
Wallace, I will never forget how you came to save me in my moment of need. I assure you that I will finish this journal and have our names etched in the history of Belobog together!
Perhaps I came at the wrong time.
No, your timing is actually perfect.
你俩日子过好比什么都重要。
I'm just glad you're both doing well.
谢谢，也希望你能找到自己挚友。对了，我还有最后一件事情需要你的帮助。
Thank you. I also hope that you are able to find your own best friend. Oh, that's right — there was one more thing that I wanted to ask for your help with.
我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?
伟大的科学组合确实需要一张供后人纪念的合照。
You're right. A great scientific team will require a photo to serve as a memento for future generations.
我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?
伟大的科学组合确实需要一张供后人纪念的合照。
You're right. A great scientific team will require a photo to serve as a memento for future generations.
…唔，背景、构图、光线、姿势和表情，都无可挑剔，正如我和雷金先生完美的友谊。
...Wow. The background, the composition, the lighting, the poses, the expressions... I would not change a thing, just like my perfect friendship with Mr. Regin.
就拿这张照片做下一期《民间科学》的封面吧。
We'll use this picture as the cover of the next issue of Citizen Science.
待办事项1已完成，接下来将导航至——「歌德宾馆」，该地区的联系人是「老歌德」，已规划最优路线。
To-do list item 1 is complete. Next, navigate to Goethe Hotel. The contact for this area is Old Goethe. The optimal route has already been plotted.
老歌德，今天谁想摸鱼了？
Old Goethe, who's looking to slack off today?
哈哈，现在哪还有委托给你接啊。你要是再晚来几天，「正当权益会社」都要解散了。
Haha, you think I still have assignments for you at this age? If you were here a few days later, I think "The Rightful Rights Society" would have already been disbanded.
这么好的社团还能解散？
How could such a great society disband?
如今不比从前，大家对工作和生活的态度改变了。
Things are different now. People's attitudes towards work and life have changed.
不可能，摸鱼是人的本性。
No way. Slacking off is human nature.
那是从前，现在的人可拼了。
That was before. People are going all out nowadays.
自从贝洛伯格与外界取得联系以后，人们的心态好像都受到了影响，加班的人变多了，走在路上的脚步变快了，连来我这喝下午茶的客人都少了。

Ever since Belobog made contact with the outside world, everyone's attitude seems to have been affected. More people are working overtime and everyone rushes from place to place. I've even got less people coming in for afternoon tea.
可能他们看到了拥有更好生活的可能，都想努力一点吧。
Maybe they all saw the possibility of getting a better life and decided to work harder.
唉…奋斗固然是好的，但怎么说呢，总感觉少了一些从前的松弛感。
Ah... It's always good to push yourself, but... How do I put it? I feel like we've lost that relaxing vibe we had before.
主张适当放松的「正当权益会社」自然就没落了，会员纷纷退社，现在只有我这个老头子守着告示板喽。
Naturally, "The Rightful Rights Society" that advocates for suitable relaxation has declined. Members are quitting one by one, and now I'm left here with the notifications board all alone.
It's all over. The rat race now begins.
我要是年轻二十岁，说不定也会奋斗一番。
If I were <unbreak>20</unbreak> years younger, maybe I'd want to give it a go myself.
Sounds like an invasion of IPC culture.
那做公司的职工真辛苦啊。
Being an IPC employee must be really tough then.
诶…我突然想起来，昨天有个叫塞琳的姑娘来发布了委托，说是希望有人去花店买束花给她。
Oh... Come to think of it, there was a girl named Celine who posted an assignment yesterday! She wanted someone to go to the florist and buy her a bouquet of flowers.
可她连买什么花都没说清楚，只说是送给一位年轻美丽的著名女演员。
But she didn't even state what kind of flowers she wanted. All she said was that they were for a famous and beautiful actress.
那些花在我眼里全长一个样，实在不知道怎么选，这委托就一直搁置着。你愿意帮帮她么？
Flowers all look the same to me. I'd have no idea how to pick a bouquet, so I put her assignment aside. Would you be willing to help her?
I was actually just on my way to see her.
那再好不过了。唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
Then that could not be more perfect. Ah, I imagine this will be the Society's last ever assignment.
I actually don't know much about flowers either.
总比我这个老头子强吧，唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
You can't be worse than an old crone like me. Ah, I imagine that this will be the Society's last ever assignment.
花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.
花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.
老爸快看，这是之前帮助过我们的{NICKNAME}！
Dad, look! It's {NICKNAME} who helped us before!
还真是，没想到会在花店遇到你，你也是来买花的吧？
So it is! I never expected to bump into you in the florist's! You're here buying flowers, too?
I need to pick a bouquet for someone.
我也一样，这里的花比军需物资种类还多，我都挑昏头了。
Me too. There are more varieties of flowers here than I've seen military supplies! Trying to decide is making my head spin.
你还是那么乐于助人啊。
I see you're as helpful as ever.
我一直记得你对我们家的帮助，要不是你，我现在可没福气陪女儿逛街。
I will never forget how you helped my family. I wouldn't be here shopping with my daughter right now if it weren't for you.
还没呢，那些新兵蛋子太不让人省心了，我还得带他们一阵子。
Not yet. These recruits are a real handful. I have to lead them for a little longer.
嗐，她一个人在家生闷气呢。
Hah, she's sulking at home alone.
我刚攒了几天休假，就想着赶紧回家看看老婆孩子。
I hurried home to see my wife and daughter as soon as I accumulated a few days of leave.
嘿嘿，笨老爸回来得匆匆忙忙，都忘了给家里带礼物。妈妈虽然嘴上没说什么，但脸上有点情绪，我赶忙拉着老爸出来买花弥补。

Hehe, silly Dad. He was in such a rush that he forgot to bring presents. Mummy said it was no problem, but her face told a different story, so I dragged Dad straight here to buy flowers to make up for it.
怪我怪我，回家路上太激动了，把礼物的事都忘了。
It's all my fault. I got so excited while on the way home that I completely forgot to bring a gift.
{NICKNAME}，你的花选好了么？我们来帮你结账吧，算是表达一下谢意。
{NICKNAME}, have you picked your bouquet? Let us buy it for you as a little token of our gratitude.
这样啊，那您把诉求跟我说下，比如送什么样的人，我来给您出出点子。
I see. Why don't you tell me more about what you're looking for? Tell me who they're for and I'll come up with some suggestions.
那我推荐您买上一束「侯爵夫人」——这是贝洛伯格最美丽、也是最难培育的一种花。
Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Marquise." They are the most beautiful flowers in Belobog, as well as the species most difficult to grow.
只有这种花，才能配得上著名女演员这种尊贵的身份。
Only a flower like that would be suitable for a distinguished actress.
I'll take a bouquet of "Marquise" then.
好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
Alright! Let me help you pick a few...
送给一位年轻美丽的女士。
The flowers will be given to a beautiful young lady.
那我推荐您买上一束「七彩虹」——这种小花色彩斑斓艳丽，女士们都很喜欢呢。
Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Rainbow." This small flower is colorful and bright — ladies all love them!
Then I'll take a bouquet of "Rainbow."
好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
Alright! Let me help you pick a few...
您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.
这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.
您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.
这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.
咦，你又来听小女子唱歌啊，这可不行啊，你得去歌剧院里正儿八经地听…难道说你还有什么事情要找小女子吗？
Huh. Are you here for my singing again? That won't do. You need to enjoy the proper performance in the theater... Or are you here for something else?
I brought the flowers you asked for.
没想到居然是你接了委托，这束花真美，谢谢啦。
I never thought it would be you taking on the assignment. These flowers are beautiful. Thank you.
Why didn't you go and buy them yourself?
I was worried you wouldn't like them.
其实本来我想自己去买的，毕竟是送给一位重要的朋友。但最近的演出实在太多了，我每天都忙着排练，根本抽不出时间。
I wanted to go and buy them myself. They're for a dear friend, after all. But I've had so many performances lately that I've been too busy with rehearsals to do anything else.
对了，我的朋友马上就来了，而且你也认识她，要不要一起见见？
Actually, my friend will be here in a second. You know her as well. So, do you want to catch up with her as well?
I've got nothing to do anyway.
你和塞琳稍加等候，一个熟悉的身影出现了。
As you and Celine wait, a familiar figure soon appears.
Hello, Celine! Ah, you're here too, {NICKNAME}!
好久不见了塔米拉，试唱还顺利吧，我可是连庆功的鲜花都买好了。
Long time no see, Tamila. Your audition went well, I assume? I even bought you some flowers to celebrate!
好美的花！那我可就收下喽。
What beautiful flowers! Thank you so much.
至于试唱嘛，嘿嘿，比我想象得还要顺利。公司已经同意和我签约了，我很快就会以新人爵士歌手的身份出道。
As for the audition, hehe, it went even better than I imagined. The IPC has already agreed to sign me up! I am going to be debuting as a new jazz singer very soon.
塞琳没跟你说吗，我已经不当演员了。
Did Celine not tell you? I'm not an actress anymore.
起因是我参加了一场贝洛伯格与星际和平公司的文化交流活动，在那里接触了爵士音乐，从此就爱上了这种音乐形式。
It all started when I took part in a Belobog and IPC cultural exchange event, where I discovered jazz music. I fell in love with the genre immediately.
我的嗓音…你也是知道的，不适合唱音乐剧，但没想到竟然很适合唱爵士乐。
As you know... My voice is not well suited to musicals. Fortunately, it turns out that it's perfect for jazz!
我一直认为塔米拉小姐的嗓音很独特，是那种慵懒迷人的音质。现在你获得了登上更大舞台的机会，我真的为你感到高兴。
I always thought that you have such a unique voice, Miss Tamila. It has such a sultry and enchanting tone. Now that you've got a chance to step out on an even larger stage... I'm so happy for you.
塞琳，其实你也应该找到属于自己的舞台。
Celine, you should also go and find your own stage.
你的声音比我更适合音乐剧，形象和演技也很出色，完全可以走到舞台上，做一名真正的音乐剧演员。
Your voice is more suited to musicals than mine, and your appearance and acting skills are also remarkable. You could easily walk up to the stage and become a real musical performer.
But... Do you really think I can do that?
你都获得塔米拉认证了。
Even Tamila has given you her approval.
你当然可以！实话说，我马上就要去公司接受艺人培训，会离开贝洛伯格很长一段时间。
Of course you can! To be honest, I am about to go to the IPC to undergo training, and I will be away from Belobog for a long time.
歌剧院的舞台不能没有女主角，你是唯一有这个能力的人。所以，塞琳请答应我，不要让我们的演出谢幕。
The theater's stage will need a prima donna, and you are the only person who can do it. So, Celine, please promise me that you won't allow our performances to end here.
其实成为音乐剧演员一直是我的梦想，既然塔米拉小姐和{NICKNAME}都这么相信我，那我会好好努力，不会让自己和你们失望的。

Becoming a musical performer has actually always been my dream. Miss Tamila, {NICKNAME}... As you both have so much faith in me, I will do everything I can to get there. I will not let you or myself down.
这样就对了嘛，你要争取成为剧场的台柱子啊。
That's more like it! You should aim to become the star of the entire theater!
I will come and watch your performance.
你…你等我适应舞台了再来。
Can... Can you come after I get a bit more used to the stage?
A new star is about to be born.
别这么说，塔米拉小姐才是大明星呢。
Don't say that. Miss Tamila is the real star here.
在离开贝洛伯格之前，总得留个纪念吧，不如我们仨拍张合照怎么样？下次再见面要很久以后了。
I have to leave behind a little memento before I leave Belobog. How about we take a picture together? All three of us? It will be a while before we are able to meet again.
那就以歌剧院为背景吧，这是我们艺术梦想起航的地方。
Then let's use the theater as the background. This is where our artistic dreams took off.
大家一起来到剧院门口。
All of you gather in front of the theater entrance.
请各位站好，我将在你们站定后开始拍照——
Please take your positions. I will take a picture as soon as you are all in place...
等下，我裙子有点皱，我稍微整理下。
Wait a moment. My skirt is a little wrinkled. Let me fix it quickly.
I want to put on some lip gloss, too!
我要开一下闪光灯，别眯眼！我开自动连拍了！
I will turn on the flash, try not to squint! Automatic burst mode activated!
这可是我拍得最满意的一张。
That's the best photo I've taken all day.
拍得不错啊，以后我想家的时候就多看看这张照片。
Not bad! Now I can look at this picture whenever I miss home.
唉，经纪人在催了，我得出发了。等哪一天我发了个人专辑，第一时间寄给你们。
Ah, my agent is telling me I have to go. When I release my solo album, I'll send you a copy straight away!
呜呜…塔米拉小姐，有空的时候要回剧院看看啊。
Waaa... Miss Tamila! Make sure you come back to visit the theater when you have time!
呜呜…塔米拉小姐，有空的时候要回剧院看看啊。
Waaa... Miss Tamila! Make sure you come back to visit the theater when you have time!
她们启发了我，我离开空间站前也应该和科员们合张照。
They have inspired me. I should have taken a picture with the researchers before I left the space station.
我没有家的概念。非要说的话，我现在服务于你，所以星穹列车才是我的家。
I do not have the concept of home. If I had to have a home, I would say that it would be the Astral Express, as I currently serve you.
You have people you miss as well?
我不理解想念的含义，但目前我系统中命令优先级最高的人是你。
I do not understand the meaning of "missing" someone. However, you are currently the person with the highest command priority in my system.
因为我的内存有限，也许有一天我会自动删除我的创造者的记录，所以想到了用照片的方式来保存。
As my internal memory is limited, there may come a day when I automatically delete the records of my creators. Therefore, I thought I could use a picture as a way of preserving them.
不过目前我还是得把算力集中到任务上，接下来将导航至——「贝洛伯格下层区」。
However, I should keep my computational power focused on the current mission. We will now be navigating to "Belobog Underworld."
咦？定位怎么显示在我们脚下，难道我的导航系统出故障了？
Hm? Why is the location marked as below us? Has my navigation system malfunctioned?
他们下层区是这样子的。
That's just how the Underworld is over here.
空间站不会送了个残次品吧？
Did the space station send me a defective product?
抱歉，目标所处的位置超出了我的处理能力，麻烦你自己寻找路线。
My apologies. Target location is beyond my processing capabilities. Please find your own route.
已到达指定地点，正在同步历史数据……
Arrived at designated location. Synchronizing historical data...
根据星穹列车的资料显示，无名客曾在此协助传奇英雄组织——此处有涂改——地下组织「鼹鼠党」进行物资运送任务。

Astral Express data shows that the Nameless previously assisted a legendary organization of heroes — Alteration — underground organization known as "The Moles" in completing a cargo delivery mission here.
当时发生了什么？我该找谁？
What happened back then? Who am I supposed to be looking for?
检索到多条相关数据：「最近一次协助时间是▉▉」「星穹列车为鼹鼠党优化了运输路线」「累计完成▉▉次物资配送」。

I have found multiple related data items: "The most recent assistance was completed on ▉▉." "The Astral Express helped to optimize The Moles' transportation routes." "A total of ▉▉ cargo deliveries have been completed."
当前空闲的当事人为：尤利安。因当事人文化水平较低，建议采取当面会晤形式，向当事人了解更多细节。
The party involved who is currently available is: Julian. As their education level is comparatively low, I suggest a face-to-face meeting with them to learn more.
I personally helped with that, too!
检索到您的相关行动记录。数据显示您在协助期间表现优异，获得了鼹鼠党成员的赞赏。
Records regarding your personal involvement have been found. Data shows that your performance while assisting was outstanding, and you received great praise from The Moles' members.
建议前往诊所前，寻找当事人「尤利安」，他对您印象深刻，拒绝和您沟通的概率为0。
Suggestion: Search for "Julian" before heading to the clinic. You left a deep impression on him. There is a 0% chance that he will refuse to communicate with you.
路线规划已生成，请在目的地附近与「尤利安」联系。
Route generation complete. Please proceed to the designated area and contact "Julian."
呜，{NICKNAME}你当时要是在就好了，呜呜……
Th—The deliveries... I—I don't wanna talk about it! *Cries*...
{NICKNAME}，你来了？你找尤利安有事吗，他现在有点不太舒服，如果可以的话，请不要刺激他。
Oh, {NICKNAME}. It's you. Did you need to speak with Julian about something? He's a little out of sorts at the moment, so please try not to get him riled up.
Sorry, I hope I didn't upset him.
哎，昨天学校发了新的练习册，他想抄近路带给其他同学，也不知道在路上看到什么东西，就变成这样了。

*Sigh* The school distributed a new batch of practice question booklets yesterday. He took a shortcut to deliver them to some of his classmates' homes. I have no idea what he saw on the way, but he's been like this ever since.
奥列格很重视这件事，他和铁卫沿路调查了一宿，但什么也没发现。
Oleg is extremely concerned about this. He and the Silvermane Guards patrolled the area for the whole night, but they didn't find anything.
我给他做过检查，还好身体没什么事。从目前的情况来看，应该是精神上受到了什么刺激。
I gave him a routine inspection. Fortunately, he seems completely healthy. From the looks of it, I'd say he was exposed to some kind of mental shock.
尤利安平时胆子是小了点，但从没见他这么害怕过。他很喜欢星穹列车的几位，也许，他愿意和你聊聊……
Julian does tend to be a little timid, but I've never seen him this scared before. He loves being with the Astral Express Crew. Maybe he would be willing to talk to you...
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}…呜呜…对不起，是我太没用了…又拖累大家了……
{F#Sister}{M#Brother}... Waaa... I'm sorry, I'm so useless... I've been a burden on everyone again...
尤利安哭得口齿不清，你实在听不清他在说什么。
Julian is crying so much you can barely make out what he is saying.
检测到对象情绪异常。正在启动辅助功能。
Emotional abnormality detected in target. Activating support function.
您现在的心跳频率是<unbreak>127</unbreak>次/分，呼吸过于急促。请跟随我屏幕光波的节奏调整呼吸。
Your current heart rate is <unbreak>127</unbreak> BPM and you are hyperventilating. Please match your breathing to the rhythm of the light displayed on my screen.
Is that really going to help?
请保持呼吸频率，另外，我要告诉您一件事——在星穹列车到访贝洛伯格的数据中，您过去完成的运送任务成功率是<unbreak>96.7%</unbreak>，运送的医疗物资累计挽救了<unbreak>27</unbreak>位居民的生命。

Please maintain that breathing rate. Furthermore, there is something that I must tell you — according to data from the Astral Express' previous visits to Belobog, your previous transport missions' success rate is <unbreak>96.7%</unbreak>. Medical supplies delivered by you have saved the lives of <unbreak>27</unbreak> citizens.
——以您现在的年龄算，在同龄人中只有<unbreak>0.0003%</unbreak>的人拥有此类成就。所以，您并不是「没用的人」。相反，您是一位了不起的救援者。
— Calculating from your current age, only <unbreak>0.0003%</unbreak> of your peers have achieved this level of success. You are not "useless." In fact, you are a great emergency worker.
我…我只是做了应该做的事……
I... I just did what needed to be done...
没想到这个小机器人还懂心理疗愈。
I had no idea this robot was trained in psychological treatment.
这是基于列车组行为模式的学习成果。
This is a learning outcome based on the Express Crew's behavior patterns.
尤利安深深地吸了一口气，停止了抽泣。
Julian takes a deep breath and stops crying.
昨天…在靠近裂界的时候，我本想抄近道，可是一抬头…一抬头就看到他们了。
Yesterday... When I was approaching the Fragmentum, I was going to take a shortcut. But... I looked up... I looked up and I saw them.
是…是一群铁卫…他们的制服都破破烂烂的，身上全是伤。我觉得很奇怪，从来没在镇子上见过他们。
It... It was a group of Silvermane Guards... Their uniforms were torn to pieces and they were covered in wounds. I thought it was strange. I've never seen them in town before.
他们还不断地问我，什么「是我们的补给到了吗？」。我吓坏了，抓起书包就跑，可是他们看到我跑，反而追着我……
They kept asking me: "Are our supplies here?" I was so scared. I grabbed my book bag and ran for it. But, when they saw me running, they started to chase me...
那群铁卫…他们…他们看上去…一点都不像活人！
Those Silvermane Guards... They... They didn't... They didn't look like they were alive!
是徘徊在裂界的过去之灵。
They are ghosts of the past that roam the Fragmentum.
It's fine. You're safe now that I'm here.
裂界…我好像听说过，曾经有矿工在裂界见到过往日的景象，他们还说看到过百年前驻守在这儿的铁卫。
The Fragmentum... I've heard about miners who saw visions of the past while being around the Fragmentum. They even said that they saw Silvermane Guards who were posted there a hundred years ago.
不过，也不排除是有人装神弄鬼——但对方为什么要针对尤利安来呢？
But it doesn't rule out the possibility that someone is just playing tricks... But why would they target Julian?
我…我也不知道…呜呜！他们一直追着我，一直追到了巷子口。我现在根本不敢出门，每每想起他们那样子我就……
I... I don't know... Waaa! They kept chasing me all the way to the end of the alleyway! I'm too scared to go outside now. Just thinking about their looks makes me go... go...
等等，我有个想法。也许…让尤利安亲眼看清真相，反而是帮助他克服恐惧的最好办法。
Wait, I have an idea. Maybe... Maybe allowing Julian to see their true form would be the best way to help him overcome his fear.
你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？如果是徘徊在此的裂界回响，那些矿工们也见过，但最终也平安无事。那就说明他们并不会伤害人。
What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Those miners saw the echoes that linger around the Fragmentum, and they came back unharmed. Surely that shows that the phantoms are not going to hurt anyone.
可如果是有人故意惹事——有{NICKNAME}在，他们也翻不出什么波浪。
But if it's someone deliberately causing trouble... {NICKNAME} will be able to stop them before they can do anything bad.
直面恐惧才能战胜恐惧！
Facing your fear is the only way to defeat it!
There's no need to scare the kid like that.
尤利安，你愿意试试吗？我和{NICKNAME}会一直陪着你，寸步不离。你带我们去裂界通道看看，或许，我们能破除你的梦魇？

Julian, do you want to give it a go? {NICKNAME} and I will be by your side the whole time. We won't leave you no matter what. Take us to that passage with the Fragmentum and maybe we can rid you of this nightmare?
我…我好怕…不过…你们陪着我的话……
I... I'm so scared... But... if you two are with me...
好、好吧，我试试——来，这边走，我记得是在那条路……
O—Okay. I'll try... Come with me. I think it was down that path...
就是这里…我记得很清楚，就在这个路口，他们就突然冒出来了！
It was right here... I remember it! They suddenly popped out at this intersection!
Don't worry. We're here with you.
说话间，空气突然变得凝重，你感觉到气温陡然降低。
As the words leave your lips, the air suddenly grows heavy and you feel the temperature drop around you.
你们是什么人？这里是军事禁区，无关人等不能随便闯入！
Who are you? This is a military restricted zone. Unauthorized personnels can't enter here!
这是我从没见过的作战方式，不，不对…你们不是我们的敌人。你们不是……
I have never seen this fighting style before... No, this is not right... You are not our enemies. You are...
我们是贝洛伯格的子民，大守护者派我们来找你——
We are Belobog citizens. The Supreme Guardian sent us to find you —
你看，这是磐岩镇镇守铁卫的徽章，我是镇上的医师。
Look, this is the badge from the Silvermane Guards' Boulder Town garrison. I am the town's doctor.
太好了，我们有救了，是大守护者，一定是大守护者让他们带补给来了！
Thank goodness, we're saved! Long live the Supreme Guardian! The Supreme Guardian must have sent them to bring us supplies!
…原来如此，我们是第七小队，在下是这里的指挥官，奉命驻守于此。这片区域非常危险，闲杂人等切勿靠近，以免受伤。

...So that's what's going on! We are squad seven. I am the commanding officer, and we have been ordered to guard this place. This area is extremely dangerous, and those with no business here must stay away for their own safety.
弹药…食物…还有医疗用品，我们已经弹尽粮绝了，什么都缺。
Ammunition... food... medical supplies... everything. We're out of everything.
How long have you been stationed here?
我们死守了七个月，弹药越来越少，库存也都清空了…饿着肚子…多少天了…可我们始终没有放弃阵地。
We have held out here for seven months. Our ammo supplies are dwindling, and the storehouse is empty. We've gone hungry for... I don't know how many days now... But we have never abandoned our post.
你们已经完成了自己的使命，一切都结束了……
You have already completed your mission. You can rest now...
娜塔莎向铁卫士兵们讲述了贝洛伯格后来所发生的事。
Natasha explains to the Silvermane Guards everything that has happened in Belobog since they took up their post.
…哈，这么看来，我们坚持到了最后一刻，也算是有点意义……
...Hah. Then it seems like our perseverance till the bitter end did achieve something...
愿贝洛伯格的火焰永不熄灭…愿我们的人民永远…幸福……
May the flame of Belobog never die... May our people... enjoy eternal happiness...
铁卫们化作星芒点点，渐渐消失……
The Silvermane Guards fade into sparkling dust and gradually disappear...
明白了吗？他们并不可怕，他们是我们的先辈，为了保护我们而战斗到最后一刻。
Do you understand now? They're not scary. They're our ancestors who fought until their last breath to protect us.
运送物资，帮助他人，让大家能够继续活下去…你现在做的事，某种意义上也是在继承他们的意志，他们是不会伤害你的。
Transporting goods, helping others, making sure others stay alive... The work you are doing now is also an extension of these Guards' will. They would never harm you.
嗯…我明白了。现在我一点都不害怕了，可是…可是他们还会再出现吗？
Okay... I understand now. I'm not scared anymore. But... Will they ever appear again?
I... I'm not sure about that.
啊？！好可惜，虎克分了我半包糖，我一直舍不得吃，我还想拿给他们吃……
Really!? That's such a shame... Hook gave me half a bag of candy. I've been saving it all this time, and now I want to share it with these soldiers...
回去后我要向大守护者申请一下，看看能不能查出他们的名单，然后在这里立一块碑，也算是给这些英勇的战士一个纪念。
I will make an application to the Supreme Guardian when we go back and see if we can find out their names. I'd like to set up a monument here as a memorial to these brave soldiers.
这样你以后再来，见到纪念碑，就等于见到这些叔叔了。只要你没有忘记他们，他们就永远不会消失。
That way, any time you come here and see the monument, it'd be like seeing these soldiers again. As long as they exist in your memory, they will never die.
我、我要跟鼹鼠党的大家说，让大家都来这里跟叔叔们打招呼！
I—I want to tell this story to everyone in The Moles! I want them all to come here and say hello to these nice guards!
{NICKNAME}，娜塔莎姐姐，谢谢你们。如果不是你们，我这辈子可能都不会知道他们的故事…呜呜……
{NICKNAME}, Natasha, thank you. If it weren't for you, I might have never figured out their story... *sobbing*...
小尤利安长大啦，可别再哭鼻子了。
You're all grown up now, Julian. No more crying like that, okay?
呜、呜呜，我、我会的！我是个成熟的男子汉了！
Waaa! Waaa! O—Okay! I'm a big, strong man now!
我好像明白了什么，但暂时未检测到需要升级的程序。
I feel like I have learned something, but I cannot detect any systems that require upgrading.
没想到你也在慢慢成长。
I never realized that you are also capable of further growth.
感情这种事你不懂也正常。
It's quite normal for you to not understand emotions.
是吗？还好吧，我是机器人，不是很懂你们人类。
Is that so? I suppose. I am a robot. I do not fully understand human emotions.
不过我发现一个有趣的现象，大家好像都有「名字」，很有趣，这似乎是某种概念的具象化，这个概念比单纯的利益交换要复杂。

But I have discovered an interesting phenomenon. It seems that everyone has "names." This seems to be the manifestation of some kind of concept that is more complex than a simple exchange of benefits.
我在想…我是否可以为自己取一个姓名，比如…「呆呆」，或者「笨笨」？以智慧生命的平均智商来看，这两个名字和我比较相符。

I have been thinking... Perhaps I could give myself a name? Something like... "Dumb-Dumb" or "Duh-Duh?" Based on the average intelligence quota of sentient creatures, these two names seem somewhat appropriate.
They're horrible names! Don't put yourself down like that.
「呆呆」和「笨笨」在空间站终端内已有重名，无法注册。你说得对，我的确不能取这个名字。
There are already entries for "Dumb-Dumb" and "Duh-Duh" in the space station terminal records. Registration could not be completed. You are right, I cannot use these names.
让我们专注接下来的行程——下一站是仙舟罗浮的金人巷。
Let us focus on the next segment of our journey — your next stop is Aurum Alley on the Xianzhou Luofu.
根据姬子小姐上传的数据，星穹列车一行在罗浮的金人巷驻足过，振兴了当地的居民产业。
According to the data provided by Miss Himeko, the Astral Express has stopped in the Luofu's Aurum Alley previously, and served to revitalize the local industries.
对，我亲自赶走了公司狗。
That's right. I chased out the IPC dogs myself.
严格来说，我也是星际和平公司研发的产品，虽然我的外形不像狗，但请你不要赶走我。
Strictly speaking, I am a product developed by the IPC. Though I do not resemble a dog on the exterior, I would ask you not to chase me away.
Then what are we waiting for? Let's get going!
别急，我的数据库显示还有第二个目标。
One moment. My database is showing that there is a second destination.
除了金人巷，我们还得去丹鼎司——当时无名客曾帮助过那里的持明族人跃渊，但我目前联系不到她。
We must visit the Alchemy Commission as well as Aurum Alley. The Nameless had assisted Yueyuan of the Vidyadhara in the past, though I am currently unable to contact her.
所以，我们接下来的行程是——去金人巷找杜氏茶庄的杜老板，
So, our next journey will be — To Du's Teahouse in Aurum Alley to meet with Boss Du.
至于丹鼎司那边，我已经给跃渊留了言，请等待她的回复。
As for the Alchemy Commission, I have left a word with Yueyuan. Please wait for her to reply.
哎，这不是…这身影好眼熟啊，喂，这位朋友——
Oh, if I'm not mistaken... I know that face! Hello, my friend—
Oh, if it isn't Boss Du!
哎呀 ，这不是我的金牌试茶员么？今天的客人实在太多，我都没注意到你来了。
Ah, if it isn't my best tea taster! We've got so many customers today that I didn't notice you were here.
我和你什么时候成朋友了？
When did I become your friend?
哎呀，你真是贵人多忘事啊，明明当初帮了我那么大忙。
My, my. I know those who do great things often forget their small deeds, but you really helped me out back in the day.
来来来，我给你腾了个座位，快坐下，我先去给你沏壶好茶。
Come, come! I've prepared a seat for you. Sit down and I'll prepare you a fine brew.
Woah, your business is seriously booming!
哈哈，这还多亏了你之前经常帮我试茶，我才受到启发，想出用试茶的法子来吸引客人。
Hahaha! It's thanks to you helping me sample all those teas! That was what inspired me to use tea tasting as a way to attract customers.
You want me to sample your tea again?
不是不是，这次完全是为了表达我的谢意。多亏了你之前经常帮我试茶，我才受到启发，想出用试茶的法子来吸引客人。
No, no. I'm doing this purely to express my gratitude. You helping me sample all those teas inspired me to use tea tasting as a way to attract customers.
说实话，你是我见过的最懂品茶的人，我根据你的反馈改良出好几个爆款。
Honestly, I have never met someone who understands the art of tea tasting like you do. I've made quite a few extremely popular products based on your feedback.
但每次看你喝完新茶都有一些…奇怪的反应，我也就不好意思再找你了。
But seeing that you always ended up with some... interesting reactions every time you drank a new product, I felt bad asking you to come and help me again.
新品研发计划就这样中断了一阵子，直到有一天我突发奇想，其他人也许没你懂茶，但只要参与试茶的人够多，百十张嘴总能挑出一碗好茶。

So my product research and development plans stopped for a while. That was when I had a moment of inspiration: Though others may not understand tea like you do, as long as I have enough people sampling my teas, I will eventually be able to select a perfect brew based on their feedback.
I know. It's called large-scale data collection.
看，什么叫行家啊，我一说你就懂了。
See? That's expertise for you! You understand what I'm talking about immediately.
你就不怕群体食物中毒？
Are you not scared of mass food poisoning?
放心，我的配方和材料都是经过严选的，干净又卫生。
Fear not. My recipes and ingredients are all carefully selected with cleanliness in mind.
每个月初我都会上架五款新茶，客人们可以半价品尝，但事先不知道杯子里装的什么茶，全凭自己的喜好投票，得票最多的茶能正式出道…哦不，上架了。

Every month, I put five new teas on sale that customers can try for half price. They have no idea what is in the brew and get to vote according to their own preferences. The brews that get the most votes get to make a formal debut... I mean, formally go on sale.
你看这活动门槛低、还有惊喜感，参与率直接拉满，试茶的队伍都排到金人巷码头去了。

Anyone can take part in this event, and it brings a sense of surprise and suspense. Before I knew it, we were overwhelmed with participants, and the queue to try my tea stretched all the way down to the Aurum Alley docks.
You've turned drinking tea into a kind of mystery box?
你这说法有点意思，这活动以后就叫喝盲茶了。
I like that expression. I'm going to call this event "mystery tea" from now on.
下个版本的活动你来设计。
You should design the event for the next update.
我就是个开茶庄的，还是老老实实泡茶吧。
I'm just a teahouse owner. I'll just stick to brewing tea.
光顾着和你聊天了，快尝尝这碗茶，这可是所有新茶里人气最高的，名叫「海的味道」。
That's enough chit-chat. Try this tea! It is the highest-rated of all my new brews. Its name is: "Taste of the Sea."
杜老板将调配好的「海的味道」倒入茶碗中。
Boss Du pours the "Taste of the Sea" he has brewed into your teacup.
I'll just drink it and get it over with.
你端起茶杯，揭开盖子。杯中的液体无色无味，与其说是茶，倒不如说更像白开水。
You lift your teacup and open the lid. The liquid in the cup is colorless and odorless. It's more like plain boiled water than tea.
不！这不是白开水。当你仔细凝视它的时候，仿佛在凝视一片深不见底的海，那是一种亿万年时光才能积累出的深邃和厚重。

No! This is not simply boiled water. As you stare at it closely, it begins to resemble a bottomless ocean. An ocean with the kind of depth and vastness that could only have accumulated over hundreds of millions of years.
你用颤抖的嘴唇抿住茶碗口沿，任凭液体奔腾入胃，如同远古的海浪冲击着礁石，带给你一点小小的味觉震撼。
You press the teacup to your trembling lips and allow the water to rush into your stomach. The feeling of ancient ocean waves crashing against rocks sends a slight shock over your taste buds.
仅用好喝已不足以形容这碗茶，如果有「茶道」命途，你相信杜老板已经接近这条命途的终点，除了稍微有一丢丢咸……

"Delicious" is not enough to describe this tea. If there were a Path of "the way of tea," you are certain that Boss Du would be approaching its absolute pinnacle. If only the salty flavor could be slightly toned down...
What do you think? Isn't it special?
确实特别，你是怎么做到的？
It is definitely special. How did you make this?
好喝，但你是不是放了盐？
It's delicious. But did you put salt in it?
嘿嘿，这个配方可是本店绝对机密，你可千万别说出去。
Hehe, that recipe is a store secret. You mustn't tell anyone!
关键就在于泡茶用的水，寻常的井水河水都不行，必须用海水，而且还得是波月古海的海水。

The key is in the water used to brew the tea. Regular well or river water aren't good enough for this recipe. It has to be seawater. More specifically, it has to be seawater from the Lunarescent Depths.
为了保证茶的品质，我每天一大早就派机巧鸟从波月古海边偷偷汲水。最近那边似乎有所察觉了…这茶怕是有段时间喝不到喽。

In order to ensure the quality of the tea, I send cycranes to secretly collect water from the edges of the Lunarescent Depths first thing every morning. I think they're starting to catch on to me... I'm afraid this tea will be unavailable for a while.
波月古海。这四个字勾起了你的思绪——
The Lunarescent Depths. Those two words take you back...
你回忆起在波月古海边捡漂流瓶的那段阳光灿烂的日子。
You recall the halcyon days when you would collect Drift Bottles along the Lunarescent Depths' shores.
可惜，跃渊还没有回复你漂流瓶的后续，不知道她那边现况如何了。
Unfortunately, Yueyuan still hasn't replied with an update about the Drift Bottles. You cannot help but wonder how things are going over there.
(Ask the little robot about the situation)
小机器人向你解释了你的无名客伙伴们是如何在岸边捡漂流瓶的。
The little robot explains to you how your Nameless partners collected Drift Bottles on the shore.
很遗憾的是，地衡司尚未通过你的进入申请，也不知道此事的后续如何。
Unfortunately, the Realm-Keeping Commission still hasn't approved your application for entry. You have no idea what happened afterwards.
杜老板既是开茶庄的本地人，或许他会知道些什么。
Maybe Boss Du will know something about this as a local teahouse owner?
有没有在海边捡到过怪东西？
Have you ever picked up something strange while you were down at the shore?
怪东西？我想想…海带贝壳之类的倒是经常捡到。哦，我还捡到过一个漂流瓶。
Something strange? Let me think... I often pick up kelp, seashells, and things that get washed up by the water. Oh, I picked up a drift bottle once, as well.
那你肯定捡到过漂流瓶吧！
Then you must have picked up a Drift Bottle right?
你怎么知道的？我还真捡到过这么一个玩意。
How did you know that? I actually did find something like that...
当时我正准备打开看看，结果被一个巡逻的持明拦住，非说我是什么「放生帮」，我解释了半天她才放我走。
I was going to open it and see what was inside, but a patrolling Vidyadhara stopped me and kept calling me an "Unshackled" or something... I was explaining myself for hours before she let me go.
但是漂流瓶被她拿去了。唉…好想知道里面写了什么。
But she ended up taking the Drift Bottle with her. Ah... I'd love to know what was written inside.
Ah, it's all just a bunch of nonsense stories.
Huh? How do you know that?
Maybe it was someone asking to be rescued.
如果是真的，那帝弓在上！保佑遇险者获救。
If that's true, then by the Arbiter! I pray that they will be rescued!
呀，跟您聊了这么久，都忘记招待其他客人了。你先自己品品茶，有什么需要尽管叫我。
Oh dear, I've been talking to you for so long that I've completely forgotten to serve my other customers! Please take your time tasting the teas. If you need anything, just call me.
我们和跃渊重新取得了联系，她给你发了短信，快看看吧。
I have managed to re-establish contact with Yueyuan. She has sent you a message. Check it quickly!
你看看信里写的东西，不知道这个写信人是脑洞太大还是日子太闲。
Here's what is written in the letter if you'd like to read it. I don't know if the writer's imagination has run away with them, or if they just have too much time on their hands.
看起来上一篇漂流记的故事已经结束连载，作者又开了一个新坑。
It looks like the previous story of being lost at sea has come to an end. It seems the author has taken a new artistic direction.
应该不会再有漂流瓶了。
I imagine that's the end of the Drift Bottles.
但愿如此吧，我受够折腾了。
I hope so. I've had enough of these twists and turns.
恒星风气球…这人脑子里到底都有多少不切实际的想法？
A stellar winds balloon... Just how many ludicrous ideas can one person have in their head?
这回他糟蹋大海还不够，还想把垃圾倒进银河？
It wasn't enough for him to pollute the oceans, now he's throwing his trash into the Cosmos?
无论怎么说，这场闹剧终于告一段落，前段日子真是辛苦你了。
Whatever the case, it looks like this whole thing has finally come to an end. Thank you for your hard work back then.
You won't need me to go on patrols anymore?
Huh? That's it? Just "Thank you for your hard work"?
以后就不用麻烦你了，我引进了一批机巧鸟，日常巡逻之类的任务都会交给它们去做。
I don't need to trouble you with all this anymore. I have bought a batch of cycranes that will do daily patrols and other missions like this.
当然啦，鉴于你为波月古海环境保护工作做出过卓越贡献，我为你向地衡司申请了一份特别奖励，应该很快就能通过审批。

Naturally, in recognition of your outstanding contributions to the environmental protection of the Lunarescent Depths, I have applied for you to receive a special reward from the Realm-Keeping Commission. The application should be approved soon.
待办事项已清空，可以准备返航。
All to-do items have been completed. You can prepare for your return when you are ready.
嘟嘟嘟噜——该回去充电咯。
Beep beep beep — it is time to return and charge my batteries.
噢？你要回去啦？那好吧，以后想来海边玩的话我随时欢迎。
Oh? You're leaving? Alright, if you wish to come and visit me at the seaside, you are welcome any time.
回来啦？看你的表情，想来收获不少吧？
You're back? That face of yours tells me that it was a worthwhile trip.
是的。此次旅程共记录了<unbreak>127</unbreak>条人类行为模式，<unbreak>2891</unbreak>条对话数据，以及<unbreak>46</unbreak>条情感波动记录。这些数据让我对{NICKNAME}与星穹列车有了更深的理解。

It was. During this trip, I recorded <unbreak>127</unbreak> human behaviors, <unbreak>2,891</unbreak> items of conversational data, and <unbreak>46</unbreak> instances of emotional fluctuation. This data has allowed me to gain a greater understanding of {NICKNAME} and the Astral Express.
我是你的随身助手，为你解决日常事务是我的职责。
I am your assistant. It is my duty to help you complete your daily affairs.
这家伙学得很快，挺有灵性。
This thing is pretty smart. It learns quick!
你说得我都有点不好意思了，我感觉我的芯片温度有点高。
Stop, you are embarrassing me. I feel like my processing chip is overheating.
说说看，这一路走下来，你有什么感受？
Well? What did you learn on this little adventure?
No good deed is too trivial.
I have learned what it means to "Trailblaze."
我刚开始做无名客的时候，也总想着要做些惊天动地的大事。拯救世界，改变命运…年轻人嘛，总是充满干劲。
When I first started as a Nameless, I always wanted to do great things, too. I wanted to save the world and change lives... You know what it's like as a youngster full of energy.
但慢慢地，我发现银河实在太大了。即便是最惊心动魄的壮举，在无垠的星海面前，也不过是沧海一粟。
But, over time, I discovered that the Cosmos really is just too big. Even the most earth-shattering events are no more than a drop in the ocean when it comes to the vast starry seas.
但与此同时，我们却在不断成长。无名客的一举一动，或许都能在普通人的生活里泛起不小的涟漪。
But we are always growing. Every action that a Nameless takes is capable of creating huge waves in the lives of normal people.
在旅途中播撒一些微小的光亮，给途经之处的人们一些微不足道的帮助，得到前进的勇气和希望的是他们吗？我觉得，受益的…似乎是我们无名客。

When we shine a little light along the way and help people as we travel, do you think it is they who receive more courage and hope? No. I think the ones that truly benefit... Are actually the Nameless.
正在存档…希望姬子小姐不要收取我录制你语句的版权费。
Saving... I hope that you will not charge me royalties for quoting you, Miss Himeko.
但这些小事又有谁记得呢？
But who will remember the small things that we do?
作为无名客，其实你已经做得很好了，永远不要低估自己的力量——来，给你看一样东西。
You are already doing an amazing job as a Nameless. Never underestimate your strength. Here, let me show you something.
姬子点开了小机器人的程序，同步了最新的数据。
Himeko accesses the little robot's programs and synchronizes it to the latest data.
我和工程师给这孩子做了些升级。现在它不仅能帮你处理更多事务，还学会了主动帮助他人。
The engineers and I gave this little one a few upgrades. Not only can it help you with more things now, but it has also learned to actively help others.
确认。已掌握{NICKNAME}的行为模式，今后将自主执行力所能及的善意行为。
Affirmative. I have studied and ascertained {NICKNAME}'s behavioral patterns and will independently carry out acts of kindness within my ability in the future.
它自己提出想升级新的通讯模块，这样就能方便你随时和这一路上认识的朋友们联系。
It suggested that it wanted to update its communication system to the latest model to make it easier for you to contact the friends you have met along your journey whenever you want.
通讯调试完成，已更新通讯人列表。
Communication system adjustment complete. Contacts catalog updated.
在更新完通讯模块之后，我们就立刻收到了这封感谢信。是仙舟地衡司的官方信函，旨在感谢你对波月古海环境保护工程的关心与认可。

When we updated the communication system, we immediately received this thank you letter. It is a formal letter from the Xianzhou's Realm-Keeping Commission, thanking you and recognizing your contribution toward the Lunarescent Depths environmental protection project.
除此以外，他们还寄了一大包特产过来。喏，这些全是给你的，小三月听说了你这一路奔波的事，坚持要把特产全都留给你。
They also sent over a huge pack of souvenirs. Here, they're all yours. When March heard about all your adventures, she was determined to save them all for you when you got back.
好啦，在外奔波这么久，接下来就好好休息吧。这个小家伙，依我看…可以放在派对车厢里，有什么事可以直接吩咐它去做。

Alright, you've spent enough time rushing around helping people. It's time to get some good rest. As for this little guy... Why don't you keep them in Party Car? If you have any issues, you can just ask them to take care of it for you.
有空的话可以跟它多交流交流，在升级了系统之后，它身上可是有不少惊喜功能等着你去探索呢。
Try talking with it whenever you get time. After the system upgrades, it now has lots of surprising functions waiting for you to discover.
有空的话可以跟它多交流交流，在升级了系统之后，它身上可是有不少惊喜功能等着你去探索呢。
Try talking with it whenever you get time. After the system upgrades, it now has lots of surprising functions waiting for you to discover.
Brrr. It really is one big snowball.
It really is one big snowball.
因为我们有来自「开拓」命途的微弱力量，能够适应严苛的环境。
Well the Trailblaze Path grants us faint power. It allows us to better adapt to harsh environments.
哎，这白茫茫的一片，咱们该往哪走？
*sigh* Snow as far as the eye can see. Which direction should we take?
根据坐标定位，目标就在前方不远处。
Based on the coordinates, the target should be up ahead.
那还等什么，这就出发吧～
Then what are we waiting for? Let's go.
何不直接降落在目的地？
Why didn't we land at the destination?
…把泰科铵大球馆砸出个洞的事，你自己说还是我来？
...Do you want to mention the time we smashed a hole through Taikiyan Stadium, or shall I?
呃，这事就别提了吧，反正着陆在没什么生物的地方就对了。
*sigh* Please stop bringing that up. Let's just say that landings and crowds don't mix.
除非你想体验义务劳动半个月的开拓之道。
Unless you enjoy trailblazing through two weeks of community service.
I didn't know we'd be hiking...
就是啊，连台备用的雪地车都没有——咱们的列车真抠门呀。
Me neither, if only we had a snowmobile... We never get to bring anything cool from the Express.
上一台雪地车被你开成什么样了，还记得吗？
Do you remember what you did to our last snowmobile?
记住，迈出的每一步都务必谨慎，我们对于这个世界还所知甚少。
Remember, we should stay vigilant. We know very little about this world.
放心啦，有咱们三个在，什么事解决不了？
Calm down. Between the three of us, nothing will stand in our way.
{NICKNAME}身体里有颗星核，我有独一无二的{RUBY_B#神秘的晶体}六相冰{RUBY_E#}，丹恒有…呃，不知道是啥的神秘过去。

I mean c'mon, {NICKNAME}, you've got a Stellaron in your body, I have my special {RUBY_B#Mysterious Ice Crystal}Six-Phased Ice{RUBY_E#} powers, and Dan Heng... Uhh, he's got that mysterious past thing going for him...
谁要是敢找我们的麻烦，算他倒霉！
So, if people start creating trouble for us, they're gonna regret it!
Let's just make sure that we're not the ones creating trouble...
这个嘛，嘻嘻，咱可不敢保证～
Well, let's not get ahead of ourselves, hehe...
走吧，勇敢地探索未知——这就是「开拓」的精神！
Let's go. Braving the unknown... that's the real spirit of trailblazing!
...Hey, get outta there or you'll shiver to death.
你忍着不出声也没用啊……
对付掩耳盗铃的人，最好的办法——
If someone's got their head stuck in the sand, or the snow in this case...
我说哥们儿，不至于吧？钻雪里没啥大过错，不用拿枪尖子捅我吧？
My fine fellow, was that really necessary? Is crawling around in the snow a crime these days? I mean, c'mon, surely it doesn't warrant a spearing?
呃，但是，这怪不得各位英雄！哈哈，是我出现得太突兀了，挨这一戳值得，应当，必须！要不怎么能认识各位好朋友呢？哈哈……
...But then again how can I blame you? I mean, I caught you off guard. It had to happen — you could even say I deserved it, huh? Besides, I've made a gallant group of new friends as a result, hehe...
…请问杰帕德长官来了嘛？我跟他挺熟的……
...Is Captain Gepard around? H—He's an old buddy of mine...
噢，你们不是银鬃铁卫？早说呀，自家人打自家人，这不是多此一举嘛！
Wait, you're not Silvermane Guards? Well, why didn't you say so? Turns out we're on the same side after all!
Pleasure to meet you, the name's Sampo Koski.
行，行，我记住了。说实话，没想到在这冰天雪地里能遇见同行。最近买卖不好干，不过你们放心，我桑博从不吃独食，外边这宝藏大得很，有财大家一起赚嘛，哈哈哈。

Excellent, I'll remember the name. I never thought I'd run into friends from the same line of work out here in this frozen wasteland. *sigh* Business is bad these days, but fear not, Sampo Koski isn't interested in hoarding. There's more than enough treasure to go around, so let's get rich together! Hahaha.
要不一起搭个伙呗？我有可靠消息：银鬃铁卫的主力都被调去前线了，这可是千载难逢的好机会……
Say, why don't we join forces? I have reliable intel the main strength of the Silvermane Guards is being deployed to the front line. This is a golden opportunity...
What business are you talking about?
…这就有点过了各位，不信任我没关系，但也不用装傻到这个地步嘛。
...Come now, friends. I can understand the mistrust, but there's no need for the charade.
得，规矩我懂，大家都是干这行的，有点戒心，能理解！怪我桑博天性热情，太真诚……
Then again, I know the rules, vigilance is the name of the game in our profession. It's my fault for letting my enthusiasm and sincerity get the better of me...
相逢一场总归是缘分，各位有什么想了解的尽管问我，知无不言言无不尽！不过长话短说，银鬃铁卫随时可能出现……

Anyway, a meeting like this has to have been written in the stars. Ask me anything you like — I won't skimp on the details. Still, make it snappy, you're never more than ten feet from a Silvermane Guard...
要这么文绉绉吗，不就是哪有活人呗？你往外走是肯定没戏了，整个世界上唯一还有人类定居的地方，就只有咱们的好贝洛伯格啰。
Settlement? What a literary turn of phrase. Why, there's only one place in this world where the living still reside — our beloved Belobog! The further away you get, the dicier things become.
「存护之城」，「永屹之城」，「人类抵御寒潮的唯一壁垒」…听上去唬人，却句句属实。人类只有在这个铁围墙里才能活命。

The City of Preservation, the Towering Citadel, humanity's last bastion against the Eternal Freeze... It may sound a bit over the top, but those names are grounded in truth. The only place humans can eke out an existence is behind those impregnable walls.
Why were you hiding in the snow?
我？还不是被你们吓到了…我本来在这儿东找找西翻翻，想搞点古代的遗物回去小赚一笔…结果你们发出那么大动静，我以为银鬃铁卫来了。
Me? You guys scared me to death... There I was looking for relics to sell, when all of a sudden you came stomping over. I thought the Silvermane Guards were paying me a visit.
算我拜托各位了，下次轻点，真的。铁卫碰见你们可不会躲雪里，你们呢？就得蹲牢里啦……
Seriously though, try treading a little lighter next time, hmm? If you run into the Guards, they won't hide in a snowdrift... and you'll be in a cell before you know it.
我真的不知道银鬃铁卫是什么…
I have no idea who these Silvermane Guards even are...
…你们是真不知道啊？银鬃铁卫就是贝洛伯格的军队，执法者，警察…那帮家伙完全不懂变通，就喜欢和干咱们这行的人打交道。

You...You really don't know? The Silvermane Guards are Belobog's soldiers, enforcers, and police. Let's just say they're not the most flexible of people... and they like paying visits to folks in our line of work.
唉，诸位真的是新手啊…嫩成这样，我都有点看不下去了。这样吧，怎么说我也算是你们前辈，就免费给点指导好了。

Seems like you guys really are new to the business. *sigh* To be young and naive again... How about this. As a senior in the field, which I'm sure you don't mind me saying, I'll give you some free guidance.
干这行的有很多规矩，得好好教教你们：怎么潜行，怎么找货，怎么估价，怎么躲铁卫，那都是技术活……

There are ways of doing things in this profession, and you better get familiar with them. Moving in the shadows, finding the goods, pricing your stock, hiding from the Guards... there's an art to all of it.
那倒不必了，你带我们进城吧？我们对路也不大熟。
No need, why don't you just take us to the city? We don't really know the way.
进城？这就回去了？今天还没开张呢妹妹，带个路是小意思，但——
The city? Already? I haven't even started trading yet. Showing you the way is easy enough, missy, but it would cost—
——但我就是乐于助人。哈哈，心地善良就是我桑博的代名词！跟我来，朋友，轻点声，可别被铁卫发现了。
...B—But it would be my pleasure! "Kindness" is Sampo Koski's middle name. Follow me, friends, and keep quiet. We don't want to be spotted by the Guards.
...And the prime suspect? The one with the blue hair?
抱歉，长官！跟丢了，我们找不到他的足迹……
Apologies, Captain! W—We lost him during the pursuit. We can't find his footprints...
不要紧，他的同伙在我们手里，主犯不会离得太远，一定会有所行动。
*sigh* No matter, we have his accomplices. He'll be close by, plotting his next move.
Yeah, we'd never team up with someone like him!
那怕是要等上一辈子了。
You might be waiting longer than you think...
我可不是狡辩，我们跟那个坏蛋真不是一伙的。你看他丢下我们时哪有半点犹豫啊。
I'm not trying to talk our way out of this, but... we're not friends with that scoundrel. Did you see how fast he ditched us?
好心把他从雪里救出来，没想到他是利用我们来对付你。你可千万别受挑拨——
We rescued him from the snow out of the kindness of our hearts. We had no idea he might be using us to get past you! Are you really dumb enough to fall for his...
我是戍卫官，并非仲裁团。作为贝洛伯格的市民，你拥有辩护的权利，但那应该在筑城者的注视下进行，不是现在。
I'm a captain, not an adjudication panel. As a Belobog citizen, you have the right to defend yourself, but that can only take place under the scrutiny of the Architects, not now.
可我们不是贝洛伯格的市民呀！
我们穿的就和你们不一样。
Take a look at our clothes.
Silence! What kind of nonsense are you—
不，也不能这么草率地下判断。你看他们的穿着，那确实不是贝洛伯格的风格。
As you were. We must not be tempted into careless judgment. Look at their attire. Indeed, it is not in the Belobog style.
Exactly! A—And we even have photos!
这些装备也不像你们的东西吧。
Does our equipment bear any resemblance to yours?
不，也不能这么草率地下判断。你看他们身上佩戴的那些古代遗物…我们从没发掘出类似的东西，博物馆里也没有相似的物件。
As you were. We must not be tempted into careless judgment. Look at their relics. We've never excavated anything like them before, and I haven't seen anything similar in our museums.
啊，{NICKNAME}你好聪明，这个点子棒耶！
Ah! {NICKNAME}, you're a genius! Great idea!
你们还没见过自己的星球长什么样子吧？给你们看我拍的雅利洛-Ⅵ……
You've probably never seen what your planet looks like, right? I took this one. Behold, Jarilo-VI...
三月七向杰帕德展示了这颗冰雪星球的照片……
March 7th shows Gepard a picture of the ice-covered planet...
你说这个白球是…这里？是我们住的地方？这也太……
...You mean to say that this... white ball... That's here? That's our home? How can that...
据说很久以前，常有{RUBY_B#星际旅行者}天外异客{RUBY_E#}来到这里……但「寒潮」发生以后，就再没有人穿过雪幕，来到贝洛伯格……
