It is said that a long time ago, {RUBY_B#Interstellar Travelers}strange visitors from beyond the sky{RUBY_E#} would visit us here... but that after the Eternal Freeze, the blizzards made passage impossible... and Belobog would cease to witness such arrivals.
这已经不是我们能裁定的事了，如果他们所言属实，那就只有「大守护者」才能决定该怎么做。
This decision is beyond us. If what they say is true, then only the supreme guardian may decide their fate.
我们该做的，是将他们带到大守护者的面前。
Our job is to present them before her. Nothing more.
外来者们，跟我来吧。贝洛伯格就在这片雪幕背后。
Outsiders, follow me. Belobog lies beyond this blizzard.
欢迎来到「存护之城」——贝洛伯格。
Welcome to Belobog — the City of Preservation.
这里还没有被侵蚀，但裂界滋生的怪物已经跑出来了。
This place still hasn't been corroded, yet Fragmentum monsters have already made it here.
这世界里「星核」的影响恐怕非同寻常。
I fear the Stellaron may be exerting a significant influence on this world.
建筑已经被积雪掩埋了。
These buildings have been buried in the snowfall.
呜哇，这、这是房顶？这得要下多久的雪，才能积到这个厚度啊？
Huh!? So these are rooftops? How long would snow have to fall to get this thick?
This is Voidranger armor. It's ancient.
虚卒？这个星球被反物质军团入侵过吗？
Voidranger? Was this planet invaded by the Antimatter Legion?
哎，你们看见了吗？好像有什么东西在动……
*gasp* Did you see that? I think something's moving...
…只是个寻常的雪堆，确定不是你的幻觉吗？
Mm... It's just an ordinary snowdrift. Are you sure you're not seeing things?
绝对不是，咱视力可好了！走，咱们靠近点儿看看。
Of course not, my eyesight's perfect! Come on, let's take a closer look.
所以，你为什么要躲着「银鬃铁卫」呀？
So why were you hiding from the Silvermane Guards?
呃，不过就是私藏了几件古代遗物而已，没什么大不了的。要怪就怪那帮执行公务的，脑子只有一根筋。
Uhh, I was just storing a few relics away from prying eyes, nothing serious. If it weren't for the uncompromising nature of our civil service, there'd be no need for secrecy.
说来，各位到底是什么来历啊？我可不是打听，就是关心关心朋友，不说也不要紧……
So whereabouts are you guys from, anyway? I don't mean to pry or anything, I just care about my friends! No pressure...
——第七条法则就是：不能留下脚印。我有条独门绝技，可以说踏雪无痕，专门用来摆脱追兵……
...Rule number seven: Never leave a footprint. I have my own special technique called "invisible snow-walking." Helps me throw off pursuers in no...time...
呃，还记得我说的银鬃铁卫吗？就是他们了……
Uh, you remember the Silvermane Guards I mentioned? That's them...
帮个忙，哥们！我不想被抓啊！
Help me, old friends! I don't wanna be caught!
发现嫌疑人和他的同伙，立即逮捕！
It's the suspect and his accomplices! Arrest them!
Hey! Where do you think you're—
我，杰帕德•朗道，银鬃铁卫戍卫官，命令尔等放弃无谓的抵抗。
I, Gepard Landau, captain of the Silvermane Guards, order you to relinquish your futile resistance.
莫名其妙被那个桑博坑了一下，感觉很火大……
Grr, that Sampo cheated us all. Wait till I get my hands on him...
被当成罪犯，感觉更火大了！
Ugh, so I'm a criminal, huh? Forget Sampo, wait until I get my hands on YOU!
{NICKNAME}, March, this Gepard... he's no pushover.
（不跟紧这家伙的话，恐怕会迷失在雪雾里吧……）
(If we don't keep up with this guy, we might get lost in the blizzard...)
（奇怪的物体…和这片雪原格格不入。）
(What a strange object... It seems really out of place in the Snow Plains.)
（也许瓦尔特先生知道这是什么？发消息问问他吧。）
(Maybe Mr. Yang will know what this is. Let's send a message to ask him.)
说不动他呀…那就只有咱们两个人去咯？
He won't budge, huh? Looks like it's just the two of us then.
真可惜！好不容易能来一次不带包袱的旅行……
Pity, he's gonna miss out! We never get the chance to go on a stress-free adventure.
He's been through a lot lately.
我当然理解他啦…这也不妨碍我觉得可惜嘛。
I know... But it's still a shame, don't you think?
Stress-free for us, or stress-free for the planet?
雅利洛-Ⅵ可是连星核都挺过去了，这回还能出什么大事？你就别操不必要的心啦。
Don't get yourself all worked up. If Jarilo-VI is strong enough to withstand a Stellaron, it'll be just fine.
唔，要是姬子能跟咱们一块去就好了……
If only Himeko could come with us...
Should we ask Mr. Yang to come with us?
杨叔？杨叔跟咱们在仙舟大闹了一番，最近说话还连咳带喘的，你没注意到吗？
Mm, maybe not. He's still wheezing from the trouble we got into on the Xianzhou. You didn't notice?
而且他都这把年纪了，肯定不爱凑这个热闹啦……
At his age, he might not appreciate the extra... excitement.
帕姆不能随便离开列车，它早就跟每个乘客都说过了吧？
Pom-Pom can't just leave the Express whenever they feel like it. You didn't know?
好啊，又抓住一个没听讲的！
Seems like someone wasn't paying attention!
{NICKNAME}，要不我们去问问姬子吧？没准她愿意跟咱们一起去呢！
{NICKNAME}, why don't we go ask Himeko to tag along? She might be up for an adventure!
话说回来，你上车这么久了，还一次都没跟姬子搭档旅行过吧？这可不行——走，咱们去找她聊聊！
You've been on the Express for a while now, but you've never gone on a trip with Himeko before, right? Well, now's your chance!
丹恒这家伙，好歹也搭理布洛妮娅一下嘛……
That Dan Heng — he can't just ignore Bronya...
走吧，我们去他房间看看。
Let's go to his room and talk to him.
{NICKNAME}，你听说了吧？咱们的下一站是「匹诺康尼」，听说那是个像梦一样漂亮的世界…真期待呀。
Hey, {NICKNAME}, did you hear about our next stop? It's a world called "Penacony" — I hear it's a beautiful, dreamy place... I'm so excited...
不过帕姆说离邀请函上的赴会时间还差挺久的，该做点什么消磨时间呢……
...but Pom-Pom said the banquet we were invited to is still a little ways off. Hmm... what can I do to pass the time...?
...Huh? Is that my phone? Must be the group chat.
丹恒！布洛妮娅刚才给我们发消息啦，你看到了没？
Dan Heng! Bronya just sent all of us a message. Did you see it yet?
那你怎么不回话？布洛妮娅可是咱的老朋友欸！
Then why didn't you reply? Bronya's a good friend of ours!
…抱歉，我只是没有闲谈的兴致。「罗浮」之后，我一直在反省和思考…这过程十分伤神。
...I'm sorry, I'm just not in the mood for idle chat. There's been a lot weighing on my mind since the Luofu... it was tough on the spirit.
不好意思，我刚才说话太冲了！的确，在仙舟经历了那么多以后，你肯定需要些时间好好调整……
I'm the one who should be sorry — I was being too pushy! You're right, you went through a lot on the Xianzhou — take all the time you need...
丹恒就留在列车休整吧。
Dan Heng, stay on the Express and get some rest.
不如一起下去换个心情？
Why not come with us for a change of scenery?
还是不了，我就留在列车上吧。
No, thanks — I'll be staying on the Express.
贝洛伯格能够迎来节庆可谓一大喜事，祝你们不虚此行。记得替我向各位老友问好。
It's great that Belobog is able to host a celebration. I hope your trip goes well — say hi to our friends for me.
好！那你也要好好休息，可不要再错过下次「开拓」啦！
Okay! Rest up — you're not allowed to miss the next Trailblaze expedition!
Mm, I'll be there next time.
收集了更多居民的意见后，最后的结果依旧是平票…
After collecting more citizen opinions, the final result remains a tie...
大矿区，开拓者和希儿这边……
Meanwhile, in the Great Mine with Seele and the Trailblazer...
与此同时，托帕和史瓦罗一边…
怎么样，{NICKNAME}？我的新礼服，感觉如何？
So? What do you think about my new dress, {NICKNAME}? Pretty neat, right?
一直都在我的衣柜里啦，只是之前没机会穿出来。
It's actually not new, I just never had the right occasion to try it on.
哼哼…这件一直躺在我的衣柜里，这下总算有机会穿出来了！
It's been sitting in my wardrobe collecting dust for far too long. But now I've finally got the chance to wear it!
好不容易碰上一次这种场合，不好好打扮一番怎么行？倒是你，不会真的只有这一套衣服吧……
This kind of event doesn't come around every day — why shouldn't I dress for the occasion? ...You're not really gonna wear that same old outfit... are you?
算了算了，当我没说！咱们中间只要有一个注重仪表就够啦。
Ugh... let's just pretend I never said anything. As long as one of us is making an effort.
我看看…睡衣、保暖袋、还有帕姆的玩偶…齐活啦，准备出发！
Pajamas, hot water bottle, Pom-Pom doll... That should be everything! Let's go!
话说回来，你怎么收拾得这么快？没有什么要带的行李吗？
Wow, that was fast... Don't you have anything you wanna bring with you?
对哦，感觉你每次都是轻装上阵…等等，你不会连睡觉都穿着这身衣服吧？！
Huh, you do seem to travel light. But... don't you at least need some pajamas!?
Why are you bringing Pom-Pom doll?
因为帕姆不能离开列车啊…所以只能用这种方法假装带它一起「开拓」过了。
Well, I thought since Pom-Pom can't leave the Express, bringing a doll with us is kind of like taking them trailblazing.
我的遗器带的都是速度词条。
My relics all have speed attributes.
我才不信呢，别想唬住我！
Other people might fall for that, but I won't!
雅利洛-Ⅵ…我刚才瞄了一眼杨叔发布的观测记录，相比我们第一次开拓之行的时候，那颗星球的平均地表温度已经回暖了不少。
I was just taking a look at Mr. Yang's records, and it seems that Jarilo-VI's average temperature has warmed up quite a bit. It's much warmer than it was on our first trip there.
虽然还谈不上宜居吧…但至少已经开始显出好转的迹象了，真替布洛妮娅跟希儿她们高兴。
I wouldn't call it liveable just yet, but things are looking up. I'm so happy for Bronya and Seele.
You bet! It's time to celebrate!
好耶！贝洛伯格，准备好再迎接本姑娘一次吧！
Actually, I think I forgot something...
…什么呀，你这不是还没准备好吗？
What? You're still not ready to go?
快去快去，我就在这儿等你。
Alright slowpoke, I'll wait for you here.
You bet! It's time to celebrate!
好耶！贝洛伯格，准备好再欢迎本姑娘一次吧！
Actually, I think I forgot something...
…什么呀，你这不是还没准备好吗？
What? You're still not ready to go?
快去快去，我就在这儿等你。
Alright slowpoke, I'll wait for you here.
活在风雪中的人们是怎么过节的呢……
Brr! How do people living in all this snow celebrate anything...?
{NICKNAME}，不管哪个世界的节日庆典，肯定都少不了各种美食吧？
One thing's for sure though, {NICKNAME}. Where there's a celebration, there's bound to be food, right?
求求了，贝洛伯格…可别让我失望啊。
Come on Belobog... don't let me down.
停，{NICKNAME}！你看那边站着的人，穿的好像不是银鬃铁卫的军服？
Wait a sec, {NICKNAME}! That person over there. That doesn't look like a Silvermane Guard uniform...
那套黑色的制服，难道是…<color=#dbc291ff>「公司」</color>的人？在这个星球？不会是我眼花了吧？
All in black, surely they're not... <color=#dbc291ff>IPC</color>? On this world? Am I going crazy?
还能是谁，当然是「星际和平公司」啦，就是到处都能看到它标志的那个「公司」——
The Interastral Peace Corporation — who else? The one whose insignia is pretty much everywhere? That IPC!
…还没想起来？「查宝」你总记得吧？它就是公司的产品呀。还有…哦对了，「星际和平播报」！这个你总有印象吧，就是列车上总在放的那个！
You still don't remember? What about "Findie"? That's one of their products... Oh and the Interastral Peace Broadcast! Y'know, the one always being played on the Express!
…算了算了，不重要。关键是，公司的人突然跑来雅利洛-Ⅵ干嘛？
Never mind, it's not that important. The important question is: What are the IPC doing on Jarilo-VI?
我也在好奇…不会是来找「查宝」的吧？那他们可真是晚了好几步。
That's what I'd like to know. If they're here to look for Findie, then they're more than just a little late.
欸，是吗？我怎么觉得还挺酷的……
...You think so? I actually think it's pretty snazzy.
…这不是重点啦！关键是，公司的人突然跑来雅利洛-Ⅵ干嘛？
Anyway, that's besides the point! The point is, what are the IPC doing here on Jarilo-VI?
没办法，咱们主动上去问问吧？我印象里的公司员工态度都还挺好的。
There's only one way to find out — let's go ask. I've always found IPC staff easy to talk to.
哇…人声鼎沸呀！这还是我记忆里的贝洛伯格吗？
Wow! There are people everywhere. Are you sure we're in Belobog?
快，{NICKNAME}！快去看看广场上有什么好玩的、好吃的！
Now to check out the main event — the food! C'mon {NICKNAME}, keep up!
哈~累了，没想到什么也不干，光是闲逛也能这么消耗体力……
Whew... who'd have thought just taking a stroll could be so tiring?
{NICKNAME}，咱们是不是该去见见布洛妮娅？毕竟是她给咱们发的邀请函嘛。
{NICKNAME}, say, I think we should probably pay Bronya a visit. After all, she was the one who invited us here.
或者，咱们也可以再去别处逛逛，玩玩…全看你心情！
Or... we could go check out some other fun stuff elsewhere. Your call!
布洛妮娅，没事吧？那个托帕…居然有那么强势的一面，本来以为是个很好说话的人呢。
Is everything all right, Bronya? I didn't know Miss Topaz was so... intense. She seemed nice when we met her.
{NICKNAME}，三月…欢迎你们回来。抱歉，我本打算盛情迎接两位，但那位自称「公司」使者的女士突然出现，打乱了我的思绪……
It's good to see you two again, welcome back to Belobog. I'd planned a special reception, but I had to deal with an unexpected guest — the lady you just witnessed. She claims to represent the IPC...
既然是和你们两位，那我也没什么好遮掩的…老实说，我现在已经没什么精力思考煦日节的事了。
There's no need to keep either of you in the dark. To tell the truth, I've too much weighing on my mind right now to even think about the Solwarm Festival.
托帕到底和你说了什么？
What exactly did Miss Topaz say to you?
…嗯，既然你们之前已经打过照面，那我也不必说明她的身份了。
Mm... Since you've already made her acquaintance, I needn't explain who she is.
你们第一次来到贝洛伯格的时候，肯定听人提到过那段历史吧？有关七百多年前的军团入侵、还有因「星核」而生的寒潮……
I'm sure you heard pieces of Belobog's history the first time you visited — the Legion's invasion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, how the Stellaron brought about the Eternal Freeze...
现在看来，当时有许多重大的历史事件被埋藏在了风雪之下…那些记忆甚至没能随着历任大守护者传承下来。
It seems that much of Belobog's history from that time was buried deep beneath the snow. Those memories were lost and weren't passed down to the subsequent generations of Supreme Guardians.
居然还有这种事！所以…所以，难不成托帕说的「业务」，就是来贝洛伯格讨债？
Wow, that's a pretty incredible story. So... does that mean Topaz's "business" here is to collect a debt from Belobog?
这也太离谱了吧？！早不来晚不来，怎么非挑这个时候？要是咱们没铲除掉星核，这笔账还不是就这么算了？这不明摆着是欺负人嘛！

That's ridiculous! And what's with the timing? What took them so long to get here? If it wasn't for us eliminating the Stellaron, they'd have nothing to collect! It's obvious they're just trying to take advantage.
根据她的说法，筑城者和公司投资人商定的还款年限是…<unbreak>280</unbreak>年。但借款之后不到百年，雅利洛-Ⅵ和整个银河的联系就彻底切断了。

According to her account, the repayment period agreed upon by the Architects and the IPC investors was... <unbreak>280</unbreak> years. However, less than a century after the loan was taken out, the connection between Jarilo-VI and the rest of the galaxy was completely severed.
公司认为雅利洛-Ⅵ遭受了毁灭级别的打击，文明已经不复存在，那笔投资也就被评定为了烂账。
The IPC deemed that the disaster had caused irreparable damage and that there was no civilization left to reclaim the debt from. As such, they considered the owed sum permanently lost...
直到「星核」危机解除，公司才发现贝洛伯格居然一直存续到了现在……
...It wasn't until the Stellaron crisis was resolved that the IPC discovered that Belobog had survived...
然后他们就派了托帕过来催债……
And that's when they sent Topaz over to collect the debt...
天文级别…我甚至不知道该怎么准确地念出那串数字。
An astronomical amount. I don't even know how to read such a long string of numbers.
What happens if you don't pay it off in time?
那笔债务的数额…是天文级别，我甚至不知道该怎么准确地念出那串数字。
The debt owed is an astronomical amount. I don't even know how to read such a long string of numbers.
你们还没进来之前，托帕已经警告过我了…如果债务拖欠太久，公司给了她采取「强硬措施」的权力。
Before you both arrived, Topaz warned me that if payments were delayed, the IPC would give her the authority to employ "strong measures."
没想到事态会朝这个方向发展…我原本还以为，公司是来帮助贝洛伯格重建的……
I had no idea things were like this. Here I was thinking the IPC had come to rebuild Belobog, not extort it!
Looks like we'll have to intervene.
是呀，咱们得帮布洛妮娅想想办法！公司的势力那么大，光靠贝洛伯格人自己肯定搞不定这事……
Yeah! We have to help Bronya out! The IPC is too big and powerful — the Belobogians won't be able to resolve this problem on their own.
只靠贝洛伯格人恐怕搞不定…
I doubt the Belobogians can do anything about this on their own...
是呀，咱们得帮他们想想办法！公司的势力那么大，就算是布洛妮娅出手也很难搞定吧……
Right, we need to figure out how to help them. The IPC is too big and powerful — even if Bronya steps in, it'll be hard for her to resolve the situation...
我对「星际和平公司」的了解没有你们多，但如果典籍中的记录属实…那是一个横跨整个银河的庞大组织，他们想镇压住贝洛伯格恐怕易如反掌……

You seem to have a deeper knowledge of the Interastral Peace Corporation than I do, but if the records are accurate and they truly have a presence throughout the galaxy, the IPC could crush Belobog like a bug if they wanted to.
所以…所以我很庆幸你们来了——我知道两位原本只是想来参加节日庆典的，但是现在……
I'm glad you're both here — I know you came for the festival, but now...
…现在我想向你们，向星穹列车求救。两位，你们能否尝试替我说服托帕？借助列车在银河中的声誉，也许……
...Now I must ask you and the Astral Express for help. Do you think you could persuade Topaz to reevaluate the situation? The Express' reputation precedes it, perhaps there's still hope...
放心吧，布洛妮娅！朋友有难，热心的无名客怎么可能拒绝？
Have no fear, Bronya! When a friend's in need, the Nameless will always be at their side!
Let's go have a chat with Topaz.
Yeah, after all, {NICKNAME} is a pretty good negotiator.
Let's bring out the big guns.
呃…倒是没必要闹得那么僵啦，托帕小姐看上去也不是那么不讲理的人。
Uh... I don't think we're at that stage yet. Miss Topaz seems like a reasonable person.
有{NICKNAME}的三寸不烂之舌，我们去试着说服她吧。
With {NICKNAME}'s silver tongue, I'm sure we'll make some progress.
谢谢你们！又要把你们卷入麻烦里了，实在抱歉……
Thank you so much, both of you. I'm so sorry for dragging you into more trouble.
两位去找托帕的这段时间，我也会思索一下应对的策略。祝你们好运——啊，还有，一定要注意安全。
While you're out looking for Topaz, I'll see if I can think of a strategy to deal with the situation. Best of luck, and stay safe.
这下知道托帕在哪了，我们快去博物馆找她吧。
Okay, got it. She's at the museum — let's get going.
咱们可得提前想想话术…年纪轻轻能在公司做到总监的位置，绝对是个人精！
We better think about what we're gonna say. She might be young, but she is an IPC executive — she's definitely no pushover.
{NICKNAME}…又把你们卷进贝洛伯格的事务，我很抱歉。但面对「星际和平公司」这种背景强大的势力，我们需要一切能够争取到的外部援助。
{NICKNAME}, I apologize for dragging you into Belobog's affairs again, but when faced with an entity as powerful as the IPC, we need all the external help we can get.
两位去找托帕的这段时间，我也会思索一下应对的策略。祝你们好运——啊，还有，一定要注意安全。
While you're out looking for Topaz, I'll see if I can think of a strategy to deal with the situation. Best of luck, and stay safe.
托帕为何而来，能再讲一遍吗？
Can you tell me again why Topaz is here?
托帕小姐给我讲了一个故事：七百年前，星核降落于雅利洛-Ⅵ之后，原本在这个世界驻留的外来者预见到了危机的迫近，纷纷选择离去。
Topaz shared with me the story of the Stellaron's descent upon Jarilo-VI — how the original outsiders stationed here foresaw the impending disaster and chose to leave in large numbers.
这些外来者中就包括了一批「星际和平公司」的投资人。但他们在临走前做了一件大事——
Among those outsiders were several investors from the Interastral Peace Corporation. Before they departed, they did something noteworthy...
——他们找到了坚持驻守家园的「筑城者」，并向后者提供了一大笔资金，用于灾难避险。
They sought out Architects who refused to leave — those who insisted on defending their homes. The IPC provided these Architects with significant funds to aid them against the coming disaster.
正是凭借那笔资金，贝洛伯格才得以建起如此高大的城墙…甚至连最初一批自动机兵的研发经费都是从那笔钱里划出来的。
It was with those funds that Belobog was able to construct its immense walls... Even the initial funding for the development of the first batch of automatons was drawn from the same pool.
根据她的说法，筑城者和公司投资人商定的还款年限是…<unbreak>280</unbreak>年。但借款之后不到百年，雅利洛-Ⅵ和整个银河的联系就彻底切断了。

According to her account, the repayment period agreed upon by the Architects and the IPC investors was... <unbreak>280</unbreak> years. However, less than a century after the loan was taken out, the connection between Jarilo-VI and the rest of the galaxy was completely severed.
公司认为雅利洛-Ⅵ遭受了毁灭级别的打击，文明已经不复存在，那笔投资也就被评定为了烂账。
The IPC deemed that the disaster had caused irreparable damage and that there was no civilization left to reclaim the debt from. As such, they considered the owed sum permanently lost...
直到「星核」危机解除，公司才发现贝洛伯格居然一直存续到了现在…于是就派了托帕小姐前来催债。
...It wasn't until the Stellaron crisis was resolved that the IPC discovered that Belobog had survived...
我们会尽力搞定这件事。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I believe in you.
{NICKNAME}，托帕之前不是给了我们她的号码吗？
{NICKNAME}, I just remembered Topaz gave me her number.
要不干脆直接点，发消息问问她在哪吧？她看上去像是喜欢有话直说的类型。
We might as well just be direct and ask her where she is. She seems like the type of person who appreciates a straight approach.
Provisional evaluation would value it at approximately <unbreak>270,000</unbreak>...
With <unbreak>34</unbreak> of this type of painting...
…哎呀，居然又是二位！咱们这是什么神仙缘分，一天里居然能撞上三次？
Oh! It's you two again. This is the third time today we've run into each other.
我还是第一次认识星穹列车的朋友，当然得好好珍惜啦。
Why, of course I will! Meeting friends from the Astral Express is always a moment worth cherishing!
其实我们给你发了消息。
Actually, we sent you a message.
哦，是智能回复告诉你们我在这儿的？这员工定位系统是「技术研发部」负责开发的，是不是挺厉害的？
Oh, did my Smart-Reply function tell you where I was? It's a system developed by the Technology Department. Pretty neat, right?
你们看过这幅画吗？我虽然不太懂艺术鉴赏，但大概也能从画家的笔触里看出些东西。
What do you make of this painting? I'm no expert, but just from the artist's strokes I can tell it's no ordinary piece.
该怎么说呢？整幅画面都传递着一种…悲伤。不是普通人遭遇不顺心时那种短暂的伤感…远比那种感觉更悠长，更厚重。
It portrays a certain kind of... sorrow, you know? Not your everyday kind of sadness — it runs much deeper than that.
那种感伤好像凝聚了历史，画家通过自己的笔触，把贝洛伯格几代…不对，是几十代人的苦难都给概括了出来。
It's as if the artist has condensed history into one poignant, but sorrowful image. The artist's brushwork depicts a generation's — no, several generations' hardships...
Seems like you know your art...
哪有哪有，只是胡乱分析一二而已，肯定没法跟专业的人比啦。
Not at all, the analysis of an aficionado. I wouldn't take my word for it.
星穹列车去过那么多地方，「无名客」个个见多识广，在这方面肯定比我强多了。
The Express has visited many worlds. I'm sure the Nameless have a far greater knowledge of such things than myself.
和我的理解也差不多嘛。
I was thinking the exact same thing.
哈哈哈，你谦虚啦。星穹列车去过那么多地方，「无名客」个个见多识广，在这方面肯定比我强多了。
Haha, you flatter me! The Express has visited many worlds. I'm sure the Nameless have a far greater knowledge of such things than myself.
换世俗点的话说，我看中的肯定不是它的绘制技法。假如我给这幅画估值二十万，这其中至少有十五六万是看中了它的「附加价值」才开出来的。

I suppose what I'm trying to say is, what I'm drawn to isn't the style in which a piece is painted, but its overall value. Its intrinsic value may only be <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits, but its "added value" might push the total up to <unbreak>200,000</unbreak>.
呃…我不是想打断你们聊高雅的话题哈，不过其实我们有别的事想找你讨论……
Ugh... Sorry for crashing your artist party, but we came to talk to you about something else...
哦，是吗？请尽管开口，莫非两位已经打算和我聊聊潜在的业务合作了？
Oh? A collaboration between our two sides, perhaps?
——啊，要不咱们边逛边聊吧？这边！
Let's walk and talk — this way!
这博物馆里的展品，大部分都有些无趣。
Most exhibits in this museum are of little value.
但只要具备一双慧眼，一定能从泥尘里发掘出宝石~
But with a keen eye, it's possible to find a diamond in the rough, so to speak.
托帕小姐，我们已经从布洛妮娅那里听说了，关于贝洛伯格的债务问题……
Miss Topaz, Bronya's already told us about Belobog's debt situation...
…啊，她都告诉二位了？你们的关系还真是特别亲密啊。
...Oh? You two are closer than I expected with her.
怎么了？二位莫非是想跟我讨论金融专业方面的问题？
So, how can I help? Not sure on the arrangement, or...?
我们…哎呀，{NICKNAME}，帮帮忙！我实在不擅长这个……
We... Uh... Help me out here, {NICKNAME}! You know I'm not good at this kinda thing...
我们想帮布洛妮娅求求情。
We want to ask for a favor on behalf of Bronya.
哈哈哈，你说话真是直接，我欣赏这点！
You're so direct — I like that!
列车会替贝洛伯格付清！
The Express will pay off Belobog's outstanding debts!
…喂喂，好人可不是你这么当的呀！
那个，托帕小姐…其实我们是来为布洛妮娅求情的。你也看到贝洛伯格现在的状况了…他们根本没能力偿还那么巨额的债务嘛。

Ahem. We're actually here on behalf of Bronya. It's just, you know... Given Belobog's circumstances, it isn't exactly awash with money right now. The Belobogians don't have the means to pay off such a huge debt.
的确，我理解。站在你们的视角，这件事肯定很不符合情理吧？
I understand. From your point of view, I can see how unreasonable it appears.
立场不同，看事情的角度就会不同，这很正常。对我来说，催债就是我的工作——比贝洛伯格的情况更艰难的案例，我也不是没见过。
However, you must understand that debt collection is a big part of my job. I've dealt with cases far more difficult than Belobog's.
…多数不能按时还款的个人或组织都有各自的苦衷。但要是我把每个项目都当作「特例」…那整个星系的经济系统恐怕都要崩盘了。
I appreciate each case has its difficulties, but if I treated every late debtor as a "special case," the galaxy's economy would come to a grinding halt.
What a heartless way of seeing things...
哈哈~类似的话我也听过很多次了，真的。
Haha~ I've heard that before — more than a few times, actually.
但就是还不上，怎么办呢？
...And if the debt can't be repaid?
负债人无法用现金还债的情况，「战略投资部」早就屡见不鲜了，我们能提供的解决方案也不止一种。
The Strategic Investment Department is well-versed in handling such situations. We can offer the debtor various repayment solutions...
但雅利洛-Ⅵ的拖债时间已经超过履行期限太久，很多比较温和的解决方案恐怕已经不适用了。所以，我向布洛妮娅提出……
...but Jarilo-VI has far exceeded the allotted repayment period. I'm afraid milder solutions aren't the order of the day. So, I proposed to Bronya...
…哎呀，差点把商业机密泄露出去了，好险好险~
Oops! I almost gave away trade secrets there, didn't I? That was a close one.
这里的展品都很普通啊，看上去没什么价值。再陪我走两步吧。
The exhibits here are pretty ordinary — I estimate they're probably not worth much. Let's keep moving.
祖辈欠下的债务，却要连累后人偿还……
So you're basically saying the Belobogians must pay off their ancestors' debts...
仔细想想，这也是宇宙间生命轮回的一部分呢。
When you think about it, it's just another part of the cycle of life.
...Uh, I'm not sure it's as poetic as that...
怎么办…聊了半天，压根一点进展都没有嘛！
So... what now? We spent ages trying to convince her and she didn't move an inch!
我们也没承诺一定成功。
We didn't promise Bronya we'd succeed.
话是这么说，但还是感觉很对不住布洛妮娅……
Well, yeah, but she'll be really disappointed...
嗯，我也这么觉得。但摆在布洛妮娅面前的问题也很现实……
I guess so, but that still doesn't fix Bronya's problem...
真的吗？我怎么觉得完全动摇不了她呢……
You sure? I really don't think she'll change her mind.
归根到底，托帕小姐也只是在贯彻她的工作原则而已。退一步说，从列车组的立场出发，跟公司作对肯定不明智……
I guess Miss Topaz is just doing her job. And as far as the Express is concerned, I think it'd be unwise to make the IPC our enemy.
…哎呀，这里面的利害关系也太复杂，太难处理了吧！学校里可没人教过这些呀——欸？这么一说，我失忆之前有上过学吗？
All these vested interests — so hard to undo any of it... they don't teach this stuff in school. Wait... did I even go to school?
Did someone send you a message?
…什么，公司的人已经开始在下层区捣乱了？
Huh? The IPC are causing trouble in the Underworld? Already?
可恶，刚才还在说什么「会考虑贝洛伯格人民的福祉」——这帮公司资本家的话，真是一个字都不能信！

Ugh, seriously? Topaz was just talking about "taking the welfare of the people of Belobog into consideration," and now they're pulling this stunt? You really can't trust these money-hungry IPC suits for a minute!
居然又要拔刀相助了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
Again... I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!
再也不乌鸦嘴了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
I really did jinx us! I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!
That's right! You can't believe a word they say!
居然又要拔刀相助了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
I really did jinx us! I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!
算了，抱怨也没用，忙还是得帮——走，我们去支援希儿他们吧。
I guess complaining won't get us anywhere. Let's go lend them a hand.
怎么了，小三月？看你一脸笑容，是有什么值得开心的事吗？
Hey, March. That's a big smile on your face — what's the good news?
姬子！听我说听我说，雅利洛-Ⅵ的大守护者正在筹备一场节日庆典，她还邀请我们一起去感受下庆典的氛围。
Himeko! There's a celebration coming up on Jarilo-VI, organized by the Supreme Guardian, and we're invited to go take in the sights and sounds.
丹恒还在闭关休养，哪儿也不去…所以，你要不要和我俩一起赴约？
Dan Heng won't be going anywhere for a while — he's still resting up, so... wanna come with us?
毕竟之前对付可可利亚的时候，你可是帮了大忙呀——布洛妮娅肯定也很想跟你这位大救星见上一面~
I mean, considering how you helped us out with Cocolia, I'm sure Bronya would be happy to see you!
怪不得三月的精神这么好，果然是在盼着好玩的事呢。
Ahh, so that explains the grin — you're excited about the celebration.
谢谢你们的邀请，不过我手头还有些事务，一时半会儿脱不开身。你们可以替我向那位「大守护者」姑娘问好。
Thanks for the invite, but I'm afraid my hands are full right now. Please send my regards to the Supreme Guardian.
雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓印迹是由你们两个——啊，当然还有丹恒——亲自走出来的，你们也理应好好享受当地人的这份谢意。下次，下次我一定会腾出时间和你们同去的。
Make the most of the festivities — you've earned it! You two and Dan Heng did help save Jarilo-VI, after all. I'll be sure to join you guys next time.
领航员的日程还真是饱和…看来这次真的只有咱们俩了。
Navigators really do have their plates full, huh? Seems like it's just you and me this time.
既然这么定了，那我就先去房间收拾收拾行李。{NICKNAME}，等你准备好了就来找我吧。
Let me go pack some stuff for the trip first. {NICKNAME}, come and find me when you're ready to set off.
嗨，你好！请问你是星际和平公司的员工吗？还是说，你只是在玩换装模仿？
Hi! Do you work for the Interastral Peace Corporation? Or are you just dressing fancy today?
老板，我这儿发现两个陌生人，要灭口吗？
Boss, encounter with two unknowns. Want me to take them out? Over.
…灭你个头啊，你别乱动！我这就过来。
Take them out!? Just hang tight for a second, I'm on my way. Don't do anything stupid.
二位好，初次见面！我叫托帕，是星际和平公司的投资专家，这次是来雅利洛-Ⅵ谈特别业务的。
Glad to make your acquaintance — I'm Topaz, an investment expert from the Interastral Peace Corporation. I'm here on Jarilo-VI for a special business assignment.
我这位同事…不太擅长沟通，两位别放在心上哈。
You'll have to forgive my colleague here — people skills aren't his strong suit. Please don't take it to heart.
呼…真是吓了一跳，我们可是抱着参加庆典的轻松心情来的，才不想又被卷入什么奇怪的冲突里啊……
Whew... You scared the life out of me! We're here for the celebrations — we're not looking for more conflicts...
哎呀，对了，自我介绍——我是三月七，是星穹列车的乘客…星穹列车你们应该听说过吧？旁边这位是咱的同伴{NICKNAME}，也是列车组的成员。
Oh, right, we should probably introduce ourselves. I'm March 7th, a passenger of the Astral Express — you may have heard of it? And this is my friend and fellow passenger — {NICKNAME}.
原来如此！我一眼就看出你们不是本地人，但想不到居然正巧碰上两位「无名客」！真是妙不可言的缘分~
No kidding! I could tell you weren't locals from a mile away, but I didn't expect to run into two Nameless here! Fate is such a curious thing⁓
我听说，雅利洛-Ⅵ之所以能摆脱星核的影响，跟「开拓」势力的援助脱不开关系，难道你们两位就是……
I heard that Jarilo-VI only stepped out of the Stellaron's shadow thanks to the direct intervention of the Trailblazers. Surely, you two aren't...?
That's us. The honor is yours.
哎呀，在外人面前，你倒是谦虚点嘛！
Huh? Geez, can you be a little more humble?
只是贡献了一份小小的力量。
We may have helped out a little bit.
哎呀，居然谦虚起来了？这可不像你呀。
So humble all of a sudden, huh? Are you feeling alright? Should I call a doctor?
喔，没想到能在这里认识两位传奇人物，真走运！是吧，账账？
I never imagined I'd run into living legends here. Must be our lucky day, huh, Numby?
话说回来，托帕小姐看上去这么年轻，居然已经当上了公司的高管，真让人羡慕……
Wow, Miss Topaz, you're really young for an IPC executive! That's impressive!
嗐，没什么好羡慕的，乘上了一波运势罢了~再说这也算不上什么美差，还不是得在各个星系之间跑来跑去，被业务推着走嘛。
More good luck, I suppose. But it's not as cushy as you think — scurrying from one side of the galaxy to the other, going wherever businesses require me to be...
去掉「业务」的部分，感觉你的工作内容跟列车组也差不多嘛！
Huh, your job sounds pretty similar to the Express crew's! Aside from the "business," I guess...
雅利洛-Ⅵ居然这么快就能跟公司建立起联系，甚至都开始谈合作了——动作真快，不愧是布洛妮娅！
Bronya moves fast! The crisis is only just over and she's already opened talks with the IPC.
这「合作」的内容可能跟你们想的不太一样…不过后半句我同意，那位「大守护者」治理城市确实很有一套。我这次来的主要目的就是和她见上一面。
Hehe, these "talks" aren't exactly what you might expect, but I have to agree, the Supreme Guardian definitely knows how to govern a city. That's the reason I'm here on Jarilo-VI — to meet with her.
啊，三月小姐刚才说，你们正赶着去参加贝洛伯格的节庆，对吧？实在不好意思，我和同事耽误你们赶路了。
Miss March, you said you were on your way to the Belobog festivities, right? My apologies for delaying you both!
没事没事，我们也不赶急。话说，你不跟着我们进城吗？这雪原多冷呀，还容易迷路……
Don't be sorry! It's not like we're in a rush. Wanna come to the city with us? The Snow Plains are freezing, and it's easier than you think to get lost out here.
多谢你的关心，我们没问题的！我跟同事都是第一次来这颗星球，想先多看两眼这里「标志性」的雪景。
Thanks for the concern, but I'll manage. It's my first time on this world — I'd like to take in its vast, iconic snowscape for just a little longer.
要是咱们之间的缘分够深，说不定在节庆现场还能遇见。喏，这是我的联系方式——工作的时候我一般不回消息，等下班了咱们可以多多交流~
Who knows, maybe we'll cross paths again during the celebrations. Oh, here's my contact information. I don't usually respond during work hours, but I'd be happy to chat off the clock⁓
哇，居然不费吹灰之力就拿到了公司高管的号码……
...Wowwww, I actually managed to get an IPC executive's phone number without even trying.
请教教我该怎么赚大钱！
Teach me how to get rich!
我有个八十亿信用点的项目。
I'm in charge of a project worth 8 billion credits, by the way.
Pfft! As if anyone would ever believe that!
哈哈哈，真不错，好羡慕你们轻松融洽的氛围啊~那我们先走一步咯，回见！
Hahaha, you two make a cute pair! Anyway, I'd better be on my way, see you next time!
横跨整个银河的两拨人，居然就这么偶遇在一起了…命运可真神奇呀，{NICKNAME}。
The universe is huge, yet we somehow stumbled onto the same path. Fate truly works in mysterious ways, {NICKNAME}, don't you think?
Come on, let's head into the city!
…贵星的苦衷我完全理解，大守护者小姐。贝洛伯格当下财务紧张的局面不是因为你——当然，也不是因为这城里任何一个人——的过错导致的。
I understand the difficulties that this world is facing, Supreme Guardian. Belobog's current financial burden cannot be pinned on you, nor anyone else for that matter.
但就事论事地说，既然贝洛伯格作为独立政体存续到了当下，那这笔债务就不能被当做坏账勾销。
However, objectively speaking, since Belobog has existed as an independent entity to this day, its debt cannot simply be written off.
...Oh, it looks like we have some visitors!
布洛妮娅！还有…托帕小姐居然也在？
Bronya! And... Topaz? You're here too?
啊，原来你们已经开始谈合作了？正事要紧，要不我们一会儿再——
I guess you've already started your business talks. We'll get out of your way if—
——没事，我们本来就聊得差不多了，这会儿正准备收尾呢。
It's no bother, we've pretty much wrapped things up already, anyway.
大守护者小姐，还请你认真考虑一下我的方案。如果雅利洛-Ⅵ还想在未来重建与银河众星的联系…你们在公司这里的信用记录会无比重要。
Please consider my plans carefully, Supreme Guardian. If Jarilo-VI wants to rebuild its connections with the rest of the galaxy, your credit record with the IPC will be of great importance.
…我明白，托帕小姐。我会…我需要时间考虑。
...You've made yourself clear, Miss Topaz. I'll require some time to consider my next course of action.
当然。不过，在你考虑的同时，我的同事需要在贝洛伯格展开一些必要的工作…还希望上下层区的诸位能够配合。
Naturally. However, while you're deliberating, my colleagues will need to carry out some operations in Belobog. I hope that your subjects in the Underworld are... cooperative.
真不好意思，因为我的事打扰你们老友重聚了！公事已经聊完了，接下来各位可以慢慢叙旧——先走一步咯，回见~
I'm sorry our business got in the way of a reunion with old friends. I'll get out of your way.
托帕小姐给我讲了一个故事：七百年前，星核降落于雅利洛-Ⅵ之后，原本在这个世界驻留的外来者预见到了危机的迫近，纷纷选择离去。
Topaz shared with me the story of the Stellaron's descent upon Jarilo-VI — how the original outsiders stationed here foresaw the impending disaster and chose to leave in large numbers.
这些外来者中就包括了一批「星际和平公司」的投资人。但他们在临走前做了一件大事——
Among those outsiders were several investors from the Interastral Peace Corporation. Before they departed, they did something noteworthy...
——他们找到了坚持驻守家园的「筑城者」，并向后者提供了一大笔资金，用于灾难避险。
They sought out Architects who refused to leave — those who insisted on defending their homes. The IPC provided these Architects with significant funds to aid them against the coming disaster.
正是凭借那笔资金，贝洛伯格才得以建起如此高大的城墙…甚至连最初一批自动机兵的研发经费都是从那笔钱里划出来的。
It was with those funds that Belobog was able to construct its immense walls... Even the initial funding for the development of the first batch of automatons was drawn from the same pool.
哇，看！这是雅利洛-Ⅵ上的小动物吗？
Wow, look! Is that little critter native to Jarilo-VI!?
白白的，蓬蓬的…好可爱！在哪里能见到活的呢？
It's so white and fluffy! Where can I find a live one?
对，超级喜欢！啊，你们之前见过账账了吧？可惜，它现在应该是自己玩去了。
I absolutely adore them! Have you guys met Numby yet? Aw, where'd they go? They must be off playing somewhere.
不过仔细想想，既然这种动物的标本会被陈列在这里…大概意味着它已经从这个世界上消失了吧？
Hmm... Come to think of it, this little guy's on display here probably means it's already extinct... right?
嗯，想想也是。要不然它的标本也不会被陈列在这里。
I suppose it probably is. Otherwise, it wouldn't be on display here.
真可惜，我超~级喜欢小动物的。啊，你们之前见过账账了吧？可惜，它现在应该是自己玩去了。
That's such a shame! I absolutely adore little animals! Have you guys met Numby yet? I guess they're off playing somewhere.
那个，托帕小姐，到底该怎么做才能让公司对贝洛伯格手下留情呢？
So, Miss Topaz, what exactly will it take for the IPC to go easier on Belobog?
布洛妮娅他们费了好大的力气才让这个世界稍微变好了一些…如果所有努力眨眼间就被剥夺，那未免太过残忍了……
Bronya invested so much just to make this world a little better. And now, it feels like all of her efforts will be undone in the blink of an eye. It's just so cruel...
你把公司想成什么啦，三月~别忘了，我们和这里的「筑城者」一样，都是「存护」的践行者哦。
What do you take the IPC for, Miss March? We're just the same as Belobog's Architects — we're all followers of the Preservation.
无论如何，我们提出的方案肯定会把贝洛伯格人民的福祉考虑在内。要是连这点都做不到，「战略投资部」不就成了跟军团一样蛮不讲理的团伙了嘛？
No matter what solutions we propose, we will always take the welfare of the people of Belobog into consideration. Otherwise, we'd be no different from the Legion, would we?
所以，你是说…我们不用担心？但布洛妮娅她……
So you're saying there's nothing to worry about? But Bronya...
放心吧，大守护者姑娘可是有大智慧的人，她肯定能想明白的。
Don't worry yourself too much. The Supreme Guardian is a wise person. She'll understand.
更何况，如果要我直接回答你的提问…答案是「怎么做都没用」。不管遇到什么阻碍，我都一定会完成雅利洛-Ⅵ这个项目。
But to answer your question directly — it'd take a miracle. I'll complete the Jarilo-VI project no matter what obstacles I encounter.
突然有种威压感…好恐怖呀。
This isn't going as planned... What should we do?
所以呀，我建议两位还是别在这件事上太费心了，你们觉得呢？不如趁你们还在的时候多享受下节庆前的热闹氛——
I wouldn't waste too much energy on this matter. Why not make the most of the festive atmosphere...?
…啊，有同事找我，实在不好意思啦。先走一步，有缘再见~
Oh, looks like one of my colleagues is after me. My apologies, but I should probably take this. Bye!
{NICKNAME}，三月！还好有你俩在，不然我们真要撑不住了！
Hey! Am I glad to see you two here — I'm not sure how much longer we can hold out.
很糟，那帮家伙的武器，还有他们操纵的机兵，威力比我们的大太多了。
It's bad — really bad. Their weapons and automatons are much stronger than anything we have.
倒是没人受重伤，只是有几个「地火」的弟兄擦破了些皮。对方没下死手…万幸。
Nobody's been seriously hurt, but a few Wildfire members got minor injuries. Fortunately for us, it seems like they were holding back.
倒是没人受重伤，只是有几个「地火」的弟兄擦破了些皮。对方没下死手…万幸。
Nobody's been seriously hurt, but a few Wildfire members got minor injuries. Fortunately for us, it seems like they were holding back.
那帮家伙的武器，还有他们操纵的机兵，威力比我们的大太多了。
Their weapons and automatons are much stronger than anything we have.
你看那两个黑衣服的，从刚才开始就一直守着矿区入口，不让任何人出入。仗着自己装备好就到处欺负别人，你们算什么东西！

You see those two in black? They've been guarding the mine entrance — they're not letting anyone in or out. Hey! Just because you have fancy equipment doesn't mean you can bully us! Who do you think you are?
What's the matter? Got nothing to say!?
矿区里面现在是什么情况，有人知道吗？
What's going on inside the mine? Any ideas?
之前倒是有几个慌慌张张跑出来的矿民。听他们说，整个矿区已经被黑衣服的家伙控制了。
A few miners made it out earlier — they looked pretty panicked. They said the whole mine had been seized by the people in black.
那帮家伙，嘴上说着什么「资产评估」…实际根本就是在骚扰下层区人正常生活！
These uninvited guests keep talking about "asset evaluation," whatever that means. All I know is they're seriously disrupting the lives of the Underworlders!
刚才还在逛博物馆来着…不会是她的手下自说自话吧？
We were just talking to her in the museum... Do you think her cronies are acting without her authorization?
话说回来，托帕不在附近吗？该不会是她的手下自说自话，在这儿搞破坏吧？
Do you think Topaz is around here somewhere? Maybe her cronies are acting without her authorization...
你们说的这个人，是这帮黑衣人的头头吗？
The person you're talking about — are they in charge of the people in black?
…算了，管她帕托还是托帕，眼下最要紧的是赶紧把大矿区给夺回来。{NICKNAME}，三月，一起来吗？
Potaz, Pazto — whatever her name is, she can wait. Right now, the most important thing is to free those trapped in the Great Mine. Are you two with me?
喂，你们两个！是听不懂人话还是没长舌头？识相的话就给我让开！
Hey, you two! Cat got your tongue or something? If you knew what was best for you, you'd get out of my way!
呃，两位站累了没有，要不要来旁边歇一会儿？公司员工应该能享有午休福利的吧？
You guys must be exhausted standing here all day. How about you take a little lunch break — I'm sure the IPC allows that, right?
我是你们老板的客户，让开。
I'm a guest of your boss, stand aside.
这两个家伙，到底怎么回事？
你们俩，是之前在雪原里跟总监聊天的……
You two were talking to the director in the Snow Plains...
…什么啊，原来是之前威胁要灭我们口的家伙！
Huh!? So it's you! You're the one who was threatening to take us out in the Snow Plains!
那你应该知道我们的身份了吧？连你的老板都对我们客客气气的，你这做下属的也该懂点礼貌才对！
Hmph, do you even know who you're talking to? If your boss knows to treat us with respect, you'd better start showing some yourself!
…不行，我不能让开！组长说了，要是漏了人进去，就要扣我半年的绩效！
I can't let you pass! My team leader said that if anyone gets through, I'll lose six months of performance bonuses!
好嘛，原来你连个小组长都不是？真是高估你了。
Team leader? Ha, you're even lower on the pecking order than I thought.
闭，闭嘴！我为了进公司，躲在一颗小行星上备战了六七年，然后又熬过了十七轮面试才成功入职——你们这些无业人员，凭什么对我评头论足？！

Sh—Shut up! I spent seven years on a forsaken asteroid preparing to join the IPC — I went through <unbreak>17</unbreak> interviews before they finally hired me... What right do you deadbeats have to criticize me!?
…什么公司，什么面试，废话真多…我的耐心已经到头了！
...IPC? Interviews!? I don't know what you're rambling on about, but you're really testing my patience.
{NICKNAME}，三月，别跟他浪费口水——咱们上！
{NICKNAME}, March — no need to waste our breath on this idiot. Let's do this!
我手头还有些事务，这次就不跟你们同去了。
I've got a lot going on right now, but I'll try to make it next time.
希望你们两个玩得开心，顺带替我跟那位「大守护者」姑娘问好。
I'm sure you'll have a great time. Don't forget to send my regards to the Supreme Guardian while you're there.
这就没影了？溜得可真快。
That's it? He sure took off quickly.
这就是十七轮面试筛选出来的实力吗？感觉也不怎么样嘛。
<unbreak>17</unbreak> rounds of interviews and these are the best people they can find? What a joke.
别掉以轻心。听报信的说，矿区里的家伙们相当不好对付。
Let's not get ahead of ourselves. I've been warned that the ones in the mine won't go down without a fight.
{NICKNAME}，等你们准备好了我们就出发。
{NICKNAME}, let's set off when you're ready.
{NICKNAME}，缓过来没有？等你准备好了，咱们得狠狠收拾收拾这帮公司的跟屁虫！
Caught your breath yet, {NICKNAME}? It's time to show these IPC fools who they're dealing with!
When did you change your clothes?
…就刚才啊，在博物馆跟托帕聊完以后？
...Right after we finished chatting with Topaz in the museum.
你不会才发现吧…多关心关心身边的同伴呀，{NICKNAME}！
Did it take you that long to notice, {NICKNAME}? I thought you were supposed to be the observant one!
I didn't think we'd have to fight again...
呃…计划赶不上变化嘛，谁能料到会发生这种事呢？
Nobody did, but it never hurts to be prepared!
准备好了吗？该去把这帮「公司」的家伙赶出下层区了。
Ready for action? It's time to kick the IPC out of the Underworld.
Mm, make sure you've got everything you need.
真遗憾，本来还想美美地度过这几天…这下我的小礼服又只能在箱底吃灰了。
Just when I thought I could catch a break, things go haywire! Guess my nice dress will have to wait for a while...
早点解决公司的问题，咱们就能早点享受节日的氛围。准备好了就跟希儿说一声吧。
The quicker we handle the IPC, the faster we can get back to enjoying the celebrations. Let Seele know when you're ready to go.
这阵仗…好像不太友善呀？
These guys... don't look pleased to see us.
应大守护者之令——请您在此止步，托帕小姐。
By order of the Supreme Guardian, proceed no further, Miss Topaz.
…怪不得人家总说，这年头欠债的才是爷呢？
Belobog might be in arrears, but I'm out of pocket.
既然是要收集民意，那肯定得兼顾上下层区居民的心情吧？
Alright, if we want to make an informed decision, we need to hear from both the Overworld and the Underworld, right?
那就先从上层区开始吧，出发。
矿民都聚在那边…这股强烈的既视感是怎么回事？
All the miners here huddled together... anyone else getting déjà vu?
毕竟你们第一次来的时候，情况也大差不差。只不过比起地痞流氓和几台破破烂烂的机器人，这次的对手难缠多了。
Well, the situation here is pretty similar to when you first arrived. It's just that instead of a few thugs and broken robots, now we're dealing with much more formidable adversaries.
喂，{NICKNAME}，快看！那不是托帕身边的扑满吗？好像是叫…「账账」，我没记错吧？
Hey, {NICKNAME}, check it out! Isn't that Topaz's little trotter over there? What was it again... Numby, right?
啥？那玩意…不是裂界里的生物吗？居然还能当宠物养？！
What!? Isn't that thing a Fragmentum monster? She's keeping one as a pet!?
公司的人嘛，黑科技就是多，养只扑满当宠物也不稀奇啦。我们过去瞅瞅它吧？
The IPC are all about their sci-fi sorcery, so it's not that surprising. Wanna go take a look?
…你们聊得挺欢啊？它都说什么啦？
...Sounds like you two are getting along! What's Numby saying?
真的假的？！莫非你真的能听懂扑满的语言？
好深奥哦…才怪，你就是在瞎扯吧！
Wow, that's soooo deep... Come on, stop fooling around!
…那你装得还挺像的，差点把我给骗了。
I should've known... Don't quit your day job.
喂，你们看！它好像…想离开这里了？
Look, you guys. Looks like it wants to leave.
啊，真的耶，说不定是要去找主人了？{NICKNAME}，我们先跟上它吧！
Looks like they want to find their master. Let's follow them, {NICKNAME}.
帮、帮帮忙啊！穿黑衣服的打人了！
H—Help! Those people dressed in black are attacking us!
…喂，老乡，问你话呢！你们堆放「地髓」的仓房在哪？
...Hey, I'm talking to you! Where do you guys store the Geomarrow?
我、我真的啥也不知道啊！
真难搞，这地方怎么净是些土老帽……
Tsk, this place is filled with nothing but incompetents...
岂有此理，得给他们点苦头尝尝！
Those cowards! I guess they wanna do this the hard way!
嗯？账账好像很开心的样子？
Huh? Looks like Numby's in a good mood.
…但它和公司的人不是一伙的吗？真奇怪。
...But aren't they on the IPC's side? Strange...
看，下面有个大家伙！管事的会不会就是他？
Look — that big guy down there — is he the one in charge?
我倒是要看看，今天到底是谁管谁——走吧！
Hmph! We'll see who's really in charge. Let's go!
那小东西，一眼看上去又圆又胖，没想到行动竟然那么敏捷。
Wow, for something so short and stubby, he's pretty nimble.
没办法…向导丢了，接下来就只能靠咱们自己继续深入了。走吧！
Well, I guess that's that. We're on our own now. Let's keep going.
唔…所以这边的事就算解决了…？
Phew... So are we all good here, or what?
嗯。看他们那副慌张的样子，大概是没胆量回来了。
Yeah. Judging by the looks on their faces, I don't think they'll be back.
这个「托帕」，到底是什么人物？不但能驯服裂界生物，还能把那帮黑衣服治得服服帖帖……
So who is this "Topaz" anyway? She seems to have no problem ordering these idiots around, or taming Fragmentum creatures, for that matter...
最好…还是让布洛妮娅和你解释吧？
You should probably ask Bronya to explain it to you.
临近过节，情况怎么突然变得这么复杂？真是不让人省心。
Why did this mess have to happen so close to the festivities? The timing couldn't have been any worse.
...Oh! Looks like we've got a message.
与此同时，在史瓦罗的聚落……
嗨！史瓦罗先生，对吗？那旁边这位可爱的小姑娘…肯定就是克拉拉妹妹了！
Hello — it's Mr. Svarog, isn't it? And this cute little girl must be Clara!
你好，我叫托帕！我来找史瓦罗先生谈些事情。
I'm Topaz! I've come to have a chat with Mr. Svarog.
Clara, go inside and wait for me.
…欸？但是史瓦罗先生，有客人的话……
Huh? But if you have a guest, maybe I should...
她不是「客人」，更不是「朋友」。
She is not a "guest," neither is she a friend.
回去等我，克拉拉。会没事的，放心。
Go, Clara. Everything will be fine.
看来我的消息源说的没错：大型机器人和小姑娘之间建立了牢不可破的纽带…真是个温暖人心的故事！
So, it seems my source was right: Who'd have thought that such a strong bond could exist between a giant robot and a little girl...? So heartwarming!
那是「星际和平公司」的标志。你为什么会出现在这里？
You bear the insignia of the Interastral Peace Corporation. What is your motive for coming here?
看来和你说话时可以暂时丢掉那些繁文缛节，太好了。
Straight to the point, huh? I like your style.
雅利洛-Ⅵ——啊，你熟悉这个说法吗？总之就是你我脚下这颗星球——它很快就要变成属于「公司」的资产了。
Jarilo-VI — are robots familiar with that term? Anyway, it refers to the planet we're currently standing on. It's about to become the property of the IPC.
没人能逆转这个结果。你不能，那几个「无名客」不能，银河中任何一方势力都不能。
No one can reverse this outcome. Not you, not the Nameless, nor any power in the galaxy.
我现在只考虑一件事，就是尽可能对经过我手的项目负责。我要让公司的股东们看到雅利洛-Ⅵ能够创造的价值。
I only care about one thing right now — demonstrating to the shareholders of the IPC that Jarilo-VI can generate value.
长线来说，这是一个…不，只有这么做才能保证贝洛伯格长远的利益。我需要你的协助才能达成这个目的。
In the long run, this is a way — the ONLY way — to ensure Belobog's long-term interests. I need your help to achieve this goal.
「长远利益」——概念模糊。评估意图中……
评估结果：失败。告诉我，使者——你打算如何说服公司的领导层？
Analysis: Failed. Tell me, emissary — how do you plan to convince the IPC leadership?
简单，我给你看一样东西。
「源代码」——确切地说，是能取得贝洛伯格所有机械单元统一控制权的「源代码」。
Source code. Or to be more precise — source code that is able to take control of all mechanized units in Belobog.
你应该很清楚吧？过去的七百年里，贝洛伯格制造的所有机兵都沿用了「公司」留下的底层系统。如此完善的代码，这里的工程师压根想不到需要替换它的理由。

I'm sure you're familiar with this — all mechanized units manufactured in Belobog over the last <unbreak>700</unbreak> years utilize the underlying systems created by the IPC. The code is so refined that the engineers never saw any reason to change it.
你应该还知道，在这下层区的某个地方，曾经有一座巨大的兵工厂。那里沉睡着许多…许许多多的兵器，多到足够碾碎一整支军团的先遣队。
I assume you're also aware that there was once a large automaton factory in the Underworld. Thousands upon thousands of automatons — enough to crush the Legion's vanguard — lay dormant within.
这就是我和上面谈判的筹码。我要说服他们，让他们相信雅利洛-Ⅵ在公司的长远战略中能占有一席之地。
This is my bargaining chip for negotiating with the higher-ups. I'll convince them that Jarilo-VI has a place in the company's long-term strategies.
但首先，我需要一位向导，告诉我那些兵器被埋在了什么地方。
But first, I need a guide to show me where these automatons are buried.
我理解了。你口中的「长远利益」，可以被定义为宏观层面的文明存续。
I understand. Your "long-term interests" can be defined as the survival of civilization at a macro level.
对于当下活在这里的人类，你又有何计划？
What are your intentions for the people currently living here?
他们的未来已经被买断了，我只能尽力让他们接受这个事实…用相对平和的态度。
Their future has already been purchased. All I can do is make them accept this fact, using a relatively peaceful approach.
我明白了。我会协助你的计划。
I understand. I will assist you with your plan.
…哦？居然这么好说话？我还以为你跟传闻中一样，是个固执己见的角呢。
...Oh? So, you're not as stubborn as the rumors suggest.
你所谈及的未来超出了我的计算范畴。但情感读数告诉我，你确实在努力考量让这个世界存续的办法。
The future you speak of is beyond my computational range. But my emotional analysis indicates that you are indeed trying to find ways to ensure the survival of this world.
另外，计算表明：假如我拒绝合作，你有<unbreak>96.4%</unbreak>的概率会强迫我服从。
Additionally, calculations indicate a <unbreak>96.4%</unbreak> probability of compliance through force if I refuse to cooperate.
看来你的计算还是偏向保守了点~
Your calculations are slightly on the conservative side.
那就预祝我们合作愉快！辛苦你带路了，史瓦罗先生。
Here's to our future cooperation! If you wouldn't mind leading the way, Mr. Svarog.
喂，那边那个大家伙！这里管事的是你吗？
Hey, you! Are you in charge around here?
…本地人？公司正在此处执行资产评估工作，请本地居民跟随负责疏散的员工到安全区域休息……
A local? The IPC is currently conducting asset evaluation work here. Local residents are advised to follow those responsible for evacuation to the—
…这叫哪门子「疏散」？明明就是你们强行霸占了矿区，还把矿民赶出了自家家门！
Don't lie to us! You seized the mine by force for yourself — you drove the locals out of their homes!
我警告你们，赶紧从这里滚出去，别再让我看见你们那身行头——否则就别怪这把镰刀不长眼了！
I'm warning you — get lost or suffer the consequences! Don't you dare show your face around here again!
呃…你是谁，说话这么嚣张？「公司」武器的威力，难道还没见识过吗？
And who might you be? You have quite the attitude... This is our jurisdiction now — we are all-powerful here.
托帕就允许你们这么乱来？
Topaz just lets you do whatever you want?
I want to speak to your boss!
托帕！我们要见你的上级，托帕小姐！
Yeah! We demand to speak with Topaz!
居然还认识托帕总监？看来身份确实不简单……
呃…不对，我管你们是谁？「战略投资部」员工没有义务和不相关人士解释项目的细节。
It doesn't matter. The Strategic Investment Department has no obligation to talk to anyone not related to this project!
负债人未能在执行期限内还款的情况，公司有权跳过协商阶段，直接接手其资产。都是按规矩办事，你们有什么不服？

In cases where debtors fail to repay within the set time frame, the IPC reserves the right to skip negotiations and take over all assets. We're simply following the rules — what exactly is your problem?
听着挺像那么回事，但这些杂七杂八的规矩不都是你们自己定的？这个世界好不容易才活了过来，才经不起你们这么瞎折腾！
Y'know, it's funny how the "rules" always seem to work in your favor, don't you think? This world's been hanging by a thread and now you're here to pull the plug on it!
呃，这是…这是领导层的决定！我们只是负责执行，你跟我们说这些也没用。
Hmph, don't blame me, I'm simply following orders. Do you think I get to make those kinds of decisions?
算了，三月，别跟他们讲道理了！本来我也没指望能和平解决这事。
Save your breath, March. I never held out any hope of resolving this problem peacefully.
你不是说那破「公司」的武器很先进吗？正好趁这个机会让我见识见识——来过两招！
Didn't you claim the IPC was all-powerful? Well now's the perfect chance to show us what you can do!
呃…没想到真的要撕破脸皮，早知道就提前申请加班了……
Ugh, if I knew things were going to get this heated, I'd have applied for overtime...
…咳，没什么，你们什么都没听见！既然你们执意要战，那就准备好脸抗我这发激光重炮吧！
Ahem... Anyway! Since you seem intent on settling this matter with violence, prepare yourselves for my heavy laser cannon!
不知道为什么，字里行间都能感受到布洛妮娅的焦虑…{NICKNAME}，我们尽快回去吧？
Hmm... I get the feeling Bronya's worried about something. We'd better go back and see her, {NICKNAME}.
希儿，你要和我们一起上去吗？
Are you coming with us, Seele?
不用了，你们去吧。我这边还有些善后工作要处理，被赶出去的矿民都还蒙在鼓里。
Go on without me, I still have stuff to take care of. The miners need to know what happened here.
她联系了你们，说明在布洛妮娅看来，这件事只有你俩才能帮上忙。我相信她的判断。
Bronya messaged you, which means she thinks you can help. I trust her judgment.
希儿…好，我明白了！我们一定尽力帮上布洛妮娅的忙。
Got it, Seele. We'll do what we can to help Bronya out.
走吧，{NICKNAME}，我们回克里珀堡去。
呃…你、你们究竟是什么来头？！居然连公司的机甲都镇压不了……
Ugh... Wh—Who are you people? Not even our tech could take you down...
末日兽、星核、幻胧，什么强敌咱没见过？就凭你这两下子，也想拦住我们？
Pfft! We took down the Doomsday Beast, the Stellaron, and Phantylia. Did you really think YOU could stop us?
不行了，已经一发弹药都不剩了……
Darn it! I'm all out of ammo...
组、组长，总监刚才发来消息……
Sir, we've just received word from the director...
呃…托帕总监？说什么了，快给我念念。
Director Topaz? What did she say?
「各项目组在执行资产评估作业期间，不得影响当地居民正常生活秩序——」
Teams are not to disrupt the lives of local inhabitants during the asset evaluation period...
「——部分严重违反此条指令的项目组，组内全体员工处以扣除<unbreak>60%</unbreak>年终奖金的处罚……」
Teams that violate this directive will have their year-end bonuses reduced by <unbreak>60%</unbreak>...
全体员工，听我指令——立刻从大矿区撤离，撤离！不要留下任何项目组来过的痕迹！
Attention all personnel. Evacuate the mine immediately! Erase all traces of your presence!
欢迎回来…真是难为情，又辛苦你们为这座城市到处奔波了。
Welcome back. I appreciate your help more than I can express — it couldn't have been easy running all over the city.
别这么见外嘛，布洛妮娅。你听着好像有点虚…没事吧？
That's what friends are for, Bronya! ...You don't sound like yourself. Is something wrong?
我还好，只是…只是有一阵子没休息了。突发情况实在太多……
I'm fine, I just... I haven't rested in a while. There's just too much happening all at once...
公司又有什么动作了吗？
I'm sure we can turn things around.
这种事，换成谁都很难面对…
You couldn't have foreseen all this.
Perhaps, but the IPC won't wait for me to catch up.
「公司」动作很快，贝洛伯格现在到处都是他们的人，而且口径都是统一的「资产评估」。
They're moving quickly. Belobog is crawling with their agents — all they talk about is "asset evaluation."
不过除了你们提到的大矿区，其它地方倒是没有出现剧烈的冲突情况。大概是因为托帕下了命令，不允许他们肆意骚扰市民。
The silver lining is that apart from the mine incident you mentioned, there haven't been any major conflicts in other areas. I suppose Topaz must have issued an order against harassing the citizenry.
但这不影响恐慌情绪在人们心中堆积…大家都有些不知所措，不知道陌生的黑衣人从哪来、他们究竟抱有什么目的。
Still, that hasn't stopped panic from building... People are confused — they don't know where these strangers in black came from, nor what their intentions are.
那…你后来又和托帕联系上了吗？其实我和{NICKNAME}一直很好奇，她提供的解决方案到底是什么……
Did you manage to get in touch with Topaz again? We're curious to know what solution she has in mind...
嗯，我请两位过来，就是想听听你们的意见。
That's the reason I asked for you to come here. I need your advice.
是一份「合同」，托帕不久前才发给我的，下面还附了她的亲笔信。
...The contract Topaz sent to me a little while ago. There's a handwritten letter attached.
两位请先看一遍上面的内容吧…然后再告诉我你们的看法。
Please, take a look at the contents... and then tell me your thoughts.
…布洛妮娅小姐——请允许我在往后的文字中使用这个亲昵的称谓——接下来，我想和你讲一个和我自己有关的故事。
Miss Bronya — if you'll permit me to call you that — I'd like to share a story with you from my own life.
在你眼中不近人情的公司职员们，其实也都有着各自的人生轨迹。以我自己为例，我出身自一个位于银河边缘的不起眼星球，它的名字除了原住民以外几乎无人知晓。

In your eyes, the IPC may seem heartless or cruel, but in reality, we all have a story to tell. As for myself, I was born on a small, unremarkable planet at the edge of the galaxy — a place whose name is known only to the native inhabitants.
我的母星资源十分匮乏。为了生存，居民们不得不大量出售劳动力，从事为星间其它文明代工的职业——多数是化工行业或重工业。
My home planet was extremely resource-poor. To survive, people worked laboriously, manufacturing products for other civilizations in the galaxy — mostly in the chemical or heavy industries.
在这样的背景下，母星的自然环境日渐恶劣。不知从我童年的哪一刻开始，人们必须戴着呼吸面罩才敢在街道上行走，耳边从早到晚都会传来撕心裂肺的咳声。

Given these circumstances, the natural environment of my home planet became increasingly harsh. I don't recall the exact moment when it happened, but people started wearing respirators just to walk down the street. All you could hear were the wheezing coughs of the people — day and night.
很快，我的家乡走入了末路。相对富有的人们选择了星际移民，重新开始；留下的多数人只能在污水、酸雨和尘霾的伴随下苟延残喘，等待绝望迫近。

My home was facing its demise. The relatively wealthy chose interstellar migration and started anew. The majority who stayed could only struggle on amidst sewage, acid rain, and dust, waiting for the end.
直到有一天，公司来到了我的母星，还带来了一整套先进的环境改造方案。作为交换，他们要求星球上的每一位居民都签下合同，成为——或是在未来成为——公司的员工。

Finally, one fateful day, the IPC arrived on my home planet. They had the technology to repair our planet's damaged environment. In return for their help, they asked for just one thing — that all inhabitants sign a contract which would make them employees of the IPC.
合同签订后的两年，黑云和雾霾消失了，人们开始摘下面罩；三年后，植被和树木重新开始生长、繁盛；五年后，许多一度绝迹的动物重新进入了人们的视野，活蹦乱跳。

Two years after signing the contract, the dark clouds and haze disappeared, and people began to take off their masks. After three years, vegetation and trees began to grow and thrive again. After five years, many animals — previously on the brink of extinction — reappeared.
我也是在那时到了年纪，正式成为了「战略投资部」的一员。我亲眼目睹了家乡经历的变化，也决心将同样的变化带给银河中诸多有着类似经历的世界。

When I was finally old enough, I officially became a member of the Strategic Investment Department. I witnessed the changes that took place on my home world and was determined to bring the same changes to many other worlds in the galaxy that were experiencing the same plight.
布洛妮娅小姐，我怀着真挚的心情写下这封信，为的是向你说明一件事——
I am writing to you, Miss Bronya, with the genuine desire to express something important...
「自由」对人而言是十分宝贵的财富；但在做现实的选择题时，总有些东西会被赋予比它更高的价值——比如「生存」。
I know freedom is precious to people, but in reality there are things of much greater value... such as survival.
仅靠贝洛伯格人的双手，你们需要跨越多少代人才能重回星空的怀抱？谁能保证未来的每一任守护者都和你一样审慎、开明？谁能断言类似星核的灾难不会再次降临？

How many generations of Belobogians will it take to embrace the stars again without assistance? Who can guarantee that every future Guardian will be as prudent and enlightened as you? How can you guarantee that a disaster such as the Stellaron Crisis will not descend upon Belobog yet again?
我已经为你们争取到了最好的方案。只要签下这份合同，贝洛伯格欠下的所有债务都可以一笔勾销。此外，公司还会设立专项小组，支援雅利洛-Ⅵ的重建工作。

I have already negotiated the best possible deal for you. Once you sign this contract, all of Belobog's debts will be forgiven. In addition, the IPC will set up a special team to support the reconstruction of Jarilo-VI.
我能够理解，对你而言，这会是一个极度艰难的抉择，因为你必须背负起贝洛伯格全体居民的命运。
I can understand that for you, this is an extremely difficult decision, because you, and you alone will bear the fate of all Belobogians.
但也正因如此，我相信你一定会做出正确的决定——能让你的子民真正从中获益的决定。
But because of this, I believe that you will make the right decision — a decision that will truly benefit your people.
托帕在信里的语气，感觉相当真诚啊…{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
Her words do sound quite sincere... What do you make of it, {NICKNAME}?
嗯…我不愿意相信她是为了欺骗我才编撰了这个故事。
I'm inclined to agree... It's hard to imagine she wrote that letter just to deceive me.
She has a way with words.
嗯…毕竟是身居高位的公司使者，她很明白怎么运用「真诚」这件武器。
Yes... she is a high-ranking member of the IPC, after all. She knows how to use words to her advantage.
戏演得很好…但我不信任她。
She's a smooth talker, but that doesn't mean she's telling the truth.
我必须承认…她展现出来的真诚触动到了我。我不愿意相信她是为了欺骗我才编撰了这个故事。
I agree, but it struck me as an honest letter — I found the contents quite moving. It's hard to imagine she'd write something like this just to deceive me.
有一点她说得没错，这个选择的确太艰难了。
In any case, she wasn't wrong when she said this would be an extremely difficult decision.
这个星球的命运，它承载的文明，曾在这里发生过、以及未来将会在这里发生的一切…现在全都悬在我的指尖上。
This planet's fate, the civilization it carries, everything that has happened here and everything that will happen... it all rests in my hands...
这绝对不能——也绝对不该——是我一个人的决定。
This definitely can't — and shouldn't — be a decision made by me alone.
应该收集所有人的看法。
Perhaps you should gain some insight from others first?
你的想法和我一样…这对我来说是种慰藉，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
That thought has crossed my mind, and it comforts me to hear you say that, {NICKNAME}.
的确，就应该这样！绝对不能让布洛妮娅一个人承担这么重大的选择，还有它可能导致的后果…!
Right? I don't think it's fair for you to carry the weight alone. Why not discuss it with others first?
我更愿意相信你的判断。
I trust your judgment more than anyone else's.
虽然我也很相信她的判断。
I trust her judgment too, but...
但是，如果要让她一个人承受如此重大的选择，还有它可能导致的后果——想想就可怕，我这辈子都不想面对这么沉重的选择题！
What if this decision is too much for one person? The impact of this choice could haunt Bronya for the rest of her life.
托帕给的期限很紧，我猜她是想让我尽快做出决定。
Topaz hasn't given me much time to consider. She wants me to decide as soon as possible.
我原本打算组织上下层区的所有居民进行公投…但从当前的时间节点来看，这条路恐怕已经被堵死了。
I wanted to put it to a vote, and let all the citizens of both the Overworld and the Underworld have their say. But with such little time, I'm afraid that's a lost cause.
我会立刻召集克里珀堡的筑城者，讨论合同签署相关的事宜。至于民间的部分…我想拜托两位替我收集民意。
I'll convene the Qlipoth Fort Architects immediately to discuss the contract. As for the locals, I'd like you to gauge their stance on the matter.
你们在贝洛伯格人心中的声望很高，他们肯定愿意对两位吐露心声。
The people of Belobog hold both of you in high regard. They'll most certainly be willing to tell you their thoughts.
It's time to race against the clock.
Yes, we need to move fast.
…这是贝洛伯格人自己的大事，咱们就别掺和了！
I... think we should leave this matter to the Belobogians... Don't you agree?
放心吧布洛妮娅！虽然之前没能说服托帕，但这件事我们一定会好好完成的！
We've got your back! We failed to convince Topaz, but this should be a piece of cake!
谢谢你的承诺，三月。我要去召集大臣们了，晚些时候我们再在这里碰面。
Thank you, March. I'll assemble the ministers. Let's meet up again here later.
姬子，居然是姬子！应、应该是本人吧？不会是全息投影，或者别的什么……
Himeko! Wait, is that the real you or a hologram!?
放心吧小三月，就是我本人，如假包换。
Haha, it's the real me, March — real as they come.
您就是星穹列车的姬子女士？幸会，之前那场…战役，多亏了您出手援助，我们才能顺利得胜。
Miss Himeko? From the Astral Express? I—It's an honor — thank you for all your help in our previous... campaign. Things might have turned out differently without your support.
要是能提前得知您前来的消息，筑城者肯定会以礼相迎。只是现在的情况特殊……
If we'd known of your arrival beforehand, the Architects would have given you a proper welcome. I'm afraid the current circumstances are quite exceptional...
不必为我解释太多，布洛妮娅小姐。我明白，你的城市正在面临空前的困境——我来到这里就是为了告知你事态的全貌。
I understand, Miss Bronya — no need to explain. Your city is facing immense difficulties — my intention is simply to ensure that you have all the relevant intel.
Do you have a solution, Himeko?
说是解决方案未免有些夸大其词，充其量只是提供一些额外的信息。
I hesitate to call it a solution, but I might have some information that might help.
我相信，在了解了这些信息之后，你身为大守护者，肯定能做出更明智的决断。
It is my hope that with this information, you will be better equipped as the supreme guardian to make a wise and informed decision.
Couldn't you have come a bit sooner?
领航员的事务可是很繁忙的，{NICKNAME}。你该庆幸我及时赶上了。
The life of a navigator is a busy one, {NICKNAME}. You should be glad that I made it in time.
我有些话想传达给大守护者。掌握了这些额外的信息之后，你一定能做出更明智的决断。
There is some important information that I must pass on to you, Supreme Guardian. It is my hope that it will better equip you to make a wise and informed decision.
信息…好。把您知道的都告诉我吧，姬子女士。
Information? Please, tell me what you know, Miss Himeko.
我恰好认识一位朋友，她对托帕的身世有所了解。的确，因为故乡的遭遇，在她眼里，被公司兼并大概是存续贝洛伯格这方文明的唯一方式。

I happen to have a friend with knowledge of Topaz. What Topaz said about her homeworld is indeed true... which is why she believes that the IPC's takeover of Belobog is the only way of ensuring the city's survival...
但恐怕有一件事，她刻意未曾提及：并非所有接受了公司条件的世界都得到了拯救。
...but there is one thing she intentionally left out: Not all worlds that have accepted the IPC's terms have been saved.
「重建星球生态」——规模如此巨大的项目必然伴随着风险。
Performing "ecological reconstruction" on a planet carries inevitable risks.
我从朋友那里拿到了些数据：真正能在公司的技术扶持下重获生机的星球，数量占项目总数的<unbreak>63%</unbreak>。
According to the intel provided by my friend, the success rate for the ecological reconstruction of worlds using the IPC's technology is <unbreak>63%</unbreak>.
六成多的概率？听起来确实不怎么靠谱呀……
Only <unbreak>63%</unbreak> of planets succeed? That's not exactly comforting...
当然，这里统计的是平均数据。托帕本人接手的项目，整体成功率在八成往上。她的业务能力无疑是最拔尖的那一档。

This is the overall average across all IPC projects. The success rate of projects personally handled by Topaz is above <unbreak>80%</unbreak>. She's undoubtedly one of the most capable people in her field.
我想传达的就是这些数字，这些「概率」。我觉得，只有把这些信息全都公开透明，对你来说才能算是公平。
I wanted to bring these numbers, these "probabilities" to light. I think it's only fair that you know all the facts before making a decision.
最后的最后，选择权还是在你手上，大守护者。
Ultimately, it's up to you, Supreme Guardian, to make the final call.
原来如此…谢谢您，姬子女士。您的信息让我看清楚了这件事的本质。
I understand... Thank you, Miss Himeko. This information is of great help.
不管对方的承诺有多美好，这纸合同代表的都是一场赌局。作为领袖，我绝对不能因为相信星运，就代替全城民众签下卖身契。
Regardless of how alluring their promises may be, this contract is nothing more than a gamble. As a leader, I cannot let the future of Belobog hinge on a roll of the dice.
既然你已经下了决心，我也不必再佯装中立了。我认为你的选择是正确的，布洛妮娅。
Now that you've decided, I don't have to pretend to be impartial anymore. I think you're making the right choice, Bronya.
星穹列车的各位——我脑海里浮现了一个想法，但要实现它需要在场各位的协助。
Astral friends, I have an idea. But for it to work, I'll need everyone's cooperation.
我需要花些时间动员城里的所有居民…然后还必须再和托帕见一次面。
I need some time to rally all the residents in the city... and then I'll meet with Topaz again.
不管她现在在哪里、在做什么，我恳请你们替我找到她。如果公司还在试图霸占属于贝洛伯格的资产，我恳求各位阻止他们的行动。
Please locate her for me. It doesn't matter where she is or what she's doing. And if the IPC is still trying to take over Belobog's assets, I ask that you do everything in your power to stop them.
放心，我们会找到托帕的。对方是银河中一等一难缠的势力，所以这次我会和三月、{NICKNAME}一起行动。
Don't worry, leave it to us — we'll find her. It won't be easy dealing with her, but March and {NICKNAME} will help me get the job done.
贝洛伯格不会出卖自己的未来。值得我们永远记住的，只有你们这些屡次在危难时刻伸出援手的朋友。
Belobog's future is not for sale, and we'll never forget the friends who stood by us in our time of need — not once, but twice.
唷…居然就在这个地方，真没想到。
Well, would you look at that. I never would've guessed it'd be here.
不过我可没看到什么机甲或者兵器啊？这四周都是结结实实的山岩，难道说……
But I don't see any mech or weapons... This place is completely surrounded by mountains — surely they can't be...
没错。那些兵器就藏在高耸的岩壁之中。
Affirmative. The weapons are concealed within the towering rock formations.
怪不得！怪不得我们上哪都找不到所谓的「兵工厂」——
No wonder we couldn't find the "automaton factory." It was right under our noses all along.
——等等，你刚才说，那些兵器一直都被藏在这里？也就是说…雅利洛-Ⅵ的筑城者和军团大战的时候，压根没用上这些兵器？
...Wait a minute, you said these weapons have been hidden here from the very beginning? That means the Architects of Jarilo-VI never used them in their fight against the Legion.
这些机兵自建成以来就从未离开过这里。公司于七百多年前撤离这颗星球以后，再也无人知晓该如何启动这批兵器。
Correct. After the IPC departed from this world more than <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, no one has possessed the necessary knowledge for activating these weapons.
根据公司留下的设计蓝图，筑城者们建造出了第一批仿制品机兵。但在阿丽萨•兰德率领的抵抗军中，主力仍是血肉之躯的人类。
The Architects used the IPC blueprints to construct replica automatons. However, the overwhelming majority of the combatants, commanded by Alisa Rand, were human.
…喔，原来如此。有关这个世界的传说越来越引人入胜了。
I see... The stories about this world are truly captivating.
我想向你提出一个问题，托帕。
I would like to ask you a question, Topaz.
嗯？这么大个机器人，别表现得这么拘谨嘛~问就是了。
Haha, you're awful polite for a big robot. Ask! Don't be shy!
「如果没有公司的介入，这个世界将走入末路」——对于这个结论，你是否深信不疑？
"If the IPC does not intervene, this world is doomed." Are you convinced of this conclusion beyond any doubt?
我信。来这之前，我翻阅了无数个案例，得出了一致的结论：凡是受到过「星核」侵扰的世界，最后没有任何一个能够逃离消亡的命运。
Yes. I've gone through countless case studies and they all point to the same conclusion: Any world that comes into contact with a Stellaron is doomed.
哪怕得到了星穹列车的帮助，哪怕表面看起来一片向好…这些都只是临时的喘息窗口。
On the surface, things may appear to be getting better since the Astral Express lent a helping hand, but sooner or later the underlying problems will resurface.
「长线的危机通常潜伏在繁荣的表面之下，一般人根本无从察觉。」
A looming crisis can often lie hidden beneath the illusion of prosperity, unnoticed by many.
…「了解」？这就完了？你不打算发表下自己的看法？
"Understood..." That's it? You don't have any thoughts on the matter?
情感读数表明，你的回答真诚且准确。我想要确认的只有此事。
Emotional readings indicate that your response is sincere and accurate. That is all I wish to confirm regarding this matter.
关于这个星球的未来，我持有与你不同的意见。但我的意见并无重要性，因为我是工具，而非决策者。
While my opinion on the future of this planet may differ from yours, it ultimately holds no weight. I am merely a tool, not a decision-maker.
…呵，有趣的家伙。要是我的同事都跟你一样有自知之明就好了~
Ha... If only my colleagues had the same self-awareness as you.
走吧，账账——我们下去仔细评估一下。
Come on Numby, we've got some assessing to do.
终于来啦~我还以为你们要赶不上了呢。
Oh, hey there slowpokes! I was starting to think you weren't gonna show up.
咦？三月小姐身边这位女士…总觉得有些眼熟？
Hmm... This lady next to Miss March looks oddly familiar.
幸会，托帕小姐。我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
Pleasure to meet you, Miss Topaz. I'm Himeko, the Astral Express' navigator.
哦哦，我想起来了，您就是那位赫赫有名的姬子女士！我有几位同事对您崇拜极了，做梦都想和您聊上两句！
Oh wow, I remember now, the illustrious Miss Himeko! Some of my colleagues dream about meeting you!
那当然啦~「无名客」的名气可大啦，毕竟你们追随的是大名鼎鼎的阿基维利嘛。
Of course! The Nameless have quite the reputation — you're following in the footsteps of the great Akivili, after all!
会有的，以后会有的~可别低估了「无名客」在星系间的名气呀，毕竟你们追随的是大名鼎鼎的阿基维利嘛。
I'd be surprised if you didn't! Don't underestimate the reputation of the Nameless out among the stars — you're following in the footsteps of the great Akivili, after all!
你们之间的交流如此融洽，我很高兴。托帕小姐，听你打招呼的语气，现在的状况你应该很清楚吧？
I'm pleased to see how well everyone's been getting along. Topaz, based on your greeting I presume you have a good grasp of the current situation?
当然~死线已经过了，但布洛妮娅还没有在合同上签字。这背后的阻力，稍微动动脑筋就能猜到了。
Of course! The deadline has already passed, but Bronya still hasn't signed the contract. I think I can guess what's holding her back...
请别误会，我们无意与公司和董事会作对。只是恰巧，雅利洛-Ⅵ这颗星球上有我们珍视的朋友，以及朋友的朋友。
Please don't misunderstand us, Miss Topaz. We have no intention of opposing the IPC or its board of directors... but we have very dear friends on Jarilo-VI.
什么也不做、不说，就这么眼睁睁地看着他们签下不平等的合约——那不是「无名客」的作风。
Standing idly by and watching them sign an unfair contract... goes against everything the Nameless are about.
那个…姬子，我们是不是该试着跟她谈判来着？这么聊下去的话……
Um... Miss Himeko, sorry for interrupting, but this doesn't sound like a negotiation...
不必费那个心了，三月。她十分钟前就决定好要怎么做了。
We needn't waste our time, March. She made her decision ten minutes ago.
不愧是列车组的头号人物，真是过人的洞察力！
Haha, there's no fooling the Astral Express!
说得没错~很多时候，立场不同不代表谁对、谁错——但为了让工作能够推进下去、不陷入停滞的局面，往往只有一个办法……
You're absolutely right. Differing views don't necessarily mean one person is right and the other is wrong. However, to keep things moving forward, there's usually only one solution...
My superiors have granted me the approval I need.
怎么了，对我的工作流程这么好奇？
You're very curious about my work, aren't you?
Your vacation time has been approved?
这么想知道的话，就告诉你们吧——
So many eager faces — I won't keep you in the dark any longer.
——请求允许对星穹列车成员发动特攻的申请，已经得到批复了！
Approval to launch an attack on the members of the Astral Express...
几位，真不愧是星穹列车的王牌！实在是精彩！
Incredible! No wonder the Astral Express is so highly regarded!
热身就到这儿吧？接下来该轮到我——
Finished warming up? Now it's my turn...
停下——请都停下！各位，请放下你们手里的武器！
Stop! All of you! Put down your weapons!
布、布洛妮娅，你可算来了！再慢两步的话，场面真要控制不住了！
B—Bronya? You're here just in time! Things were about to get out of control!
大守护者小姐？我刚刚还在想，你应该不会只把列车组推到我面前，自己缩在后面等结果吧…这可不像你的为人啊。
Supreme Guardian? I was starting to wonder whether you'd left the Express crew to fend for themselves! That would hardly be becoming of you.
当然不会。我之所以晚来一步，是因为手头有一件非常重要的事需要处理。
I would never do such a thing. There was an important matter that required my attention.
对。它的重要性，你大概一眼就能看出来…这句话的意思是，我想请你来帮忙评估我们目前的成果。
Yes. I think you'll understand the significance once you see it... In short, I need you to help us evaluate our current progress.
…请我来？有意思。我还以为你已经下定决心要阻挠我开展工作了呢。
...Help you? Hmm, that's interesting. I was under the impression you'd already decided to obstruct our operations here.
我逐字逐句看过了你写的信，托帕小姐。我对你的童年经历深感同情。
I have read your letter word for word, Miss Topaz, and your childhood experiences truly touched me.
正因为你的家乡经历了和雅利洛-Ⅵ类似的劫难，所以我能理解你看问题的视角、还有你选择的立场。
Your hometown once experienced a similar catastrophe to Jarilo-VI, so I can understand your perspective on the issue and the position you have taken.
也正是出于这份共情，我至今还抱着一丝希望——即便经历了这些不愉快，我认为我们之间依旧可以达成共识…通过和平的方式。
It's because of this empathy you have, that I still hold out a glimmer of hope. Despite all that's happened, I hope we can still find common ground... through peaceful means.
我得承认，和你沟通的过程总是很舒畅。我刚才的态度有些冒犯，请你见谅。
...I have to admit, talking to you is always such a pleasure. I apologize for my behavior just now, it was... inappropriate.
既然话已经说到了这个份上，那我就跟你走一趟。但还是要给各位打好预防针…想改变上面的决定可不是什么易事。

I admire your determination. Seeing as we've come this far... I've changed my mind — I'll hold off a little longer and see what you have to show me. But remember — winning over the higher-ups won't be easy.
我明白。所以我打算一步一步来…先试着改变你的想法。
I understand. That's why I've been taking things one step at a time. The first step was changing your mind.
列车组的各位，也请和我们一起来吧。
Members of the Express, we'll need your help, too.
三月，{NICKNAME}——那边支离破碎的大家伙，你们还有印象吧？
...Do you two recognize that broken-down machine over there?
这台机器的名字是「造物引擎」，回想起来了吗？
It's called the Engine of Creation. Do you remember it?
托帕小姐，我知道你之前做了很多调研工作——我想知道，你的资料里是否有关于「造物引擎」的记载？
Miss Topaz, I know you've done a lot of research into Belobog. I was wondering if there was any information on the Engine of Creation in your records?
完全没有。所以我才觉得不可思议…这么庞大的工程，居然在战略投资部的调研报告里完全没有提及。
Not at all... which is why I find it so incredible... Such a massive feat of engineering, yet there's not a single mention of it in any of the Strategic Investment Department's reports.
我或许了解个中原因。「造物引擎」完全是由贝洛伯格人自己建造的，没有借助任何外来的技术。
I may know the reason why. The Engine of Creation was constructed solely by the people of Belobog, without any external assistance.
初代大守护者阿丽萨•兰德领导了这项工程。战士们在前线浴血奋战时，工程师们在后方夜以继日地设计、搭建……
The project was led by the first Supreme Guardian — Alisa Rand. While warriors fought on the front lines, the engineers worked tirelessly behind the scenes, designing and constructing it...
也就是说…「造物引擎」是由贝洛伯格人自主研发的战争兵器？
So what you're saying is... the "Engine of Creation" was a weapon constructed by the Belobogians themselves?
的确，造物引擎在建成初期被投入过战斗，也在对抗军团的战役中立下了赫赫战功。
The Engine of Creation was commissioned for combat shortly after its completion and played a significant role in the battles against the Legion.
但阿丽萨•兰德的目光比任何人所想的都要长远。在很长的一段时间里，这台机器的代号曾是「地质改造工程单元」。
But Alisa Rand had a long-term vision, one that nobody anticipated. For a long time, this feat of engineering was codenamed the "Geological Reconstruction Unit."
它被赋予的真正使命，是在驱逐所有企图侵害这个世界的敌人之后，帮助贝洛伯格人重建家园——让这个世界回归鼎盛时的模样。
It was actually given a much grander purpose: To help the Belobogians rebuild their homeland and restore their world to its former glory... after driving away all those who threatened it.
长线发展的理念…跨越了时间，也跨越了生命。那位兰德女士真是一位伟人。
Remarkable. A vision that would transcend both time and generations of Belobogians. Madam Rand was truly an inspiring leader.
而我眼前的这位「兰德」…也不遑多让。
Not to take away from the Supreme Guardian in front of me... Hehe, she's quite the inspiring leader as well.
谢谢你的认同，但我其实没做什么。
Thank you, but I didn't really do anything.
我只是把贝洛伯格的人们集结在一起，并告诉他们，我们得来不易的自由再次面临着巨大的威胁。
All I did was bring the people of Belobog together and make them aware that our hard-earned freedom was under immense threat once again.
想要存护这份自由，我们就必须行动起来，向那些怀疑的眼光证明，我们有意愿、也有能力掌控自己的命运。
If we want to preserve this freedom, we must act and show those who doubt us that we, Belobog, have the will and the ability to control our own destiny.
动员的结果，你也看到了。贝洛伯格的孩子们已经做出了决定，他们想靠自己的双手「存护」这个家园。
The outcome of our mobilization speaks for itself. The children of Belobog have made their decision. They have chosen to preserve this homeland with their own two hands.
这么大的惊喜，真是无论如何都预料不到。
...I must say, I didn't anticipate this at all.
…我会为你们争取这个机会。我把你们的境遇和自己童年的经历混为了一谈，这是个重大的错误。
I'll fight for this opportunity for you, Bronya. I shouldn't have conflated your own circumstances with my childhood. That was a serious lapse of judgment on my part.
我的故乡没有出现一位意志坚定的领导者，人们早早就放弃了自救的念头。而你们的文明竟然在风雪中坚持了<unbreak>700</unbreak>年之久…真令人钦佩。

My world never had a resolute leader, so people gave up on the idea of saving themselves long ago. But your civilization has persisted through the snow and storms for <unbreak>700</unbreak> years... A truly admirable feat.
这么说，你愿意收回之前的决定？至于那笔债务，我们一定会想办法慢慢偿还。只是这需要时间……
Then, are you willing to retract your previous decision? As for the debt... we'll find a way to gradually repay it, but it'll take some time...
…很可惜，收并雅利洛-Ⅵ是得到公司高层点头的战略决策。即便我有意颠覆这个决定，想说服上面的人也非常困难。
...Unfortunately the acquisition of Jarilo-VI is a strategic decision that's been approved by the IPC's top brass. Even if I wanted to overturn it, convincing them would be extremely difficult.
放心吧，托帕小姐。我愿意代表星穹列车，押上全体「无名客」的名誉为这个世界担保。
Don't worry, Miss Topaz. Myself and all of the Nameless aboard the Astral Express are willing to vouch for this world.
太好了！这样应该行得通。接下来的汇报流程，以及后续可能的追责……
Fantastic! That might just work. As for the reports and potential accountability...
…综上所述，托帕，部门将对你作出如下处分——
In light of the events that have transpired, we will be taking the following disciplinary measures against you.
职级降级，从P<unbreak>45</unbreak>下调至P<unbreak>44</unbreak>，基本薪酬作相应调整；取消一个周期内，你参与的所有奖励计划，包括股票期权和绩效奖金。

Your rank will be demoted from P<unbreak>45</unbreak> to P<unbreak>44</unbreak>, with corresponding adjustment to your basic salary. All bonuses for the current cycle will be revoked, including stock options and performance bonuses.
关于本次事故，你需要向「钻石」额外提交一份报告。如果对于处罚有任何异议，你也可以通过书面方式进行申诉。
You will also need to submit an additional report regarding this incident to Diamond. If you have any objections to this penalty, you may also file an appeal in writing.
收到。那…还有人想说点什么吗？
Understood. Is there anything else anyone would like to add?
既然各位都没有意见，我们就散会吧。
If there are no further remarks, this meeting is concluded.
唷，运气不错啊，弄砸了这么个项目，职级居然只降一级，看来上面的老几位是挺照顾你。哦，他们都下线了吧，那——
You only got demoted one rank? Whew, you dodged a bullet there — pretty big project to mess up on. Someone must be looking out for you. Oh, they've already left the call...
我就把这垃圾效果器关掉咯。
Ugh, this voice changer is driving me crazy. Let me turn it off.
...Aventurine? Why are you still on the line?
这话说的，我不能在？干嘛这么嫌弃，我又不是你的上级…哦不对，现在应该是了？哈哈，失礼失礼，我还没适应呢！
Hey, what's with the hostility? It's not like I'm your boss... Oh, wait, I guess I am now? Haha! My apologies — I'm still getting used to my new place in the hierarchy!
有什么事吗？不妨有话直说吧。
...Can I help you? If you've got something to say, say it already.
哎，没什么事，就是关心关心你。我早说了，雅利洛-Ⅵ这案子一看就带刺，还榨不出多少油水，何必掺和呢？
Oh, nothing important — just checking in on you. I told you Jarilo-VI would be a high-risk low-reward case. Why'd you even bother?
做我们这行，心地不能太善良，否则，路会越走越窄的……
In our line of work, having a kind heart can be more of a liability than an asset. If you're not careful, you'll end up leading yourself down a dead-end road...
...Anything else? If not, I'm hanging up.
…哎，别挂别挂！你是真不在聊天的状态啊，行，那说点你会感兴趣的——
W—Wait, hold on a minute, don't hang up. I get it, you're not in the mood for this conversation right now... Okay, how about this — something that might interest you...
你在雅利洛-Ⅵ玩朋友游戏的时候，「钻石」搞定了筑材物流部的大佬。缺席今天的「圆桌会议」，就是因为这个。
While you were enjoying your playtime on Jarilo-VI, Diamond was busy taking care of the head honcho of the Building Material Logistics Department. That's why he didn't attend today's meeting.
对，大名鼎鼎的塔拉梵，七人董事会的一员！他那一票要押咱们身上了，明白吗，是咱们，不是市场开拓部，这回奥斯瓦尔多终于笑不出来咯！

That's right, the renowned Taravan — one of the seven board members! He's throwing his support behind us instead of the Marketing Development Department for once. Ha! Oswaldo won't be laughing anymore!
不过…托帕，「钻石」也算是你我的贵人，如此重要的日子，你来这么一下，多少让战略投资部有些不好交代吧？
Diamond's been a great help to both of us. Your antics on such a crucial day can't exactly have painted the Strategic Investment Department in a good light, y'know?
既然你明白，咱们就说正事：我现在在庇尔波因特，有笔关乎整个部门的大生意，我这一趟还缺个靠谱的项目管理——朋友，非你莫属啊。

Since you get the point, let's get down to business... I'm currently at Pier Point — there's a major deal that could affect the whole department. I just so happen to need a reliable project manager for the job... what do you say, old friend?
有趣，什么案子让你也学会「合作」了？
Huh, and what prompted the mighty Aventurine to start collaborating with others?
还能是什么，「匹诺康尼」呗。
对咯~我喜欢的就是这种反应。
That's right⁓ Now that's the kind of reaction I was hoping for.
钻石最后选了你？我以为会是「欧泊」…或者「龙晶」…那桩生意，至少得P<unbreak>46</unbreak>以上的人出面。
Hold on a minute... Diamond picked you for this project? I was expecting someone like Opal or Obsidian to handle it — at least somebody higher than rank P<unbreak>46</unbreak>...
谁知道呢。「家族」的人脑袋都不太正常，想和他们做买卖？我看是没戏。
Honestly, who knows? "The Family" has some pretty questionable characters. If you ask me, doing business with them is a lost cause.
哎呀，三月，{NICKNAME}！真是稀客，什么风把你们吹来了？
Well, well, look who we have here! {NICKNAME} and March, paying us a visit. What's the occasion?
有件重要的事需要你的意见。
We need your opinion on an important matter.
…嗯？语气这么严肃，这可不像你啊。是什么重要的事，说来给我听听？
Uh-oh, sounds like something serious is happening. You'd better fill me in.
将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了希露瓦……
You tell Serval about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
这到底是怎么…不是，这信息量也太大了吧？！不行，我得缓缓……
...What? How is that possible? I need a moment to wrap my head around this...
时间很紧，希露瓦！你有什么想法就告诉我们吧。
Serval, we're racing against the clock! No time for head-wrapping.
…我知道了。如果让我来选…我会签下这份合同。
...It's okay, I've thought it through... If it were up to me, I'd... sign the contract.
咦？！我还以为以希露瓦的性格，绝对不会同意这条件呢！
What!? Hold on, are you serious? I thought you'd be against it for sure!
让你意外啦？但我的理由其实很简单。
Surprised? My reasons are pretty simple.
签下这份合同，就意味着我们不必再为「活着」发愁了。对于这里的大部分居民，尤其是下层区人来说，单单这一点就足够说服他们了。
Signing this contract would mean we no longer have to worry about "surviving." For most of the residents here, especially those in the Underworld, that would be more than enough to persuade them.
至于给公司打工——嗐，人总归是要工作的，在哪儿干不是干？要是公司的家伙敢欺负到我们头上，到时候再群起反抗也不迟！
As for working for the company, pfft, people need to work no matter where they are, right? If the IPC tries to take too many liberties, we can always rise up against them!
话又说回来，我从小就憧憬星空，所以才会爱上科学，投身于对星核的研究。如果有人告诉我，我的愿望立刻就能实现，而且只需要付出一点点代价…那我大概不会犹豫。

You know, I've always longed for the stars since I was a child, which is why I devoted myself to science and the studying of the Stellaron. If someone told me that I could do whatever research I wanted, with only a small price to pay... I probably wouldn't hesitate.
原来如此，希露瓦是这么想的啊……
I see... I suppose that makes sense.
明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.
我从小就憧憬星空，所以才会爱上科学，投身于对星核的研究。如果有人告诉我，我的愿望立刻就能实现，而且只需要付出一点点代价…那我大概不会犹豫。

I've always longed for the stars since I was a child, which is why I devoted myself to science and the studying of the Stellaron. If someone told me that I could do whatever research I wanted with only a small price to pay... I probably wouldn't hesitate.
不知道其他人会怎么看待，但这就是我的真实想法。
I can't speak for everyone, but this is how I really feel.
又见面了两位，别来无恙？
We meet again! How have you two been?
呃…{NICKNAME}的表情怎么这么凝重？是有什么心事吗？
Uh-oh... That look on {NICKNAME}'s face tells me something's wrong. I hope it's nothing too serious.

看来是很严肃的事啊…请说吧，我会仔细听的。
