You tell Pela about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
这…你们说的这些都是真实的吗？！不会是编出来捉弄人的故事吧？
Really...? You better not be making things up!
我们当然也希望是虚构的…可惜这些都是现实。
I wish it were made up... Unfortunately it's all true.
时间很紧了，佩拉！布洛妮娅需要知道大家的想法。
We don't have much time, Pela! Bronya wants to get everyone's opinion.
这么重大的抉择，却要在这么短的时间里…冷静，佩拉…冷静地思考。
Wait, you're telling me I have to make this huge decision on the spot? At least give me a few seconds to think it over.
Okay, I think I've got it.
让我决定的话…我可能会同意公司开出的条件。
If it were up to me... I'd probably agree to the IPC's conditions.
原来如此…佩拉是怎么考虑的呢？
我看到过几组观测数字，按照现在寒潮消退的速率，至少要再过三四代人的时间，笼罩城市的风雪才能完全停歇。
I've looked at some of the climate reports, and based on the data I've seen, it'll take three or four more generations for the snow to completely subside.
…这还是在没有其它意外发生的前提之下。老实说，比起没办法亲眼见证的未来…我更在乎当下，更关心自己身边的人。
And that's assuming no other disasters occur. I care more about those in the present than a future I can't be sure of.
如果公司的方案真的能够立竿见影，付出这样的代价在我看来是值得的。
If the IPC is able to bring about immediate change, then I think that's a price well worth paying.
用双手为后人筑造地基——听上去特别伟大，对吧？但是对于切身参与到这项工程中的人们来说，这里面又有多少乐趣可言呢？
Building a better world for future generations sound great, right? But is it any fun for the engineers and Architects who are directly involved in such a pursuit?
原来如此，相比冀望缥缈的未来，佩拉更希望身边的人能过上好的生活……
I see. So compared to a distant and uncertain future, what you really care about is making sure the people around you have a good life...
明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.
如果公司的方案真的能够立竿见影，付出这样的代价在我看来是值得的。

不知道我的意见能有多少分量…但至少这是我的心声。
I'm not sure how much weight my opinion carries, but that's my take on the matter.
噢，这不是{NICKNAME}和三月小姐吗！许久不见，没想到你们又来贝洛伯格了。
Is that {NICKNAME} and Miss March? It's been a while! I didn't think you'd be back in Belobog so soon.
最近城里不太平啊。突然冒出来的黑衣人四处作乱，铁卫拿他们都没什么办法……
It's been pretty hectic in the city lately. All these people dressed in black suddenly showed up, and even the Silvermane Guards have had trouble dealing with them...
有件重要的事需要你的意见。
We need your opinion on an important matter.
哦？是什么事，居然需要收集我的意见？

将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了邓恩……
You tell Dunn about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
…原来那帮黑衣人是这个身份！简直不敢相信，真相居然如此骇人！
...So that's who they are. Huh, it's worse than I imagined.
守护者大人一定面临着空前巨大的压力…我们真的给不了她任何帮助吗？真是让人……
The Madam Guardian must be under a lot of pressure... Is there really nothing we can do to assist her?
我们来这儿就是为了替她收集大家的声音。时间不等人，我们想知道你是怎么看的。
We're here to gather everyone's opinion on the matter. I know this is a little sudden, but we're running out of time. What's your take?
Why, I'd refuse the contract, of course! There is no room for compromise!
看看那群黑衣人嚣张跋扈的样子，怎么能信任那种家伙？签了合同又如何，谁能保证他们不会毁约？
Just look at them — arrogant, stomping around here as if they own the place. How can such people be trusted? Who's to say they won't breach the contract?
面对这种胁迫，我们必须反抗、反抗、反抗到底！一秒都不能动了服软的心思！
Faced with this sort of coercion, we must resist them with all our might! Surrendering is not an option!
一定要提醒守护者大人，不能主动踩进对方设好的陷阱里！
You must warn the Madam Guardian not to allow herself to fall into their trap!
邓恩，真不愧有一颗军人的心啊……
A soldier's perspective is always valuable, Dunn.
明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.
面对这种胁迫，我们必须反抗、反抗、反抗到底！一秒都不能动了服软的心思！

一定要提醒守护者大人，不能主动踩进对方设好的陷阱里！

上层区该问的人已经都问过了，对吧？
Did we miss anyone in the Overworld? I think we asked just about everyone we needed to.
从现在收集的结果来看…支持和公司签合同的声音好像要更大一些呢。
From what I've gathered, it seems like most people in the Overworld are leaning towards signing the IPC's contract.
抓紧时间去下层吧，我很好奇娜塔莎和希儿会怎么看这件事……
We'd better hurry to the Underworld and see what Natasha and Seele make of it all...
小三月，{NICKNAME}？你们居然在下层区…而且还绷着脸，发生什么了吗？
Miss March, {NICKNAME}, what brings you two to the Underworld? And why the long face?
有件重要的事需要你的意见。
We need your opinion on an important matter.
虽然有点突然…但既然两位专程登门造访，想必事态相当紧急。请说吧，我会仔细听的。
Seems a little out of the blue, but since you came all this way, it must be urgent. Go ahead.
将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了娜塔莎……
You tell Natasha about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
还真是…密集的信息。抱歉两位，我知道你们在赶时间，但我需要稍微思考一下。
That's a lot of information to take in. Sorry, both of you — I know you're in a hurry, but I need a moment to think.
别着急，娜塔！一定要把你最真实的想法告诉我们。
No stress, Nat. Just tell us what you really think.
…我已经想好了。如果我是布洛妮娅，就不会签署这份合同。
I've thought about it, and... Well, if I were Bronya, I wouldn't sign it.
的确，公司开出的价码很诱人。如果拒绝，贝洛伯格不仅要承担还清巨额债务的压力，还会被一方极为强大的势力盯上。
I won't deny, the offer on the table is a very tempting one... and if we refuse, Belobog will not only have the burden of a huge debt — we may also incite the wrath of a very powerful force...
但即便如此…我想起了上学时读到过的一句话：「愿意放弃自由寻求保障的人，最后两者皆空」。
...but even so, a quote I read back in school came to me just now: "Those who are willing to give up freedom for security will end up with neither."
下层区所经历的一切，让我对这句话有了深切的了解。于我个人而言…我宁愿背负巨石在雪原里跋涉，也不愿意被关在漂亮的笼子里，过虚假的生活。
Living in the Underworld has taught me that this phrase is true. I'd rather trek through the frigid Snow Plains than live in a beautiful cage.
娜塔莎的想法，听上去很有说服力耶……
反对票又多了一张——谢谢你的回答，娜塔。
Another vote for the against pile. Thanks for your insight, Nat.
「愿意放弃自由寻求保障的人，最后两者皆空」。
"Those who are willing to give up freedom for security will end up with neither."
这个道理，我衷心希望布洛妮娅也能理解。
I hope Bronya takes these words seriously.
三月姐姐…还有{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！你们…你们怎么来了？
Miss March, {F#big sister}{M#big brother} {NICKNAME}! What brings you to the Underworld?
克拉拉，你好呀！咦？史瓦罗是出门了吗？
Hey there, Clara! Huh? Is Svarog not around?
史瓦罗先生，和一个叫托帕的姐姐一起走了……
Mr. Svarog went out for a walk with a lady called Topaz...
什么，托帕？！你知道他们去哪了吗？

克拉拉也不清楚…但是史瓦罗先生答应我，他很快就会回来的……
I'm not sure... but Mr. Svarog promised he'd be back soon...
怎么办，{NICKNAME}…本来我还想说，史瓦罗肯定能提出有建设性的意见……
Ugh! What now, {NICKNAME}? Svarog's super logical, we should definitely get his opinion...
克拉拉的想法也很重要。
Clara's opinion is just as important!

True. Dan Heng's always saying that Clara's really insightful for her age.
…欸？三月姐姐，是有什么问题要问克拉拉吗？
Huh? Miss March, do you want to ask me something?

You tell Clara about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
好复杂，好沉重…克拉拉不知道该怎么……
Uhh... That's complicated... I don't know what to say...
没关系的，克拉拉！你只要把当下真实的想法告诉我们就好。
It's alright, Clara, no pressure. Just tell us how you feel about it.
那个…克拉拉觉得，如果还有选择余地的话…未来的路，还是应该由大家自己决定。
I... I think if we have a choice for the future, it should be everyone's decision.
因为…克拉拉、虎克、还有鼹鼠党其他的小朋友们，我们一起玩的时候…聊到过以后的梦想。
Because... when I was playing with Hook, The Moles, and the other kids... We talked about our dreams...
大家的愿望各不相同，有不同的色彩…如果同意了托帕姐姐的条件，大家是不是就没法实现自己的梦想了？
Everyone has different dreams. If we accept Miss Topaz's offer, then doesn't that mean our dreams will never come true?
梦想被夺走的感觉…克拉拉不知道，但只是想象一下…一定很不好受吧？
Just taking away people's dreams like that... I don't know... It feels wrong.
的确，透过孩子们的眼睛来看，这个世界本该有无限多的可能性。
You're right. Children see the world as a place where anything is possible...
要是人生的方向在这个时候就被定死了…呃，不行！光是想想我就心寒得打颤了！
...just the thought of our lives being predestined from birth makes me shiver!
谢谢你，克拉拉！你的意见对我们来说非常重要。
Thanks, Clara. Your thoughts mean a lot to us.
克拉拉觉得，如果还有选择的余地的话…未来的路，还是应该由大家自己决定。
I think if we have a choice for the future, it should be everyone's decision.
虎克、尤利安，还有鼹鼠党的其他小朋友们…克拉拉不想看到大家的梦想被夺走。
Hook, Julian, and The Moles all have different dreams. I don't think anyone should take them away...
哎唷，这不是两位贝洛伯格的大救星吗？我之前就听说你们回来了，还合计你们啥时候能想起我这老头子呢！
None other than the saviors of Belobog! To what do I owe the pleasure? To be honest, I'm surprised you even remembered an old geezer like me!
不过看你们这脸色…怎么，有心事？
But... I can tell by the look on your faces you're probably not dropping by to say hi.
有件重要的事需要你的意见。
We need your opinion on an important matter.
噢…我猜跟之前那群乱来的黑衣人有关系，是吧？
Let me guess — something to do with these unruly people in black showing up everywhere?
行啊，正好我也对那些家伙的背景好奇着呢。跟我说说吧，看看能不能帮上什么忙。
Well, ask away! It just so happens I'm curious about them myself. Maybe I can be of some help.
将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了奥列格……
You tell Oleg about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
…不好办啊，真是不好办。布洛妮娅姑娘年纪轻轻，居然要承受这前无古人的压力……
...That's a tricky situation alright... a lot for anyone to handle, let alone someone as young as Lady Bronya.
我们认识的贝洛伯格人里，就属大叔你的人生阅历最丰富了。你觉得该怎么选呢？
Mr. Oleg, out of all the people we know in Belobog, you have the most life experience. What do you think we should do?
想听实话吗？到了我这年纪，那些宏图大业，或者什么远大的计划，早就没什么吸引力了。
Wanna hear the truth? I'm afraid great ambitions and lofty plans no longer hold much appeal for an old-timer like me.
如果这个「公司」确实跟你们说的那样神通广大，一夜间就能让这个世界回到千年前的模样——在我眼里，这实在没什么好犹豫的。
If this "IPC" does indeed possess the magical power to restore Belobog back to its former self overnight, then I think the answer is clear.
不如想想事情的反面。如果拒绝了，接下来会发生什么？重建计划本就一眼看不到头，现在又凭空多出一笔巨债要还，只靠我们自己真的顶得住吗？

Have you considered the opposite? What about if we refuse? The reconstruction plan already sounds like an endless endeavor. With the added burden of a massive debt... How's that something we can manage on our own?
要说这里唯一让我担心的，就是布洛妮娅姑娘自己。她能不能承受住来自自己人民的非议？她准备好背上可能流传千年的骂名了吗？

What worries me most is how Lady Bronya will handle the backlash from her people. Will she be able to withstand the criticism? Is she prepared to carry the weight of a tarnished reputation for years to come?
布洛妮娅，「最后的大守护者」…
的确，我还没从这个角度考虑过…真是个沉重的称号啊。
Huh, I guess I never looked at it from that angle... I wouldn't wish that title on anyone.
I think she can handle a little criticism.
嗯，我也这么觉得。但是「出卖了人民的君主」什么的…一想到以后可能有人这么评价她，我就觉得很难受……
I think so too. But could you imagine having to hear names like "The Traitorous Ruler" for the rest of your life?
明白了，奥列格大叔，一票赞成。谢谢你提供意见。
Thank you for your thoughts, Mr. Oleg. Another vote for the "for" pile.
到了我这年纪，那些宏图大业，或者什么远大的计划，早就没什么吸引力了。
The truth is, great ambitions and lofty plans no longer hold much appeal to an old-timer like me.
如果这个「公司」确实跟你们说的那样神通广大，一夜间就能让这个世界回到千年前的模样——在我眼里，这实在没什么好犹豫的。
If this "IPC" does indeed possess the magical power to restore Belobog back to its former self overnight, then I think the answer is clear.
但这只是我一己之见。最后的最后，还是得看布洛妮娅姑娘怎么判断。
But that's just my personal opinion. In the end, it's all up to Lady Bronya.
呼…一、一下跑了这么多地方，我已经开始喘了……
Whew... All that running around has worn me out.
所以，现在的收集结果是——
——票数居然完全持平啊。怎么办…支持和反对的人都有自己的理由，而且听上去都合情合理……
...The votes are completely even! Ugh, I don't know what to do — both sides have really compelling arguments.
There's still one person left to ask.
只能由布洛妮娅自己决断了。
Only Bronya can make the final call.
不对，还漏了一个人！咱们还没去问希儿的意见呢！
Wait a minute, we forgot to ask Seele! Let's go see what she has to say.
她应该还在大矿区协助矿民吧？走，我们去找她！
She's probably still in the Great Mine helping the miners. Come on, let's get going!
咦？你俩怎么这么快就又回来了，是有新消息吗？
{NICKNAME}，你脸色不太好啊…出什么问题了吗？
A—Are you feeling alright, {NICKNAME}? You look a little uneasy.
有件重要的事需要你的意见。
We need your opinion on an important matter.
重要的事…需要我的意见？
听你这语气就感觉不妙。来吧，我做好心理准备了。
I can tell from your tone this isn't gonna be a lighthearted chat... but I'm ready to hear it.
将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了希儿……
You tell Seele about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...
我…算是勉强听懂了。本来以为只是公司的喽啰又闯了什么祸，没想到……
I... think I get it. At first, I thought it was just a few IPC ruffians overstepping their boundaries...
…没想到居然攸关贝洛伯格的存亡，对吧？
Yeah, you didn't think the future of Belobog was at stake, right?
Right... I need a little time to process this...
现在的结果是平票——你的意见很关键，希儿。
As it stands, the votes are even. Your opinion will make all the difference.
再想想吧，你这一票至关重要…
我已经想清楚了——做选择是布洛妮娅的责任，不是我的。
I've thought about it... This responsibility rests on Bronya's shoulders, not mine.
你得担起这个责任才行。
You have to shoulder this responsibility.
不，不对。这是布洛妮娅的责任。
No, this responsibility rests on Bronya's shoulders, not mine.
同意还是拒绝，不管她现在偏向于选哪个…她肯定比我看得更远，考虑到的东西绝对比我更多，更完整。
No matter the choice she makes, she has far greater foresight than I do — she can see the bigger picture more clearly than I can.
现在的结果是平票——也就是说，我一时的想法可能会让杠杆倾斜，左右她的判断。
The vote is tied. If I were to give you my view, it would tip the scales and possibly impact her final choice.
这种事不该由我来做。不管布洛妮娅选择了哪条路，我都会追随…我唯一不能做的就是替她下决定。
I'll respect whatever decision she makes, but... it's not my place to make it for her.
原来希儿是这么想的…的确，现在的结果恰好说明，人们对这件事没有统一的立场，每个人的看法都完全不同。
...Understood, Seele. This is a difficult decision to make, and everyone feels differently about it.
这才是最需要领袖站出来的时候呀……
It's times like these that a leader must stand up and do what's needed...
嗯。所以我才说，这是布洛妮娅的责任。她是不会推卸的，也不会逃避。我从头到尾都相信她。
Right... It's Bronya's decision. She knows what's at stake — she won't run away from her duty. I trust her wholeheartedly.
要是她问起来，你们就拿我的原话回复。她肯定能明白的。
If she asks you, just let her know my reasoning. She'll understand.
结果到了最后，还是得由布洛妮娅自己来做决定啊。
Well, it's all in Bronya's hands now. She has to make the final call.
她对这个世界太重要了。
She plays a crucial role on this world.
可不是嘛，还好现在领导贝洛伯格的是她……
Right? I'm glad Belobog has someone like her in charge...
…那是当然！布洛妮娅的为人，可是有咱们列车组官方认证的。
You bet! The Express can vouch for Bronya. That says a lot about her character.
时间刚好，我们快去向她汇报吧？不知道她和克里珀堡的大臣们商议得如何了。
The time has come — let's go fill her in. I'm curious to see how she's handling those Qlipoth ministers.
结果…怎么样？城里的大家是怎么想的？
So... what's the verdict? What do the people think?
我们把上下层区都跑了个遍，问了很多人的意见。最后的结果是…平票。
We talked to people in both the Overworld and Underworld. The final result was... a tie.
原来如此…每个人都有自己看问题的角度，这个结果倒也正常。
I see... I suppose everyone has their own way of seeing things. I can't say I'm surprised.
那…你们问希儿了吗？她是怎么选的？
...What was Seele's perspective on the matter?
She's behind you, whatever you decide.
She thought it wasn't her place to say.
…真像她的作风，我大概能想象出来她是怎么和你们沟通的了。
...I should've known. That sounds like Seele alright.
你这边呢，大家有讨论出什么结果吗？办公室里这么嘈杂，我一句话都听不清……
Did you come to a conclusion with the ministers? It's so loud I can't tell what anyone's saying...
这边的情况也差不多。两边各执一词，根本没法达成共识。
It's pretty much the same situation here. Neither party is willing to compromise.
该到做决定的时候了。这种…这么混乱的局面，不能再持续下去了。
The time has to come to make a decision... This chaos cannot be allowed to continue any longer.
等等，杰帕德刚才是不是说了铆钉镇的深处？难道托帕是在……
Wait a sec, did Gepard say that he's in Rivet Town? Could that mean Topaz is...
…不管啦，咱们先去铆钉镇找他汇合吧。
No time for guesses! Let's just head to Rivet Town and find Gepard first.
铆钉镇——杰帕德应该就在那里等我们，对吧？
Gepard should be waiting for us in Rivet Town, right?
又要去老地方冒险了，我们走！
Here we go again, back to our old stomping grounds for another adventure!
大守护者已经将情况告知于我，让我协助列车组的各位找到托帕。
The supreme guardian has briefed me on the situation and asked that I assist you in locating Topaz.
准备好了就告诉我，我们一起进入铆钉镇。
Ready to enter Rivet Town? We'll go in together when everyone is set.
不知道前方是否有公司的人阻拦，务必提高警惕。
Keep your guards up — we might run into IPC agents ahead.
当然，准备工作务必要做周全。
Take your time — preparation is key.
史瓦罗先生！你还好吗？托帕和公司的人没把你怎么样吧？
Mr Svarog! Are you alright? I hope Topaz and her IPC henchmen didn't hurt you.
你们到了，外来者。系统功能一切正常，我并未与公司的使者起冲突。
Greetings, outsiders. System functions are normal — I have had no conflict with the IPC's representatives.
还以为又要和你当对手了。
I thought we might be facing off against each other for a moment.
Such a result would be highly undesirable.
托帕就在前方。她本可以用手段强制我服从命令，但却并未如此行事。
Topaz is ahead. She had the means to force me to comply with her orders, but chose not to.
于她看来，将贝洛伯格并入公司是唯一的「存护」之道。我虽持有不同观点，但以现有的算力难以找到反驳的证据。

From her perspective, the only way to "preserve" Belobog is by incorporating it into the IPC. While I do not agree with her viewpoint, I lack the computational power to provide evidence to the contrary.
尽管几率很低，我仍然希望你们能够避免冲突局面。
While it is unlikely, I still encourage the avoidance of any potential conflicts.
「几率很低」——史瓦罗先生都这么说了……
"Unlikely, potential..." meaning there could still be conflicts...
不必慌张，三月。列车组从不提倡冲突，可一旦快进到刀兵相向的场面，我们也从不胆怯。一路都是这么过来的，不是吗？
Don't worry, March. The Express never pursues conflict as a first means... but if it comes down to it, we won't back down either. That's how it's always been.
的确，姬子说得对。不管结果如何，我们只要做到问心无愧就够了！
Himeko's right. As long as we can look at ourselves in the mirror and know we did the right thing, that's all that matters.
真不容易呀，能通过和平的方式解决问题真是太好了。
Phew, I was worried things were gonna get ugly again. A peaceful solution is always the best solution.
话说回来…他们正在修的，莫非就是之前跟我们战斗过的那台大机器人？我有印象，你当时夺取了它的控制权，帮我们打赢了可可利亚！
Speaking of solutions... Are they repairing that giant robot — the one we fought against? I remember you took control of it and helped us defeat Cocolia!
不知道还能不能过「煦日节」…
I wonder if we'll have time to celebrate the Solwarm Festival.
对哦，我都快忘了！咱们原本只是想来体验节日气氛的……
Right! I'd totally forgotten — that's the whole reason we came here in the first place!
城里的大家都在帮忙施工，庆典恐怕是办不起来了。不过往好处想，能和托帕小姐这样的公司高管搭上线，也算是不虚此行了吧？

Looks like everyone in the city's helping with construction — doubt there'll be much time for celebrating. Still, look on the bright side — we got to meet a top IPC executive! The trip wasn't a complete waste, right?
希望托帕的谈判能有好结果。
I hope Topaz's negotiations go smoothly.
一定可以的！你不觉得吗？托帕小姐身上有种…唔，该怎么形容呢…有种势在必得的气质！
Miss Topaz is definitely up to the job! She has that aura of... what's the word... invincibility!
虽然这次下来没能体验到节日庆典的气氛，但是往好处想，能和托帕小姐这样的公司高管搭上线，也算是不虚此行了吧？
Well, we didn't get to enjoy the festivities this time round, but at least we still got to meet a top IPC executive!
{NICKNAME}，我早听你和三月夸奖过这位大守护者姑娘。但亲眼看到她的行动力和手段，还是让我感到惊讶。
Y'know, {NICKNAME}, I'd heard you and March speak highly of the Supreme Guardian before, but seeing her methods firsthand left me in awe.
…同时我们也该庆幸，雅利洛-Ⅵ这个项目是由托帕小姐接手的。如果换做「战略投资部」的其他人，事情的进展恐怕会更…难以预料。
We should also be glad that Miss Topaz is the one in charge of the Jarilo-VI project. If it were someone else from the Strategic Investment Department, things might have gotten... complicated.
「战略投资部」集结了公司内部的精英，他们中的大部分手腕都非常…强硬。
The Strategic Investment Department comprises the IPC's most elite employees, many of whom can be very... forceful.
我觉得托帕已经很强硬了。
You mean Topaz didn't make things complicated enough?
那说明你对「战略投资部」这个部门还不太了解，{NICKNAME}。
That tells me you really don't understand the Strategic Investment Department, {NICKNAME}.
不过这个话题可以等你回列车再聊。你和小三月又经历了一段不可思议的旅程，最好还是先忘记这些杂事，饱饱地睡上一觉吧。
Let's talk about this later when you're back on the Express. You and March must be tired after such an incredible journey — it's time you got some well-deserved rest.
Even when I'm off work, I'm looking after a child...
It's even more exhausting than working in an office...
I hear I have to work overtime for taking time off when I get back...
Eight days in a row. Honestly, just kill me...
If I'd known, I'd have saved some of my holiday.
Silvermane Guard training camp, sign up here!
Oh, I want to sign up!
Give me the change you borrowed first...
Where did those people in black come from?
What's with that weird get up?
The smarter the uniform, the looser the morals...
He's short-tempered, I'm worried he could start a fight...
I'm fine... Just a little dizzy...
How have I ended up in a spot like this again...
这地儿是不是风水不行…
Is this place cursed or something...
Forget it, they're just slacking on the job...
That person in black even palmed me some money...
How come I never get this lucky?
托帕小姐，你刚才说的追责……
别担心，没什么我搞不定的~职级什么的都不重要，找到解决问题的最佳方案才是硬道理。
Don't worry, it's nothing I can't handle. There are more important things than titles and ranks — finding the best solution is what matters most.
扣就扣吧~反正我早就过了纯为挣钱而工作的那个阶段了。
If that's what they want to do, then so be it. I've long passed the stage of working just for money.
哈哈哈，怎么可能，最多降我一两个职级，再扣点奖金。别担心，我现在工作可不是纯为了赚钱~
Haha, that's unlikely. At most, they might lower my rank and reduce my bonus a bit. But don't worry, I work for far more than just a paycheck.
也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。真没想到会再次把你们卷进危机里…还差点导致列车跟公司之间的关系破裂。
Thank you so much for all you've done, {NICKNAME}. I never thought we'd drag the Express into a crisis again, much less one that might cause a rift between you and the IPC.
破裂？不至于不至于。况且这部分的主要责任也在我，怪我对下属管理不力。
A rift? I wouldn't go that far. Also, it's me who's mostly to blame — I didn't keep my subordinates in check.
希望你跟老板们多说我的好话！
Mind putting in some good words for me with your bosses?
…哦？看来你已经有未来的职业规划咯？
Oh? Thinking about a career change?
没问题，我对你的评价可是很高的，{NICKNAME}~
Sure thing! I'll put in the best words I can, {NICKNAME}.
听说有人经历了十七轮面试…
Is it true the IPC requires you to go through <unbreak>17</unbreak> rounds of interviews?
十七轮？哦~我大概知道你说的是谁了。
<unbreak>17</unbreak>? Oh... I think I might know who you're talking about.
他那样的属于极端个例啦，正常的入职流程才不会拉那么长。
You could say he's a special case. For most people the interview process is much shorter.
能和你们这样闲聊真是太好了。
Hehe, I'm glad we're able to discuss some lighter topics.
{NICKNAME}，你们这一路实在是辛苦，我给你们安排了歌德宾馆的房间，请务必在贝洛伯格好好恢复精神。
{NICKNAME}, you all need some rest after everything you've been through. I've arranged rooms for you all at the Goethe Hotel.
托帕小姐，如果你需要一个舒适的地方落脚……
Miss Topaz, if you need somewhere comfortable to stay...
不劳烦你啦，我这就准备回去汇报工作了。
I appreciate the offer, but I need to head back and deliver my reports.
{NICKNAME}，布洛妮娅小姐——很高兴能跟你们建立联系。希望以后我们还有合作的机会…当然啦，合作方式肯定要换一种！
{NICKNAME}, Miss Bronya, it's been great getting to know you both. I hope we can work together again in the future... only next time under better circumstances!
North... as far north as we can go.
败落不堪啊，这片城区…你们之前来过？
What a dismal sight. This district... Have you been here before?
对。我们在这里结束了一切……
Yes... This is where we put an end to it all...
凯尔，久等了。我们现在可以过去了吗？
Kyle, sorry for the delay. Are we clear to proceed?
报告——前方的道路已经畅通了，大守护者大人。您和同伴可以放心北上了。
The path ahead is clear, Madam Guardian. You and your companions can proceed north without hindrance.
太好了。各位，前方的山路有些崎岖，请当心脚下。
Excellent. The mountain road ahead is a little treacherous, watch your step.
{NICKNAME}，还请你们先去歌德宾馆休息吧。我和托帕小姐还要聊聊后续的事宜。
{NICKNAME}, why don't you head over to the Goethe Hotel and relax for a bit? Miss Topaz and I still have a few matters to discuss.
这次没能让你们体会到节日的氛围，实在是遗憾…我保证，下次一定会尽力补偿各位。
I'm sorry you didn't get to experience the festival atmosphere this time around... I promise I'll make it up to you all next time.
话说回来，姬子是怎么知道这里发生的事的？
I've been wondering, how did you figure out what was happening here on Belobog, Himeko?
时刻关切列车组成员的状态，本就是领航员的分内责任。
Well, you know, keeping an eye on the crew is just another part of a navigator's job.
（三月一直在期待的煦日节，看来这次也体验不上了啊……）
(March was looking forward to the Solwarm Festival for ages... Looks like she's missed her chance, this time...)
（没想到这次又经历了…好困，该睡觉了……）
(I never thought this trip would be so... *yawn* ...tiring. Time for bed...)
既然是要收集民意，那肯定得兼顾上下层区居民的心情吧？
Alright, if we want to make an informed decision, we need to hear from both the Overworld and the Underworld, right?
那就先从上层区开始吧，出发。
哇，这么多人…没想到克里珀堡还有这么熙攘的时候。
Whoa, the fort's packed... I've never seen this many people here before.
不过感觉，稍微有点…吵耶。
Geez... I can barely even hear myself think!
居然真的是这里…怎么突然一个人都没有了？
Is this really the right place...? It's so quiet all of a sudden.
氛围完全不一样了，托帕真的在前面吗？
This atmosphere really feels strange... Are you sure Topaz is here?
哇…没想到，下层区居然还有这种地方？！
Wow... I didn't expect to find a place like this in the Underworld!
不知道托帕来这里是为了什么呢……
I wonder why Topaz would come to a place like this...
所以…我们现在该去哪呀，布洛妮娅？
So... where are we headed to now, Bronya?
这里是…这个地方，我们没来过耶！
...What is this place? We've never been here before, right?
那是肯定，我们也是不久前才发现了这片区域。
Mm, we've only recently discovered this domain.
继续走吧，我想给各位看的东西就在前方。
Let's keep moving forward. What I want to show you is just ahead.
It's actually her! I can't believe it!
Could I pleeease get your autograph?
{NICKNAME}，快来快来！希露瓦好像要开嗓啦！
{NICKNAME}, quick! Serval's about to start singing!
嘘——大家安静一下！别着急，表演马上开始！
Woo! Thanks everyone! Hope you're ready for a great show! Let's get started!
Gertie's suncakes are fresh out of the oven⁓
Mom, can I get one, pleeeease!?
It's been years since I tried one...
They're so cheap... Hope they're safe to eat.
Aunt Gertie! It's been too long!
哎哟，这不是小三月吗——你们怎么来啦？我听人说，你们早就坐上大飞船，开到外太空去了呀？
Ah! Is that little March!? What brings you this way? I heard you left to go travel the galaxy?
哦，我知道了！你们肯定是听说了煦日节的事，特地回来体验节日气氛的，是吧？来来来，快来，我给你们烙一张热腾腾的太阳薄饼……
...Oh, you're here for the Solwarm Festival, right? The atmosphere is like no other. Silly me, where are my manners? Grab yourselves a suncake each — get 'em while they're hot!
喂喂，前面那两个怎么插队啊？懂不懂先来后到啊？
Hey, that's not fair! Get to the back of the line. Ever heard of first come, first served?
别嚷嚷了！怎么，不认得这两位？要是没有{F#她们}{M#他们}，你怕是还蹲在矿坑里吃泥巴呢！
Tsk, show a little respect! If it weren't for these two, we'd be eating Geomarrow by now!
看看，看看！这是我今天烙得最满意的两张饼了！
Take a look at these beauties! These are the best suncakes I've made all day.
哇，好香啊！又焦又脆的感觉，太棒了！
Wow, they smell so good! They look so crispy and crunchy! I think I'm in love!
记得一定要趁热吃啊，凉了就没那个风味了——不好意思啊，后面的客人还在等着呢，下次有机会我再好好招待你俩……
Well, don't wait for them to get cold now. I'm sorry sweethearts, I'd best see to these other customers before their hunger gets the better of them. Thanks for stopping by!
Okay kids, now we're going to learn about the museum...
Make sure you're all paying attention...
Look — a Silvermane Guard! So cool!
那是佩拉吧？她又在带小孩子啦？
Is that Pela? Looks like she's teaching the kids again.
接下来，佩拉姐姐要开始介绍博物馆的历史背景了，大家要认真听哦。
Next, I'll be introducing the history of the museum. Everyone, listen carefully, okay?
贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆建立于<unbreak>600</unbreak>年前，起初是为了纪念初代大守护者阿丽萨……
Belobog's History and Culture Museum was founded <unbreak>600</unbreak> years ago, and was originally built to memorialize Supreme Guardian Alisa...
好饿哦…好想吃夕红鱼刺身……
Soooo hungry... I wish I could have a Redsunset Salmon right now...
…咳，是为了纪念初代大守护者阿丽萨•兰德，还有……
*cough* It was built to memorialize Supreme Guardian Alisa Rand, and also...
你们知道嘛？上层区以后好像要开铁卫生活体验营，听说会很有趣哦？
Guess what — I heard there's gonna be a Silvermane adventure camp opening in the Overworld soon. It's gonna be super awesome.
…还有在七百年前对抗侵略者的战争中牺牲的……
...Also, those who sacrificed their lives in the war against the invaders <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago...
佩拉姐姐，我要告状！彼得他，要睡着啦！
Miss Pela! Peter is falling asleep!
够了，你们！从现在开始，禁止交头接耳——不想罚抄作业的话，就都给我好好听着！
Enough! From now on, no whispering allowed! If you don't want to have any homework later, you'd better start listening!
…这才像话嘛。咳，刚才说到哪里了？我们继续……
That's better. *cough* Now, where was I?
原来佩拉也有那么凶的一面啊……
I never knew Pela had a strict side...
Thieves are rife during times of celebration.
…锵锵！戍卫官大人，瞧瞧谁回来了？
三月，还有{NICKNAME}？欢迎回到贝洛伯格。
It's you two! Welcome back to Belobog.
大守护者说过，会有神秘来宾前来参加煦日节的节庆活动——没想到她指的就是列车组的各位。
The Supreme Guardian mentioned there'd be mystery guests attending the Solwarm celebrations, but I didn't think it'd be the Express crew.
希望你们这一路上还算顺利，没有派出铁卫迎接各位是我的失职……
I hope you had a smooth journey. I should have dispatched Silvermane Guards to welcome you on arrival — my apologies.
不不不，你别道歉啦！我们也就是路过看看，不用搞得那么隆重。
It's fine! You really don't have to apologize. We're just passing through, it's no big deal.
明白，希望你们能享受节日的氛围。
Understood. I hope you both enjoy the festivities.
…不过也要多加小心，城里的扒手就喜欢挑这种场合下手。请务必保管好私人财物。
Please make sure you keep your personal belongings safe — pickpockets tend to take advantage of events like this. We'll be performing additional patrols.
嗯！明白啦！那就不打扰你们工作了，回头见！
Got it! We'll get out of your way, then. Bye!
Master Rossy, may I inquire as to where you'll be employed next?
I'll be helping my father with his affairs...
Me? Why, I'm still going through parol— a period of transformation...
等等，前面那不是…是华劳斯！他终于交到朋友啦？过去听听他们在说什么吧。
Hang on a sec, isn't that Wallace up ahead? Looks like he's finally made some friends! I wonder what they're talking about...
…诺尔伯特，倒是跟大家说说，你怎么这么快就被放出来了啊？
...Norbert, why don't you tell everyone how you were released from jail so quickly?
倒卖文物、假扮铁卫——这一条条的，听着都是大罪啊！
Selling cultural relics and impersonating Silvermane Guards are both heinous crimes!
呃…这不是多亏了我小叔嘛，你懂的……
Well... it was all thanks to my uncle, you know...
噢！想起来了，你小叔是那位诺伊尔大臣吧？交通部的领导？
Ahh, I remember! Your uncle is Minister Noel — he heads up the Department of Transportation, no?
Ahem... Yes, y—you knew that, too?
我去，兄弟，不是我说，你这回脸皮可够厚的！换成是我犯了事被扔进班房，肯定没脸叫我老爸过来捞人。
Haha, you're shameless, Norbert! Not to be rude, but if I were thrown in jail, I wouldn't possibly ask my father to bail me out.
…不是，你以为我想啊？华劳斯，你是知道我的，我像那种仗势压人的主吗？
Do you think I wanted to? I'm not the type of person to abuse my status.
Well, I... don't really know about that...
…什么玩意，我在里面遭了这么多罪，现在出来了还要遭你们挤兑？你、你们算什么朋友！
Ugh, get off my back, will you? I had to deal with hardened criminals in jail — now that I'm free my supposed "friends" are ganging up on me!
呃…他们好像快吵起来了，咱们还是先走为上吧……
Looks like things are getting heated. I think we'd better get outta here.
How could you possibly consider this course of action!?
What are we supposed to do...
Is slander the only language you speak!?
I support the Supreme Guardian's decision!
托帕离开铆钉镇之后便不知了去向，她的部下随后涌入，占领了这里。
Topaz disappeared after leaving Rivet Town. In her absence, her subordinates flooded in and took over.
「公司」的士兵装备精良，和他们正面起冲突恐怕不太明智。你有什么办法吗，戍卫官？
The IPC soldiers are well-equipped — it wouldn't be wise to fight them head-on. Captain, what do you have in mind?
姬子小姐所言正是。为了能尽量隐蔽行踪，我们准备启用「潜爆机兵」。
You're right, Miss Himeko. We'll be using the Automaton Stealth Bomb to cover our tracks.
具体的操作细节我会稍后解释，先前进吧。
I'll explain later. Let's get moving.
Look — down there! It's the IPC!
各位，请尽量保持安静，不要惊动敌人。
Keep noise to a minimum — everyone. We don't want to alert the enemy to our presence.
It's time to deploy the Automaton Stealth Bomb.
准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？操作「潜爆机兵」，排除公司的威胁吧。
Are you ready, {NICKNAME}? Use the Automaton Stealth Bomb to wipe out the IPC threats.
记住，要尽量保证机兵不被敌人发现——行动越隐蔽，成功率越高。
Remember, try to avoid being noticed. Remaining hidden will increase our chances of success.
Oh no, they saw right through it...
没关系，再试一次。我们准备了很多备用的「潜爆机兵」。
It's alright — we prepared many backups. Try again.
{NICKNAME}, where are you going? Come back!
我明白，你心中战斗的欲望正在高涨…但这次还是用「潜爆机兵」解决问题吧。
I know that your urge to fight is overwhelming... but let's use the Automaton Stealth Bomb this time.
哇！「嘭」的一下就把他们炸晕了，效率真高！
Wow! We wiped them all out in a single explosion! That's what you call efficiency!
若非迫不得已，我们也不想用这种手段。
It's a shame we had to resort to this method, but we had no choice.
You Silvermane Guards sure are a righteous bunch...
那种制式的机器人，我以前见过。是公司执行外勤的「小组长」。
I've seen standard-issue robots like these before. It's an IPC field Team Leader.
嗯，它的外观和「灰熊」类似，但武器更先进，装甲也更坚硬。
Correct — the exterior is similar to the Grizzly, but its weapons and armor are more advanced.
希望「潜爆机兵」的攻击能对它奏效。{NICKNAME}，准备好了就告诉我吧。
Hopefully, the Automaton Stealth Bomb will still be effective. {NICKNAME}, let me know when you're ready.
好耶！这下道路都畅通啦。
实话说，我也没想到威力会这么大…还好一切顺利。
To be honest, I didn't think it would be so powerful... Good thing everything went according to plan.
托帕就是顺着这条路离开了铆钉镇。
This is the road that Topaz took when she left Rivet Town.
走吧，我们去找到她，告诉她布洛妮娅的决定。
Let's find her and tell her about Bronya's decision.
如果有必要的话…软硬兼施！
This time, the gloves are off!
托帕来到这里，是为了找什么东西吗？
Why would Topaz come here? Is she looking for something?
有可能。这个世界的地下藏着不少秘密。
It's possible. Many mysteries lurk beneath the surface of this world.
但公司的手段从来都不止「交易」一种，这时就该我这类人出马了，对不？怎么样，千载难逢的机会，考虑一下吧，说不定能将功补过哦。

But as we both know, the IPC does more than just "business deals" — guess it's my time to shine. So, how about it? This is a rare opportunity. Consider it. You never know, you might even be able to make up for your blunder on Jarilo-VI.
...Seems it's just one wild ride after another...
但愿我这次的判断没出问题……
...but I hope I made the right decision this time...
娜塔莎医生，需要我的帮助吗？
你来得正好，{NICKNAME}，我有些事想麻烦你。
You came at a good time, {NICKNAME}, there is something you can help me with.
根据病历簿上的记录，有一些病人最近没来复诊，说实话我有些担心——虽然类似的情况时有发生，但从来没有像最近这么频繁。
According to my patient records, there are a few that haven't come for their follow-up visits. It happens from time to time, but never as regularly as this. I'm a bit concerned...
…你听说过「疑难重症患者互助会」吗？
Have you heard of the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society?
听上去像是个公益组织。
通常而论，在类似的互助会上，患者之间能够交流经历、互相支持鼓励，努力战胜疾病对各自的负面影响…但眼下这个「互助会」恐怕没那么单纯。

Generally speaking, mutual aid societies like these allow patients to share their experiences and support each other. It's a way of countering all the negative emotional effects of being ill... But there might be more to this society than that.
我的有些患者，自从参加了「疑难重症患者互助会」之后便开始拒绝治疗——很难不让人浮想联翩。
I've got a few patients who've started refusing treatment since joining the society... It certainly makes you wonder.
更可疑的是，不管我再怎么追问，始终没人愿意告诉我和这个「互助会」相关的细节…所以我才想向你求助。
The most suspicious part is that no matter how much I ask, no one's ever willing to tell me anything about it... and that's where you might be able to help.
我明白了，你是想让我去卧底。
Got it, you want me to go undercover.
听着有些凶险，但你要做的其实很简单。我希望你能帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
...It sounds dangerous, but what I want you to do is actually very simple. Investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out what exactly they're up to.
我要得什么病才能混进去？
Do I need to be ill before I can make inquiries?
…倒不需要你做到这种地步。我只是希望你能假装患者，帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
...That won't be necessary, but it will help if you pretend to be a patient. Help me investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out exactly what they're up to.
我希望你能假装患者，帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
Hmm... Pretend to be a patient. Help me investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out exactly what they're up to.
如果「互助会」是在瞒着我这个主治医生，做些可能危害到患者的事…那我坚决不能坐视不理。
If I find out they're preventing me from doing my job... or if they're bringing harm to my patients... I won't just sit on the sidelines.
我可以把这个任务交给你吗，{NICKNAME}？
Can I entrust you with this task, {NICKNAME}?
No problem, leave it with me.
真是一如既往地贴心呢，{NICKNAME}。
我这小小的诊所，每天都要面对大量前来问诊的病患…多亏有你帮我分担压力，我才能静下心来专心照料病人。
This little clinic has huge numbers of patients to deal with every day... If I didn't have you here to help me out, I wouldn't be able to focus on giving them quality care.
那就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。等你回来以后，我再好好感谢你。
Good luck, {NICKNAME}. I'll be sure to thank you properly when you're back.
你…我在诊所里见过你，你不是那个帮娜塔莎跑腿的家伙吗？
You... I've seen you at the clinic. You run errands for Natasha, right?
卧底计划这么快就失败了…
...Your cover? What are you talking about?
…少装蒜了，我的眼神不会骗人。
...Don't play dumb. I might be sick but my eyes still work.
我猜猜，是娜塔莎让你来劝我去复诊的？
*sigh* Let me guess, Natasha wants you to persuade me to go back for a follow-up visit, right?
哎…还有什么意义呢？我都已经得了绝症了 ，完蛋了，这辈子就这样了吧。
*sigh* ...What's the use? I'm terminal. Life'll be over before I know it.
这是娜塔莎的诊断结果？
当然不是，是我自己从书上看到的。
Of course not, I read it in a book.
我每看到一个书上描述的病症，就感觉自己的情况完全符合…这书才翻到一半，我就已经和十几种不治之症对上号了。
Every book I read has descriptions that match my symptoms exactly... I can diagnose myself with a dozen incurable diseases before I get halfway through.
像我这种情况，就算去复诊也只是浪费时间和金钱…哦，还浪费了医生开的药。
For people in my situation, a follow-up visit is just a waste of time and money... not to mention medicine.
不是因为参加「互助会」吗？
Soooo nothing to do with you joining the mutual aid society then?
Mutual aid what now? What are you talking about?
…不和你扯了，其实我就是没钱继续看病了。虽然娜塔莎医生说我可以一直赊账，等以后有机会再还…但我这人就是脸皮薄。
...What else is there to say. Natasha was seeing me free of charge. She said I could keep a tab running for as long as I liked, then pay it back when I had the opportunity... I guess I'm too proud.
这点道理还用你说吗？别劝我了，我已经想清楚了……
You think I need you to tell me? Don't try and persuade me, I've already thought this through...
面子比命重要，我懂你的意思。
Appearances are more important than life, I feel you.
…你在讽刺我吗？放弃吧，激将这招对我没用。
...Are you making fun of me? Have at it, you won't change my mind.
哎…我之前去瓦赫医生那里看病都是不用花钱的。虽然娜塔莎人也挺好，但果然在我心里，瓦赫医生才是第一位的……
*sigh* ...Dr. Vache never charged me anything either. Natasha's great, but Vache was always my number one...
瓦赫医生就是娜塔莎的哥哥啊，以前这俩人都在铆钉镇行医。
Natasha's brother? They both used to practice medicine back in Rivet Town.
听说瓦赫医生是上层区医学院的高材生，贝洛伯格的大医院都抢着要他。也不知道他为什么会跑到这穷酸的下层…可能就是纯粹的心善吧？
I heard he was a top student from the Overworld medical academy — Belobog's main hospital wanted him. I've no idea what convinced him to set up down here... a kind heart, maybe.
不收钱的医生，我信不过…
Free medical care? I don't believe it...
你在说啥？瓦赫医生是「穷人们的医生」，他总是给我们分发免费的药物，还会仔细询问我们吃药之后的感受。
What do you mean? Dr. Vache was a people's doctor — he handed out free medicine. He even followed up with detailed questions on how we felt.
下层区一直都缺乏药物资源，据说这些药都是瓦赫医生自己研制出来的。
The Underworld is always short on medical resources — they say that Dr. Vache made all his own medicine himself.
为什么不继续去找瓦赫医生？
Why don't you go to him anymore?
你以为我不想吗？我听人说…瓦赫医生不在人世了。
You think I don't want to? I heard that he... passed away.
那个…接下来的话，我只小声告诉你，你可不要随便外传……
Uh... I should keep my voice down. Don't go telling anyone else about this next bit...
我听人说，瓦赫医生离世跟他妹妹娜塔莎有关。说是那个女人嫉妒瓦赫医生抢走了自己的病人，所以才……
I heard that Natasha had something to do with Dr. Vache's death. They say she was jealous that her brother had stolen her patients, so she...
哎呀，我也只是道听途说…我也不信娜塔莎医生能干出这种事。
Agh, it's just something people were saying... I don't think Dr. Natasha could do something like that.
…等会儿，只是个坊间传闻而已，你怎么就信了？
...Hey, it's just a rumor. Don't take my word for it.
哎…算了，不跟你多说了。既然娜塔莎医生特地派你来劝我，那我就姑且听她一句吧。
*sigh* Forget I said anything. Since Dr. Natasha sent you over specially, I'll do her a favor.
一会儿我就去诊所再复查一次，再见……
I'll go to the clinic for my follow-up a little later. Bye for now...
（这个患者，因为经济拮据的原因没有去复诊……）
(Avoiding a follow-up visit due to money issues...)
（再找另一个患者打听一下吧……）
(I should find another patient to talk to...)
…你说什么？大声点儿！我耳朵不好，听不清楚。
...What was that? You'll have to be louder! My ears aren't what they used to be — everything's muffled.
请问你为什么不去复诊？
I wanted to ask why you're not going for your follow-up visit.
啊？为什么不去复诊？你是要问我这个吗？
Hah? Follow-up visit? Is that what you're asking about?
哎，娜塔莎是个好姑娘，每次给我检查都特别认真细致……
*sigh* Natasha's a wonderful girl. She always gives me a thorough checkup...
不过…你看我这一把年纪，早就经不起折腾了。就算能治好病，也活不长了。这多浪费啊……
But at this age, it's rather a lot to bear. Even if they could cure me, I'm sure I wouldn't be around for long. I don't want to waste anyone's time...
为了健康考虑，哪有浪费一说？
There's no time wasted where health is concerned, right?
这话是说给年轻人听的吧？我现在的状况，早就不奢求什么身体健康了……
Not for youngsters like yourself. When you get to my time of life, good health is a bit of a luxury I'm afraid.
听听娜塔莎医生怎么说吧。
You should listen to Dr. Natasha.
那姑娘一直劝我按时吃药，我知道她是一片好心……
That girl's always trying to get me to take my medicine on time. *sigh* I know her heart's in the right place...
其实我家的老东西患了跟我一样的病，但他光让我吃药，自己却什么都不吃。
My husband had the same illness as me, but he never touched the medicine. He wanted to make sure I had enough.
后来有一天，老东西说是要去矿区办事儿，结果就再也没出来……
Then one day, he said he needed to take care of some things at the mine. He never came back...
他以前一直说，想走在我前面…哎，这老东西，真是自私……
He was forever saying he wanted to go before I did. Hehe... Selfish old fool...
我唯一挂念的老伴儿都不在了，还有谁会在乎我活多久呢？
I miss him. Now that he's gone, who cares how long I stick around?
你老伴的在天之灵会在乎。
I'm sure he's up there caring right now.
…他真会这么想？他难道不会希望我早点儿去陪他吗……
...Do you think so? Wouldn't he want me to hurry up and join him...?
…哎，现在的年轻人，可真难打发……
Hmph... Kids today don't give up easily.
…你说的倒也有几分道理。哎，那小姑娘一直都对我尽心尽力，但我一直觉得自己是她的负担……
...You're not wrong, I suppose. That girl certainly spares me no effort, but I always feel like I'm a burden to her...
…你还真是难打发啊，不过…你说话倒也挺中听的。
You don't give up easily, do you? Still... you're full of kind words.
行吧，那我就听你一回，再去娜塔莎医生那儿复诊一次……
Okay, you win. It's off for another follow-up visit with Dr. Natasha, I suppose...
嗯？你又想说什么？我耳朵不太好使……
Mm? Did you want to say something else? My ears are terrible...
Have you heard of the mutual aid society?
听到了听到了…小声点儿！没有，我才没听说过什么「互助会」……
Alright, I heard you! Do you have to shout? ...No, I've never heard of any mutual aid society...
（老人是因为自己老伴的原因没有去复诊……）
(Avoiding a follow-up visit due to her husband...)
（再找另一个患者打听一下吧……）
(I should find another patient to talk to...)
你问我为什么不去复诊…你也是患者吗，还是说你是娜塔莎医生派来的？
Why haven't I gone for my follow-up visit... Are you a patient too, or did Dr. Natasha send you over?
不然呢，还有谁会关心我们这种人？
Who else would care about people like me?
嚯，那你就快回去吧，帮我谢谢娜塔莎医生的关心。
Hah, you should head on back then. Thank Dr. Natasha for her concern.
我现在不需要娜塔莎医生的帮助，让她省点心也省点药，去救助其他人吧。
I don't need Dr. Natasha's help now. Tell her to save her worries and medicine for other people.
你和娜塔莎医生有过节？
Did you have a dispute with her?
过节？没有没有，她可是下层区唯一一个良心医生。
A dispute? No, no, she's the only kindhearted doctor in the Underworld.
我只是不太认可她的做法，缺乏效率，而且太过理想主义……
I just don't really approve of her methods, that's all. Too idealistic, and no real efficacy...
啊？原来和她有过节的是你啊？
Huh? So you had a dispute with her?
…她可是下层区唯一一个良心医生。我只是不太认可她的做法，缺乏效率，而且太过理想主义……
...She's the only kindhearted doctor in the Underworld. I just don't really approve of her methods, that's all. Too idealistic, and no real efficacy...
什么人都想救，就意味着谁也救不了——到头来只是折磨了患者，又累倒了自己。
She tries to save everyone, which means she can't save anyone... In the end, it's the patients who suffer, and she just tires herself out.
像我这样的矿工，根本等不起什么「漫长的疗程」——吃了药以后要是不能立刻返工赚钱，那和晾着等死差别也不大……
Miners like me don't have time for lengthy treatments... If I can't take something and get right back to work, I may as well lie down and wait for death to come knocking...
你知道瓦赫医生吗？他做的特效药不仅便宜，还能立刻起效，只需要承担一点点风险……
Did you know Dr. Vache? His wonder medicine is cheap and the results are immediate. You just need to be willing to... take a little risk.
瓦赫医生的药很特殊，有很多人在服用之后痊愈，也有一些人在服药之后病情加剧，不幸离世——
Dr. Vache's medicine is... different. Lots of people make a full recovery after taking it... but some get worse, and the unlucky ones check out early.
不过就算知道有「风险」，大家还是争着抢着想拿到这种药，你知道为什么吗？
Even knowing the risk, most people fought tooth and nail to get a hold of the medicine. You know why?
They're willing to gamble with their life...
Hmph, you're smarter than you look.
哼…因为你没有经历过那种穷困潦倒啊。
Hmph... you've clearly never been in really dire straits.
被生活逼迫到那种地步的人，任何放在眼前的机会都不会放过…哪怕是要他们拿命去赌。
When life forces you to the edge, you'll throw yourself at any opportunity... even if it means risking it all.
对于我们这种人，缓慢又痛苦的疗程跟被宣判死刑也没什么两样。与其说服我们去受那种折磨…还不如来个干脆痛快的。
For people like us, a slow and tortuous treatment is the same as a death sentence. If it's between that and a quick result, we'll take the latter.
咳，算了，跟你说那么多干嘛？反正瓦赫医生已经不在了……
Ahem, forget it. Why am I telling you all this? Dr. Vache is dead, anyway...
该去哪里弄这种「特效药」呢？
Where can I go to get this wonder medicine?
如果我说，我认同你的想法…
What if I told you I agreed with you?
哈，怎么，你也对「特效药」起兴趣了？
Hah, what, now you're interested in the wonder medicine?
偷偷告诉你吧，「疑难重症患者互助会」现在还在卖这种药…让我告诉你他们的交易地点也不是不行，但你得遵守一条规矩……
Listen up... the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society is still selling that medicine... I can tell you where they trade, but there's a rule...
——一定不能把这些信息告诉娜塔莎医生，明白了吗？你要是敢违反这条规矩，后果自负！
...You must not tell any of this to Dr. Natasha, you hear? If you break the rule, you'll face the consequences!
喏，拿着吧，这是「疑难重症患者互助会」卖药的地址。我再最后强调一遍——不许把这消息透露给娜塔莎！
Here, take this, it's the address. A final warning — do not reveal this information to Natasha!
（拿到卖「特效药」的地址了，接下来该怎么做呢…）
(I know where to find the wonder medicine. What should I do next...?)
（那个患者不让我把这件事告诉娜塔莎，该不该听他的呢？）
(That patient didn't want me to tell Natasha about this... Should I listen to him?)
先去调查一下卖药的地址吧。
Let's investigate the wonder medicine address first.
Explain what you found out about the mutual aid society.
也就是说，「互助会」找到了哥…瓦赫留下的研究成果，而且还在向一些患者出售那些所谓的「特效药」……
So the mutual aid society found my bro— ...Vache's research results... and now they're selling this so-called "wonder medicine" to patients...?
能做出这种事…足以证明他们不是什么纯粹的「互助会」。
Any organization doing something like that is interested in more than just "mutual aid..."
患者们还希望我对你保密。
The patients wanted me to keep it a secret from you.
这也难怪。我坚决反对他们服用所谓的「特效药」，他们肯定也知道我的态度。
I'm not surprised. They'll know that I'm completely against them using this "wonder medicine..."
The patient said he was willing to take the risk.
…作为对他们的生命负责的医生，我不能接受这种说辞。我对所谓「特效药」的态度不会改变。
...As a doctor, I don't accept that — I'm responsible for their well-being. My attitude towards this "wonder medicine" won't change.
瓦赫留下的那些药物…不对，那些甚至不能算「药物」，只是些实验中产生的副产品、试剂罢了。
What Vache left behind is nothing more than reagents and experimental by-products... The word "medicine" doesn't apply here.
我无数次警告过那些患者，但他们还是执迷不悟…也怪不得他们不愿意把和「互助会」有关的消息透露给我。
I warned the patients countless times, but it seems like they had their heads in the sand all along... No wonder they kept the mutual aid society a secret from me.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。即使那些人说了很多于我不利的话，你还是对我如此信任。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Those patients weren't exactly singing my praises — thank you for having faith in me.
你要是还好奇瓦赫那所谓「特效药」的效用，不如去问问诊所里的患者吧——看看他们会给你什么样的答案。
If you're curious about Vache's wonder medicine, you should ask some of the patients in the clinic... see what they have to say about the effects.
Hey, where do you think you're going?
To buy medicine from the mutual aid society.
买药？哦…明白了，你也是奔着瓦赫医生的特效药来的，是吧？
Medicine? Oh... you mean Dr. Vache's wonder medicine, right?
到裂界里散步吗？哼，别装了。
In the Fragmentum? Hmph, gimme a break.
路过这儿的穷酸流浪汉都跟你一个样——想买药的话直接跟我说就行，没必要再往前走了。
You're the same as everyone else that comes through here. If you want medicine, you don't need to go any further — you talk to me.
哦，对了，这里只收现金，概不赊账……
And we only take cash, this ain't a charity...
我听说这儿的药很便宜。
I heard the medicine here is pretty cheap.
价是「互助会」后来定的，虽然不像瓦赫医生那样接近免费送，但也比诊所那女人卖的药便宜不少。
The mutual aid society sets the price. It might be different from Dr. Vache and his handouts, but it's a darn sight cheaper than that clinic woman's medicine.
…我说，你到底买不买，能不能给个痛快话？我没空跟你扯闲天。
...Well, are you buying or not? Spit it out. I don't have time for chit-chat.
What if a patient doesn't have the money?
没钱？没钱还买什么药啊，自己乖乖回家等死不行吗？
No money? Then you don't get any. You go home and wait for death.
…我说，你是不是在试探我啊？没钱就快滚开，别耽误我卖药。
...Say, what are you trying to pull here? If you can't afford it, then get outta my sight. I've got medicine to sell.
I'll take a course of treatment.
哼，下次跟人做生意，记得少说点废话…我的时间宝贵得很。
Hmph, cut the small talk next time... my time is valuable.
Must be difficult being this unpleasant.
怎么，爱买不买，你还能拿我怎么着不成？
Huh? What are you gonna do about it? Either buy something or clear out.
你们不该为穷人着想的吗？
Shouldn't you think about those in need?
那是瓦赫说的话，跟我们「互助会」没关系。
You sound like Vache. That isn't how the mutual aid society works.
等会儿，你这身打扮…你是那个女医生的熟人吧？我之前去诊所的时候瞥见过你，肯定没错！
Wait a minute, your clothes... Are you friends with that doctor woman? I've seen you at the clinic before — I know it!
走开，走开！离远点，我这儿不欢迎和那个女人有瓜葛的家伙！今天药店关门了，谁也别来烦我！
Get lost — now! If you're a friend of that woman then you're not welcome here! Shop's closed today, no customers!
等…等一下！那我们的药怎么办？我们都等了这么久了……
...W—Wait! What about our medicine? We've been waiting for ages...
散开，都散开！别废话了，你们改天再来吧！
Get lost! All of ya! Save your breath and come back some other time!
…都、都怪你，害得我们买不上特效药了！
...Th—This is all your fault! How are we supposed to get our wonder medicine now!?
你快走吧，你在这儿待着，怕是那家伙永远都不会再营业了……
You should leave — if you stay here that guy might not ever sell to us again...
（那个卖药的家伙，好像表现得特别心虚……）
(That medicine seller sure shut up shop in a hurry...)
（果然还是回去向娜塔莎汇报一下吧。）
(I should head back and report to Natasha.)

也就是说，「互助会」找到了哥…瓦赫留下的研究成果，而且还在向一些患者出售那些所谓的「特效药」……
So the mutual aid society found my bro— ...Vache's research results... and now they're selling this so-called "wonder medicine" to patients...?
能做出这种事…足以证明他们不是什么纯粹的「互助会」。

患者们还希望我对你保密。
The patients wanted me to keep it a secret from you.
这也难怪。我坚决反对他们服用所谓的「特效药」，他们肯定也知道我的态度。
I'm not surprised. They'll know that I'm completely against them using this "wonder medicine..."
The patient said he was willing to take the risk.
…作为对他们的生命负责的医生，我不能接受这种说辞。我对所谓「特效药」的态度不会改变。
...As a doctor, I don't accept that — I'm responsible for their well-being. My attitude towards this "wonder medicine" won't change.
瓦赫留下的那些药物…不对，那些甚至不能算「药物」，只是些实验中产生的副产品、试剂罢了。
What Vache left behind is nothing more than reagents and experimental by-products... The word "medicine" doesn't apply here.
我无数次警告过那些患者，但他们还是执迷不悟…也怪不得他们不愿意把和「互助会」有关的消息透露给我。
I warned the patients countless times, but it seems like they had their heads in the sand all along... No wonder they kept the mutual aid society a secret from me.
那些人应该是说了很多于我不利的话，所以你才会先去卖药的窝点一探究竟吧？
I'm guessing the patients you met weren't exactly singing my praises, which is why you tracked the dealer down and made inquiries first.
我不怪你，{NICKNAME}。感谢你事后还能来找我，这份信任对我来说很重要。
I don't blame you, {NICKNAME}. After everything you heard, I'm grateful you came back to find me. Your trust is important to me.
你如果好奇瓦赫那所谓「特效药」的效用，不如去问问诊所里的患者吧——看看他们会给你什么样的答案。
If you're curious about Vache's wonder medicine, you should ask some of the patients in the clinic... see what they have to say about the effects.
你问我瓦赫留下的药？那玩意…真的能称得上是药吗？
The medicine Vache left behind? That stuff... Can you even call it medicine?
虽然娜塔莎医生也在这里，但我还是得实话实说…依我看，瓦赫欠缺医德，根本算不上是个医生！
I know Dr. Natasha's here, but I have to tell it like it is... Vache had zero medical ethics — he didn't deserve the title "doctor."
他是有一身医生的本事，但却不肯好好用那本事治病救人——我以前去找他看病的时候，他甚至连病症都不问清楚，就给我开了所谓的「特效药」……
He may have had the capability, but he didn't use it to help anyone... Whenever I went to see him, he never even asked about my illness! He just prescribed me his so-called "wonder medicine..."
换作是你，那药你敢吃吗？
If it were you, would you have taken that medicine?
有人说瓦赫医生是主动从上层区下来帮忙的大善人…但我可不这么觉得。
Some people say that Dr. Vache was a saint who came from the Overworld to help those in need... I don't buy it.
「穷人们的医生」这种说法，纯粹是某些人在自我感动而已。瓦赫以前虽然经常发放一些免费的药物，但他其实压根不关心那些吃药的人……

"People's doctor..." That's just what people who've bought into the myth like to say. Vache used to distribute free medicine all the time, but, uh... he couldn't have cared less about the people taking the medicine...
说得难听点，他不过是把我们当成了实验对象。病能不能治好不重要，重要的是得有人愿意傻呵呵地当他的小地鼠……
The hard truth is that we were just his test subjects. It didn't matter if the medicine worked or not. What mattered was having a constant stream of willing lab rats...
…当然了，我控制不了别人怎么想，这些也只是我自己的推测。
...Of course, I can't control what anyone else thinks. That's just how I see it.
…瓦赫的事，我还没想好该怎么向你传达。我们之间的关系…还有他在下层区做过的事，这些旧事都说来话长。
...I still haven't worked out how to convey it to you, the issues surrounding Vache. My relationship with him... the things he's done in the Underworld... it's a long story.
关于瓦赫，你应该也已经听到许多不同的意见了。{NICKNAME}，能告诉我你的想法吗？
I'm guessing you've heard a lot of different opinions on Vache. What do you make of him, {NICKNAME}?
他是个欠缺医德的医生。
I think he was a doctor with zero medical ethics.
It's tough for me to say.
你是这么认为的吗？也难怪……
I see... I can understand that.
{NICKNAME}，我想让你再去见一位病人，她也是那「特效药」的受害者——我想让你看到滥用药物给患者带来的切实后果。
{NICKNAME}, I want you to go and visit another patient — a victim of the wonder medicine... I want you to see the real consequences of abusing that medicine.
等你了解了她的情况以后，就再回来找我聊聊看法吧。然后…我想拜托你帮我一个忙。
Once you've understood her situation, come back and tell me what you think. After that... I want to ask for your help again.
和她搭话时要小心，她的精神状态很不稳定…我已经照顾了她很长时间，但始终没能帮她调整到正常状态。
Watch what you say to her, she's not in the most stable mental state... I've taken care of her for a long time, but still haven't been able to get her back to her old self.
去尝试着和她交流一下吧，{NICKNAME}。尽量表现得有亲和力一些…不要吓到病人了。
Try talking with her, {NICKNAME}. And try to be as kind as possible... you don't want to scare her.
我是娜塔莎医生的朋友。
I'm a friend of Dr. Natasha.
我是…从天外降临的神医。
I'm a... miracle doctor from beyond the sky.
您是娜塔莎的病人，记得吗？
You're one of Dr. Natasha's patients, don't you remember?
…我老公在哪里，我的孩子又在哪里……
...Where's my husband... and where's my child...?
…他们在哪里？你说…你知道对不对？
...Wh—Where are they? You... you know where they are, right?
你还好吗？我真的不知道…
I'm afraid not. Are you okay?
…你不知道…她也不知道…大家都不知道……
...You don't know... they don't know... nobody knows...
到哪去了…他们…到哪去了……
真可怜啊，那个女人…她的丈夫孩子都生病去世了。
That poor, poor lady... Both her husband and child became ill and passed away.
他们之前病得很严重吗？
They must have been seriously ill...
哎…也说不上多严重，只是偶尔需要卧床治疗，耽误了工作生计。
*sigh* ...Not terribly serious. But they needed to get treatment every now and then, which did impact their livelihood.
她会变成这样就是这个原因吗？
And that made her become like this?
是啊…在家人去世之前，她还是挺开朗的一个人。
Yes... Before her family passed away, she was a carefree young woman.
她的老公和孩子都得了一种怪病，虽说症状不算太严重，但工作生计难免会受些影响。
Her husband and child caught a mysterious illness. The symptoms weren't grave, but their livelihood was certainly impacted.
为了能一次性彻底治愈，他们就去买那什么「特效药」…谁能想到，改用了那药之后，两人的病情立马变得更严重了。

In order to try and rid themselves of the ailment once and for all, they bought some kind of "wonder medicine..." Who would've thought their condition would deteriorate so rapidly after they began using it.
那副遭罪的模样，简直生不如死…过了没多久，两个人就前后脚离开了。
The two began to suffer terribly, such that death became a blessing... It wasn't long before they departed this world, one after the other.
那之后她就一直是这种状态。多亏娜塔莎医生主动帮她调养，否则的话…哎，真不敢想。
From that moment on, oh she became as you see her now. If Dr. Natasha hadn't taken her under her wing... *sigh* Well it doesn't bear thinking about.
那能怎么办呢？卖药的事先也都警告过了，说这疗法有风险，出了情况只能赖自己运气太差……
And yet what more could've been done? They were warned about the medicine. They were told about the risks... They chose to roll the dice.
也许真的和运气太差有关…
你真这么觉得吗？在我看来啊，那些卖药的就是在明目张胆地谋财害命啊…怎么能把这种东西卖给生病的人呢？
Just unlucky? As far as I'm concerned, those medicine dealers are making money for murder in broad daylight... Who would sell such a thing to the sick?
哎，多的话我也没力气说了。至少现在我和老伴儿还能尽力帮帮她，希望她有朝一日还能像个正常人一样生活吧……
*sigh* Talking about it tires me out. At least my husband and I are able to help her where we can. I just hope that one day she can lead a normal life again...
年轻人，来这边吧，别打扰那个可怜人了…我跟你说几句……
Come over here, child. It's best to leave that poor lady in peace. Let me explain...
你问我她怎么了？这已经够明显了吧，先是遭遇了医疗事故，然后精神上又受了打击……
What's wrong with her? Isn't it obvious? Her family were the victims of improper medical treatment, then she had a nervous breakdown...
真是无可救药啊，我这蠢妹妹…哎……
*sigh* Oh sister, sometimes there just isn't a cure...
那个叫瓦赫的医生，简直就不是人…是披着大褂的恶魔！
That Dr. Vache wasn't human... he was a devil in a doctor's coat!
我都提醒过她好多次了，这药不能信，可是她……
I told her so many times not to believe in that medicine, but she...
…你以为他活着的时候，做的事和「互助会」的那群药贩子有什么区别？要我说，他甚至还不如那帮家伙！
Yeah... But don't think for a second he was any better than those medicine dealers at the mutual aid society. He was worse than they could ever aspire to be!
「互助会」卖药起码还会告诉买家风险自负，瓦赫那家伙则是免费把那些毒药分发给所有人，连老人和小孩都……
At least the mutual aid society doesn't hide the risk from the buyers. Vache gave that poison away to everyone for free... even the elderly and the children...
可恶，可恶啊！我妹妹的命怎么就这么苦……
Argh, I hate them! I hate them all! How could they do this to my sister...
看你的表情…我想你对那种所谓「特效药」的性质已经有判断了，对吗？
By the look on your face... I'm assuming you've come to understand the wonder medicine all too well.
推广这种药的人…是恶魔吗？
The people selling that stuff are devils.
药贩子利用了人们脆弱的一面…
Those medicine dealers prey on our weaknesses...
嗯，不管是瓦赫还是「互助会」，他们都把下层区人们的心理拿捏得很准。
Be it Vache or the mutual aid society — forces like that can take full advantage of the... the typical Underworld state of mind.
Let me tell you a story, {NICKNAME}.
曾经，上层区有一位医术高明的医生，他同时还拥有过人的制药天赋。
There was once a brilliant Overworld doctor with unmatched pharmaceutical skill.
那位医生执意想要研制一种能够使人体不惧严寒的药物，他为自己的研究项目取名「风雪免疫」。
The doctor was set on developing a medicine that would steel the human body against the cold. He named his research project "Blizzard Immunity."
但医生的研究一再受阻，最大的原因在于缺乏实验对象。篡改人体的免疫系统伴随着巨大的风险，而上层区没有人愿意配合他进行这种实验。

But his research met with obstruction time and time again, the biggest factor being a lack of test subjects. Tampering with the human immune system carries huge risk, and nobody in the Overworld was willing to submit themselves to such experiments.
于是，那位医生联络了自己在下层区的妹妹…声称他想来支援下层区的医疗工作。
As such, the doctor got in touch with his sister in the Underworld... claiming that he wanted to support the medical effort below ground.
…得知这个消息的妹妹当然喜出望外。毕竟在医学方面，哥哥是她一直以来憧憬的目标。
...Naturally, his sister was overjoyed. After all, as far as medicine was concerned, her brother had always been the standard she'd strived to attain.
所以，她亲自把哥哥接到了下层，还托人给他安排了自己的诊所和实验室……
She brought her brother underground and entrusted him with her clinic and laboratory...
…后来的事，你应该能想象得到了。
...I think you know what comes next.
抱歉，我之前还怀疑过你…
I'm sorry that I doubted you before...
那种人居然是娜塔莎的哥哥…
It's hard to believe he was your brother...
给穷人发放免费的药物，只是瓦赫用来测试实验药剂的手段。
Issuing free medicine to the needy was just Vache's way of conducting experiments on his test subjects.
他的这些试剂确实能在某种程度上缓解病患的痛苦…但也仅此而已。试剂的效果会让病人暂时忘记痛苦，进而疏漏了常规的治疗……
On some level, his reagents were able to alleviate the patients' suffering... but nothing more. They would forget their pain for a while, and neglect their regular treatment plans...
结果就是…轻症的患者在虚假的「药效」陪同下痊愈，将一切归功于所谓的「特效药」；而重症患者的病情则会快速加剧，甚至提前迎来死亡。
The result... patients with mild illness would attribute their recovery to the so-called wonder medicine, while patients with serious illness would quickly deteriorate... and sometimes die.
我不能接受他们把死者的境遇单纯地归结为「不幸」或是「风险」，{NICKNAME}——没有一个称职的医生能接受这种事。
I cannot accept that their fate was simply the result of misfortune or risk, {NICKNAME}. No true doctor would accept that.
所以，我想正式委托你帮我回收那些「特效药」。你愿意接下这个任务吗？
That's why I want you to help me recover all the wonder medicine. Are you willing to take on this assignment?
必须有人站出来做正确的事。
Somebody has to do the right thing.
Not my preferred course of action, but...
但你肯定不会坐视不管，对吧？
...But it's impossible to sit on the sidelines, right?
这样做一定会让那些已经对「特效药」产生依赖的病人感到痛苦…毕竟要由我们来亲手打碎他们「虚假的希望」。
This will be hard for the people that have come to rely on the wonder medicine... but it's up to us to remove this false hope.
但还请你不要心软，一定要将瓦赫留下的试剂悉数回收。所有的责任和后果都由我来承担，你不必为此感到焦虑。
You mustn't hesitate — recover every last reagent that Vache left behind. I'll take responsibility for the consequences — don't worry about that.
去吧，{NICKNAME}。我在这里等着你的好消息。
Go, {NICKNAME}. I'll be waiting for the good news.
Stop right there! No one's allowed up ahead!
嚯！你倒是理直气壮啊，直接明抢是吧？
Oh-ho! Playing the hero, are we? Is this a stick-up?
你这家伙，就是诊所那个女医生的跟班吧？你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
You're that clinic woman's lackey, aren't you. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?
骗谁呢？你这家伙明明就是那个女医生的跟班，你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
Who are you trying to kid? You're that clinic woman's lackey. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?
In the Fragmentum? Gimme a break!
你这家伙，就是诊所那个女医生的跟班吧？你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
You're that clinic woman's lackey, aren't you. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?
我看那婆娘就是盯上了我们的药，特地派你来砸场子的吧？
She's after our medicine and sent you here to smash the place, right?
兄弟们，不用再假装客气了，把这家伙给我赶走！
Men, look lively and send this idiot packing already!
残破的储物箱里存放着按照实验编号放置的测试药剂，应该就是「互助会」提到的「特效药」了。
The old box has some medicine labeled with experiment numbers. This must be the wonder medicine the mutual aid society was talking about.
背后突然传来一阵脚步声……
You suddenly hear footsteps behind you...
…好嘛，看看这回我撞上谁了？大名鼎鼎的外来者——没想到还是个小偷兼强盗！
...Well, look who we have here. Your reputation precedes you, outsider... I didn't take you for a bandit and a thief!
哦，凑巧路过，然后把我们看门的弟兄揍得落花流水？
Oh, just passing through... And our guards decided to just beat themselves into submission, I suppose?
告诉你吧，我是「疑难重症患者互助会」的会长。你面前这些药物可是我们诸多会员的命根子啊，你确定要做触犯他们利益的事吗？
You listen here — I'm the president of the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society. The medicine we hold here is lifeblood for many of our members. Are you sure you want to deprive them of that?
多可怜啊，这些病人…好不容易找到能救命的特效药，居然还要碰上你这种强盗……
Those poor patients... Along comes a life-saving wonder medicine, only to be snatched away by a shameless bandit like you...
据我所知，这下层区的病患之多，只靠那一家诊所早就容纳不下了吧？
The Underworld is full of sickness... What would happen if we left it all to that clinic to treat?
有我的「互助会」帮她接手那些已经走投无路的患者，你家那位医生难道不该感谢我吗？
My mutual aid society has relieved that doctor of patients at the end of the road. Shouldn't she be thanking me?
娜塔莎不会放弃任何患者——
Natasha would never give up on a patient...
...And she'd never work with an impostor like you!
哼，看来你这家伙是铁了心要来砸场子啊……
Hmm. Seems like you are quite bent on dismantling our operations, aren't you?
也罢，既然被你找到了这里，那说什么也不能让你毫发无损地离开！
Fine, seeing as you came all this way, it'd be rude not to give you the opportunity!
弟兄们，把这个偷药贼给我拿下！
可…可恶…我们和你到底什么仇什么怨，为什么要挡我们的财路……
Blast it... What did we ever do to you? Why are you taking away our money-maker!?
看来你也已经承认了啊？自己干这行只是为了赚钱，而不是为了拯救患者的生命。
So you admit it, then? You're not in this to save lives. You're in it to get rich.
你、你怎么来了？该死，麻烦事一桩接一桩……
Wh—What are you doing here? Ugh, as if we didn't have enough trouble already...
…你早该料到「麻烦」会找上门来，从你决定昧着良心做假药生意的那天开始。
...Selling fake medicine with false kindness. You should have expected trouble to find you sooner or later.
我有责任保障患者们的生命安全。换句话说…我必须铲除威胁到他们的危险因素。
I have a responsibility to protect the well-being of my patients... or to put it another way: I must eradicate any and all threats to them.
你…你救不了所有人！这下层区，茫茫多的病患…你怎么救得过来？
You... You can't save everyone! The Underworld is teeming with sickness... how could you possibly pull it off!
没错，只靠我自己的力量救不了所有人…如果有必要，我可以放弃吃饭和睡觉的时间来为他们治病。
You're right, I can't save everyone alone... but if I must, I would sacrifice food and sleep to treat them.
瓦赫欠下层区的债还记在我的头上。我只能尽最大的努力帮助这里的每个人，直到我倒下为止。
The debt that Vache owes to the Underworld rests with me. All I can do is help everyone to the best of my ability... to the very end.
哼，真是个偏执的家伙…在这方面，你跟你那疯子哥哥没什么两样。
Ugh... So stubborn... In that sense, you're no different from your crazy brother.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。你今天的作为能拯救许多下层区的家庭。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your actions today have saved many Underworld families.
我会找到办法处理哥哥留下的这些试剂，「互助会」再也不能打着他的旗号胡作非为了。
I'll find a way to dispose of Vache's leftover reagents. Next time the "Mutual Aid Society" wants to whip up a quack cure? They'll be out of luck.
我们回镇上去吧。我还欠那些患者一个解释……
Let's go back to town. I still owe those patients an explanation...
（娜塔莎好像被患者围住了？听听他们在说什么吧…）
(It looks like the patients have surrounded Natasha? Let's hear what they're saying...)
…医生，你说什么？「特效药」已经停止供应了？
...What are you saying, doctor? The wonder medicine is out of supply?
对，你没听错。那批药物存在严重的隐患，相关的供应链已经被「地火」切断了。
Correct. That medicine is a wolf in sheep's clothing — Wildfire has cut off the supply chain.
各位的病情需要合理、科学的治疗，胡乱用药只会加剧你们的症状……
Your ailments need rational, scientific treatment. Relying on pseudo-medicines will only worsen your condition...
哼，什么合理、科学…我看你就是嫉妒自己的病人被抢走了吧？
Hmph, rational and scientific, huh...? The way I see it, you're just jealous you lost your patients.
别、别这么跟娜塔莎医生说话，太不礼貌了……
H—How dare you speak to Dr. Natasha like that! Where are your manners...
…不是，老太太，你怎么还向着她啊？我们这特效药吃得好好的，现在说断就断了？凭什么——
...Ma'am, please think for a moment. How can you still be siding with her? That wonder medicine was working fine for us, and now it's gone because she wants it to be? How can she—
——我明白你恼火的原因，但还请大家相信我作为主治医生的判断。
I understand your anger, but as your doctor, I ask you to trust my judgment.
我一定会想办法争取到足够的医疗资源，帮大家渡过各自的难关。如果有必要的话，我会到上层区去求助……
I will find a way to access more medical resources and help you through your struggles. If I must, I'll get help from the surface...
上层区…哼，我都快忘了，你以前还是个上层区的大小姐呢。
The surface... Hmph, I almost forgot that you were an Overworld big shot.
你太不尊重娜塔莎医生了……
Have some respect for Dr. Natasha...
嘁，她最好真能快点找到「特效药」的替代品！否则的话，我就把她陷害瓦赫医生的事告诉所有人。
Tsk, if it's respect she wants, she better find a replacement for the wonder medicine, fast! If not, I'll tell everyone about how she set up Dr. Vache.
啊…你来了，{NICKNAME}。抱歉，被你看到了尴尬的一幕。
Oh... {NICKNAME}, you're here. I apologize, that must have made for uncomfortable viewing.
嗯…我没事。设身处地地想想，他会有那样的反应也很自然。我能做的只有尽力为这些患者治疗，消除他们的疑虑。
Mm... I'm okay. If I were in his shoes, I may well have had the same reaction. Now I need to focus on treating the patients, and dispelling their doubts.
好想修理那个嘴碎的家伙！
I'd like to straighten out that loudmouth myself!
别冲动。设身处地地想想，他会有那样的反应也很自然。我能做的只有尽力为这些患者治疗，消除他们的疑虑。
Don't let your emotions get the better of you. If I were in his shoes, I might well have had the same reaction. Now I need to focus on treating the patients, and dispelling their doubts.
…先不提这个了。收拾掉了瓦赫留下的烂摊子，我心里那块石头也能暂时放下。
...Let's leave it for now. I'll feel a lot better once I've gotten rid of this mess that Vache left us.
现在…我想跟你完整地讲讲有关他的事。
...Now's as good a time as any to tell you Vache's whole story.
你如果有任何想问我的事，就请现在开口吧。
If there's anything you want to know, don't hesitate to ask.
不…但我一直以为，我们的关系比同父同母的兄妹更亲密。
No... but I used to think we were so close that we may as well have been...
我其实也是在孤儿院长大的孩子。直到被来自上层区的一家人收养以后，我的人生轨迹才发生了变化。
I actually grew up in the orphanage. It wasn't until I was adopted by an Overworld family that life changed for me.
我的养母，她一直将我视若己出。瓦赫也把我当亲妹妹一样疼爱…至少儿时如此。
My adoptive mother always saw me as her own flesh and blood, and Vache loved me like a sister... that is, while we were still young.
养父母一家是医学世家，我们俩从小就接触到了很多医学专著。长大以后，我们也都顺利进入了贝洛伯格的医学院校，走上了从医这条路。

My adoptive parents belonged to a prominent medical family — as kids, we were exposed to all kinds of medical texts. When we were older, both of us got straight into Belobog's medical school. We were on a path into the medical profession.
What kind of person was Vache?
温和，内向。但是一旦涉及到专业领域…他就会变得极端偏执，像是换了一副脸孔。
He was gentle and introverted. But when it came to work he could be absurdly obsessive... like a completely different person.
如果我在实验时犯了错误，他会用尖刻的词句苛责我…但事后又会道歉，安慰我。他就是如此矛盾的一个人。
Whenever I made a mistake in an experiment, he'd bite my head off... and then a while later, he'd apologize and comfort me. He was conflicted in that way.
你早就知道这药是他留下的？
So you knew this medicine was his work?
我并不知道他还在铆钉镇留下了残余的试剂。刚听你说起时，我也有些震惊。
I didn't know he had leftover reagents in Rivet Town. I was shocked when you told me.
没能彻底斩断联系的过往…总有一天会回来敲你的门。
If you fail to make a clean break with the past, the past creeps up on you...
这件事得从头说起…瓦赫从小就有一个理想——研制出名为「风雪免疫」的药物。
*sigh* That's a long story... Ever since he was little, Vache had always wanted to develop a medicine called "Blizzard Immunity."
他将人体的畏寒性视作疾病，希望能研制出与之对抗的药物，让人类能在寒潮中生存。那样的话，人们就可以走出贝洛伯格，在雪原中重建家园。

He saw the human body's vulnerability to cold as a disease, and wanted to cure it so that humanity could survive the Eternal Freeze. If he succeeded, people would be able to leave Belobog and rebuild their homes in the Snow Plains.
老实说，我不知道「风雪免疫」该如何达成。但我敬佩他的理想和坚持…所以从小到大，我一直选择相信他。
To be honest, I never understood how he'd achieve that "Blizzard Immunity." But I do admire that vision and perseverance... I always chose to believe him, ever since I was a kid.
我敬佩他的理想和坚持，虽然我觉得「风雪免疫」是个遥不可及的理想。
I do admire his vision and perseverance, even though "Blizzard Immunity" always seemed unachievable to me.
我知道他在上层的研究并不顺利，所以经常给他写信，让他到下层来看看，和孤儿院的孩子们待上一段时间——权当是一种调剂。

I knew his research in the Overworld wasn't going well. I used to write to him and ask him to come down and stay with the kids in the orphanage for a while. I thought it might help take his mind off his research.
但当时我还太年轻，还不知道长期的挫败会如何压垮一个人，给他带去可怕的影响……
But I was too young to know what long-term frustration could do to a person. It changed him in a terrible way...
在下层的那段时间，他接触到了一些受到轻微裂界侵蚀影响的患者。他们的身体对冷热的反应异于常人，这种特性让瓦赫十分着迷。

During his stay in the Underworld, he met patients affected by Fragmentum corrosion with mild symptoms. Compared with non-patients, their bodies reacted differently to hot and cold. And that fascinated Vache.
他开始尝试复现轻微的裂界侵蚀效果，认为这种研究能促进「风雪免疫」的开发……
He began to simulate mild Fragmentum corrosion, thinking that it could lead to breakthroughs in developing Blizzard Immunity.
这些试剂并不能治愈一切重疾——世界上不存在那种万能药。瓦赫制作出它们，只是为了在短期内稳定受研究者的症状…以便观察他们的体征变化。

Those reagents of his aren't cure-alls for critical illness — that doesn't exist. Vache made the reagents to mitigate the suffering of his patients in the short term — a convenient way for him to observe changes in his test subjects.
在我没有注意到的角落，他一直在向无辜的居民分发着这种试剂。等我注意到异常时…他的理智已经快被可怕的研究消磨殆尽了。

But behind my back, he had been doling out the reagents to residents who were kept in the dark. When it finally struck me that something was wrong, his terrible research had already turned him into... into a madman.
He'd lost his last shred of humanity...
嗯…而且这一切就发生在我的眼皮底下。想来可笑，对亲人的信任竟然蒙蔽了我的双眼……
Indeed... and it all happened under my nose. How ridiculous — my judgment was clouded by trust in a loved one...
过了很久，你什么都没发现？
Did nothing seem strange to you all that time?
当时的我无条件地信任瓦赫。想来真是可笑又可悲……
I trusted Vache with all my heart. Funny, isn't it? And pathetic.
他的实验被揭发以后，我和奥列格商议了很久，讨论该如何给这件事善后。
When his experiments were exposed, I spent a long time with Oleg discussing how to handle the aftermath.
当时正值封锁令颁布前夕，下层的银鬃铁卫已经近乎不见踪影，我们想了很久都找不到处置瓦赫的办法。
This was shortly before the Underworld was sealed off — there were hardly any Silvermane Guards remaining. We spent ages trying to find a way to handle Vache.
最后，奥列格建议将他驱逐了事，并且永远禁止他再踏足下层。
In the end, Oleg suggested that we banish him and permanently deny him access to the Underworld.
如果让他的受害者知道了真相，瓦赫肯定会被愤怒的下层区人撕成碎片。那时的我还很年轻、软弱，奥列格会提出那种建议，肯定也是顾及了我的感情。

Had his victims found out the truth, Vache would've been torn to pieces by furious Underworlders. I was young and weak at the time — Oleg must have worried about how I'd react to such a scenario, or he wouldn't have suggested banishment.
Banishment isn't a particularly harsh punishment...
现在回想起来，的确如此。他的所作所为值得更加严苛的惩罚……
*sigh* Looking back, it wasn't. He deserved much worse...
You two did the right thing.
…希望如此。得知真相的那天…我第一次觉得兄长的面貌如此陌生。
...I hope so. The day I learned the truth was the day I no longer recognized my brother.
我和奥列格把他带回了上层。瓦赫最后向我们提出的要求，是将他带到城市之外，他一直想要战胜的那片雪原之中。
Oleg and I took Vache to the Overworld. He made his final request to us: To take him outside the city to the Snow Plains he'd always wanted to conquer.
就在我的眼前，他独自走进了雪幕…从那时候起，我就不断在脑海里对自己重复一句话——「瓦赫已经死了」。
His figure gradually disappeared into the snow curtain... I've been telling myself that Vache is dead ever since.
抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我不太擅长讲故事。瓦赫是位糟糕透顶的兄长，更是个不称职的医生…你只要知道这点就够了。
Forgive me, {NICKNAME}, I'm not good at telling stories. Vache was a terrible brother and a worse doctor... That's all you need to know.
今天就聊到这里吧，谢谢你帮我处理哥哥留下的烂摊子。这是一点谢意，请你收下。

您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
