「军团」远去，奇物归位，各科室研究再度开张，新进宇宙舶来品快速流转……
The Legion is gone, and the Curios are back. Various departments are returning to their research, and the newly imported goods from the cosmos are beginning to circulate.
「复兴计划」诸事顺利，那么这封信，究竟在指什么？
Everything is going smoothly with Project Revival. So what exactly does this letter mean?
I heard you are looking for me?
在全体科员和你这位得力帮手的共同建设之下，「黑塔」已经大致恢复了战前的元气。
Thanks to your help and everybody's hard work, the space station is pretty much back on its feet.
在复兴的尾声，我本来是想把你叫回来做个见证，也算有始有终。
As a conclusion to Project Revival, I wanted to summon you to witness the fruits of our labor.
但就在前两天，我收到了一封奇怪的信，既然你来了，也帮我拿拿主意。
But just two days ago, I received a strange letter. Now that you're here, perhaps you can help me figure out what it is about.
我常听科员称赞你的多谋和善断，怎么样，对这段文字有什么头绪吗？
I often hear the researchers praise you for your resourcefulness and good judgment. What do you think? Any clue what this message is about?
It seems like something from the Department of Implement Arts.
没错，只有应物科的温姓科员会这么说话。
Yes, only the researcher called Wen in the Department of Implement Arts would speak like that.
然而此信来源蹊跷。它被夹在议事间桌上那本名叫《星域界种指南》的大部头中间，平时除我之外，没有其他人翻看。

However, it was a strange story how I got hold of this letter at the beginning. It was sandwiched in a tome called A Guide to Astral Realm Species on the Conference Room table. Normally, no one looks at it except me.
显然，有人想把这封信私下递给我，所以我也不敢贸然询问应物科的人。
Obviously, someone wanted to hand me this letter in private, so I didn't dare to ask the staff in the Department of Implement Arts.
Who is this Cryptologist From Locus Silentii?
据我所知，空间站里没有顶着这个名号的科员，应该只是化名。
As far as I know, there is no one with this title in the space station. It must be an alias.
但写信人的身份，并不是我的关注重点啦。
But the identity of the writer is not what I am most concerned about.
魈魅…魈魅…不会是…水魈？不愧是{NICKNAME}呀，一下就抓住了全文的「文眼」。现在一切都说得通了！
Spirit... Spirit... Can it be... The Xenohydro? Well done, {NICKNAME}! You just found the "key" to the text right away. Now everything makes sense!
看来，这并不是普通的信件，而是一封「告密信」，意在检举「异星水魈」。
It seems this is no ordinary letter, it's from an informant. Their intention is to report on the Xenohydro.
自从「异星水魈」从温明德队长手下脱逃之后，它就从空间站销声匿迹。
The Xenohydro has disappeared from the space station since it escaped from Mr. Wen Mingde's hands.
这封信，似乎印证了曾有的传言——水魈迟迟没有落网，正是因为有共犯包庇。
This letter seems to support the rumor that the Xenohydro was not caught because it has an accomplice.
你看这下阙，「细问魈魅踪迹，偏看收容一隅」明显是在指引我们去查探水魈的活动范围；而「戚戚与之同谋」，则点明了共犯的存在。

Look at this sentence. "An inquiry into spirit traces, a glance into the site of storage" is obviously leading us to investigate the Xenohydro's range of activities, and "to be an accomplice" implies the existence of an accomplice.
至于其他六言句，依我来看，一部分描绘了这位共犯的画像，一部分表述了水魈真正的藏匿地点。可惜，我对如何破解剩下的信息毫无头绪。

As for the other six sentences, in my opinion, some depict the portrait of the accomplice and some describe the real hiding place of the Xenohydro. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to interpret the rest of the message.
如今工作告一段落，恰逢这封告密信出现，是时候借着东风，把水魈议题重新摆上台面。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
Now that we are done with other work, this letter falls into our hands at just the right moment. It's high time we put the Xenohydro issue back on the table. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?
I am with you all the way!
I have a lot going on lately...
Please, {NICKNAME}. I hope you won't refuse. After all—
考虑到有内鬼卷入此事，如果交由普通科员来办，难免打草惊蛇。而{NICKNAME}既非科员，又和水魈打过照面，可以说是「唯一」的理想人选。

Considering there may be a traitor among us, if I hand this case to our staff, we might alert the culprit. And {NICKNAME}, you're not a staff member, and you've also met the Xenohydro before. You really are the ideal candidate to handle this case.
一旦牵扯到共犯，这件事就不再是单纯的奇物收容问题，必须谨慎处理。所以，我想请你先到信中明确提到的收容舱段，探探这段言论的虚实。

And if there is an accomplice involved, this matter is no longer a simple case of Curio retrieval. It must be handled with caution. Therefore, I would like to ask you to go to the Storage Zone mentioned in the letter and verify the facts.
只要{NICKNAME}能抓住水魈或是共犯中的任何一个，我们就能当面对质。至于那位科员是一念之差，还是有心作恶，我会作出公正评判。
If we can catch either the Xenohydro or the accomplice, we'll be able to interrogate them. Then I can judge whether the accomplice's motive is malicious or not.
在这大势所趋的关头，就让复兴计划在你我手中画上句点吧。
At this critical juncture, it is up to us to finally finish Project Revival.
——「波少」一向大人有大量，其实，你完全有机会重获我的青睐…只要你肯为了之前的那些行为道歉！
I've always been a rather magnanimous person. In fact, here is a chance for you to regain my favor... As long as you are willing to apologize for your behavior!
想否认事实？！拉明娜啊拉明娜，你的花样可是越来越多了！我来帮你回忆回忆——
You want to deny the truth!? Lamina, Lamina, you're getting more and more dishonest! Let me help you remember—
我盒饭中的芥末、制服背后的大洞、回复女科员的干瘪信件，这些难道不是你的手笔？
The mustard in my lunch box, the big hole on the back of my uniform, and this boring letter in reply to the female researcher. Aren't they your doing?
虽然那些东西确实只有我经手过，但……
It's true I'm the only person who handled those things, but...
更别说，当我在跟艾丝妲小姐汇报工作的时候，你还突然大叫，卡波特先生，来不及了，「呜呜伯」还在等着您和它们一起玩呢！让小姐以为我私通奇物，不务正业！

And when I was reporting to Miss Asta, you suddenly shouted, "Mr. Capote, it's too late. The Wubbaboos are still waiting for you to play with them!" You made her think I was colluding with Curios and not doing my job.
可这句话的确是在陈述事实啊……
But I was just stating a fact...
天知地知，你知我知！这句话我跟你说了多少遍，你就是存心要和我作对！
We should keep it only between you, and me! How many times have I told you that? You were just going against me on purpose!
算了，我看你根本没有悔改的意思，等你哪天在这里呆得头晕眼花，前途灰暗，你自然会再回来寻求「波少」的帮助。
Forget it. I don't think you are going to repent at all. One day, when you're sick of this place and your future is gloomy, you will come crawling back to seek help from me.
你就祈祷那时候我还没找到什么薇诺娜埃琳娜芭芭娜之类的科员来顶替你吧！哼。
Just keep praying that by then, I haven't replaced you with a Renona, an Elena, or a Barbara... or someone else, hmph!
…我到底什么时候才能变得更勇敢一点……
啊，是空间站的英雄{NICKNAME}，久闻大名，没想到有机会近距离见到……
Oh, it's {NICKNAME}, the hero of the space station. I've heard so much about you. I didn't expect to have the opportunity to see you up close.
我…我本来是卡波特先生的秘书。
I... I was Mr. Capote's secretary.
最近帮他办事，出了些岔子，就被他赶到这里，做奇物分拣的流水线工作。
But recently, I made a few mistakes when I was running errands for him. So he sent me here to work on the Curio sorting assembly line.
真是不好意思，让你看笑话啦……
I'm so sorry, you must think I am a joke...
都被你听到啦…其实卡波特先生安在我头上的那些罪名，我根本没有印象。
You heard it all... Although, I don't remember doing the things Mr. Capote accused me of.
至于真正的罪犯，我也怀疑过另有其人，但无论是监控还是其他证据显示，卡波特先生的东西确实只有我一个人碰过。
I also suspected someone else, but everything showed that I was the only one who touched Mr. Capote's things.
也许真应了那句界种科内部的「拉明娜定律」，凡是我拉明娜「有可能会」搞砸的事，「就一定会」被拉明娜搞砸……
Maybe "Lamina's law" is really true. In the Department of Ecology, they have a saying, anything that Lamina "can" screw up, Lamina will "screw up."
难道{NICKNAME}觉得…还有其他的可能？不可能吧……
{NICKNAME}, do you think... there's another explanation for this? Surely not...
别这样，要是它叫做「{NICKNAME}定律」，你会怎么想……
Come on, how would you feel if it was called the "{NICKNAME}'s law."
I have a letter for you to read.
以我的能力，估计帮不上什么忙…我先看看吧…
Sure, but knowing me, I probably won't be much help...
嗯，如果我没理解错的话，这封信里，「细问魈魅踪迹」似乎写的是我们界种科的奇物「异星水魈」。而「戚戚与之同谋」，则像是某种指控……

Well, if I understand correctly, where it says, "An inquiry into spirit traces," it seems to be referring to the Xenohydro, a kind of Curio from our department. And "to be an accomplice" seems to be some kind of accusation.
{NICKNAME}为什么问我这个，莫非，你正在调查「异星水魈」窜逃案吗？
{NICKNAME}, why are you asking me this? Are you investigating the escape of the Xenohydro?
啊？！是吗…我最近一直呆在这边，倒是没有发现异常。
Oh!? Really... I've been hanging around here lately, but I haven't noticed anything unusual.
啊？！难道卡波特先生说的那些事，也是它冒充我做的？可它没必要这样做吧……
Huh!? Did it do those things that Mr. Capote is accusing me of? But why...
…至于信上的其他内容，恕我愚笨，我实在是看不大懂。
As for the rest of the letter, please forgive my ignorance, but I really don't understand it.
但既然有了收容舱段这个线索，这里的区域拢共就这么大，不如优先采取枚举法或者排除法。
But now we know it's in the Storage Zone, and this area is only so large. Maybe we can take the initiative and make a list of the possible suspects.
这块地方我还算熟，记忆中的确有一两处地方人迹罕至，有可能窝藏水魈，我可以带你去碰碰运气。
I'm quite familiar with this place. There are one or two places I know that are inaccessible where the Xenohydro may be hiding. I can take you to have a look.
「行动」总比「空想」要好，如果不嫌弃的话，{NICKNAME}你就跟上来吧。
Actions are better than words. If you don't mind, {NICKNAME}, follow me.
咳、咳，这房间，好浓重的水腥气…看来水魈真的来过这里。
Ahem, ehem, this room smells humid... It seems the Xenohydro really was here.
{NICKNAME}你快过来，这里据点隐蔽，视野开阔，可以监控整个房间。
{NICKNAME}, come quickly. This place is secluded and it's a good vantage point. You can watch the whole room from here.
那个…我们确定要在这里蹲它吗？其实可以试着做个捕猎装置，也算是我们界种科的工作规范。
Well... Are you sure we want to ambush it here? We can try making a trap, it's one of our standard procedures in the Department of Ecology.
How do you make a trap?
这样也许不太明智…按照《星域界种指南》的说法，水魈这种生物行踪诡秘，又生性多疑，简单的守株待兔，大概率会竹篮打水一场空。
This may not be wise... According to the A Guide to Species in the Astral Realm, the Xenohydro is very cautious and stealthy. If we simply wait for it, it's probably just a waste of time.
{NICKNAME}，你不如先听听捕猎装置这个方案……
{NICKNAME}, why don't I show you how to make a trap?
「将两只一次性动力臂严丝合缝地铰接，一旦猎物以微弱的生物震动踏入动力臂的捕捉范围，等待它们的便是在劫难逃的命运。」
Tightly connect the two disposable kinetic arms. Once the prey steps within range of the power arm, all that awaits them is doom.
而要做一次性动力臂，我们需要找到许多精细的零件、毁灭异质、相位灵火……
To make a disposable kinetic arm, we need to find many intricate parts, Strange Matter of Destruction and Phase Flame...
得亏你记性好才能记住。
I am glad you have such a good memory.
不不，「星域界种」就是这样一门非常严谨、优雅的学科，我只是如实传达出它的魅力。
No, astral ecology is a rigorous and beautiful discipline of knowledge. I am simply conveying its charm truthfully.
但你提醒了我，似乎一时间很难把这么多材料凑齐……
But you reminded me that it'll be difficult to gather all the materials quickly.
听起来是很高级的材料。
也还好啦，以前我们可是想向应物科支取多少就能支取多少。不过，现在物资不比以前宽裕，短时间内很难凑齐……
It's okay. In the past, we could take as much as we wanted from the Department of Implement Arts. But now we are short of materials, it'll be hard to collect everything we need soon.
做完水魈已经老死了吧。
By that time the Xenohydro will have died of old age.
啊，用不了那么久吧？水魈的寿命应该还挺长的…不过把精力聚焦在装置上，确实容易陷入被动，本末倒置。
Well, it won't take quite that long. The Xenohydro has a pretty long lifespan... But we probably shouldn't put ourselves in such a passive situation.
抱歉跟你说了这么多，我们还是靠人肉蹲点吧……
Anyway, we'd better ambush it ourselves.
或许要等上一段时间，不如聊聊天打发打发时间吧，{NICKNAME}。
We may have to wait for a while. Why don't we have a chat to kill time, {NICKNAME}.
Why do you work for Capote?
你不是第一个问这问题的人…撇开「波少」的粉丝不谈，很多人对卡波特先生印象糟糕，认为他行事张扬，仗势欺人。
You're not the first person to ask me this question... Except for his fans, many people have a bad impression of Master Capote. They think he is loud and obnoxious.
但我和他相处的时间最长，我知道，卡波特先生本性不坏，他只是拥有很多优越的条件，因此没办法理解别人的困境。简单来说，他只是被运气「宠坏」了。

But I have been with him for the longest time. I know that Mr. Capote is not a bad person in nature. He is just naturally gifted in many aspects, so he can't understand other people's difficulties sometimes. In short, he is just spoiled by fate.
How can you be spoiled by fate?
得天独厚的帅气长相、老天爷赏饭吃的研究才华、轻易被人喜欢的飒爽风度…一个人从来都这样如意，要求所有人都围着自己转，也是很自然的事吧。

With his unusually handsome appearance, his great talent for research, and his lovable outgoing nature... Everything has always worked out well for him. So it's normal for him to think the world revolves around him.
没、没有，我只是陈述我眼睛所看到的东西而已。从小，家里人就让我多关注事情的亮面，这样生活才不会那么阴郁。
No, no, I'm just stating what I see. Since my childhood, my family has always taught me to focus on the positive, so that life wouldn't be so gloomy.
更何况，他确实给了我一份能更接近界种科本真研究的工作机会，虽然代价是要兼任他的秘书……
Not to mention he did give me a job that lets me get closer to the real research work in the Department of Ecology. Although the price was to work as his secretary...
How do you see yourself, Lamina?
我、我么…就是一个再普通不过的小科员，甚至这么说都是高看了我自己……
Me? I... I'm just an ordinary researcher. Even that sounds like an exaggeration.
因为…我是顶替了姐姐的名额，才得以进入「黑塔」…当然这件事，卡波特先生也不知道。
Because... I only got into the space station in my sister's place... Of course, Mr. Capote doesn't know about that.
我的母星资源贫乏，每个家庭只能勉强支撑一个人进行星际旅行。姐姐获得了「黑塔」的遴选资格，但她把这全家独一、毕生唯一的机会，让给了我。

My home planet is quite poor in resources, and most families can only barely support one person to go on a space journey. My sister was qualified to come to the space station, but she gave me the only chance in the family and in her life.
可惜我不争气，如果是姐姐在黑塔，一定能干出一番名头。所以我是怎样的人？这个问题，我无法…或是说，根本不敢回答……

It's a pity I am such a failure. If my sister were here in the space station, she would be able to make a name for herself. So how do I see myself? I can't... Or dare not answer this question at all...
你和拉明娜在这里蹲到辰宿列张，露结为霜，肚皮空荡荡。
You and Lamina wait there until very late. The dew has turned to frost, and your belly is empty.
We can't just wait here forever...
呼…水魈还是影子也没有…也许，它早就离开了？
*sigh* No sign of the Xenohydro... Maybe it left a long time ago?
我们可以找找房间里的使用痕迹，通过新旧程度，大致能够推算水魈离开的时间。
We can look for traces left by the Xenohydro in the room and use them to work out when it was last here.
Time to walk around and change my mood...
银光闪烁的舱内，留下了几根水魈本就稀疏的毛发。
In the silver cabin, there are several hairs left from the Xenohydro's sparse fur.
显然，在保持自由身的情况下，水魈还是会回到收容舱里睡个好觉。你不禁怀疑，它是否已经罹患斯德哥尔摩综合症。
Apparently, although it is free, the Xenohydro still returns to the Storage Zone to sleep. You can't help but wonder if it has Stockholm syndrome.
旁边的收容品说明已被涂黑，显示出脱逃者徒劳的愤怒和有限的反抗。
The description of the collectible item nearby has been painted over. This is a sign of anger and frustration exhibited by the escapee.
水魈也会联网冲浪？如此荒诞的情景是你没想到的。
Can the Xenohydro surf the Internet? You didn't expect to find such an absurd scene.
上面留存着「异星水魈」的研究资料，说明水魈曾在这里研究它自己。
There is research data about the Xenohydro left on the screen, showing that the Xenohydro was once here learning about itself.
在页面最下方键入了一行未提交的本地小字：
At the bottom of the page, there is a line of unsubmitted words:
「咕噜噜，一派胡言，别想抓老子！」
毛发彻底干燥，电子屏的本地日期也停留在很久之前……
The hair is completely dry, and the date on the screen is from a long time ago
看样子它是不会再回来了，咱们继续找找其他地方吧。
Looks like it won't be coming back. Let's keep looking elsewhere.
（这儿也有浓重的水腥气…但拉明娜人呢？）
(There's also a strong watery smell here... But where's Lamina?)
(Let me deal with these monsters first!)
怎么样？现在有感觉好些吗？
How's that? Are you feeling better now?
(Darn it, I seem to have fallen for the Xenohydro's trap!)
（怪物的突然袭击造成了严重的伤势……）
(The monster's surprise attack caused some serious injuries...)
{NICKNAME}！别着急，我来替你治疗。我身上留着许多药剂，本来是医疗科的粉丝送给卡波特先生的，他不稀罕，就全扔给了我。
{NICKNAME}! Don't worry, I'll treat your wounds. I have a lot of medicine on me. It was originally given to Mr. Capote by his fans among the medical staff. He didn't want it, so he gave it to me.
我发现这里有怪物游荡，就先躲起来了。怪我没有出声警示，才害{NICKNAME}中了水魈的陷阱。
I found a monster wandering around here, so I hid away. It's my fault that I didn't warn you. That's why you fell for the Xenohydro's trap.
我知道了…但到目前为止，感觉我一直在帮倒忙，水魈依旧没找到。而且我也想不出其他可能的窝点了，要不然就…放弃吧？
I know... I feel like I haven't really been helping so far, and the Xenohydro is still no where to be found. And I can't think of anywhere else. So... should we give up?
它一定是猜到了会有人追捕自己，才在一路上设下致命的障碍。它在暗，我们在明，这样找下去指不定还有什么危险，要不然就…放弃吧？
It must have guessed that someone is going after it, so it sets up a trap along the way. It's hidden and we're exposed. It could be more dangerous if we go ahead. So... Should we give up?
We can't go on like this.
是我想得太简单了…费了这么大功夫，还差点遭遇危险，要不然就…放弃吧？
I underestimated the situation... We put in so much effort and almost got seriously hurt. So... should we give up?
是时候重新检视一回密信了。
It's time to reexamine the letter.
唉，兜兜转转…总之有价值的信息，应该就在「细问魈魅踪迹，偏看收容一隅。铁鞋踏破不世，待问三堂深处」这一段了，你来试着抓抓重点？

*sigh* Back to square one... Anyway, the useful information should be in the paragraph "An inquiry into spirit traces, a glance into the site of storage. Even with iron shoes worn out unearthly, one has to visit the three depths." Can you see anything useful?
就是收容舱段的某处，我们目前找到的两个地方，都满足这样的条件……
It's somewhere in the Storage Zone. The two places we've found so far both meet these conditions...
简单的动宾结构，重点应该放在宾语上…等一等，这个「不世」听起来确实有些耳熟。
In this sentence structure, the focus should be on the object... Wait a minute, "unearthly" does sound familiar.
{NICKNAME}，你觉得它跟「不世之材」会有关系吗？
{NICKNAME}, do you think Unearthly Marvel has anything to do with it?
嗯！我也这么觉得。所以这「铁鞋踏破不世」，指的就是需要经过由「不世之材」修建的道路吧。
Um! I think so, too. Therefore, this "iron shoes worn out unearthly" refers to passing through the road built by Unearthly Marvel.
你不记得了吗？我听辛克尔夫人说过，你曾经用「不世之材」帮她修复过重要的道路缺损……
Don't you remember? I heard from Mrs. Hinkel that you once used Unearthly Marvel to help her repair major road defects.
应该是刚到空间站的时候，那时空间站新来了个「爱管闲事的年轻人」的消息还传得沸沸扬扬呢。
I think it was when you first arrived at the space station. At the time, word of a "young busybody" was spreading around the space station.
所以这「铁鞋踏破不世」，指的就是需要经过由「不世之材」修建的道路吧？
So this "iron shoes worn out unearthly" refers to the road built by the Unearthly Marvel?
既然「踏破不世」是一重限制条件，那么按照直觉，「三堂深处」就应该是第二重条件。
Since "worn out unearthly" is a condition, then "the three depths" should be the second condition.
从字面上来说，指的应该是要经过三个房间的深处。
Literally, it means going through the depths of three rooms.
Why didn't you say this earlier...
嗯…也许是解开了「不世之材」，才突然福至心灵……
Well... Maybe it's the unraveling of the Unearthly Marvel that suddenly sparked my realization...
应该是吧…字谜这东西就和魔术揭秘一样，一旦知道了谜底，就会觉得是对自己智识的侮辱，但这只是马后炮的错觉罢了……
I think so... Solving riddles is like solving magic tricks. Once you know the answer, you would think it's an insult to your intelligence, but that's just the illusion of hindsight.
所以如果密信揭露的是事实，那么水魈就藏在一个既有不世之材，又要经过三个房间的地方……
So if the letter is correct, the Xenohydro should be hiding in a place where there's Unearthly Marvel, but also you have to pass through three rooms to get there.
唉，如果{NICKNAME}还是坚持不肯放弃的话，那我就帮你帮到底吧。
*sigh* If you still insist on continuing, I'll help you to the end.
这一次，一定不会再失手了。
{NICKNAME}，你看，经过「不世之材」修复的道路，进入三个房间联通的最深处……
{NICKNAME}, look, after passing through the road that was repaired with Unearthly Marvel, we entered the deepest part where the three rooms are connected...
这就是所谓「三堂深处」…快进来吧！
This is the so-called "the three depths"... Come on in!
终于抓到你了，{NICKNAME}…或者我应该叫你，水魈才对呢？
I finally got you, {NICKNAME}... Or should I call you... Xenohydro!
还好我早有防备，早在几天前，{NICKNAME}就找到我，提醒我注意近期或有水魈流窜，没想到这么快你就送上门了。
Good thing I was on guard. As early as a few days ago, the real {NICKNAME} had already warned me that there may be a Xenohydro wreaking havoc in the near future. I didn't expect you to come so soon.
让我想想，把你干掉，绕过卡波特先生，交给艾丝妲小姐，这样的话，我就不用再当流水工了……
Let me see, I can just take care of you, bypass Mr. Capote and hand you over to Miss Asta, so I don't have to be a slave anymore...
我在说，绕了这么一大圈，我和{NICKNAME}终于抓到了你——贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」！
I'm saying that after all that, the real {NICKNAME} and I finally caught you, Xenohydro!
终于抓到了你，贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」。如果你不是，那倒是请你看看，站在那边的又是谁……
I've caught you, Xenohydro! If you are not Xenohydro, then who that is standing over there?
终于抓到了你，贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」。废话少说，要是不服气，尽管去和{NICKNAME}对峙吧。
I caught you, Xenohydro! Enough nonsense. If you're not convinced, sort it out with {NICKNAME}.
终于抓到你了，「异星水魈」，这次你可别想逃。
I finally caught you, Xenohydro. You won't get away this time.
我可不这么认为。你看，我们都是两只眼睛一个嘴巴，谈吐无异，气度相像。
I don't think so. You see, we both have two eyes and a mouth. We sound the same and act the same way.
考虑到现在没有第四个人在场，拉明娜认为谁是水魈，谁就是水魈。
Since there is no fourth person present, whoever Lamina thinks is the Xenohydro, is the Xenohydro.
这话我应该问你才对，我堂堂{NICKNAME}，「星穹列车」的正义成员，行走的星核容器……
I should be asking you that. I'm {NICKNAME}! The official crew member of the Astral Express, the walking Stellaron vessel...
力压「反物质军团」的无敌强手，银河驰名的冉冉新星，岂是你这水魈可以冒充的？
The invincible conqueror of the Antimatter Legion, the infamous rising star of the cosmos. Who do you think you are impersonating, Xenohydro?
你顶着我的脸，是不是为了享受我的好名声，方便在空间站内到处招摇撞骗？
Aren't you using my face to take advantage of my reputation so you can conduct scams in the space station?
People in the space station will believe me.
相信？多么廉价的词语。别说其他人，现在连拉明娜也不信你。
Believe? What a joke. Not even Lamina believes you right now, let alone the others.
我早就抢先一步提醒她，最近可能会有人冒充我找她套近乎，你说你不是水魈，有什么证据吗？
I warned her earlier that someone might pretend to be me to get close to her. Do you have any proof that you are not the Xenohydro?
棒球棍，那是什么？能够定义你究竟是谁的本体？还是全宇宙只此无二的神器？
Baseball bat... what's that? Can you use it to prove your identity? Or is it the only one of its kind in the universe?
嗯？你的本体不该是星核吗？竟然是一种外置的东西吗？
Huh? Isn't your body the Stellaron? So it's an external object?
你是星核容器也就罢了，竟然还有这样的宝贝，怎么跟之前空间站里那些拿了剧本的人似的，真够威风的……
I get it, you're the stellaron vessel, fine, but you even have this bad boy? Hey, it's like those guys with the scripts in the space station before. It's pretty cool.
